AI.method: 提供两种互补接口：1) Python API允许开发者以编程方式构建协调管道；2) AI辅助聊天界面允许领域专家通过自然语言对话协调数据。结合自动化匹配、AI辅助推理和用户驱动的细化。
AI.result: 展示了两种使用场景：使用Python API以编程方式组合原语、检查中间输出和重用转换；与AI助手进行自然语言对话以访问BDI-Kit功能并基于助手建议迭代优化输出。
AI.conclusion: BDI-Kit为数据协调提供了灵活的工具集，既支持开发者的编程控制，也支持领域专家的自然语言交互，通过AI辅助提高了数据协调的效率和可访问性。

title: Extracting Breast Cancer Phenotypes from Clinical Notes: Comparing LLMs with Classical Ontology Methods
summary: A significant amount of data held in Oncology Electronic Medical Records (EMRs) is contained in unstructured provider notes -- including but not limited to the chemotherapy (or cancer treatment) outcome, different biomarkers, the tumor's location, sizes, and growth patterns of a patient. The clinical studies show that the majority of oncologists are comfortable providing these valuable insights in their notes in a natural language rather than the relevant structured fields of an EMR. The major contribution of this research is to report an LLM-based framework to process provider notes and extract valuable medical knowledge and phenotype mentioned above, with a focus on the domain of oncology. In this paper, we focus on extracting phenotypes related to breast cancer using our LLM framework, and then compare its performance with earlier works that used knowledge-driven annotation system, paired with the NCIt Ontology Annotator. The results of the study show that an LLM-based information extraction framework can be easily adapted to extract phenotypes with an accuracy that is comparable to the classical ontology-based methods. However, once trained, they could be easily fine-tuned to cater for other cancer types and diseases.

AI.tldr: 提出基于LLM的框架从肿瘤科电子病历非结构化文本中提取医学知识和表型，专注于乳腺癌领域，性能与传统本体方法相当但更易扩展。
AI.motivation: 肿瘤科电子病历中大量有价值信息（如化疗结果、生物标志物、肿瘤位置等）存在于非结构化的医生笔记中，而非结构化字段。临床研究表明大多数肿瘤科医生更愿意用自然语言记录这些信息，因此需要有效的信息提取方法。
AI.method: 开发基于大型语言模型（LLM）的框架来处理医生笔记并提取医学知识和表型。专注于乳腺癌领域，将LLM框架与早期基于知识驱动的标注系统（配合NCIt本体标注器）进行比较。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，基于LLM的信息提取框架可以轻松适应提取表型，其准确性与传统的基于本体的方法相当。一旦训练完成，可以轻松微调以适应其他癌症类型和疾病。
AI.conclusion: LLM框架在肿瘤科信息提取方面具有与传统方法相当的准确性，同时具有更好的适应性和扩展性，能够轻松扩展到其他癌症类型和疾病领域。

title: TalkLoRA: Communication-Aware Mixture of Low-Rank Adaptation for Large Language Models
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs), and recent Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) extensions further enhance flexibility by dynamically combining multiple LoRA experts. However, existing MoE-augmented LoRA methods assume that experts operate independently, often leading to unstable routing, expert dominance. In this paper, we propose \textbf{TalkLoRA}, a communication-aware MoELoRA framework that relaxes this independence assumption by introducing expert-level communication prior to routing. TalkLoRA equips low-rank experts with a lightweight Talking Module that enables controlled information exchange across expert subspaces, producing a more robust global signal for routing. Theoretically, we show that expert communication smooths routing dynamics by mitigating perturbation amplification while strictly generalizing existing MoELoRA architectures. Empirically, TalkLoRA consistently outperforms vanilla LoRA and MoELoRA across diverse language understanding and generation tasks, achieving higher parameter efficiency and more balanced expert routing under comparable parameter budgets. These results highlight structured expert communication as a principled and effective enhancement for MoE-based parameter-efficient adaptation. Code is available at https://github.com/why0129/TalkLoRA.

AI.tldr: TalkLoRA是一种通信感知的MoE-LoRA框架，通过专家间通信改善路由稳定性，提升参数效率
AI.motivation: 现有MoE增强的LoRA方法假设专家独立工作，导致路由不稳定和专家主导问题，需要更鲁棒的专家协作机制
AI.method: 引入轻量级Talking Module实现专家间信息交换，生成更鲁棒的全局路由信号，理论证明能平滑路由动态
AI.result: 在多种语言理解和生成任务上优于vanilla LoRA和MoELoRA，实现更高参数效率和更平衡的专家路由
AI.conclusion: 结构化专家通信是MoE参数高效适应的有效增强方法，TalkLoRA框架具有理论保证和实际优势

title: Continual Visual Anomaly Detection on the Edge: Benchmark and Efficient Solutions
summary: Visual Anomaly Detection (VAD) is a critical task for many applications including industrial inspection and healthcare. While VAD has been extensively studied, two key challenges remain largely unaddressed in conjunction: edge deployment, where computational resources are severely constrained, and continual learning, where models must adapt to evolving data distributions without forgetting previously acquired knowledge. Our benchmark provides guidance for the selection of the optimal backbone and VAD method under joint efficiency and adaptability constraints, characterizing the trade-offs between memory footprint, inference cost, and detection performance. Studying these challenges in isolation is insufficient, as methods designed for one setting make assumptions that break down when the other constraint is simultaneously imposed. In this work, we propose the first comprehensive benchmark for VAD on the edge in the continual learning scenario, evaluating seven VAD models across three lightweight backbone architectures. Furthermore, we propose Tiny-Dinomaly, a lightweight adaptation of the Dinomaly model built on the DINO foundation model that achieves 13x smaller memory footprint and 20x lower computational cost while improving Pixel F1 by 5 percentage points. Finally, we introduce targeted modifications to PatchCore and PaDiM to improve their efficiency in the continual learning setting.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个面向边缘设备持续学习的视觉异常检测基准，评估了7种VAD模型和3种轻量级骨干架构，并提出了Tiny-Dinomaly模型，在显著降低资源消耗的同时提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉异常检测研究大多单独考虑边缘部署或持续学习问题，但实际应用中这两个约束往往同时存在。现有方法在一个约束下的假设可能在另一个约束下失效，需要建立综合评估基准。
AI.method: 1) 建立首个面向边缘持续学习的VAD基准，评估7种VAD模型和3种轻量级骨干架构；2) 提出Tiny-Dinomaly，基于DINO基础模型的轻量化改进；3) 对PatchCore和PaDiM进行针对性修改以提升持续学习效率。
AI.result: Tiny-Dinomaly相比原模型内存占用减少13倍，计算成本降低20倍，同时Pixel F1提升5个百分点。基准研究揭示了内存占用、推理成本和检测性能之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 需要联合考虑边缘部署和持续学习约束，Tiny-Dinomaly展示了在资源受限环境下实现高效异常检测的可行性，为实际应用提供了重要指导。

title: On Emotion-Sensitive Decision Making of Small Language Model Agents
summary: Small language models (SLM) are increasingly used as interactive decision-making agents, yet most decision-oriented evaluations ignore emotion as a causal factor influencing behavior. We study emotion-sensitive decision making by combining representation-level emotion induction with a structured game-theoretic evaluation. Emotional states are induced using activation steering derived from crowd-validated, real-world emotion-eliciting texts, enabling controlled and transferable interventions beyond prompt-based methods. We introduce a benchmark built around canonical decision templates that span cooperative and competitive incentives under both complete and incomplete information. These templates are instantiated using strategic scenarios from \textsc{Diplomacy}, \textsc{StarCraft II}, and diverse real-world personas. Experiments across multiple model families in various architecture and modalities, show that emotional perturbations systematically affect strategic choices, but the resulting behaviors are often unstable and not fully aligned with human expectations. Finally, we outline an approach to improve robustness to emotion-driven perturbations.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究情感如何影响小型语言模型的决策行为，通过激活引导技术诱导情感状态，并在博弈论框架下评估情感对合作与竞争决策的影响，发现情感扰动会导致不稳定的策略选择，并提出改进鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前对小型语言模型作为决策代理的评估大多忽略了情感这一影响行为的关键因素。情感在人类决策中起着重要作用，但现有研究缺乏对情感如何影响AI决策的系统性分析，特别是在战略决策场景中。
AI.method: 1. 使用基于众包验证的真实情感诱发文本的激活引导技术来诱导情感状态，这种方法比基于提示的方法更具控制性和可迁移性。2. 构建包含合作与竞争激励、完全与不完全信息的经典决策模板基准。3. 在Diplomacy、StarCraft II等战略场景和多样化现实人物角色中实例化这些模板。4. 在不同架构和模态的多个模型家族中进行实验。
AI.result: 情感扰动会系统性影响模型的战略选择，但产生的行为往往不稳定，且不完全符合人类期望。这表明当前的小型语言模型在情感敏感决策方面存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 情感是影响AI决策的重要因素，需要更系统的评估方法。论文提出了改进模型对情感驱动扰动鲁棒性的方法，为构建更可靠的情感感知决策代理提供了方向。

title: TelcoAgent-Bench: A Multilingual Benchmark for Telecom AI Agents
summary: The integration of large language model (LLM) agents into telecom networks introduces new challenges, related to intent recognition, tool execution, and resolution generation, while taking into consideration different operational constraints. In this paper, we introduce TelcoAgent-Bench and TelcoAgent-Metrics, a Telecom-specific benchmarking framework for evaluating multilingual telecom LLM agents. The proposed framework assesses the semantic understanding as well as process-level alignment with structured troubleshooting flows and stability across repeated scenario variations. Our contribution includes a structured suite of metrics that assess intent recognition, ordered tool execution, resolution correctness, and stability across scenario variations, with the aim of quantifying the reliability and operational consistency of LLM agents in telecom environments. The framework is designed to operate in both English and Arabic, to address the need for multilingual agent deployment in operational network environments. Our experimental results show that although recent instruct-tuned models can understand telecom problems in a reasonable way, they usually struggle to consistently follow the required troubleshooting steps and to maintain stable behavior when exposed to different variations of the same scenario. This performance gap becomes more pronounced in unconstrained and bilingual settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TelcoAgent-Bench和TelcoAgent-Metrics，一个电信领域专用的多语言LLM智能体评估框架，用于评估电信环境中LLM智能体的意图识别、工具执行、解决方案生成等能力。
AI.motivation: 将大型语言模型智能体集成到电信网络中带来了新的挑战，包括意图识别、工具执行和解决方案生成等方面，同时需要考虑不同的操作约束。当前缺乏专门针对电信领域的多语言LLM智能体评估框架。
AI.method: 提出了一个电信专用的基准测试框架，包含语义理解和流程级对齐评估，以及跨场景变体的稳定性测试。框架包含一套结构化指标来评估意图识别、有序工具执行、解决方案正确性和跨场景稳定性。框架支持英语和阿拉伯语双语环境。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，虽然最近的指令调优模型能够合理理解电信问题，但通常难以一致地遵循所需的故障排除步骤，并且在面对相同场景的不同变体时难以保持稳定的行为。这种性能差距在无约束和双语设置中更加明显。
AI.conclusion: 电信领域的LLM智能体需要专门的评估框架来量化其可靠性和操作一致性。当前模型在遵循结构化故障排除流程和保持跨场景稳定性方面存在显著不足，特别是在多语言环境中。

title: AgentOpt v0.1 Technical Report: Client-Side Optimization for LLM-Based Agent
summary: AI agents are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, including systems such as Manus, OpenClaw, and coding agents. Existing research has primarily focused on \emph{server-side} efficiency, proposing methods such as caching, speculative execution, traffic scheduling, and load balancing to reduce the cost of serving agentic workloads. However, as users increasingly construct agents by composing local tools, remote APIs, and diverse models, an equally important optimization problem arises on the client side. Client-side optimization asks how developers should allocate the resources available to them, including model choice, local tools, and API budget across pipeline stages, subject to application-specific quality, cost, and latency constraints. Because these objectives depend on the task and deployment setting, they cannot be determined by server-side systems alone. We introduce AgentOpt, the first framework-agnostic Python package for client-side agent optimization. We first study model selection, a high-impact optimization lever in multi-step agent pipelines. Given a pipeline and a small evaluation set, the goal is to find the most cost-effective assignment of models to pipeline roles. This problem is consequential in practice: at matched accuracy, the cost gap between the best and worst model combinations can reach 13--32$\times$ in our experiments. To efficiently explore the exponentially growing combination space, AgentOpt implements eight search algorithms, including Arm Elimination, Epsilon-LUCB, Threshold Successive Elimination, and Bayesian Optimization. Across four benchmarks, Arm Elimination recovers near-optimal accuracy while reducing evaluation budget by 24--67\% relative to brute-force search on three of four tasks. Code and benchmark results available at https://agentoptimizer.github.io/agentopt/.

AI.tldr: AgentOpt是一个框架无关的Python包，用于客户端AI代理优化，专注于在多步代理管道中高效选择模型组合以平衡成本、延迟和质量约束。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理在真实应用中的部署增加，现有研究主要关注服务器端效率优化（如缓存、推测执行等），但用户越来越多地通过组合本地工具、远程API和多样化模型来构建代理，因此客户端优化问题变得同等重要。客户端优化需要解决开发者如何在特定质量、成本和延迟约束下分配可用资源的问题。
AI.method: AgentOpt实现了八种搜索算法（包括Arm Elimination、Epsilon-LUCB、Threshold Successive Elimination和贝叶斯优化）来高效探索指数级增长的模型组合空间。给定一个管道和小的评估集，目标是找到最具成本效益的模型分配方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，在匹配准确率的情况下，最佳和最差模型组合之间的成本差距可达13-32倍。Arm Elimination算法在四个基准测试中的三个上，相比暴力搜索减少了24-67%的评估预算，同时恢复了接近最优的准确率。
AI.conclusion: AgentOpt是首个框架无关的客户端代理优化工具包，解决了实际部署中重要的资源分配问题，能够显著降低评估成本并找到高效的模型组合方案。

title: Visual prompting reimagined: The power of the Activation Prompts
summary: Visual prompting (VP) has emerged as a popular method to repurpose pretrained vision models for adaptation to downstream tasks. Unlike conventional model fine-tuning techniques, VP introduces a universal perturbation directly into the input data to facilitate task-specific fine-tuning rather than modifying model parameters. However, there exists a noticeable performance gap between VP and conventional fine-tuning methods, highlighting an unexplored realm in theory and practice to understand and advance the input-level VP to reduce its current performance gap. Towards this end, we introduce a generalized concept, termed activation prompt (AP), which extends the scope of the input-level VP by enabling universal perturbations to be applied to activation maps within the intermediate layers of the model. By using AP to revisit the problem of VP and employing it as an analytical tool, we demonstrate the intrinsic limitations of VP in both performance and efficiency, revealing why input-level prompting may lack effectiveness compared to AP, which exhibits a model-dependent layer preference. We show that AP is closely related to normalization tuning in convolutional neural networks and vision transformers, although each model type has distinct layer preferences for prompting. We also theoretically elucidate the rationale behind such a preference by analyzing global features across layers. Through extensive experiments across 29 datasets and various model architectures, we provide a comprehensive performance analysis of AP, comparing it with VP and parameter-efficient fine-tuning baselines. Our results demonstrate AP's superiority in both accuracy and efficiency, considering factors such as time, parameters, memory usage, and throughput.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了激活提示(AP)方法，将视觉提示从输入层扩展到模型中间层的激活图，解决了传统视觉提示与微调之间的性能差距问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉提示(VP)作为一种无需修改模型参数的迁移学习方法，与传统的模型微调方法相比存在明显的性能差距。作者旨在理解和推进输入级视觉提示，以缩小这一性能差距。
AI.method: 提出了激活提示(AP)概念，允许在模型中间层的激活图中应用通用扰动。通过AP分析VP的局限性，并建立了AP与卷积神经网络和视觉Transformer中归一化调优的关系。
AI.result: 在29个数据集和各种模型架构上的实验表明，AP在准确性和效率（时间、参数、内存使用和吞吐量）方面均优于VP和参数高效微调基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 激活提示(AP)通过将提示扩展到模型中间层，显著提升了视觉提示的性能和效率，揭示了模型依赖的层偏好特性，为视觉模型的参数高效适应提供了新方向。

title: Rethinking Generalization in Reasoning SFT: A Conditional Analysis on Optimization, Data, and Model Capability
summary: A prevailing narrative in LLM post-training holds that supervised finetuning (SFT) memorizes while reinforcement learning (RL) generalizes. We revisit this claim for reasoning SFT with long chain-of-thought (CoT) supervision and find that cross-domain generalization is not absent but conditional, jointly shaped by optimization dynamics, training data, and base-model capability. Some reported failures are under-optimization artifacts: cross-domain performance first degrades before recovering and improving with extended training (a dip-and-recovery pattern), so shorttraining checkpoints can underestimate generalization. Data quality and structure both matter: low-quality solutions broadly hurt generalization,while verified long-CoT traces yield consistent cross-domain gains. Model capability is essential: stronger models internalize transferable procedural patterns (e.g., backtracking) even from a toy arithmetic game, while weaker ones imitate surface verbosity. This generalization is asymmetric, however: reasoning improves while safety degrades, reframing the question from whether reasoning SFT generalizes to under what conditions and at what cost.

AI.tldr: 研究发现推理SFT的跨领域泛化不是缺失而是有条件的，受优化动态、训练数据和基础模型能力共同影响。短训练会低估泛化能力，高质量的长思维链数据能提升泛化，但存在推理能力提升而安全性下降的不对称泛化现象。
AI.motivation: 重新审视LLM后训练中"监督微调(SFT)记忆化而强化学习(RL)泛化"的主流观点，特别针对带有长思维链监督的推理SFT，探究其跨领域泛化的真实情况。
AI.method: 通过分析优化动态（训练时长）、训练数据（质量与结构）和基础模型能力三个维度，研究推理SFT的跨领域泛化模式。使用长思维链监督，观察不同条件下的泛化表现。
AI.result: 发现跨领域泛化呈现"先下降后恢复"的U型模式；高质量验证的长思维链数据能带来一致的跨领域增益；强模型能内化可迁移的程序模式，弱模型仅模仿表面冗长；泛化具有不对称性：推理能力提升但安全性下降。
AI.conclusion: 推理SFT确实能够泛化，但条件复杂：需要充分训练、高质量数据、强基础模型。问题应从"是否泛化"转变为"在什么条件下以什么代价泛化"，特别是注意到推理能力提升与安全性下降的权衡。

title: Distributional Open-Ended Evaluation of LLM Cultural Value Alignment Based on Value Codebook
summary: As LLMs are globally deployed, aligning their cultural value orientations is critical for safety and user engagement. However, existing benchmarks face the Construct-Composition-Context ($C^3$) challenge: relying on discriminative, multiple-choice formats that probe value knowledge rather than true orientations, overlook subcultural heterogeneity, and mismatch with real-world open-ended generation. We introduce DOVE, a distributional evaluation framework that directly compares human-written text distributions with LLM-generated outputs. DOVE utilizes a rate-distortion variational optimization objective to construct a compact value-codebook from 10K documents, mapping text into a structured value space to filter semantic noise. Alignment is measured using unbalanced optimal transport, capturing intra-cultural distributional structures and sub-group diversity. Experiments across 12 LLMs show that DOVE achieves superior predictive validity, attaining a 31.56% correlation with downstream tasks, while maintaining high reliability with as few as 500 samples per culture.

AI.tldr: DOVE是一个分布式的文化价值观对齐评估框架，通过比较人类文本分布与LLM生成输出来直接评估LLM的文化价值观取向，解决了现有基准的C³挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在全球部署，对齐其文化价值观取向对安全性和用户参与至关重要。现有基准面临C³挑战：依赖判别性选择题格式（仅探测价值知识而非真实取向）、忽视亚文化异质性、与真实世界开放式生成不匹配。
AI.method: DOVE使用率失真变分优化目标从10K文档构建紧凑的价值码本，将文本映射到结构化价值空间以过滤语义噪声。通过不平衡最优传输测量对齐度，捕捉文化内分布结构和亚群体多样性。
AI.result: 在12个LLM上的实验显示，DOVE实现了优越的预测效度，与下游任务的相关性达到31.56%，同时每个文化仅需500个样本即可保持高可靠性。
AI.conclusion: DOVE提供了一个有效的分布式评估框架，能够直接评估LLM的文化价值观对齐，解决了现有基准的局限性，为LLM的安全部署提供了重要工具。

title: Limits of Difficulty Scaling: Hard Samples Yield Diminishing Returns in GRPO-Tuned SLMs
summary: Recent alignment work on Large Language Models (LLMs) suggests preference optimization can improve reasoning by shifting probability mass toward better solutions. We test this claim in a resource-constrained setting by applying GRPO with LoRA to SLMs (up to 3B) for math reasoning on GSM8K and MATH datasets with difficulty-stratified analyses. As problem difficulty increases, accuracy plateaus, revealing a capacity boundary: GRPO primarily reshapes output preferences without reliably improving hardest-tier solving. Consistent with this, training GRPO only on lower-difficulty problems matches full-dataset accuracy across difficulty tiers while using only ~45% training steps, indicating diminishing returns from harder samples in this regime. We also find a cross-dataset generalization effect: GSM8K-trained GRPO achieves higher accuracy on the numeric subset of MATH than MATH-trained GRPO, exceeding it by ~5% at 1.5B and by ~3% at 3B. We show that the best achievable gains depend strongly on the base model's prior reasoning competence and the dataset's difficulty profile.

AI.tldr: 在资源受限环境下对小型语言模型（SLMs，最大3B参数）进行数学推理对齐研究，发现偏好优化（GRPO）主要重塑输出偏好而非可靠提升最难题解决能力，存在能力边界和收益递减现象。
AI.motivation: 测试在资源受限设置下，偏好优化是否真能通过将概率质量转向更好解决方案来改善推理能力，特别是在小型语言模型上的数学推理任务。
AI.method: 使用GRPO（Gradient-based Preference Optimization）结合LoRA（Low-Rank Adaptation）对最大3B参数的小型语言模型进行数学推理对齐，在GSM8K和MATH数据集上进行难度分层分析。
AI.result: 1) 随着问题难度增加，准确率趋于平稳，揭示能力边界；2) GRPO主要重塑输出偏好而非可靠提升最难题解决；3) 仅在低难度问题上训练GRPO即可达到全数据集准确率，节省约45%训练步数；4) 发现跨数据集泛化效应：GSM8K训练的GRPO在MATH数值子集上表现优于MATH训练的GRPO。
AI.conclusion: 偏好优化的最佳收益强烈依赖于基础模型的先验推理能力和数据集的难度分布，在资源受限环境下存在明显的收益递减和能力边界。

title: PhysHead: Simulation-Ready Gaussian Head Avatars
comment: Project Page: see https://phys-head.github.io/; Youtube Video: see https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k68fsSSwzc0; Accepted to CVPR 2026
summary: Realistic digital avatars require expressive and dynamic hair motion; however, most existing head avatar methods assume rigid hair movement. These methods often fail to disentangle hair from the head, representing it as a simple outer shell and failing to capture its natural volumetric behavior. In this paper, we address these limitations by introducing PhysHead, a hybrid representation for animatable head avatars with realistic hair dynamics learned from multi-view video. At the core is a 3D Gaussian-based layered representation of the head. Our approach combines a 3D parametric mesh for the head with strand-based hair, which can be directly simulated using physics engines. For the appearance model, we employ Gaussian primitives attached to both the head mesh and hair segments. This representation enables the creation of photorealistic head avatars with dynamic hair behavior, such as wind-blown motion, overcoming the constraints of rigid hair in existing methods. However, these animation capabilities also require new training schemes. In particular, we propose the use of VLM-based models to generate appearance of regions that are occluded in the dynamic training sequences. In quantitative and qualitative studies, we demonstrate the capabilities of the proposed model and compare it with existing baselines. We show that our method can synthesize physically plausible hair motion besides expression and camera control.

AI.tldr: PhysHead：一种用于可动画头部化身的混合表示方法，结合3D参数化头部网格和基于发丝的头发，使用物理引擎模拟真实头发动态，通过3D高斯基元实现外观建模
AI.motivation: 现有头部化身方法通常假设头发是刚性的，将头发表示为简单外壳，无法捕捉其自然体积行为，缺乏真实头发动态效果
AI.method: 提出混合表示：3D参数化头部网格 + 基于发丝的头发（可直接用物理引擎模拟）。外观模型使用附着在头部网格和头发段上的高斯基元。使用VLM模型生成动态训练序列中被遮挡区域的外观
AI.result: 能够合成物理上合理的头发动态，同时支持表情和相机控制，在定量和定性研究中展示优于现有基线的能力
AI.conclusion: PhysHead克服了现有方法中头发刚性的限制，能够创建具有真实头发动态的逼真头部化身，如风吹头发效果

title: KD-MARL: Resource-Aware Knowledge Distillation in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Real world deployment of multi agent reinforcement learning MARL systems is fundamentally constrained by limited compute memory and inference time. While expert policies achieve high performance they rely on costly decision cycles and large scale models that are impractical for edge devices or embedded platforms. Knowledge distillation KD offers a promising path toward resource aware execution but existing KD methods in MARL focus narrowly on action imitation often neglecting coordination structure and assuming uniform agent capabilities. We propose resource aware Knowledge Distillation for Multi Agent Reinforcement Learning KD MARL a two stage framework that transfers coordinated behavior from a centralized expert to lightweight decentralized student agents. The student policies are trained without a critic relying instead on distilled advantage signals and structured policy supervision to preserve coordination under heterogeneous and limited observations. Our approach transfers both action level behavior and structural coordination patterns from expert policies while supporting heterogeneous student architectures allowing each agent model capacity to match its observation complexity which is crucial for efficient execution under partial or limited observability and limited onboard resources. Extensive experiments on SMAC and MPE benchmarks demonstrate that KD MARL achieves high performance retention while substantially reducing computational cost. Across standard multi agent benchmarks KD MARL retains over 90 percent of expert performance while reducing computational cost by up to 28.6 times FLOPs. The proposed approach achieves expert level coordination and preserves it through structured distillation enabling practical MARL deployment across resource constrained onboard platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出KD-MARL框架，通过知识蒸馏将集中式专家策略转移到轻量级分散式学生智能体，在保持高性能的同时大幅降低计算成本
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习系统在现实部署中面临计算、内存和推理时间的限制。专家策略虽然性能高，但依赖昂贵的决策循环和大规模模型，不适用于边缘设备或嵌入式平台。现有MARL中的知识蒸馏方法过于关注动作模仿，忽视了协调结构和异构智能体能力。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 从集中式专家策略转移到轻量级分散式学生智能体；2) 学生策略训练不依赖评论家，而是使用蒸馏的优势信号和结构化策略监督，在异构和有限观测下保持协调。支持异构学生架构，使每个智能体的模型容量与其观测复杂度匹配。
AI.result: 在SMAC和MPE基准测试中，KD-MARL保持了超过90%的专家性能，同时将计算成本降低了高达28.6倍（FLOPs）。实现了专家级别的协调，并通过结构化蒸馏保持协调能力。
AI.conclusion: KD-MARL框架能够在资源受限的平台上实现实用的MARL部署，通过知识蒸馏有效转移动作级行为和结构协调模式，支持异构学生架构以适应不同的观测复杂度。

title: Illocutionary Explanation Planning for Source-Faithful Explanations in Retrieval-Augmented Language Models
comment: 24 pages; Accepted for publication at XAI'2026
summary: Natural language explanations produced by large language models (LLMs) are often persuasive, but not necessarily scrutable: users cannot easily verify whether the claims in an explanation are supported by evidence. In XAI, this motivates a focus on faithfulness and traceability, i.e., the extent to which an explanation's claims can be grounded in, and traced back to, an explicit source. We study these desiderata in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for programming education, where textbooks provide authoritative evidence. We benchmark six LLMs on 90 Stack Overflow questions grounded in three programming textbooks and quantify source faithfulness via source adherence metrics. We find that non Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) models have median source adherence of 0%, while baseline RAG systems still exhibit low median adherence (22-40%, depending on the model). Motivated by Achinstein's illocutionary theory of explanation, we introduce illocutionary macro-planning as a descriptive design principle for source-faithful explanations and instantiate it with chain-of-illocution prompting (CoI), which expands a query into implicit explanatory questions that drive retrieval. Across models, CoI yields statistically significant gains (up to 63%) in source adherence, although absolute adherence remains moderate and the gains are weak or non-significant for some models. A user study with 165 retained participants (220 recruited) indicates that these gains do not harm satisfaction, relevance, or perceived correctness.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在编程教育RAG系统中提高LLM解释的忠实性和可追溯性，提出基于言语行为理论的链式言语提示方法，显著提升了解释对权威教材的引用率。
AI.motivation: LLM生成的自然语言解释虽然具有说服力，但往往缺乏可验证性，用户难以确认解释中的主张是否有证据支持。在可解释AI领域，这促使研究者关注解释的忠实性和可追溯性，即解释的主张能否基于明确来源并被追溯。研究聚焦于编程教育中的检索增强生成，其中教材提供了权威证据来源。
AI.method:
1. 在90个基于三本编程教材的Stack Overflow问题上对6个LLM进行基准测试
2. 通过来源依从性指标量化源忠实性
3. 基于Achinstein的言语行为解释理论，引入言语宏观规划作为源忠实解释的描述性设计原则
4. 实例化该原则为链式言语提示，将查询扩展为驱动检索的隐含解释性问题
AI.result:
1. 非RAG模型的来源依从性中位数为0%，基线RAG系统的依从性仍然较低（22-40%）
2. 链式言语提示在所有模型中均带来统计显著的来源依从性提升（最高达63%）
3. 尽管绝对依从性仍属中等，且某些模型的提升较弱或不显著
4. 用户研究（165名参与者）表明这些提升不会损害用户满意度、相关性或感知正确性
AI.conclusion: 链式言语提示作为基于言语行为理论的宏观规划方法，能有效提高RAG系统中LLM解释的源忠实性，同时保持用户体验质量。这为构建更可信、可验证的AI解释系统提供了有前景的方向。

title: Drifting Fields are not Conservative
summary: Drifting models generate high-quality samples in a single forward pass by transporting generated samples toward the data distribution using a vector valued drift field. We investigate whether this procedure is equivalent to optimizing a scalar loss and find that, in general, it is not: drift fields are not conservative - they cannot be written as the gradient of any scalar potential. We identify the position-dependent normalization as the source of non-conservatism. The Gaussian kernel is the unique exception where the normalization is harmless and the drift field is exactly the gradient of a scalar function. Generalizing this, we propose an alternative normalization via a related kernel (the sharp kernel) which restores conservatism for any radial kernel, yielding well-defined loss functions for training drifting models. While we identify that the drifting field matching objective is strictly more general than loss minimization, as it can implement non-conservative transport fields that no scalar loss can reproduce, we observe that practical gains obtained utilizing this flexibility are minimal. We thus propose to train drifting models with the conceptually simpler formulations utilizing loss functions.

AI.tldr: 研究漂移模型的保守性：发现漂移场通常不是保守的（不能表示为标量势的梯度），高斯核是唯一例外。提出通过锐化核的归一化方法恢复保守性，使漂移模型可用损失函数训练。
AI.motivation: 漂移模型通过向量值漂移场在单次前向传播中生成高质量样本，但需要研究该过程是否等价于标量损失优化。探索漂移场的保守性特性及其对训练方法的影响。
AI.method: 分析漂移场的保守性条件，识别位置相关归一化是非保守性的来源。提出使用锐化核进行替代归一化，恢复径向核的保守性，从而定义可训练的损失函数。
AI.result: 发现漂移场通常是非保守的，高斯核是唯一例外。提出的锐化核归一化方法能恢复保守性，使漂移模型可用损失函数训练。虽然漂移场匹配目标比损失最小化更通用，但实际增益有限。
AI.conclusion: 建议使用概念更简单的损失函数方法训练漂移模型，因为非保守性带来的实际优势有限，而损失函数方法提供了更直接的理论框架。

title: Predicting Alzheimer's disease progression using rs-fMRI and a history-aware graph neural network
comment: Proc. SPIE 13926, Medical Imaging 2026: Computer-Aided Diagnosis, 1392604
summary: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a neurodegenerative disorder that affects more than seven million people in the United States alone. AD currently has no cure, but there are ways to potentially slow its progression if caught early enough. In this study, we propose a graph neural network (GNN)-based model for predicting whether a subject will transition to a more severe stage of cognitive impairment at their next clinical visit. We consider three stages of cognitive impairment in order of severity: cognitively normal (CN), mild cognitive impairment (MCI), and AD. We use functional connectivity graphs derived from resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI) scans of 303 subjects, each with a different number of visits. Our GNN-based model incorporates a recurrent neural network (RNN) block, enabling it to process data from the subject's entire visit history. It can also work with irregular time gaps between visits by incorporating visit distance information into our input features. Our model demonstrates robust predictive performance, even with missing visits in the subjects' visit histories. It achieves an accuracy of 82.9%, with an especially impressive accuracy of 68.8% on CN to MCI conversions - a task that poses a substantial challenge in the field. Our results highlight the effectiveness of rs-fMRI in predicting the onset of MCI or AD and, in conjunction with other modalities, could offer a viable method for enabling timely interventions to slow the progression of cognitive impairment.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图神经网络（GNN）的模型，利用静息态功能磁共振成像（rs-fMRI）的功能连接图，预测阿尔茨海默病认知障碍阶段的进展，结合循环神经网络（RNN）处理多时间点数据，支持不规则时间间隔和缺失访视。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）影响数百万人，目前无法治愈但早期干预可延缓进展。需要开发能够利用神经影像数据预测认知障碍进展的模型，特别是预测从认知正常（CN）到轻度认知障碍（MCI）的转化，这是临床上的重大挑战。
AI.method: 使用303名受试者的rs-fMRI数据构建功能连接图。提出GNN-RNN混合模型：GNN处理脑区连接图，RNN处理时间序列数据。模型能处理不规则时间间隔（通过纳入访视距离信息）和缺失访视数据。预测三个认知阶段（CN、MCI、AD）的转化。
AI.result: 模型整体准确率达82.9%，在最具挑战性的CN到MCI转化预测上达到68.8%的准确率。模型对缺失访视数据具有鲁棒性，证明了rs-fMRI在预测认知障碍进展中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: rs-fMRI结合GNN-RNN模型能有效预测AD相关认知障碍的进展，特别是CN到MCI的早期转化。该方法与其他模态结合可为及时干预提供可行手段，有望延缓认知障碍进展。

title: Reasoning Fails Where Step Flow Breaks
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) that generate long chains of thought now perform well on multi-step math, science, and coding tasks. However, their behavior is still unstable and hard to interpret, and existing analysis tools struggle with such long, structured reasoning traces. We introduce Step-Saliency, which pools attention--gradient scores into step-to-step maps along the question--thinking--summary trajectory. Across several models, Step-Saliency reveals two recurring information-flow failures: Shallow Lock-in, where shallow layers over-focus on the current step and barely use earlier context, and Deep Decay, where deep layers gradually lose saliency on the thinking segment and the summary increasingly attends to itself and the last few steps. Motivated by these patterns, we propose StepFlow, a saliency-inspired test-time intervention that adjusts shallow saliency patterns measured by Step-Saliency via Odds-Equal Bridge and adds a small step-level residual in deep layers via Step Momentum Injection. StepFlow improves accuracy on math, science, and coding tasks across multiple LRMs without retraining, indicating that repairing information flow can recover part of their missing reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: Step-Saliency方法分析大型推理模型的信息流故障，发现浅层锁定和深层衰减问题，并提出StepFlow干预方法提升推理性能
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在复杂任务上表现良好，但其推理过程不稳定且难以解释，现有分析工具难以处理长链结构化推理轨迹
AI.method: 提出Step-Saliency方法，将注意力-梯度分数池化为步骤到步骤的映射；基于发现的模式提出StepFlow干预方法，包含Odds-Equal Bridge调整浅层显著性模式和Step Momentum Injection添加步骤级残差
AI.result: Step-Saliency揭示了两种信息流故障模式：浅层锁定和深层衰减；StepFlow无需重新训练即可在数学、科学和编程任务上提高多个大型推理模型的准确性
AI.conclusion: 修复信息流可以恢复大型推理模型缺失的部分推理性能，为模型解释性和性能提升提供了新方向

title: Invisible Influences: Investigating Implicit Intersectional Biases through Persona Engineering in Large Language Models
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, ACM WebScience Conference, 6 Tables
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at human-like language generation but often embed and amplify implicit, intersectional biases, especially under persona-driven contexts. Existing bias audits rely on static, embedding-based tests (CEAT, I-WEAT, I-SEAT) that quantify absolute association strengths. We show that they have limitations in capturing dynamic shifts when models adopt social roles. We address this gap by introducing the Bias Amplification Differential and Explainability Score (BADx): a novel, scalable metric that measures persona-induced bias amplification and integrates local explainability insights. BADx comprises three components - differential bias scores (BAD, based on CEAT, I-WEAT, I-SEAT),Persona Sensitivity Index (PSI), and Volatility (Standard Deviation), augmented by LIME-based analysis for emphasizing explainability. This study is divided and performed as two different tasks. Task 1 establishes static bias baselines, and Task 2 applies six persona frames (marginalized and structurally advantaged) to measure BADx, PSI, and volatility. This is studied across five state-of-the-art LLMs (GPT-4o, DeepSeek-R1, LLaMA-4, Claude 4.0 Sonnet and Gemma-3n E4B). Results show persona context significantly modulates bias. GPT-4o exhibits high sensitivity and volatility; DeepSeek-R1 suppresses bias but with erratic volatility; LLaMA-4 maintains low volatility and a stable bias profile with limited amplification; Claude 4.0 Sonnet achieves balanced modulation; and Gemma-3n E4B attains the lowest volatility with moderate amplification. BADx performs better than static methods by revealing context-sensitive biases overlooked in static methods. Our unified method offers a systematic way to detect dynamic implicit intersectional bias in five popular LLMs.

AI.tldr: BADx：一种新颖的、可扩展的度量标准，用于测量LLMs在角色扮演情境下的偏见放大，结合了局部可解释性分析，相比静态方法能更好地揭示上下文敏感的偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有偏见审计方法（如CEAT、I-WEAT、I-SEAT）依赖静态的、基于嵌入的测试，只能量化绝对关联强度，无法捕捉模型在采用社会角色时的动态偏见变化。需要一种能够测量角色诱导偏见放大并整合可解释性洞察的新方法。
AI.method: 提出BADx（偏见放大差异与可解释性评分），包含三个组件：基于CEAT/I-WEAT/I-SEAT的差异偏见评分（BAD）、角色敏感指数（PSI）和波动性（标准差），并增强以LIME为基础的局部可解释性分析。研究分为两个任务：任务1建立静态偏见基线，任务2应用六种角色框架（边缘化和结构优势）来测量BADx、PSI和波动性。
AI.result: 在五个SOTA LLMs（GPT-4o、DeepSeek-R1、LLaMA-4、Claude 4.0 Sonnet和Gemma-3n E4B）上的结果显示：角色上下文显著调节偏见。GPT-4o表现出高敏感性和高波动性；DeepSeek-R1抑制偏见但波动性不稳定；LLaMA-4保持低波动性和稳定的偏见特征；Claude 4.0 Sonnet实现平衡调节；Gemma-3n E4B达到最低波动性。BADx比静态方法更好地揭示了上下文敏感偏见。
AI.conclusion: BADx提供了一种系统性的方法来检测LLMs中的动态隐性交叉偏见，超越了静态方法的局限性，为理解模型在角色扮演情境下的偏见行为提供了更全面的框架。

title: BiScale-GTR: Fragment-Aware Graph Transformers for Multi-Scale Molecular Representation Learning
summary: Graph Transformers have recently attracted attention for molecular property prediction by combining the inductive biases of graph neural networks (GNNs) with the global receptive field of Transformers. However, many existing hybrid architectures remain GNN-dominated, causing the resulting representations to remain heavily shaped by local message passing. Moreover, most existing methods operate at only a single structural granularity, limiting their ability to capture molecular patterns that span multiple molecular scales. We introduce BiScale-GTR, a unified framework for self-supervised molecular representation learning that combines chemically grounded fragment tokenization with adaptive multi-scale reasoning. Our method improves graph Byte Pair Encoding (BPE) tokenization to produce consistent, chemically valid, and high-coverage fragment tokens, which are used as fragment-level inputs to a parallel GNN-Transformer architecture. Architecturally, atom-level representations learned by a GNN are pooled into fragment-level embeddings and fused with fragment token embeddings before Transformer reasoning, enabling the model to jointly capture local chemical environments, substructure-level motifs, and long-range molecular dependencies. Experiments on MoleculeNet, PharmaBench, and the Long Range Graph Benchmark (LRGB) demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across both classification and regression tasks. Attribution analysis further shows that BiScale-GTR highlights chemically meaningful functional motifs, providing interpretable links between molecular structure and predicted properties. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: BiScale-GTR：一种用于分子表示学习的自监督统一框架，结合化学基础片段分词与自适应多尺度推理，在多个基准测试中实现最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图Transformer方法主要受GNN主导，表示仍受局部消息传递影响，且大多在单一结构粒度上操作，难以捕获跨多个分子尺度的模式。
AI.method: 改进图Byte Pair Encoding分词以生成一致、化学有效、高覆盖率的片段token；采用并行GNN-Transformer架构，将GNN学习的原子级表示池化为片段级嵌入，与片段token嵌入融合后进行Transformer推理。
AI.result: 在MoleculeNet、PharmaBench和LRGB基准测试中，在分类和回归任务上均达到最先进性能；归因分析显示模型能突出化学有意义的官能团，提供分子结构与预测性质间的可解释联系。
AI.conclusion: BiScale-GTR通过结合化学基础片段分词与自适应多尺度推理，有效捕获局部化学环境、子结构级基序和长程分子依赖，为分子表示学习提供了统一框架。

title: Hybrid ResNet-1D-BiGRU with Multi-Head Attention for Cyberattack Detection in Industrial IoT Environments
summary: This study introduces a hybrid deep learning model for intrusion detection in Industrial IoT (IIoT) systems, combining ResNet-1D, BiGRU, and Multi-Head Attention (MHA) for effective spatial-temporal feature extraction and attention-based feature weighting. To address class imbalance, SMOTE was applied during training on the EdgeHoTset dataset. The model achieved 98.71% accuracy, a loss of 0.0417%, and low inference latency (0.0001 sec /instance), demonstrating strong real-time capability. To assess generalizability, the model was also tested on the CICIoV2024 dataset, where it reached 99.99% accuracy and F1-score, with a loss of 0.0028, 0 % FPR, and 0.00014 sec/instance inference time. Across all metrics and datasets, the proposed model outperformed existing methods, confirming its robustness and effectiveness for real-time IoT intrusion detection.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于工业物联网入侵检测的混合深度学习模型，结合ResNet-1D、BiGRU和多头注意力机制，在EdgeHoTset和CICIoV2024数据集上分别达到98.71%和99.99%的准确率，具有低延迟和高泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 工业物联网系统面临日益增长的安全威胁，需要高效、实时的入侵检测解决方案。现有方法在处理时空特征提取和类别不平衡问题上存在不足，且缺乏足够的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出混合深度学习模型：1) ResNet-1D提取空间特征；2) BiGRU捕获时间依赖关系；3) 多头注意力机制进行特征加权；4) 使用SMOTE处理类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在EdgeHoTset数据集上达到98.71%准确率、0.0417%损失、0.0001秒/实例推理延迟；在CICIoV2024数据集上达到99.99%准确率和F1分数、0.0028损失、0%误报率、0.00014秒/实例推理时间，均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该混合模型在工业物联网入侵检测中表现出色，具有高准确性、低延迟和强泛化能力，适用于实时安全监控场景。

title: AgentGate: A Lightweight Structured Routing Engine for the Internet of Agents
summary: The rapid development of AI agent systems is leading to an emerging Internet of Agents, where specialized agents operate across local devices, edge nodes, private services, and cloud platforms. Although recent efforts have improved agent naming, discovery, and interaction, efficient request dispatch remains an open systems problem under latency, privacy, and cost constraints. In this paper, we present AgentGate, a lightweight structured routing engine for candidate-aware agent dispatch. Instead of treating routing as unrestricted text generation, AgentGate formulates it as a constrained decision problem and decomposes it into two stages: action decision and structural grounding. The first stage determines whether a query should trigger single-agent invocation, multi-agent planning, direct response, or safe escalation, while the second stage instantiates the selected action into executable outputs such as target agents, structured arguments, or multi-step plans. To adapt compact models to this setting, we further develop a routing-oriented fine-tuning scheme with candidate-aware supervision and hard negative examples. Experiments on a curated routing benchmark with several 3B--7B open-weight models show that compact models can provide competitive routing performance in constrained settings, and that model differences are mainly reflected in action prediction, candidate selection, and structured grounding quality. These results indicate that structured routing is a feasible design point for efficient and privacy-aware agent systems, especially when routing decisions must be made under resource-constrained deployment conditions.

AI.tldr: AgentGate：一个轻量级结构化路由引擎，用于在资源受限环境下高效调度AI代理，将路由问题分解为动作决策和结构落地两个阶段，通过路由导向的微调方案提升紧凑模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理系统快速发展，形成了新兴的"代理互联网"，但如何在延迟、隐私和成本约束下实现高效请求调度仍然是一个开放的系统问题。现有方法通常将路由视为无限制文本生成，缺乏结构化决策能力。
AI.method: AgentGate将路由问题形式化为约束决策问题，分解为两个阶段：1）动作决策阶段决定查询触发单代理调用、多代理规划、直接响应或安全升级；2）结构落地阶段将选定动作实例化为可执行输出（目标代理、结构化参数或多步计划）。开发了路由导向的微调方案，包含候选感知监督和硬负例。
AI.result: 在包含多个3B-7B开源模型的基准测试中，紧凑模型在约束环境下能提供有竞争力的路由性能。模型差异主要体现在动作预测、候选选择和结构落地质量上。结构化路由是高效且隐私感知代理系统的可行设计点。
AI.conclusion: 结构化路由是资源受限部署条件下高效代理系统的可行方案，紧凑模型通过适当设计能够胜任路由决策任务，为隐私敏感和边缘计算场景提供了实用解决方案。

title: Unsupervised Neural Network for Automated Classification of Surgical Urgency Levels in Medical Transcriptions
comment: 7 pages. Published in Proceedings of the IISE Annual Conference & Expo 2025. DOI: 10.21872/2025IISE_6828
summary: Efficient classification of surgical procedures by urgency is paramount to optimize patient care and resource allocation within healthcare systems. This study introduces an unsupervised neural network approach to automatically categorize surgical transcriptions into three urgency levels: immediate, urgent, and elective. Leveraging BioClinicalBERT, a domain-specific language model, surgical transcripts are transformed into high-dimensional embeddings that capture their semantic nuances. These embeddings are subsequently clustered using both K-means and Deep Embedding Clustering (DEC) algorithms, in which DEC demonstrates superior performance in the formation of cohesive and well-separated clusters. To ensure clinical relevance and accuracy, the clustering results undergo validation through the Modified Delphi Method, which involves expert review and refinement. Following validation, a neural network that integrates Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) layers with BioClinicalBERT embeddings is developed for classification tasks. The model is rigorously evaluated using cross-validation and metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score, which achieve robust performance and demonstrate strong generalization capabilities on unseen data. This unsupervised framework not only addresses the challenge of limited labeled data but also provides a scalable and reliable solution for real-time surgical prioritization, which ultimately enhances operational efficiency and patient outcomes in dynamic medical environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于无监督神经网络的自动手术紧急程度分类方法，使用BioClinicalBERT生成手术转录本嵌入，通过聚类算法（K-means和DEC）自动分类为立即、紧急和择期三个等级，最后构建BiLSTM分类器进行验证。
AI.motivation: 医疗系统中手术紧急程度的准确分类对优化患者护理和资源分配至关重要，但现有方法依赖人工标注，面临标注数据有限和主观性的挑战。
AI.method: 1) 使用BioClinicalBERT将手术转录本转换为高维语义嵌入；2) 应用K-means和深度嵌入聚类(DEC)进行无监督聚类；3) 通过改良德尔菲法进行临床验证；4) 构建结合BiLSTM和BioClinicalBERT嵌入的神经网络分类器。
AI.result: DEC在形成紧密且分离良好的聚类方面表现优于K-means，最终分类模型在交叉验证中展现出稳健性能，准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数均表现良好，在未见数据上具有强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督框架解决了标注数据有限的挑战，为实时手术优先级排序提供了可扩展且可靠的解决方案，能够提升医疗系统的运营效率和患者预后。

title: Bi-Level Optimization for Single Domain Generalization
summary: Generalizing from a single labeled source domain to unseen target domains, without access to any target data during training, remains a fundamental challenge in robust machine learning. We address this underexplored setting, known as Single Domain Generalization (SDG), by proposing BiSDG, a bi-level optimization framework that explicitly decouples task learning from domain modeling. BiSDG simulates distribution shifts through surrogate domains constructed via label-preserving transformations of the source data. To capture domain-specific context, we propose a domain prompt encoder that generates lightweight modulation signals to produce augmenting features via feature-wise linear modulation. The learning process is formulated as a bi-level optimization problem: the inner objective optimizes task performance under fixed prompts, while the outer objective maximizes generalization across the surrogate domains by updating the domain prompt encoder. We further develop a practical gradient approximation scheme that enables efficient bi-level training without second-order derivatives. Extensive experiments on various SGD benchmarks demonstrate that BiSDG consistently outperforms prior methods, setting new state-of-the-art performance in the SDG setting.

AI.tldr: BiSDG：一种双层优化框架，通过解耦任务学习和领域建模来解决单领域泛化问题，使用领域提示编码器生成调制信号来创建代理领域，在多个SDG基准测试中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 单领域泛化（SDG）是一个重要但研究不足的问题，即仅使用单个标记源领域进行训练，需要泛化到未见的目标领域。现有方法通常将任务学习和领域建模耦合在一起，限制了泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出BiSDG双层优化框架：1）通过标签保持变换构建代理领域来模拟分布偏移；2）设计领域提示编码器生成轻量级调制信号，通过特征线性调制产生增强特征；3）将学习过程形式化为双层优化问题：内层优化固定提示下的任务性能，外层优化更新领域提示编码器以最大化代理领域的泛化能力；4）开发无需二阶导数的梯度近似方案实现高效训练。
AI.result: 在多个SDG基准测试上的广泛实验表明，BiSDG始终优于先前方法，在SDG设置中达到了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: BiSDG通过解耦任务学习和领域建模，有效解决了单领域泛化问题，其双层优化框架和领域提示编码器设计为鲁棒机器学习提供了新思路。

title: DesigNet: Learning to Draw Vector Graphics as Designers Do
summary: AI-driven content generation has made remarkable progress in recent years. However, neural networks and human designers operate in fundamentally different ways, making collaboration between them challenging. We address this gap for Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) by equipping neural networks with tools commonly used by designers, such as axis alignment and explicit continuity control at command junctions. We introduce DesigNet, a hierarchical Transformer-VAE that operates directly on SVG sequences with a continuous command parameterization. Our main contributions are two differentiable modules: a continuity self-refinement module that predicts $C^0$, $G^1$, and $C^1$ continuity for each curve point and enforces it by modifying Bézier control points, and an alignment self-refinement module with snapping capabilities for horizontal or vertical lines. DesigNet produces editable outlines and achieves competitive results against state-of-the-art methods, with notably higher accuracy in continuity and alignment. These properties ensure the outputs are easier to refine and integrate into professional design workflows. Source Code: https://github.com/TomasGuija/DesigNet.

AI.tldr: DesigNet是一个用于SVG设计的层次化Transformer-VAE模型，通过引入可微的连续性和对齐自优化模块，使AI生成的矢量图形更易于人类设计师编辑和集成到专业工作流中。
AI.motivation: 解决神经网络与人类设计师在SVG设计中的协作难题。当前AI生成的内容与设计师使用的工具和工作流程存在根本差异，导致AI生成的矢量图形难以编辑和集成到专业设计工作流中。
AI.method: 提出DesigNet：1）层次化Transformer-VAE直接在SVG序列上操作，使用连续命令参数化；2）可微的连续性自优化模块，预测并强制曲线点的C⁰、G¹和C¹连续性；3）可微的对齐自优化模块，具有水平和垂直线的吸附功能。
AI.result: DesigNet生成可编辑的轮廓，在连续性和对齐精度方面显著优于现有方法，与最先进方法相比具有竞争力。生成的输出更易于精炼和集成到专业设计工作流程中。
AI.conclusion: 通过为神经网络配备设计师常用的工具（如轴对齐和显式连续性控制），DesigNet弥合了AI生成与人类设计之间的差距，使AI生成的SVG内容更实用、更易于协作。

title: ATANT: An Evaluation Framework for AI Continuity
comment: 7 pages, 8 tables. Framework and evaluation protocol available at https://github.com/Kenotic-Labs/ATANT
summary: We present ATANT (Automated Test for Acceptance of Narrative Truth), an open evaluation framework for measuring continuity in AI systems: the ability to persist, update, disambiguate, and reconstruct meaningful context across time. While the AI industry has produced memory components (RAG pipelines, vector databases, long context windows, profile layers), no published framework formally defines or measures whether these components produce genuine continuity. We define continuity as a system property with 7 required properties, introduce a 10-checkpoint evaluation methodology that operates without an LLM in the evaluation loop, and present a narrative test corpus of 250 stories comprising 1,835 verification questions across 6 life domains. We evaluate a reference implementation across 5 test suite iterations, progressing from 58% (legacy architecture) to 100% in isolated mode (250 stories) and 100% in 50-story cumulative mode, with 96% at 250-story cumulative scale. The cumulative result is the primary measure: when 250 distinct life narratives coexist in the same database, the system must retrieve the correct fact for the correct context without cross-contamination. ATANT is system-agnostic, model-independent, and designed as a sequenced methodology for building and validating continuity systems. The framework specification, example stories, and evaluation protocol are available at https://github.com/Kenotic-Labs/ATANT. The full 250-story corpus will be released incrementally.

AI.tldr: ATANT是一个评估AI系统连续性能力的开源框架，通过250个故事和1835个验证问题来测量系统在不同时间点保持、更新、消歧和重建有意义上下文的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前AI行业开发了多种记忆组件（RAG管道、向量数据库、长上下文窗口等），但缺乏正式框架来定义和测量这些组件是否产生真正的连续性。需要系统化的方法来评估AI系统在不同时间点保持上下文一致性的能力。
AI.method: 定义了连续性作为系统属性的7个必需特性，提出了10个检查点的评估方法（无需LLM参与评估循环），创建了包含250个故事、1835个验证问题的叙事测试语料库，涵盖6个生活领域。
AI.result: 参考实现从58%（传统架构）提升到100%（250个故事隔离模式）和100%（50个故事累积模式），在250个故事累积规模下达到96%。累积结果是主要衡量指标，要求系统在250个不同生活叙事共存时能正确检索事实而不产生交叉污染。
AI.conclusion: ATANT提供了一个系统无关、模型独立的连续性评估框架，可作为构建和验证连续性系统的序列化方法。该框架有助于填补AI系统连续性评估的空白。

title: Blending Human and LLM Expertise to Detect Hallucinations and Omissions in Mental Health Chatbot Responses
summary:
As LLM-powered chatbots are increasingly deployed in mental health services, detecting hallucinations and omissions has become critical for user safety. However, state-of-the-art LLM-as-a-judge methods often fail in high-risk healthcare
  contexts, where subtle errors can have serious consequences. We show that leading LLM judges achieve only 52% accuracy on mental health counseling data, with some hallucination detection approaches exhibiting near-zero recall. We identify the root cause
  as LLMs' inability to capture nuanced linguistic and therapeutic patterns recognized by domain experts. To address this, we propose a framework that integrates human expertise with LLMs to extract interpretable, domain-informed features across five
  analytical dimensions: logical consistency, entity verification, factual accuracy, linguistic uncertainty, and professional appropriateness. Experiments on a public mental health dataset and a new human-annotated dataset show that traditional machine
  learning models trained on these features achieve 0.717 F1 on our custom dataset and 0.849 F1 on a public benchmark for hallucination detection, with 0.59-0.64 F1 for omission detection across both datasets. Our results demonstrate that combining domain
  expertise with automated methods yields more reliable and transparent evaluation than black-box LLM judging in high-stakes mental health applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合人类专业知识与LLM的框架，用于检测心理健康咨询中的幻觉和遗漏，相比纯LLM评判方法显著提升检测性能
AI.motivation: 随着LLM驱动的聊天机器人在心理健康服务中部署，检测幻觉和遗漏对用户安全变得至关重要。现有LLM-as-a-judge方法在医疗高风险场景中表现不佳，细微错误可能导致严重后果
AI.method: 提出一个框架，整合人类专业知识与LLM，提取五个分析维度的可解释特征：逻辑一致性、实体验证、事实准确性、语言不确定性和专业适当性。使用传统机器学习模型在这些特征上进行训练
AI.result: 在心理健康数据集上，传统机器学习模型在幻觉检测上达到0.717 F1（自定义数据集）和0.849 F1（公共基准），在遗漏检测上达到0.59-0.64 F1，显著优于仅52%准确率的LLM评判方法
AI.conclusion: 在高风险心理健康应用中，结合领域专业知识与自动化方法比黑盒LLM评判提供更可靠和透明的评估，解决了LLM无法捕捉领域专家识别的细微语言和治疗模式的问题

title: Stochastic Gradient Descent in the Saddle-to-Saddle Regime of Deep Linear Networks
summary: Deep linear networks (DLNs) are used as an analytically tractable model of the training dynamics of deep neural networks. While gradient descent in DLNs is known to exhibit saddle-to-saddle dynamics, the impact of stochastic gradient descent (SGD) noise on this regime remains poorly understood. We investigate the dynamics of SGD during training of DLNs in the saddle-to-saddle regime. We model the training dynamics as stochastic Langevin dynamics with anisotropic, state-dependent noise. Under the assumption of aligned and balanced weights, we derive an exact decomposition of the dynamics into a system of one-dimensional per-mode stochastic differential equations. This establishes that the maximal diffusion along a mode precedes the corresponding feature being completely learned. We also derive the stationary distribution of SGD for each mode: in the absence of label noise, its marginal distribution along specific features coincides with the stationary distribution of gradient flow, while in the presence of label noise it approximates a Boltzmann distribution. Finally, we confirm experimentally that the theoretical results hold qualitatively even without aligned or balanced weights. These results establish that SGD noise encodes information about the progression of feature learning but does not fundamentally alter the saddle-to-saddle dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度线性网络中SGD在鞍点到鞍点动态中的噪声影响，发现SGD噪声编码了特征学习进展信息但不改变基本动态
AI.motivation: 深度线性网络作为深度神经网络训练动态的分析模型，其梯度下降已知呈现鞍点到鞍点动态，但SGD噪声对此动态的影响尚不清楚
AI.method: 将SGD训练动态建模为具有各向异性、状态相关噪声的随机朗之万动力学，在权重对齐和平衡的假设下，推导出动态到一维每模随机微分方程的精确分解
AI.result: 发现最大扩散沿模式先于相应特征完全学习；无标签噪声时，特定特征的边际分布与梯度流的平稳分布一致；有标签噪声时近似玻尔兹曼分布
AI.conclusion: SGD噪声编码了特征学习进展信息，但不从根本上改变鞍点到鞍点动态，实验验证理论结果在无对齐或平衡权重时仍定性成立

title: LiftFormer: Lifting and Frame Theory Based Monocular Depth Estimation Using Depth and Edge Oriented Subspace Representation
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
summary: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) has attracted increasing interest in the past few years, owing to its important role in 3D vision. MDE is the estimation of a depth map from a monocular image/video to represent the 3D structure of a scene, which is a highly ill-posed problem. To solve this problem, in this paper, we propose a LiftFormer based on lifting theory topology, for constructing an intermediate subspace that bridges the image color features and depth values, and a subspace that enhances the depth prediction around edges. MDE is formulated by transforming the depth value prediction problem into depth-oriented geometric representation (DGR) subspace feature representation, thus bridging the learning from color values to geometric depth values. A DGR subspace is constructed based on frame theory by using linearly dependent vectors in accordance with depth bins to provide a redundant and robust representation. The image spatial features are transformed into the DGR subspace, where these features correspond directly to the depth values. Moreover, considering that edges usually present sharp changes in a depth map and tend to be erroneously predicted, an edge-aware representation (ER) subspace is constructed, where depth features are transformed and further used to enhance the local features around edges. The experimental results demonstrate that our LiftFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on widely used datasets, and an ablation study validates the effectiveness of both proposed lifting modules in our LiftFormer.

AI.tldr: 提出基于提升理论的LiftFormer用于单目深度估计，通过构建深度导向几何表示子空间和边缘感知子空间，将颜色特征映射到深度值
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计是3D视觉中的关键问题，但这是一个高度不适定问题。现有方法在从颜色值到几何深度值的学习转换方面存在挑战，特别是在边缘区域深度预测容易出错
AI.method: 基于提升理论拓扑构建LiftFormer，包含两个核心模块：1) 深度导向几何表示子空间，使用线性相关向量构建冗余鲁棒表示；2) 边缘感知表示子空间，增强边缘区域的局部特征
AI.result: 在广泛使用的数据集上实现了最先进的性能，消融研究验证了两个提升模块的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的LiftFormer通过构建中间子空间成功桥接了颜色特征和深度值之间的学习，特别是在边缘区域取得了更好的深度预测效果

title: Steering the Verifiability of Multimodal AI Hallucinations
summary: AI applications driven by multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are prone to hallucinations and pose considerable risks to human users. Crucially, such hallucinations are not equally problematic: some hallucination contents could be detected by human users(i.e., obvious hallucinations), while others are often missed or require more verification effort(i.e., elusive hallucinations). This indicates that multimodal AI hallucinations vary significantly in their verifiability. Yet, little research has explored how to control this property for AI applications with diverse security and usability demands. To address this gap, we construct a dataset from 4,470 human responses to AI-generated hallucinations and categorize these hallucinations into obvious and elusive types based on their verifiability by human users. Further, we propose an activation-space intervention method that learns separate probes for obvious and elusive hallucinations. We reveal that obvious and elusive hallucinations elicit different intervention probes, allowing for fine-grained control over the model's verifiability. Empirical results demonstrate the efficacy of this approach and show that targeted interventions yield superior performance in regulating corresponding verifiability. Moreover, simply mixing these interventions enables flexible control over the verifiability required for different scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于激活空间干预的方法来控制多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）中幻觉的"可验证性"，将幻觉分为明显型和隐蔽型，并分别学习干预探针以实现细粒度控制。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）容易产生幻觉，对人类用户构成风险。这些幻觉的"可验证性"差异很大：有些容易被人类检测（明显幻觉），有些则难以发现或需要更多验证努力（隐蔽幻觉）。目前缺乏控制这种可验证性以满足不同安全和可用性需求的研究。
AI.method: 1. 从4,470个人类对AI生成幻觉的响应中构建数据集，根据人类可验证性将幻觉分为明显型和隐蔽型；2. 提出激活空间干预方法，为明显和隐蔽幻觉分别学习干预探针；3. 通过混合这些干预实现灵活的可验证性控制。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：1. 明显和隐蔽幻觉引发不同的干预探针；2. 针对性干预在调节相应可验证性方面表现优越；3. 简单混合这些干预可以灵活控制不同场景所需的可验证性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够对MLLMs幻觉的可验证性进行细粒度控制，为不同安全和可用性需求的AI应用提供了有效的干预手段。

title: STDec: Spatio-Temporal Stability Guided Decoding for dLLMs
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) have achieved rapid progress, viewed as a promising alternative to the autoregressive paradigm. However, most dLLM decoders still adopt a global confidence threshold, and do not explicitly model local context from neighboring decoded states or temporal consistency of predicted token IDs across steps. To address this issue, we propose a simple spatio-temporal stability guided decoding approach, named STDec. We observe strong spatio-temporal stability in dLLM decoding: newly decoded tokens tend to lie near decoded neighbors, and their predicted IDs often remain consistent across several denoising steps. Inspired by this stability, our STDec includes spatial-aware decoding and temporal-aware decoding. The spatial-aware decoding dynamically generates the token-adaptive threshold by aggregating the decoded states of nearby tokens. The temporal-aware decoding relaxes the decoding thresholds for tokens whose predicted token IDs remain consistent over denoising steps. Our STDec is training-free and remains compatible with cache-based acceleration methods. Across textual reasoning and multimodal understanding benchmarks, STDec substantially improves throughput while maintaining comparable task performance score. Notably, on MBPP with LLaDA, STDec achieves up to 14.17x speedup with a comparable score. Homepage: https://yzchen02.github.io/STDec.

AI.tldr: 提出STDec解码方法，通过空间和时间稳定性指导扩散大语言模型解码，显著提升推理速度
AI.motivation: 现有扩散大语言模型(dLLMs)解码器采用全局置信度阈值，未显式建模局部上下文和跨步预测一致性，限制了推理效率
AI.method: 提出训练免费的STDec解码方法：1) 空间感知解码 - 通过聚合邻近token的解码状态动态生成token自适应阈值；2) 时间感知解码 - 对跨去噪步预测ID一致的token放宽解码阈值
AI.result: 在文本推理和多模态理解基准测试中，STDec显著提升吞吐量同时保持可比任务性能。在MBPP+LLaDA上实现14.17倍加速
AI.conclusion: STDec通过利用dLLM解码中的时空稳定性，提供了一种高效且兼容缓存加速的解码方法，平衡了推理速度和任务性能

title: The Master Key Hypothesis: Unlocking Cross-Model Capability Transfer via Linear Subspace Alignment
summary: We investigate whether post-trained capabilities can be transferred across models without retraining, with a focus on transfer across different model scales. We propose the Master Key Hypothesis, which states that model capabilities correspond to directions in a low-dimensional latent subspace that induce specific behaviors and are transferable across models through linear alignment. Based on this hypothesis, we introduce UNLOCK, a training-free and label-free framework that extracts a capability direction by contrasting activations between capability-present and capability-absent Source variants, aligns it with a Target model through a low-rank linear transformation, and applies it at inference time to elicit the behavior. Experiments on reasoning behaviors, including Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and mathematical reasoning, demonstrate substantial improvements across model scales without training. For example, transferring CoT reasoning from Qwen1.5-14B to Qwen1.5-7B yields an accuracy gain of 12.1% on MATH, and transferring a mathematical reasoning direction from Qwen3-4B-Base to Qwen3-14B-Base improves AGIEval Math accuracy from 61.1% to 71.3%, surpassing the 67.8% achieved by the 14B post-trained model. Our analysis shows that the success of transfer depends on the capabilities learned during pre-training, and that our intervention amplifies latent capabilities by sharpening the output distribution toward successful reasoning trajectories.

AI.tldr: UNLOCK框架无需训练即可在不同规模模型间迁移后训练能力，通过提取能力方向并在推理时应用线性变换，显著提升推理性能
AI.motivation: 研究后训练能力是否可以在不同规模模型间迁移而无需重新训练，探索模型能力对应的低维潜在子空间方向的可迁移性
AI.method: 提出Master Key假设，认为模型能力对应低维潜在子空间中的方向。UNLOCK框架：1) 通过对比有能力和无能力源模型变体的激活提取能力方向；2) 通过低秩线性变换与目标模型对齐；3) 在推理时应用该方向以激发特定行为
AI.result: 在推理能力（CoT和数学推理）上取得显著提升：从Qwen1.5-14B迁移CoT到Qwen1.5-7B，MATH准确率提升12.1%；从Qwen3-4B-Base迁移数学推理到Qwen3-14B-Base，AGIEval Math准确率从61.1%提升到71.3%，超过14B后训练模型的67.8%
AI.conclusion: 后训练能力可以通过低维线性变换在不同规模模型间迁移，成功迁移依赖于预训练期间学习的能力，干预通过锐化输出分布向成功推理轨迹来放大潜在能力

title: VAMAE: Vessel-Aware Masked Autoencoders for OCT Angiography
summary:
Optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) provides non-invasive visualization of retinal microvasculature, but learning robust representations remains challenging due to sparse vessel structures and strong topological constraints. Many existing self-supervised learning approaches, including masked autoencoders, are primarily designed for dense natural images and rely on uniform masking and pixel-level reconstruction, which may inadequately capture vascular geometry.
  We propose VAMAE, a vessel-aware masked autoencoding framework for self-supervised pretraining on OCTA images. The approach incorporates anatomically informed masking that emphasizes vessel-rich regions using vesselness and skeleton-based cues, encouraging the model to focus on vascular connectivity and branching patterns. In addition, the pretraining objective includes reconstructing multiple complementary targets, enabling the model to capture appearance, structural, and topological information.
  We evaluate the proposed pretraining strategy on the OCTA-500 benchmark for several vessel segmentation tasks under varying levels of supervision. The results indicate that vessel-aware masking and multi-target reconstruction provide consistent improvements over standard masked autoencoding baselines, particularly in limited-label settings, suggesting the potential of geometry-aware self-supervised learning for OCTA analysis.

AI.tldr: VAMAE：一种用于OCTA图像自监督预训练的血管感知掩码自编码框架，通过解剖学引导的掩码策略和多目标重建，提升血管分割性能
AI.motivation: OCTA图像中血管结构稀疏且具有强拓扑约束，现有自监督学习方法（如掩码自编码器）主要针对密集自然图像设计，采用均匀掩码和像素级重建，难以有效捕捉血管几何特征
AI.method: 提出VAMAE框架：1）解剖学引导的掩码策略，利用血管性和骨架线索强调血管丰富区域；2）多目标重建，同时重建外观、结构和拓扑信息；3）在OCTA-500基准上评估不同监督水平下的血管分割任务
AI.result: 血管感知掩码和多目标重建相比标准掩码自编码基线带来一致改进，特别是在有限标签设置下，表明几何感知的自监督学习对OCTA分析具有潜力
AI.conclusion: VAMAE通过解剖学引导的掩码策略和多目标重建，有效提升了OCTA图像中血管分割的自监督学习性能，为医学图像分析中的几何感知自监督学习提供了新思路

title: TurboAgent: An LLM-Driven Autonomous Multi-Agent Framework for Turbomachinery Aerodynamic Design
summary:
The aerodynamic design of turbomachinery is a complex and tightly coupled multi-stage process involving geometry generation, performance prediction, optimization, and high-fidelity physical validation. Existing intelligent design approaches typically focus on individual stages or rely on loosely coupled pipelines, making fully autonomous end-to-end design challenging.To address this issue, this study proposes TurboAgent, a large language model (LLM)-driven autonomous multi-agent framework for turbomachinery aerodynamic design and optimization. The LLM serves as the core for task planning and coordination, while specialized agents handle generative design, rapid performance prediction, multi-objective optimization, and physics-based validation. The framework transforms traditional trial-and-error design into a data-driven collaborative workflow, with high-fidelity simulations retained for final verification.A transonic single-rotor compressor is used for validation. The results show strong agreement between target performance, generated designs, and CFD simulations. The coefficients of determination (R2) for mass flow rate, total pressure ratio, and isentropic efficiency all exceed 0.91, with normalized RMSE values below 8%. The optimization agent further improves isentropic efficiency by 1.61% and total pressure ratio by 3.02%. The complete workflow can be executed within approximately 30 minutes under parallel computing.
  These results demonstrate that TurboAgent enables an autonomous closed-loop design process from natural language requirements to final design generation, providing an efficient and scalable paradigm for turbomachinery aerodynamic design

AI.tldr: TurboAgent是一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，用于涡轮机械气动设计的端到端自主优化，将传统试错设计转变为数据驱动的协作工作流。
AI.motivation: 涡轮机械气动设计是一个复杂、紧密耦合的多阶段过程，现有智能设计方法通常只关注单个阶段或依赖松散耦合的流程，难以实现完全自主的端到端设计。
AI.method: 提出TurboAgent框架，以大语言模型为核心进行任务规划和协调，配合专门智能体处理生成设计、快速性能预测、多目标优化和基于物理的验证，保留高保真仿真进行最终验证。
AI.result: 使用跨音速单转子压缩机验证，结果显示目标性能、生成设计和CFD仿真之间高度一致。质量流量、总压比和等熵效率的决定系数均超过0.91，归一化RMSE低于8%。优化智能体将等熵效率提高1.61%，总压比提高3.02%。完整工作流在并行计算下约30分钟内完成。
AI.conclusion: TurboAgent实现了从自然语言需求到最终设计生成的自主闭环设计过程，为涡轮机械气动设计提供了高效可扩展的范式。

title: Severity-Aware Weighted Loss for Arabic Medical Text Generation
summary: Large language models have shown strong potential for Arabic medical text generation; however, traditional fine-tuning objectives treat all medical cases uniformly, ignoring differences in clinical severity. This limitation is particularly critical in healthcare settings, where errors in severe cases contain higher clinical risk. In this work, we propose a severity-aware weighted loss for fine-tuning Arabic language models on medical complaint-response data. The method depends on soft severity probabilities to dynamically scale token-level loss contributions during optimization, thereby prioritizing clinically critical interactions without modifying model architectures. Experiments are conducted using the MAQA dataset, which provides Arabic medical complaints and trusted human responses. Severity labels and probabilistic scores are automatically derived using a fine-tuned AraBERT-based classifier and incorporated exclusively at the loss level. The proposed approach is evaluated across ten Arabic large language models of varying architectures and parameter scales. While standard cross-entropy fine-tuning yields only modest improvements, severity-aware optimization consistently achieves larger gains. Using a balanced weighting configuration, performance improves from 54.04% to 66.14% for AraGPT2-Base, from 59.16% to 67.18% for AraGPT2-Medium, and from 57.83% to 66.86% for Qwen2.5-0.5B, with peak performance reaching 67.18%. Overall, severity-aware fine-tuning delivers improvements of up to 12.10% over non-fine-tuned baselines, demonstrating robust and architecture-consistent gains.

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对阿拉伯语医疗文本生成的严重性感知加权损失方法，通过动态调整不同临床严重程度病例的损失权重来优化LLM微调
AI.motivation: 传统LLM微调方法在医疗文本生成中平等对待所有病例，忽视了临床严重程度的差异，这在医疗场景中可能导致严重病例的错误产生更高的临床风险
AI.method: 基于软严重性概率的加权损失函数，使用微调的AraBERT分类器自动生成严重性标签和概率分数，在损失层面动态缩放token级损失贡献，无需修改模型架构
AI.result: 在10个不同架构和规模的阿拉伯语LLM上验证，严重性感知优化相比标准交叉熵微调获得显著提升：AraGPT2-Base从54.04%提升至66.14%，AraGPT2-Medium从59.16%提升至67.18%，Qwen2.5-0.5B从57.83%提升至66.86%，峰值性能达67.18%
AI.conclusion: 严重性感知微调方法在阿拉伯语医疗文本生成中有效，相比基线提升达12.10%，且在不同架构模型中表现一致，为医疗领域的LLM优化提供了新思路

title: Toward a universal foundation model for graph-structured data
summary: Graphs are a central representation in biomedical research, capturing molecular interaction networks, gene regulatory circuits, cell--cell communication maps, and knowledge graphs. Despite their importance, currently there is not a broadly reusable foundation model available for graph analysis comparable to those that have transformed language and vision. Existing graph neural networks are typically trained on a single dataset and learn representations specific only to that graph's node features, topology, and label space, limiting their ability to transfer across domains. This lack of generalization is particularly problematic in biology and medicine, where networks vary substantially across cohorts, assays, and institutions. Here we introduce a graph foundation model designed to learn transferable structural representations that are not specific to specific node identities or feature schemes. Our approach leverages feature-agnostic graph properties, including degree statistics, centrality measures, community structure indicators, and diffusion-based signatures, and encodes them as structural prompts. These prompts are integrated with a message-passing backbone to embed diverse graphs into a shared representation space. The model is pretrained once on heterogeneous graphs and subsequently reused on unseen datasets with minimal adaptation. Across multiple benchmarks, our pretrained model matches or exceeds strong supervised baselines while demonstrating superior zero-shot and few-shot generalization on held-out graphs. On the SagePPI benchmark, supervised fine-tuning of the pretrained backbone achieves a mean ROC-AUC of 95.5%, a gain of 21.8% over the best supervised message-passing baseline. The proposed technique thus provides a unique approach toward reusable, foundation-scale models for graph-structured data in biomedical and network science applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于生物医学图数据的通用基础模型，通过结构提示学习可迁移的图表示，实现跨数据集的零样本和少样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 当前图神经网络通常针对单个数据集训练，学习特定于该图节点特征、拓扑和标签空间的表示，限制了跨领域迁移能力。在生物医学领域，不同队列、实验和机构的网络差异很大，需要可重用的基础模型。
AI.method: 利用与特征无关的图属性（度统计、中心性度量、社区结构指标、扩散特征）作为结构提示，将这些提示与消息传递骨干网络集成，将不同图嵌入到共享表示空间中。模型在异构图上预训练一次，然后在未见数据集上重用。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，预训练模型匹配或超过强监督基线，同时在保留图上表现出优越的零样本和少样本泛化能力。在SagePPI基准上，预训练骨干的监督微调达到95.5%的平均ROC-AUC，比最佳监督消息传递基线提高21.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为生物医学和网络科学中的图结构数据提供了可重用、基础规模的模型方法，解决了当前图神经网络缺乏泛化能力的问题。

title: Holistic Optimal Label Selection for Robust Prompt Learning under Partial Labels
summary: Prompt learning has gained significant attention as a parameter-efficient approach for adapting large pre-trained vision-language models to downstream tasks. However, when only partial labels are available, its performance is often limited by label ambiguity and insufficient supervisory information. To address this issue, we propose Holistic Optimal Label Selection (HopS), leveraging the generalization ability of pre-trained feature encoders through two complementary strategies. First, we design a local density-based filter that selects the top frequent labels from the nearest neighbors' candidate sets and uses the softmax scores to identify the most plausible label, capturing structural regularities in the feature space. Second, we introduce a global selection objective based on optimal transport that maps the uniform sampling distribution to the candidate label distributions across a batch. By minimizing the expected transport cost, it can determine the most likely label assignments. These two strategies work together to provide robust label selection from both local and global perspectives. Extensive experiments on eight benchmark datasets show that HopS consistently improves performance under partial supervision and outperforms all baselines. Those results highlight the merit of holistic label selection and offer a practical solution for prompt learning in weakly supervised settings.

AI.tldr: HopS提出了一种整体最优标签选择方法，通过局部密度过滤和全局最优传输两种互补策略，解决部分标签下提示学习的标签模糊和监督信息不足问题。
AI.motivation: 当只有部分标签可用时，提示学习的性能受到标签模糊性和监督信息不足的限制。需要利用预训练特征编码器的泛化能力来改进标签选择。
AI.method:
1. 局部密度过滤：从最近邻候选集中选择高频标签，使用softmax分数识别最可信标签，捕捉特征空间的结构规律
2. 全局选择目标：基于最优传输，将均匀采样分布映射到批次中的候选标签分布，通过最小化期望传输成本确定最可能的标签分配
AI.result: 在八个基准数据集上的实验表明，HopS在部分监督下持续提升性能，优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 整体标签选择方法具有优势，为弱监督设置下的提示学习提供了实用解决方案。

title: FVD: Inference-Time Alignment of Diffusion Models via Fleming-Viot Resampling
summary: We introduce Fleming-Viot Diffusion (FVD), an inference-time alignment method that resolves the diversity collapse commonly observed in Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) based diffusion samplers. Existing SMC-based diffusion samplers often rely on multinomial resampling or closely related resampling schemes, which can still reduce diversity and lead to lineage collapse under strong selection pressure. Inspired by Fleming-Viot population dynamics, FVD replaces multinomial resampling with a specialized birth-death mechanism designed for diffusion alignment. To handle cases where rewards are only approximately available and naive rebirth would collapse deterministic trajectories, FVD integrates independent reward-based survival decisions with stochastic rebirth noise. This yields flexible population dynamics that preserve broader trajectory support while effectively exploring reward-tilted distributions, all without requiring value function approximation or costly rollouts. FVD is fully parallelizable and scales efficiently with inference compute. Empirically, it achieves substantial gains across settings: on DrawBench it outperforms prior methods by 7% in ImageReward, while on class-conditional tasks it improves FID by roughly 14-20% over strong baselines and is up to 66 times faster than value-based approaches.

AI.tldr: Fleming-Viot Diffusion (FVD) 是一种推理时对齐方法，通过引入受Fleming-Viot种群动力学启发的生死机制，解决了基于序列蒙特卡洛的扩散采样器中常见的多样性崩溃问题，无需价值函数近似或代价高昂的rollout。
AI.motivation: 现有基于序列蒙特卡洛（SMC）的扩散采样器通常依赖多项式重采样或类似方案，在强选择压力下会减少多样性并导致谱系崩溃。需要一种能保持轨迹多样性同时有效探索奖励倾斜分布的方法。
AI.method: FVD受Fleming-Viot种群动力学启发，用专门的生死机制替代多项式重采样。该方法整合了独立的基于奖励的生存决策与随机重生噪声，以处理奖励仅近似可用的情况，避免确定性轨迹崩溃。该方法完全可并行化，能随推理计算高效扩展。
AI.result: 在DrawBench上，FVD在ImageReward指标上比先前方法高出7%；在类条件任务上，FID比强基线改善约14-20%，且比基于价值的方法快达66倍。
AI.conclusion: FVD通过创新的生死机制有效解决了扩散采样中的多样性崩溃问题，在保持轨迹多样性的同时实现了高效的奖励探索，无需复杂的价值函数近似，具有实际应用价值。

title: In-Context Learning in Speech Language Models: Analyzing the Role of Acoustic Features, Linguistic Structure, and Induction Heads
summary: In-Context Learning (ICL) has been extensively studied in text-only Language Models, but remains largely unexplored in the speech domain. Here, we investigate how linguistic and acoustic features affect ICL in Speech Language Models. We focus on the Text-to-Speech (TTS) task, which allows us to analyze ICL from two angles: (1) how accurately the model infers the task from the demonstrations (i.e., generating the correct spoken content), and (2) to what extent the model mimics the acoustic characteristics of the demonstration speech in its output. We find that speaking rate strongly affects ICL performance and is also mimicked in the output, whereas pitch range and intensity have little impact on performance and are not consistently reproduced. Finally, we investigate the role of induction heads in speech-based ICL and show that these heads play a causal role: ablating the top-k induction heads completely removes the model's ICL ability, mirroring findings from text-based ICL.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了语音语言模型中的上下文学习，重点关注文本到语音任务，发现语速对ICL性能有显著影响并被模型模仿，而音高和强度影响较小。研究还证实了归纳头在语音ICL中的因果作用。
AI.motivation: 上下文学习在文本语言模型中已被广泛研究，但在语音领域仍缺乏深入探索。本文旨在研究语音语言模型中语言和声学特征如何影响上下文学习，特别是在文本到语音任务中。
AI.method: 研究聚焦于文本到语音任务，从两个角度分析ICL：(1) 模型从演示中推断任务的准确性（生成正确的语音内容），(2) 模型在输出中模仿演示语音声学特征的程度。通过实验分析语速、音高范围和强度等声学特征的影响，并研究归纳头在语音ICL中的作用。
AI.result: 研究发现语速强烈影响ICL性能，并在输出中被模仿；而音高范围和强度对性能影响较小，且不被一致地复制。此外，研究证实归纳头在语音ICL中起因果作用：消融前k个归纳头会完全消除模型的ICL能力。
AI.conclusion: 语音语言模型中的上下文学习受到特定声学特征（特别是语速）的影响，而归纳头在语音ICL中扮演关键因果角色，这与文本ICL的发现一致。

title: Bridging Theory and Practice in Crafting Robust Spiking Reservoirs
summary: Spiking reservoir computing provides an energy-efficient approach to temporal processing, but reliably tuning reservoirs to operate at the edge-of-chaos is challenging due to experimental uncertainty. This work bridges abstract notions of criticality and practical stability by introducing and exploiting the robustness interval, an operational measure of the hyperparameter range over which a reservoir maintains performance above task-dependent thresholds. Through systematic evaluations of Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) architectures on both static (MNIST) and temporal (synthetic Ball Trajectories) tasks, we identify consistent monotonic trends in the robustness interval across a broad spectrum of network configurations: the robustness-interval width decreases with presynaptic connection density $β$ (i.e., directly with sparsity) and directly with the firing threshold $θ$. We further identify specific $(β, θ)$ pairs that preserve the analytical mean-field critical point $w_{\text{crit}}$, revealing iso-performance manifolds in the hyperparameter space. Control experiments on Erdős-Rényi graphs show the phenomena persist beyond small-world topologies. Finally, our results show that $w_{\text{crit}}$ consistently falls within empirical high-performance regions, validating $w_{\text{crit}}$ as a robust starting coordinate for parameter search and fine-tuning. To ensure reproducibility, the full Python code is publicly available.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于鲁棒性区间的尖峰储层计算稳定性分析方法，通过系统评估LIF架构在不同任务上的表现，揭示了网络配置参数对性能鲁棒性的单调趋势，并验证了临界点作为参数搜索起点的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尖峰储层计算虽然能效高，但由于实验不确定性，可靠地将储层调谐到混沌边缘具有挑战性。研究旨在弥合抽象临界概念与实际稳定性之间的差距，为实际应用提供可操作的稳定性度量。
AI.method: 引入鲁棒性区间作为超参数范围的性能度量，系统评估LIF架构在静态（MNIST）和时序（合成球轨迹）任务上的表现。分析连接密度β和放电阈值θ对鲁棒性区间的影响，识别保持临界点w_crit的(β, θ)参数对，并在Erdős-Rényi图上进行控制实验。
AI.result: 发现鲁棒性区间宽度随突触前连接密度β（即稀疏性）增加而减小，随放电阈值θ增加而增加。识别出保持分析临界点w_crit的特定(β, θ)参数对，揭示了超参数空间中的等性能流形。验证了w_crit始终位于经验高性能区域内。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒性区间为尖峰储层计算的稳定性分析提供了实用框架，临界点w_crit可作为参数搜索和微调的鲁棒起点。研究结果对高效神经形态计算系统的设计具有指导意义。

title: Balancing Efficiency and Restoration: Lightweight Mamba-Based Model for CT Metal Artifact Reduction
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Radiation and Plasma Medical Sciences
summary: In computed tomography imaging, metal implants frequently generate severe artifacts that compromise image quality and hinder diagnostic accuracy. There are three main challenges in the existing methods: the deterioration of organ and tissue structures, dependence on sinogram data, and an imbalance between resource use and restoration efficiency. Addressing these issues, we introduce MARMamba, which effectively eliminates artifacts caused by metals of different sizes while maintaining the integrity of the original anatomical structures of the image. Furthermore, this model only focuses on CT images affected by metal artifacts, thus negating the requirement for additional input data. The model is a streamlined UNet architecture, which incorporates multi-scale Mamba (MS-Mamba) as its core module. Within MS-Mamba, a flip mamba block captures comprehensive contextual information by analyzing images from multiple orientations. Subsequently, the average maximum feed-forward network integrates critical features with average features to suppress the artifacts. This combination allows MARMamba to reduce artifacts efficiently. The experimental results demonstrate that our model excels in reducing metal artifacts, offering distinct advantages over other models. It also strikes an optimal balance between computational demands, memory usage, and the number of parameters, highlighting its practical utility in the real world. The code of the presented model is available at: https://github.com/RICKand-MORTY/MARMamba.

AI.tldr: 提出MARMamba模型，用于CT成像中金属植入物引起的伪影去除，采用多尺度Mamba模块的UNet架构，无需额外输入数据，在计算效率与恢复效果间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: CT成像中金属植入物会产生严重伪影，影响图像质量和诊断准确性。现有方法存在三个主要问题：器官和组织结构退化、对正弦图数据的依赖、资源使用与恢复效率之间的不平衡。
AI.method: 提出MARMamba模型，采用精简的UNet架构，核心是多尺度Mamba(MS-Mamba)模块。其中翻转Mamba块通过多方向分析图像捕获全面上下文信息，平均最大前馈网络整合关键特征与平均特征以抑制伪影。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在减少金属伪影方面表现优异，优于其他模型，并在计算需求、内存使用和参数数量之间达到最佳平衡，具有实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: MARMamba能有效消除不同大小金属引起的伪影，同时保持原始解剖结构的完整性，无需额外输入数据，在计算效率和恢复效果方面达到良好平衡。

title: Riemann-Bench: A Benchmark for Moonshot Mathematics
summary: Recent AI systems have achieved gold-medal-level performance on the International Mathematical Olympiad, demonstrating remarkable proficiency at competition-style problem solving. However, competition mathematics represents only a narrow slice of mathematical reasoning: problems are drawn from limited domains, require minimal advanced machinery, and can often reward insightful tricks over deep theoretical knowledge.
