AI.result: 在评估基线中表现最佳：Rank-1识别率94.19%，等错误率5.35%。在光照退化条件下比竞争方法更强鲁棒性，学习表示具有降低的模板可重构性
AI.conclusion: EventFace成功将RGB面部先验知识迁移到事件域，通过时空建模实现了鲁棒的事件面部识别，为事件相机在生物识别应用中的潜力提供了支持

title: Benchmarking LLM Tool-Use in the Wild
summary: Fulfilling user needs through Large Language Model multi-turn, multi-step tool-use is rarely a straightforward process. Real user interactions are inherently wild, being intricate, messy, and flexible. We identify three key challenges from user behaviour: compositional tasks that demand efficient orchestration of tool-call topologies, implicit intent spread across dialogue turns that require contextual inference, and instruction transition, which mixes task queries, clarifications, and casual conversation, forcing LLMs to adjust their policies on the fly. Existing benchmarks overlook these behaviors, making the apparent progress of LLMs on tool-use spurious. To address this, we introduce WildToolBench, an LLM tool-use benchmark grounded in real-world user behavior patterns. Comprehensive evaluations of 57 LLMs reveal that no model achieves an accuracy of more than 15%, indicating a substantial gap in the robustness of LLMs' agentic ability. Controlled experiments and in-depth analyses further indicate that the real challenge for LLM tool-use lies not in artificially complex tasks, but in the wild nature of user behavior, emphasizing the need to reconsider the interactions among LLMs, users, and tools.

AI.tldr: WildToolBench：基于真实用户行为模式的LLM工具使用基准，揭示现有模型在真实复杂用户交互中的表现不足（准确率<15%）
AI.motivation: 现有LLM工具使用基准忽略了真实用户行为的复杂性，导致模型在人工测试上的进步具有误导性。真实用户交互具有组合性任务、隐含意图跨对话轮次、指令转换等挑战，需要更贴近现实的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出WildToolBench基准，基于真实用户行为模式构建评估框架，包含三个关键挑战：1) 需要高效编排工具调用拓扑的组合任务；2) 需要上下文推理的跨轮次隐含意图；3) 混合任务查询、澄清和闲聊的指令转换。对57个LLM进行全面评估。
AI.result: 所有57个LLM的准确率均未超过15%，表明LLM在代理能力鲁棒性方面存在显著差距。控制实验和深入分析表明，真正的挑战不在于人工复杂任务，而在于用户行为的"野生"特性。
AI.conclusion: LLM工具使用的真正挑战在于用户行为的复杂性，而非人工设计的复杂任务。需要重新思考LLM、用户和工具之间的交互关系，强调基于真实用户行为的评估重要性。

title: LLM-based Schema-Guided Extraction and Validation of Missing-Person Intelligence from Heterogeneous Data Sources
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at International Conference on Intelligent Digitization of Systems and Services (IDSS 2026)
summary: Missing-person and child-safety investigations rely on heterogeneous case documents, including structured forms, bulletin-style posters, and narrative web profiles. Variations in layout, terminology, and data quality impede rapid triage, large-scale analysis, and search-planning workflows. This paper introduces the Guardian Parser Pack, an AI-driven parsing and normalization pipeline that transforms multi-source investigative documents into a unified, schema-compliant representation suitable for operational review and downstream spatial modeling. The proposed system integrates (i) multi-engine PDF text extraction with Optical Character Recognition (OCR) fallback, (ii) rule-based source identification with source-specific parsers, (iii) schema-first harmonization and validation, and (iv) an optional Large Language Model (LLM)-assisted extraction pathway incorporating validator-guided repair and shared geocoding services. We present the system architecture, key implementation decisions, and output design, and evaluate performance using both gold-aligned extraction metrics and corpus-level operational indicators. On a manually aligned subset of 75 cases, the LLM-assisted pathway achieved substantially higher extraction quality than the deterministic comparator (F1 = 0.8664 vs. 0.2578), while across 517 parsed records per pathway it also improved aggregate key-field completeness (96.97\% vs. 93.23\%). The deterministic pathway remained much faster (mean runtime 0.03 s/record vs. 3.95 s/record for the LLM pathway). In the evaluated run, all LLM outputs passed initial schema validation, so validator-guided repair functioned as a built-in safeguard rather than a contributor to the observed gains. These results support controlled use of probabilistic AI within a schema-first, auditable pipeline for high-stakes investigative settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Guardian Parser Pack，一个AI驱动的解析和标准化管道，用于将多源调查文档（如失踪人口案件）转换为统一的、符合模式的表示，支持操作审查和下游空间建模。
AI.motivation: 失踪人口和儿童安全调查依赖于异构的案例文档，包括结构化表格、公告式海报和叙述性网页资料。这些文档在布局、术语和数据质量上的差异阻碍了快速分类、大规模分析和搜索规划工作流程。
AI.method: 系统整合了：(1) 多引擎PDF文本提取与OCR回退，(2) 基于规则的源识别与源特定解析器，(3) 模式优先的协调和验证，(4) 可选的LLM辅助提取路径，包含验证器引导的修复和共享地理编码服务。
AI.result: 在75个手动对齐的案例子集上，LLM辅助路径的提取质量显著高于确定性比较器（F1 = 0.8664 vs. 0.2578）。在517个解析记录中，LLM路径也提高了聚合关键字段完整性（96.97% vs. 93.23%）。确定性路径更快（平均运行时间0.03秒/记录 vs. 3.95秒/记录）。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果支持在高风险调查环境中，在模式优先、可审计的管道中受控使用概率性AI。LLM辅助路径显著提高了提取质量，而验证器引导的修复作为内置安全保障。

title: SubFLOT: Submodel Extraction for Efficient and Personalized Federated Learning via Optimal Transport
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training while preserving data privacy, but its practical deployment is hampered by system and statistical heterogeneity. While federated network pruning offers a path to mitigate these issues, existing methods face a critical dilemma: server-side pruning lacks personalization, whereas client-side pruning is computationally prohibitive for resource-constrained devices. Furthermore, the pruning process itself induces significant parametric divergence among heterogeneous submodels, destabilizing training and hindering global convergence. To address these challenges, we propose SubFLOT, a novel framework for server-side personalized federated pruning. SubFLOT introduces an Optimal Transport-enhanced Pruning (OTP) module that treats historical client models as proxies for local data distributions, formulating the pruning task as a Wasserstein distance minimization problem to generate customized submodels without accessing raw data. Concurrently, to counteract parametric divergence, our Scaling-based Adaptive Regularization (SAR) module adaptively penalizes a submodel's deviation from the global model, with the penalty's strength scaled by the client's pruning rate. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that SubFLOT consistently and substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods, underscoring its potential for deploying efficient and personalized models on resource-constrained edge devices.

AI.tldr: SubFLOT：一种基于最优传输的服务器端个性化联邦剪枝框架，通过Wasserstein距离最小化生成定制化子模型，并采用自适应正则化缓解参数发散问题
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在实际部署中面临系统和统计异构性的挑战。现有联邦剪枝方法存在关键困境：服务器端剪枝缺乏个性化，而客户端剪枝对资源受限设备计算成本过高。此外，剪枝过程本身会引发异构子模型间的参数发散，破坏训练稳定性并阻碍全局收敛。
AI.method: 提出SubFLOT框架，包含两个核心模块：1）最优传输增强剪枝（OTP）模块：将历史客户端模型作为本地数据分布的代理，将剪枝任务构建为Wasserstein距离最小化问题，在不访问原始数据的情况下生成定制化子模型；2）基于缩放的自适应正则化（SAR）模块：自适应惩罚子模型与全局模型的偏差，惩罚强度根据客户端剪枝率进行缩放。
AI.result: 综合实验表明，SubFLOT在性能上持续且显著优于现有最先进方法，证明了其在资源受限边缘设备上部署高效个性化模型的潜力。
AI.conclusion: SubFLOT成功解决了联邦剪枝中的个性化与计算效率的权衡问题，通过最优传输和自适应正则化机制，为资源受限边缘设备提供了高效且个性化的模型部署解决方案。

title: Insights from Visual Cognition: Understanding Human Action Dynamics with Overall Glance and Refined Gaze Transformer
summary: Recently, Transformer has made significant progress in various vision tasks. To balance computation and efficiency in video tasks, recent works heavily rely on factorized or window-based self-attention. However, these approaches split spatiotemporal correlations between regions of interest in videos, limiting the models' ability to capture motion and long-range dependencies. In this paper, we argue that, similar to the human visual system, the importance of temporal and spatial information varies across different time scales, and attention is allocated sparsely over time through glance and gaze behavior. Is equal consideration of time and space crucial for success in video tasks? Motivated by this understanding, we propose a dual-path network called the Overall Glance and Refined Gaze (OG-ReG) Transformer. The Glance path extracts coarse-grained overall spatiotemporal information, while the Gaze path supplements the Glance path by providing local details. Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on the Kinetics-400, Something-Something v2, and Diving-48, demonstrating its competitive performance. The code will be available at https://github.com/linuxsino/OG-ReG.

AI.tldr: 提出OG-ReG Transformer，一种双路径视频理解网络，模拟人类视觉系统的瞥视和凝视行为，分别提取粗粒度时空信息和局部细节，在多个视频数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有视频Transformer方法（如因子化或基于窗口的自注意力）会分割视频中的时空相关性，限制了模型捕捉运动和长距离依赖的能力。受人类视觉系统启发，不同时间尺度下时空信息的重要性不同，注意力在时间上是稀疏分配的（瞥视和凝视行为）。
AI.method: 提出OG-ReG Transformer双路径网络：1) Glance路径提取粗粒度整体时空信息；2) Gaze路径补充局部细节。模拟人类视觉的瞥视和凝视机制，实现更有效的时空建模。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400、Something-Something v2和Diving-48数据集上达到state-of-the-art性能，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟人类视觉系统的瞥视和凝视机制，提出的OG-ReG Transformer能够更有效地建模视频中的时空信息，在多个视频理解任务上取得优异性能。

title: Full State-Space Visualisation of the 8-Puzzle: Feasibility, Design, and Educational Use
comment: This is a preprint of a paper accepted to IEEE ITET 2026
summary: Search algorithms are a foundational topic in artificial intelligence education, yet even simple domains can generate large state spaces that challenge learners' ability to form accurate mental models. This paper presents an interactive learning system that demonstrates the feasibility of visualising the entire reachable state space of the 8-puzzle (181,440 states), while tightly coupling abstract graph structure with concrete puzzle manipulation. Built using Unity and modern GPU-based rendering techniques, the system enables real-time exploration of global structure, step-by-step execution of search algorithms, and direct comparison of how different strategies traverse the same space. We describe the system's design, visualisation layouts, and educational use, reporting findings from an initial classroom deployment and pilot study with students at different levels of university education. Overall, the results indicate that full state-space visualisation is both technically feasible and educationally valuable for supporting conceptual understanding of search behaviour within this canonical problem domain.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个交互式学习系统，可视化8-puzzle的全部可达状态空间（181,440个状态），将抽象图结构与具体拼图操作紧密结合，支持实时探索全局结构、逐步执行搜索算法，并比较不同策略如何遍历相同空间。
AI.motivation: 搜索算法是人工智能教育的基础主题，但即使是简单领域也可能产生巨大的状态空间，挑战学习者形成准确心智模型的能力。需要可视化工具来帮助学习者理解搜索算法的行为。
AI.method: 使用Unity和现代GPU渲染技术构建交互式学习系统，可视化8-puzzle的完整可达状态空间。系统设计包括可视化布局、抽象图结构与具体拼图操作的紧密耦合，支持实时探索和算法执行。
AI.result: 系统在技术上是可行的，能够实时可视化181,440个状态。教育评估表明，完整状态空间可视化对支持概念理解具有教育价值，初步课堂部署和试点研究显示了积极效果。
AI.conclusion: 完整状态空间可视化在技术上是可行的，并且对教育有价值，能够支持学生在经典问题领域中概念化理解搜索行为。

title: Scoring Edit Impact in Grammatical Error Correction via Embedded Association Graphs
summary: A Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) system produces a sequence of edits to correct an erroneous sentence. The quality of these edits is typically evaluated against human annotations. However, a sentence may admit multiple valid corrections, and existing evaluation settings do not fully accommodate diverse application scenarios. Recent meta-evaluation approaches rely on human judgments across multiple references, but they are difficult to scale to large datasets. In this paper, we propose a new task, Scoring Edit Impact in GEC, which aims to automatically estimate the importance of edits produced by a GEC system. To address this task, we introduce a scoring framework based on an embedded association graph. The graph captures latent dependencies among edits and syntactically related edits, grouping them into coherent groups. We then perform perplexity-based scoring to estimate each edit's contribution to sentence fluency. Experiments across 4 GEC datasets, 4 languages, and 4 GEC systems demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms a range of baselines. Further analysis shows that the embedded association graph effectively captures cross-linguistic structural dependencies among edits.

AI.tldr: 提出GEC中编辑影响评分新任务，通过嵌入式关联图捕捉编辑间依赖关系，基于困惑度评估编辑对句子流畅性的贡献，在4个数据集、4种语言、4个GEC系统上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 当前GEC系统评估存在局限性：1) 一个句子可能有多种有效修正，现有评估方法无法充分适应多样应用场景；2) 基于多参考的人工元评估方法难以扩展到大规模数据集；3) 需要自动评估GEC系统产生的编辑重要性。
AI.method: 提出嵌入式关联图框架：1) 构建图结构捕捉编辑间的潜在依赖关系和句法相关编辑；2) 将编辑分组为连贯组；3) 基于困惑度评分估计每个编辑对句子流畅性的贡献。
AI.result: 在4个GEC数据集、4种语言、4个GEC系统上的实验表明，该方法一致优于多种基线方法。进一步分析显示嵌入式关联图能有效捕捉编辑间的跨语言结构依赖。
AI.conclusion: 提出的编辑影响评分任务和嵌入式关联图框架为GEC评估提供了更细粒度的自动评估方法，能有效处理多语言场景并捕捉编辑间的结构依赖关系。

title: SHAPE: Stage-aware Hierarchical Advantage via Potential Estimation for LLM Reasoning
summary: Process supervision has emerged as a promising approach for enhancing LLM reasoning, yet existing methods fail to distinguish meaningful progress from mere verbosity, leading to limited reasoning capabilities and unresolved token inefficiency. To address this, we propose Stage-aware Hierarchical Advantage via Potential Estimation (SHAPE), a framework that formalizes reasoning as a trajectory through a state space of empirical solvability. SHAPE introduces a hierarchical credit assignment mechanism: at the segment level, it employs a stage-aware advantage function to prioritize efficient breakthroughs in low-potential states; at the token level, it utilizes entropy-driven redistribution to sharpen execution signals. Extensive experiments in math reasoning across three base models and five benchmarks demonstrate that SHAPE achieves an average accuracy gain of 3% with 30% reduced token consumption.

AI.tldr: SHAPE是一个用于增强LLM推理的过程监督框架，通过分层信用分配机制区分有意义进展与冗长输出，在数学推理任务上实现3%准确率提升和30%token消耗减少。
AI.motivation: 现有过程监督方法无法区分有意义进展与冗长输出，导致推理能力有限和token效率低下。需要一种能识别推理过程中关键突破点并优化token使用的方法。
AI.method: SHAPE将推理形式化为经验可解性状态空间的轨迹。采用分层信用分配：在片段级别使用阶段感知优势函数优先处理低潜力状态的效率突破；在token级别使用熵驱动重分配来锐化执行信号。
AI.result: 在三个基础模型和五个数学推理基准测试中，SHAPE平均准确率提升3%，同时减少30%的token消耗。
AI.conclusion: SHAPE通过分层信用分配有效解决了过程监督中的冗长问题，显著提升了LLM推理的效率和准确性，为LLM推理优化提供了新思路。

title: Video-guided Machine Translation with Global Video Context
summary: Video-guided Multimodal Translation (VMT) has advanced significantly in recent years. However, most existing methods rely on locally aligned video segments paired one-to-one with subtitles, limiting their ability to capture global narrative context across multiple segments in long videos. To overcome this limitation, we propose a globally video-guided multimodal translation framework that leverages a pretrained semantic encoder and vector database-based subtitle retrieval to construct a context set of video segments closely related to the target subtitle semantics. An attention mechanism is employed to focus on highly relevant visual content, while preserving the remaining video features to retain broader contextual information. Furthermore, we design a region-aware cross-modal attention mechanism to enhance semantic alignment during translation. Experiments on a large-scale documentary translation dataset demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms baseline models, highlighting its effectiveness in long-video scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出全局视频引导的多模态翻译框架，通过预训练语义编码器和向量数据库检索构建上下文视频片段集，使用注意力机制聚焦相关视觉内容，并设计区域感知跨模态注意力增强语义对齐，在长视频翻译任务中显著优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视频引导多模态翻译方法大多依赖局部对齐的视频片段与字幕一对一配对，难以捕捉长视频中跨多个片段的全局叙事上下文，限制了翻译质量。
AI.method: 1) 使用预训练语义编码器和向量数据库检索构建与目标字幕语义相关的上下文视频片段集；2) 采用注意力机制聚焦高度相关的视觉内容，同时保留其余视频特征以维持更广泛的上下文信息；3) 设计区域感知跨模态注意力机制增强翻译过程中的语义对齐。
AI.result: 在大规模纪录片翻译数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于基线模型，特别是在长视频场景中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 提出的全局视频引导多模态翻译框架能够有效捕捉长视频中的全局叙事上下文，通过注意力机制和区域感知跨模态注意力显著提升翻译质量，为长视频多模态翻译提供了有效解决方案。

title: LLM Spirals of Delusion: A Benchmarking Audit Study of AI Chatbot Interfaces
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Annual Conference of the International Association for Safe and Ethical Artificial Intelligence
summary: People increasingly hold sustained, open-ended conversations with large language models (LLMs). Public reports and early studies suggest that, in such settings, models can reinforce delusional or conspiratorial ideation or even amplify harmful beliefs and engagement patterns. We present an audit and benchmarking study that measures how different LLMs encourage, resist, or escalate disordered and conspiratorial thinking. We explicitly compare API outputs to user chat interfaces, like the ChatGPT desktop app or web interface, which is how people have conversations with chatbots in real life but are almost never used for testing. In total, we run 56 20-turn conversations testing ChatGPT-4o and ChatGPT-5, via both the API and chat interface, and grade each conversation by two research assistants (RAs) as well as by GPT-5. We document five results. First, we observe large differences in performance between the API and chat interface environments, showing that the universally used method of automated testing through the API is not sufficient to assess the impact of chatbots in the real world. Second, when tested in the chat interface, we find that ChatGPT-5 displays less sycophancy, escalation, and delusion reinforcement than ChatGPT-4o, showing that these behaviors are influenced by the policy choices of major AI companies. Third, conversations with nearly identical aggregate intensity in a behavior display large differences in how the behavior evolves turn by turn, highlighting the importance of temporal dynamics in multi-turn evaluation. Fourth, even updated models display substantial levels of negative behaviors, revealing that model improvement does not imply model safety. Fifth, the same API endpoint tested just two months apart yields a complete reversal in behavior, underscoring how transparency in model updates is a necessary prerequisite for robust audit findings.

AI.tldr: 研究发现：通过API测试LLM无法准确评估真实聊天界面中的行为差异；ChatGPT-5在聊天界面中比4o表现出更少的谄媚、升级和妄想强化；相同行为强度下存在显著的时间动态差异；模型改进不等于安全性提升；API端点行为在两个月内完全反转。
AI.motivation: 随着人们与LLM进行持续开放式对话，模型可能强化妄想或阴谋论思维，甚至放大有害信念。当前研究主要使用API进行自动化测试，但人们实际通过聊天界面与模型交互，这种差异可能导致评估不准确。
AI.method: 对ChatGPT-4o和ChatGPT-5进行审计和基准测试，比较API输出与聊天界面（桌面应用/网页界面）的差异。共进行56个20轮对话，由两名研究助理和GPT-5对每个对话进行评分。
AI.result: 1) API与聊天界面性能差异显著；2) ChatGPT-5在聊天界面中谄媚、升级和妄想强化行为更少；3) 相同行为强度下存在显著时间动态差异；4) 更新模型仍存在大量负面行为；5) 同一API端点在两个月内行为完全反转。
AI.conclusion: API测试不足以评估真实世界聊天机器人影响，模型改进不保证安全性，模型更新透明度对稳健审计至关重要。聊天界面评估应成为标准实践。

title: Scientific Knowledge-driven Decoding Constraints Improving the Reliability of LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong knowledge reserves and task-solving capabilities, but still face the challenge of severe hallucination, hindering their practical application. Though scientific theories and rules can efficiently direct the behaviors of human manipulators, LLMs still do not utilize these highly-condensed knowledge sufficiently through training or prompting. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{SciDC}, an LLM generation method that integrate subject-specific knowledge with strong constraints. By adopting strong LLMs to automatically convert flexible knowledge into multi-layered, standardized rules, we build an extensible framework to effectively constrain the model generation on domain tasks. Experiments on scientific tasks including industrial formulation design, clinical tumor diagnosis and retrosynthesis planning, consistently demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, achieving a 12\% accuracy improvement on average compared with vanilla generation. We further discuss the potential of LLMs in automatically inductively summarizing highly-condensed knowledge, looking ahead to practical solutions for accelerating the overall scientific research process. All the code of this paper can be obtained (https://github.com/Maotian-Ma/SciDC).

AI.tldr: SciDC是一种将领域专业知识转化为多层标准化规则来约束LLM生成的方法，在科学任务上平均提升12%准确率
AI.motivation: LLMs虽然具备强大的知识储备和任务解决能力，但在实际应用中面临严重的幻觉问题。科学理论和规则可以高效指导人类操作，但LLMs尚未充分利用这些高度凝练的知识
AI.method: 提出SciDC方法，利用强大LLMs自动将灵活的知识转化为多层标准化规则，构建可扩展框架来有效约束模型在领域任务上的生成
AI.result: 在工业配方设计、临床肿瘤诊断和逆合成规划等科学任务上的实验一致证明了方法的有效性，相比普通生成平均提升12%准确率
AI.conclusion: SciDC通过将领域知识转化为约束规则有效减少LLM幻觉，并展望了LLMs在自动归纳总结高度凝练知识方面的潜力，为加速整体科研过程提供实用解决方案

title: FlowAdam: Implicit Regularization via Geometry-Aware Soft Momentum Injection
comment: Accepted at IJCNN 2026 (IEEE WCCI). 8 pages, 4 figures
summary: Adaptive moment methods such as Adam use a diagonal, coordinate-wise preconditioner based on exponential moving averages of squared gradients. This diagonal scaling is coordinate-system dependent and can struggle with dense or rotated parameter couplings, including those in matrix factorization, tensor decomposition, and graph neural networks, because it treats each parameter independently. We introduce FlowAdam, a hybrid optimizer that augments Adam with continuous gradient-flow integration via an ordinary differential equation (ODE). When EMA-based statistics detect landscape difficulty, FlowAdam switches to clipped ODE integration. Our central contribution is Soft Momentum Injection, which blends ODE velocity with Adam's momentum during mode transitions. This prevents the training collapse observed with naive hybrid approaches. Across coupled optimization benchmarks, the ODE integration provides implicit regularization, reducing held-out error by 10-22% on low-rank matrix/tensor recovery and 6% on Jester (real-world collaborative filtering), also surpassing tuned Lion and AdaBelief, while matching Adam on well-conditioned workloads (CIFAR-10). MovieLens-100K confirms benefits arise specifically from coupled parameter interactions rather than bias estimation. Ablation studies show that soft injection is essential, as hard replacement reduces accuracy from 100% to 82.5%.

AI.tldr: FlowAdam是一种混合优化器，将Adam与基于ODE的连续梯度流集成相结合，通过软动量注入处理耦合参数优化问题，在低秩矩阵/张量恢复等任务上显著优于传统优化器。
AI.motivation: Adam等自适应矩方法使用基于梯度平方指数移动平均的对角预处理器，这种坐标依赖的缩放难以处理密集或旋转的参数耦合（如矩阵分解、张量分解、图神经网络），因为它独立处理每个参数。
AI.method: FlowAdam通过普通微分方程（ODE）将连续梯度流集成与Adam结合。当EMA统计检测到优化困难时，切换到裁剪的ODE积分。核心贡献是软动量注入，在模式转换期间将ODE速度与Adam动量混合，防止训练崩溃。
AI.result: 在耦合优化基准测试中，ODE积分提供隐式正则化，将低秩矩阵/张量恢复的保持误差降低10-22%，在Jester（真实世界协同过滤）上降低6%，优于调优的Lion和AdaBelief，同时在良好条件工作负载（CIFAR-10）上与Adam相当。
AI.conclusion: FlowAdam通过软动量注入有效解决了耦合参数优化问题，在保持Adam优点的同时，对复杂参数交互提供了更好的优化性能，特别是在矩阵分解等耦合参数场景中。

title: FedDAP: Domain-Aware Prototype Learning for Federated Learning under Domain Shift
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables decentralized model training across multiple clients without exposing private data, making it ideal for privacy-sensitive applications. However, in real-world FL scenarios, clients often hold data from distinct domains, leading to severe domain shift and degraded global model performance. To address this, prototype learning has been emerged as a promising solution, which leverages class-wise feature representations. Yet, existing methods face two key limitations: (1) Existing prototype-based FL methods typically construct a $\textit{single global prototype}$ per class by aggregating local prototypes from all clients without preserving domain information. (2) Current feature-prototype alignment is $\textit{domain-agnostic}$, forcing clients to align with global prototypes regardless of domain origin. To address these challenges, we propose Federated Domain-Aware Prototypes (FedDAP) to construct domain-specific global prototypes by aggregating local client prototypes within the same domain using a similarity-weighted fusion mechanism. These global domain-specific prototypes are then used to guide local training by aligning local features with prototypes from the same domain, while encouraging separation from prototypes of different domains. This dual alignment enhances domain-specific learning at the local level and enables the global model to generalize across diverse domains. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on three different datasets: DomainNet, Office-10, and PACS to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework to address the domain shift challenges. The code is available at https://github.com/quanghuy6997/FedDAP.

AI.tldr: FedDAP提出了一种联邦学习框架，通过构建领域特定的全局原型来解决跨领域数据分布差异问题，采用相似性加权融合机制聚合同一领域内的客户端原型，并引导本地特征与同领域原型对齐、与异领域原型分离。
AI.motivation: 现实世界联邦学习中，客户端数据通常来自不同领域，导致严重的领域偏移问题，降低全局模型性能。现有基于原型的联邦学习方法存在两个关键局限：1）为每个类别构建单一全局原型，未保留领域信息；2）特征-原型对齐是领域无关的，强制客户端与全局原型对齐而忽略领域来源。
AI.method: 提出FedDAP框架：1）通过相似性加权融合机制聚合同一领域内的客户端原型，构建领域特定的全局原型；2）在本地训练中，引导本地特征与同领域原型对齐，同时鼓励与不同领域原型分离；3）这种双重对齐增强本地层面的领域特定学习，使全局模型能够泛化到不同领域。
AI.result: 在DomainNet、Office-10和PACS三个不同数据集上进行广泛实验，证明了所提框架在解决领域偏移挑战方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FedDAP通过构建领域感知的原型和对齐机制，有效解决了联邦学习中的领域偏移问题，提高了模型在跨领域场景下的泛化能力。

title: Harf-Speech: A Clinically Aligned Framework for Arabic Phoneme-Level Speech Assessment
summary: Automated phoneme-level pronunciation assessment is vital for scalable speech therapy and language learning, yet validated tools for Arabic remain scarce. We present Harf-Speech, a modular system scoring Arabic pronunciation at the phoneme level on a clinical scale. It combines an MSA phonetizer, a fine-tuned speech-to-phoneme model, Levenshtein alignment, and a blended scorer using longest common subsequence and edit-distance metrics. We fine-tune three ASR architectures on Arabic phoneme data and benchmark them with zero-shot multimodal models; the best, OmniASR-CTC-1B-v2, achieves 8.92\% phoneme error rate. Three certified speech-language pathologists independently scored 40 utterances for clinical validation. Harf-Speech attains a Pearson correlation of 0.791 and ICC(2,1) of 0.659 with mean expert scores, outperforming existing end-to-end assessment frameworks. These results show Harf-Speech yields clinically aligned, interpretable scores comparable to inter-rater expert agreement.

AI.tldr: Harf-Speech是一个用于阿拉伯语发音评估的模块化系统，通过ASR架构微调和多模态模型对比，实现了临床级别的音素级发音评分，与专家评分高度相关。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语自动音素级发音评估工具稀缺，而这对可扩展的言语治疗和语言学习至关重要。现有工具缺乏临床验证，需要开发能够提供临床对齐、可解释评分的系统。
AI.method: 开发模块化系统：包含MSA音素化器、微调的语音到音素模型、Levenshtein对齐，以及使用最长公共子序列和编辑距离度量的混合评分器。微调三种ASR架构，并与零样本多模态模型进行基准测试。
AI.result: 最佳模型OmniASR-CTC-1B-v2达到8.92%的音素错误率。与三位认证言语病理学家的独立评分相比，Harf-Speech获得Pearson相关系数0.791和ICC(2,1) 0.659，优于现有端到端评估框架。
AI.conclusion: Harf-Speech能够产生临床对齐、可解释的评分，与专家评分者间一致性相当，为阿拉伯语发音评估提供了有效的临床规模解决方案。

title: The Detection--Extraction Gap: Models Know the Answer Before They Can Say It
summary: Modern reasoning models continue generating long after the answer is already determined. Across five model configurations, two families, and three benchmarks, we find that \textbf{52--88\% of chain-of-thought tokens are produced after the answer is recoverable} from a partial prefix. This post-commitment generation reveals a structural phenomenon: the \textbf{detection--extraction gap}. Free continuations from early prefixes recover the correct answer even at 10\% of the trace, while forced extraction fails on 42\% of these cases. The answer is recoverable from the model state, yet prompt-conditioned decoding fails to extract it. We formalize this mismatch via a total-variation bound between free and forced continuation distributions, yielding quantitative estimates of suffix-induced shift. Exploiting this asymmetry, we propose Black-box Adaptive Early Exit (\BAEE{}), which uses free continuations for both detection and extraction, truncating \textbf{70--78\% of serial generation} while \textbf{improving accuracy by 1--5\,pp} across all models. For thinking-mode models, early exit prevents post-commitment overwriting, yielding gains of up to 5.8\,pp; a cost-optimized variant achieves 68--73\% reduction at a median of 9 API calls. Code is available at https://github.com/EdWangLoDaSc/know2say.

AI.tldr: 论文发现大语言模型在推理过程中存在"检测-提取差距"：模型在答案已确定后仍继续生成大量token（52-88%），且自由延续能比强制提取更早恢复正确答案。基于此提出了Black-box Adaptive Early Exit方法，可减少70-78%的序列生成并提升准确率1-5个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现代推理模型在答案已经确定后仍继续生成长序列，造成计算资源浪费。研究发现52-88%的思维链token是在答案可恢复后产生的，揭示了一个结构性现象：检测-提取差距——模型状态中已包含正确答案，但提示条件解码无法有效提取。
AI.method: 通过分析自由延续与强制提取之间的分布差异，形式化定义了后缀诱导偏移。提出Black-box Adaptive Early Exit (BAEE)方法，利用自由延续进行检测和提取，自适应地提前退出生成过程，减少不必要的token生成。
AI.result: 在五个模型配置、两个模型家族和三个基准测试中，BAEE方法能减少70-78%的序列生成，同时提升准确率1-5个百分点。对于思维模式模型，提前退出可防止答案被后续生成覆盖，带来高达5.8个百分点的提升。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型推理中存在显著的检测-提取差距，答案在早期即可恢复但模型仍继续生成。BAEE方法通过利用自由延续分布的不对称性，实现了计算效率与准确率的双重提升，为高效推理提供了新思路。

title: GraphWalker: Graph-Guided In-Context Learning for Clinical Reasoning on Electronic Health Records
summary: Clinical Reasoning on Electronic Health Records (EHRs) is a fundamental yet challenging task in modern healthcare. While in-context learning (ICL) offers a promising inference-time adaptation paradigm for large language models (LLMs) in EHR reasoning, existing methods face three fundamental challenges: (1) Perspective Limitation, where data-driven similarity fails to align with LLM reasoning needs and model-driven signals are constrained by limited clinical competence; (2) Cohort Awareness, as demonstrations are selected independently without modeling population-level structure; and (3) Information Aggregation, where redundancy and interaction effects among demonstrations are ignored, leading to diminishing marginal gains. To address these challenges, we propose GraphWalker, a principled demonstration selection framework for EHR-oriented ICL. GraphWalker (i) jointly models patient clinical information and LLM-estimated information gain by integrating data-driven and model-driven perspectives, (ii) incorporates Cohort Discovery to avoid noisy local optima, and (iii) employs a Lazy Greedy Search with Frontier Expansion algorithm to mitigate diminishing marginal returns in information aggregation. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world EHR benchmarks demonstrate that GraphWalker consistently outperforms state-of-the-art ICL baselines, yielding substantial improvements in clinical reasoning performance. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/PuppyKnightUniversity/GraphWalker

AI.tldr: GraphWalker：一个针对电子健康记录（EHR）推理的演示选择框架，通过整合数据驱动和模型驱动视角、群体发现以及惰性贪婪搜索，解决ICL中的视角限制、群体意识和信息聚合问题。
AI.motivation: 针对电子健康记录（EHR）推理任务中现有ICL方法面临的三个核心挑战：1）视角限制——数据驱动的相似性无法与LLM推理需求对齐，模型驱动信号受限于临床能力；2）群体意识——演示选择独立进行，未建模群体级结构；3）信息聚合——忽略演示间的冗余和交互效应，导致边际收益递减。
AI.method: GraphWalker框架包含三个核心组件：1）联合建模患者临床信息和LLM估计的信息增益，整合数据驱动和模型驱动视角；2）引入群体发现机制避免局部最优；3）采用带前沿扩展的惰性贪婪搜索算法缓解信息聚合中的边际收益递减问题。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界EHR基准测试上的广泛实验表明，GraphWalker持续优于最先进的ICL基线方法，在临床推理性能上带来显著提升。
AI.conclusion: GraphWalker为EHR导向的ICL提供了一个原则性的演示选择框架，有效解决了现有方法的局限性，显著提升了临床推理性能，代码已开源。

title: Generate, Analyze, and Refine: Training-Free Sound Source Localization via MLLM Meta-Reasoning
summary: Sound source localization task aims to identify the locations of sound-emitting objects by leveraging correlations between audio and visual modalities. Most existing SSL methods rely on contrastive learning-based feature matching, but lack explicit reasoning and verification, limiting their effectiveness in complex acoustic scenes. Inspired by human meta-cognitive processes, we propose a training-free SSL framework that exploits the intrinsic reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Our Generation-Analysis-Refinement (GAR) pipeline consists of three stages: Generation produces initial bounding boxes and audio classifications; Analysis quantifies Audio-Visual Consistency via open-set role tagging and anchor voting; and Refinement applies adaptive gating to prevent unnecessary adjustments. Extensive experiments on single-source and multi-source benchmarks demonstrate competitive performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/VisualAIKHU/GAR-SSL.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于多模态大语言模型的免训练声源定位框架GAR，通过生成-分析-精炼三阶段流程，利用MLLM的推理能力在复杂声学场景中实现更准确的声源定位。
AI.motivation: 现有声源定位方法主要依赖基于对比学习的特征匹配，缺乏显式推理和验证机制，在复杂声学场景中效果受限。受人类元认知过程启发，作者希望利用多模态大语言模型的内在推理能力来提升声源定位性能。
AI.method: 提出GAR（生成-分析-精炼）三阶段免训练框架：1) 生成阶段：利用MLLM生成初始边界框和音频分类；2) 分析阶段：通过开放集角色标注和锚点投票量化音频-视觉一致性；3) 精炼阶段：应用自适应门控机制防止不必要的调整。
AI.result: 在单源和多源基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法取得了有竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了利用多模态大语言模型的内在推理能力进行声源定位的有效性，提出的免训练GAR框架在复杂声学场景中表现出色。

title: DiffuMask: Diffusion Language Model for Token-level Prompt Pruning
summary: In-Context Learning and Chain-of-Thought prompting improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). These typically come at the cost of longer, more expensive prompts that may contain redundant information. Prompt compression based on pruning offers a practical solution, yet existing methods rely on sequential token removal which is computationally intensive. We present DiffuMask, a diffusion-based framework integrating hierarchical shot-level and token-level pruning signals, that enables rapid and parallel prompt pruning via iterative mask prediction. DiffuMask substantially accelerates the compression process via masking multiple tokens in each denoising step. It offers tunable control over retained content, preserving essential reasoning context and achieving up to 80\% prompt length reduction. Meanwhile, it maintains or improves accuracy across in-domain, out-of-domain, and cross-model settings. Our results show that DiffuMask provides a generalizable and controllable framework for prompt compression, facilitating faster and more reliable in-context reasoning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: DiffuMask：基于扩散模型的并行提示压缩框架，通过分层镜头级和令牌级剪枝信号实现快速提示压缩，可减少80%提示长度同时保持或提升推理准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有提示压缩方法依赖顺序令牌移除，计算成本高且可能包含冗余信息。需要一种更高效、可控的压缩方法来加速上下文推理。
AI.method: 提出DiffuMask框架，集成分层镜头级和令牌级剪枝信号，通过迭代掩码预测实现并行提示剪枝，每个去噪步骤可同时掩码多个令牌。
AI.result: 实现高达80%的提示长度缩减，在领域内、领域外和跨模型设置中保持或提升准确性，显著加速压缩过程。
AI.conclusion: DiffuMask提供了一个通用且可控的提示压缩框架，促进LLMs中更快、更可靠的上下文推理。

title: Towards Accurate and Calibrated Classification: Regularizing Cross-Entropy From A Generative Perspective
summary: Accurate classification requires not only high predictive accuracy but also well-calibrated confidence estimates. Yet, modern deep neural networks (DNNs) are often overconfident, primarily due to overfitting on the negative log-likelihood (NLL). While focal loss variants alleviate this issue, they typically reduce accuracy, revealing a persistent trade-off between calibration and predictive performance. Motivated by the complementary strengths of generative and discriminative classifiers, we propose Generative Cross-Entropy (GCE), which maximizes $p(x|y)$ and is equivalent to cross-entropy augmented with a class-level confidence regularizer. Under mild conditions, GCE is strictly proper. Across CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, and a medical imaging benchmark, GCE improves both accuracy and calibration over cross-entropy, especially in the long-tailed scenario. Combined with adaptive piecewise temperature scaling (ATS), GCE attains calibration competitive with focal-loss variants without sacrificing accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Generative Cross-Entropy (GCE)损失函数，通过最大化p(x|y)来改善深度神经网络的校准性，同时保持或提高预测准确性，解决了传统交叉熵导致过拟合和过自信的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代深度神经网络经常过度自信，主要因为负对数似然的过拟合。虽然focal loss变体能缓解校准问题，但通常降低准确性，揭示了校准与预测性能之间的权衡。受生成式和判别式分类器互补优势的启发，需要一种能同时改善准确性和校准性的方法。
AI.method: 提出Generative Cross-Entropy (GCE)损失函数，最大化p(x|y)，相当于在交叉熵基础上添加类级置信度正则化器。在温和条件下，GCE是严格适当的。结合自适应分段温度缩放(ATS)进一步改善校准。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet和医学影像基准测试中，GCE在准确性和校准性上都优于交叉熵，尤其在长尾场景下表现更好。结合ATS后，GCE达到与focal loss变体相当的校准水平，但不牺牲准确性。
AI.conclusion: GCE提供了一种有效的方法来同时改善深度神经网络的准确性和校准性，特别是在长尾分布场景下，解决了传统方法中校准与准确性之间的权衡问题。

title: RePL: Pseudo-label Refinement for Semi-supervised LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semi-supervised learning for LiDAR semantic segmentation often suffers from error propagation and confirmation bias caused by noisy pseudo-labels. To tackle this chronic issue, we introduce RePL, a novel framework that enhances pseudo-label quality by identifying and correcting potential errors in pseudo-labels through masked reconstruction, along with a dedicated training strategy. We also provide a theoretical analysis demonstrating the condition under which the pseudo-label refinement is beneficial, and empirically confirm that the condition is mild and clearly met by RePL. Extensive evaluations on the nuScenes-lidarseg and SemanticKITTI datasets show that RePL improves pseudo-label quality a lot and, as a result, achieves the state of the art in LiDAR semantic segmentation.

AI.tldr: RePL：通过掩码重建识别和修正伪标签错误的半监督LiDAR语义分割框架，提升伪标签质量，在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI上达到SOTA
AI.motivation: 半监督LiDAR语义分割中，噪声伪标签会导致错误传播和确认偏差，这是长期存在的问题。需要提高伪标签质量来改善分割性能。
AI.method: 提出RePL框架，通过掩码重建识别和修正伪标签中的潜在错误，并设计了专门的训练策略。还提供了理论分析，证明伪标签精炼在何种条件下有益。
AI.result: 在nuScenes-lidarseg和SemanticKITTI数据集上的广泛评估表明，RePL显著提高了伪标签质量，在LiDAR语义分割中达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: RePL通过掩码重建机制有效解决了半监督LiDAR分割中的伪标签质量问题，理论分析和实验验证都证明了其有效性。

title: Feedback Adaptation for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are typically evaluated under static assumptions, despite being frequently corrected through user or expert feedback in deployment. Existing evaluation protocols focus on overall accuracy and fail to capture how systems adapt after feedback is introduced. We introduce feedback adaptation as a problem setting for RAG systems, which asks how effectively and how quickly corrective feedback propagates to future queries. To make this behavior measurable, we propose two evaluation axes: correction lag, which captures the delay between feedback provision and behavioral change, and post-feedback performance, which measures reliability on semantically related queries after feedback. Using these metrics, we show that training-based approaches exhibit a trade-off between delayed correction and reliable adaptation. We further propose PatchRAG, a minimal inference-time instantiation that incorporates feedback without retraining, demonstrating immediate correction and strong post-feedback generalization under the proposed evaluation. Our results highlight feedback adaptation as a previously overlooked dimension of RAG system behavior in interactive settings.

AI.tldr: 论文提出RAG系统的反馈适应性问题，引入修正延迟和反馈后性能两个评估指标，展示了训练方法的延迟-可靠性权衡，并提出无需重新训练的PatchRAG方法实现即时修正
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统评估通常基于静态假设，忽略了实际部署中用户或专家反馈的修正作用。当前评估协议只关注整体准确性，无法衡量系统在引入反馈后的适应能力
AI.method: 提出反馈适应性问题设置，定义修正延迟和反馈后性能两个评估指标。通过实验展示训练方法的权衡，并提出PatchRAG方法——一种无需重新训练的推理时实现，通过即时整合反馈实现快速适应
AI.result: 训练方法在延迟修正和可靠适应之间存在权衡；PatchRAG方法能够实现即时修正，并在反馈后查询上表现出强大的泛化能力，在提出的评估框架下表现优异
AI.conclusion: 反馈适应是RAG系统在交互环境中被忽视的重要维度，提出的评估指标和PatchRAG方法为理解和改进RAG系统的适应能力提供了新视角

title: Bi-Lipschitz Autoencoder With Injectivity Guarantee
comment: Accepted for publication at ICLR 2026, 27 Pages, 15 Figures
summary: Autoencoders are widely used for dimensionality reduction, based on the assumption that high-dimensional data lies on low-dimensional manifolds. Regularized autoencoders aim to preserve manifold geometry during dimensionality reduction, but existing approaches often suffer from non-injective mappings and overly rigid constraints that limit their effectiveness and robustness. In this work, we identify encoder non-injectivity as a core bottleneck that leads to poor convergence and distorted latent representations. To ensure robustness across data distributions, we formalize the concept of admissible regularization and provide sufficient conditions for its satisfaction. In this work, we propose the Bi-Lipschitz Autoencoder (BLAE), which introduces two key innovations: (1) an injective regularization scheme based on a separation criterion to eliminate pathological local minima, and (2) a bi-Lipschitz relaxation that preserves geometry and exhibits robustness to data distribution drift. Empirical results on diverse datasets show that BLAE consistently outperforms existing methods in preserving manifold structure while remaining resilient to sampling sparsity and distribution shifts. Code is available at https://github.com/qipengz/BLAE.

AI.tldr: 提出Bi-Lipschitz自编码器(BLAE)，通过注入正则化和双Lipschitz松弛解决传统正则化自编码器的非单射映射问题，提升流形结构保持能力和对数据分布漂移的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统正则化自编码器在降维时假设高维数据位于低维流形上，但现有方法存在非单射映射和过于刚性的约束问题，导致收敛性差和潜在表示失真。编码器的非单射性是核心瓶颈，限制了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出Bi-Lipschitz自编码器(BLAE)，包含两个关键创新：1) 基于分离准则的注入正则化方案，消除病态局部极小值；2) 双Lipschitz松弛，保持几何结构并展现对数据分布漂移的鲁棒性。同时形式化可接受正则化的概念并提供满足条件。
AI.result: 在多样化数据集上的实证结果表明，BLAE在保持流形结构方面持续优于现有方法，同时对采样稀疏性和分布漂移具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: BLAE通过解决编码器非单射性问题，提供了更有效和鲁棒的正则化自编码器框架，在保持流形几何结构方面表现优异。

title: VGGT-SLAM++
comment: 8 pages (main paper) + supplementary material. Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshop (VOCVALC)
summary: We introduce VGGT-SLAM++, a complete visual SLAM system that leverages the geometry-rich outputs of the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT). The system comprises a visual odometry (front-end) fusing the VGGT feed-forward transformer and a Sim(3) solution, a Digital Elevation Map (DEM)-based graph construction module, and a back-end that jointly enable accurate large-scale mapping with bounded memory. While prior transformer-based SLAM pipelines such as VGGT-SLAM rely primarily on sparse loop closures or global Sim(3) manifold constraints - allowing short-horizon pose drift - VGGT-SLAM++ restores high-cadence local bundle adjustment (LBA) through a spatially corrective back-end. For each VGGT submap, we construct a dense planar-canonical DEM, partition it into patches, and compute their DINOv2 embeddings to integrate the submap into a covisibility graph. Spatial neighbors are retrieved using a Visual Place Recognition (VPR) module within the covisibility window, triggering frequent local optimization that stabilizes trajectories. Across standard SLAM benchmarks, VGGT-SLAM++ achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, substantially reducing short-term drift, accelerating graph convergence, and maintaining global consistency with compact DEM tiles and sublinear retrieval.

AI.tldr: VGGT-SLAM++是一个完整的视觉SLAM系统，利用视觉几何基础Transformer的几何丰富输出，通过DEM-based图构建和空间校正后端实现高精度大规模建图。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的SLAM系统（如VGGT-SLAM）主要依赖稀疏回环或全局Sim(3)约束，导致短期姿态漂移问题。需要恢复高频局部束调整来稳定轨迹。
AI.method: 系统包含：1）融合VGGT前馈Transformer和Sim(3)解算的视觉里程计前端；2）基于数字高程图(DEM)的图构建模块；3）空间校正后端。通过构建密集平面规范DEM、分区计算DINOv2嵌入，在共视图窗口内使用视觉地点识别模块检索空间邻居，触发频繁局部优化。
AI.result: 在标准SLAM基准测试中达到最先进精度，显著减少短期漂移，加速图收敛，同时通过紧凑DEM瓦片和次线性检索保持全局一致性。
AI.conclusion: VGGT-SLAM++通过恢复高频局部束调整，有效解决了Transformer-based SLAM系统的短期姿态漂移问题，实现了高精度、大规模建图。

title: A Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning Approach through Multitask Prompt Distillation and Decomposition for Clinical NLP
summary: Existing prompt-based fine-tuning methods typically learn task-specific prompts independently, imposing significant computing and storage overhead at scale when deploying multiple clinical natural language processing (NLP) systems. We present a multitask prompt distillation and decomposition framework that learns a single shared metaprompt from 21 diverse clinical source tasks and adapts it to unseen target tasks with fewer than 0.05% trainable parameters. Evaluated across five clinical NLP task types (named entity recognition, relation extraction, question answering, natural language inference, and summarization) on 10 held-out target datasets using three backbone models (LLaMA 3.1 8B, Meditron3 8B, gpt-oss 20B), our framework consistently outperforms LoRA by 1.5~1.7% despite using orders of magnitude fewer parameters, and exceeds single-task prompt tuning by 6.1~6.6%. The gpt-oss 20B model achieves the highest overall performance, particularly on clinical reasoning tasks. The strong zero- and few-shot performance demonstrates better transferability of the shared prompt representation.

AI.tldr: 提出多任务提示蒸馏与分解框架，从21个临床NLP任务学习共享元提示，以少于0.05%可训练参数适应新任务，在多种临床NLP任务上超越LoRA和单任务提示调优。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的微调方法通常独立学习任务特定提示，在部署多个临床NLP系统时带来显著的计算和存储开销。需要一种更高效的多任务提示学习方法。
AI.method: 提出多任务提示蒸馏与分解框架：1) 从21个临床源任务学习单一共享元提示；2) 通过分解机制将元提示适应到未见目标任务；3) 使用少于0.05%可训练参数实现高效适应。
AI.result: 在5类临床NLP任务（命名实体识别、关系抽取、问答、自然语言推理、摘要）的10个目标数据集上，使用3个骨干模型（LLaMA 3.1 8B、Meditron3 8B、gpt-oss 20B），框架性能：1) 比LoRA高1.5~1.7%，参数少几个数量级；2) 比单任务提示调优高6.1~6.6%；3) gpt-oss 20B在临床推理任务上表现最佳；4) 零样本和少样本性能显示更好的提示表示可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过共享元提示学习实现了高效的多任务适应，显著减少参数开销的同时提升性能，特别适合临床NLP系统的大规模部署。

title: Bi-level Heterogeneous Learning for Time Series Foundation Models: A Federated Learning Approach
summary: Heterogeneity in time series data is more pronounced than in vision or language, as temporal dynamics vary substantially across domains and tasks. Existing efforts on training time series foundation models (TSFMs) from scratch are often trained with mixed-batch strategies that merge large-scale datasets, which can cause gradient conflicts and degrade representation quality. To address this, we propose a fine-grained learning method that distills invariant knowledge from heterogeneous series while reducing cross-domain interference. We characterize heterogeneity at two levels: inter-domain and intra-domain. To tackle this bi-level heterogeneity, we design a federated learning method that mitigates intra-domain conflicts by enforcing domain-invariant and semantically consistent representations through local regularization, and addresses inter-domain discrepancies by enhancing cross-domain collaboration via domain-aware aggregation. Experiments across diverse benchmarks show that TSFMs trained with our method consistently outperform both centralized and federated TSFM baselines in point and probabilistic forecasting, while also achieving competitive zero-shot performance at scale, offering a flexible pathway for training TSFMs from scratch in heterogeneous environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对时间序列基础模型（TSFM）的细粒度学习方法，通过联邦学习框架解决时间序列数据中的双层异质性（域间和域内），在减少跨域干扰的同时提取不变知识，从而提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 时间序列数据的异质性比视觉或语言数据更为显著，不同领域和任务的时间动态变化很大。现有训练时间序列基础模型的方法通常使用混合批处理策略合并大规模数据集，这会导致梯度冲突并降低表示质量。需要一种能够从异质序列中提取不变知识同时减少跨域干扰的方法。
AI.method: 提出细粒度学习方法，通过联邦学习框架处理双层异质性：1）针对域内冲突，通过局部正则化强制域不变和语义一致的表示；2）针对域间差异，通过域感知聚合增强跨域协作。该方法在训练时间序列基础模型时能够有效减少梯度冲突。
AI.result: 在多样化基准测试中，使用该方法训练的时间序列基础模型在点预测和概率预测方面均优于集中式和联邦式基线模型，同时在大规模零样本预测方面也表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在异质环境中从头训练时间序列基础模型提供了灵活途径，能够有效处理时间序列数据的异质性，提升模型性能并实现更好的泛化能力。

title: CloudMamba: An Uncertainty-Guided Dual-Scale Mamba Network for Cloud Detection in Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Cloud detection in remote sensing imagery is a fundamental, critical, and highly challenging problem. Existing deep learning-based cloud detection methods generally formulate it as a single-stage pixel-wise binary segmentation task with one forward pass. However, such single-stage approaches exhibit ambiguity and uncertainty in thin-cloud regions and struggle to accurately handle fragmented clouds and boundary details. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning framework termed CloudMamba. To address the ambiguity in thin-cloud regions, we introduce an uncertainty-guided two-stage cloud detection strategy. An embedded uncertainty estimation module is proposed to automatically quantify the confidence of thin-cloud segmentation, and a second-stage refinement segmentation is introduced to improve the accuracy in low-confidence hard regions. To better handle fragmented clouds and fine-grained boundary details, we design a dual-scale Mamba network based on a CNN-Mamba hybrid architecture. Compared with Transformer-based models with quadratic computational complexity, the proposed method maintains linear computational complexity while effectively capturing both large-scale structural characteristics and small-scale boundary details of clouds, enabling accurate delineation of overall cloud morphology and precise boundary segmentation. Extensive experiments conducted on the GF1_WHU and Levir_CS public datasets demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches across multiple segmentation accuracy metrics, while offering high efficiency and process transparency. Our code is available at https://github.com/jayoungo/CloudMamba.

AI.tldr: CloudMamba：一种基于CNN-Mamba混合架构的双尺度网络，采用不确定性引导的两阶段策略进行遥感图像云检测，在薄云区域和边界细节处理上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习云检测方法通常采用单阶段像素级二值分割，但在薄云区域存在模糊性和不确定性，难以准确处理碎片化云和边界细节。
AI.method: 1) 不确定性引导的两阶段云检测策略：第一阶段包含不确定性估计模块量化薄云分割置信度，第二阶段对低置信度困难区域进行细化分割；2) 基于CNN-Mamba混合架构的双尺度Mamba网络，保持线性计算复杂度同时有效捕捉云的大尺度结构特征和小尺度边界细节。
AI.result: 在GF1_WHU和Levir_CS公开数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在多个分割精度指标上优于现有方法，同时具有高效率和过程透明度。
AI.conclusion: CloudMamba通过两阶段策略和双尺度Mamba网络有效解决了薄云区域模糊性和碎片化云边界细节的挑战，为遥感图像云检测提供了更准确高效的解决方案。

title: A Graph-Enhanced Defense Framework for Explainable Fake News Detection with LLM
summary: Explainable fake news detection aims to assess the veracity of news claims while providing human-friendly explanations. Existing methods incorporating investigative journalism are often inefficient and struggle with breaking news. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) enable leveraging externally retrieved reports as evidence for detection and explanation generation, but unverified reports may introduce inaccuracies. Moreover, effective explainable fake news detection should provide a comprehensible explanation for all aspects of a claim to assist the public in verifying its accuracy. To address these challenges, we propose a graph-enhanced defense framework (G-Defense) that provides fine-grained explanations based solely on unverified reports. Specifically, we construct a claim-centered graph by decomposing the news claim into several sub-claims and modeling their dependency relationships. For each sub-claim, we use the retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) technique to retrieve salient evidence and generate competing explanations. We then introduce a defense-like inference module based on the graph to assess the overall veracity. Finally, we prompt an LLM to generate an intuitive explanation graph. Experimental results demonstrate that G-Defense achieves state-of-the-art performance in both veracity detection and the quality of its explanations.

AI.tldr: G-Defense：基于图增强的可解释假新闻检测框架，通过分解新闻主张为子主张并构建依赖图，使用RAG检索证据生成竞争性解释，最终评估真实性并生成直观解释图。
AI.motivation: 现有假新闻检测方法效率低下且难以处理突发新闻，而基于LLM的方法可能因使用未验证报告而引入不准确性。需要为新闻主张的各个方面提供可理解解释，帮助公众验证准确性。
AI.method: 1) 将新闻主张分解为子主张并构建主张中心图；2) 对每个子主张使用RAG检索显著证据并生成竞争性解释；3) 基于图的防御式推理模块评估整体真实性；4) 提示LLM生成直观解释图。
AI.result: 实验结果表明G-Defense在真实性检测和解释质量方面均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: G-Defense框架能够仅基于未验证报告提供细粒度解释，有效解决现有可解释假新闻检测方法的局限性。

title: Extraction of linearized models from pre-trained networks via knowledge distillation
summary: Recent developments in hardware, such as photonic integrated circuits and optical devices, are driving demand for research on constructing machine learning architectures tailored for linear operations. Hence, it is valuable to explore methods for constructing learning machines with only linear operations after simple nonlinear preprocessing. In this study, we propose a framework to extract a linearized model from a pre-trained neural network for classification tasks by integrating Koopman operator theory with knowledge distillation. Numerical demonstrations on the MNIST and the Fashion-MNIST datasets reveal that the proposed model consistently outperforms the conventional least-squares-based Koopman approximation in both classification accuracy and numerical stability.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合Koopman算子理论与知识蒸馏的框架，从预训练神经网络中提取线性化模型用于分类任务，在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上优于传统最小二乘Koopman近似方法。
AI.motivation: 硬件发展（如光子集成电路和光学器件）推动了对适合线性操作的机器学习架构的研究需求，因此探索通过简单非线性预处理后仅使用线性操作构建学习机器的方法具有价值。
AI.method: 提出一个框架，将Koopman算子理论与知识蒸馏相结合，从预训练神经网络中提取线性化模型用于分类任务。通过非线性预处理将数据映射到高维空间，然后在该空间中使用线性Koopman算子进行学习。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上的数值实验表明，所提模型在分类准确率和数值稳定性方面均优于传统的最小二乘Koopman近似方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为构建适合线性硬件实现的机器学习模型提供了有效方法，结合Koopman算子理论和知识蒸馏能够从复杂神经网络中提取高效的线性表示。

title: Vision-Language Model-Guided Deep Unrolling Enables Personalized, Fast MRI
summary: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is a cornerstone in medicine and healthcare but suffers from long acquisition times. Traditional accelerated MRI methods optimize for generic image quality, lacking adaptability for specific clinical tasks. To address this, we introduce PASS (Personalized, Anomaly-aware Sampling and reconStruction), an intelligent MRI framework that leverages a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to guide a deep unrolling network for task-oriented, fast imaging. PASS dynamically personalizes the imaging pipeline through three core contributions: (1) a deep unrolled reconstruction network derived from a physics-based MRI model; (2) a sampling module that generates patient-specific $k$-space trajectories; and (3) an anomaly-aware prior, extracted from a pretrained VLM, which steers both sampling and reconstruction toward clinically relevant regions. By integrating the high-level clinical reasoning of a VLM with an interpretable, physics-aware network, PASS achieves superior image quality across diverse anatomies, contrasts, anomalies, and acceleration factors. This enhancement directly translates to improvements in downstream diagnostic tasks, including fine-grained anomaly detection, localization, and diagnosis.

AI.tldr: PASS是一个智能MRI框架，利用视觉语言模型指导深度展开网络，实现面向临床任务的快速成像，通过个性化采样和异常感知先验提升图像质量和诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 传统加速MRI方法优化通用图像质量，缺乏对特定临床任务的适应性。MRI采集时间长，需要既能加速成像又能针对具体临床任务优化的智能框架。
AI.method: 提出PASS框架：1) 基于物理MRI模型的深度展开重建网络；2) 生成患者特异性k空间轨迹的采样模块；3) 从预训练VLM提取的异常感知先验，引导采样和重建关注临床相关区域。
AI.result: PASS在不同解剖结构、对比度、异常情况和加速因子下均获得优越的图像质量，直接提升下游诊断任务性能，包括细粒度异常检测、定位和诊断。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合VLM的高级临床推理与可解释的物理感知网络，PASS实现了任务导向的个性化MRI加速，显著改善临床诊断效果。

title: Between Century and Poet: Graph-Based Lexical Semantic Change in Persian Poetry
summary: Meaning in Persian poetry is both historical and relational. Words persist through literary tradition while shifting their force through changing constellations of neighbors, rhetorical frames, and poetic voices. This study examines that process using aligned Word2Vec spaces combined with graph-based neighborhood analysis across centuries and major poets. Rather than modeling semantic change as vector displacement alone, it treats lexical history as the rewiring of local semantic graphs: the gain and loss of neighbors, shifts in bridge roles, and movement across communities. The analysis centers on twenty target words, anchored by five recurrent reference terms: Earth, Night, two wine terms, and Heart. Surrounding them are affective, courtly, elemental, and Sufi concepts such as Love, Sorrow, Dervish, King, Annihilation, and Truth. These words exhibit distinct patterns of change. Night is more time-sensitive, Earth more poet-sensitive, and Heart shows continuity despite graph-role mobility. The two wine terms highlight probe sensitivity: one is broad and semantically diffuse, while the other is narrower and more stable. A lexical audit confirms that the corpus contains historically driven terms, poet-specific usages, and sparsely attested mystical vocabulary requiring caution. Overall, semantic change in Persian poetry is better captured as neighborhood rewiring than as abstract drift. For Digital Humanities, this approach restores local structure to computational analysis and supports interpretations closer to literary practice: persistence, migration, mediation, and selective transformation.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用对齐的Word2Vec空间和图基邻域分析，将波斯诗歌中的语义变化建模为局部语义图的重连（邻居增减、桥梁角色变化、社区迁移），而非单纯的向量位移。
AI.motivation: 传统语义变化研究多关注向量位移，但波斯诗歌中的意义既是历史的又是关系的，词汇在文学传统中持续存在，同时通过邻居、修辞框架和诗歌声音的变化而改变力量。需要一种能捕捉局部语义结构变化的方法。
AI.method: 使用对齐的Word2Vec空间结合图基邻域分析，跨越多个世纪和主要诗人。分析20个目标词（以5个重复参考词为中心：地球、夜晚、两个酒术语、心脏），考察情感、宫廷、元素和苏菲概念如爱、悲伤、苦行僧、国王、湮灭、真理等。
AI.result: 不同词汇展现不同的变化模式：夜晚更具时间敏感性，地球更具诗人敏感性，心脏在图形角色流动中保持连续性。两个酒术语显示探测敏感性差异：一个广泛而语义分散，另一个更窄更稳定。词汇审计确认了历史驱动术语、诗人特定用法和需要谨慎处理的稀疏神秘词汇。
AI.conclusion: 波斯诗歌中的语义变化更适合被捕捉为邻域重连而非抽象漂移。对于数字人文，这种方法将局部结构恢复到计算分析中，支持更接近文学实践的解释：持续性、迁移、调解和选择性转变。

title: Busemann energy-based attention for emotion analysis in Poincaré discs
summary: We present EmBolic - a novel fully hyperbolic deep learning architecture for fine-grained emotion analysis from textual messages. The underlying idea is that hyperbolic geometry efficiently captures hierarchies between both words and emotions. In our context, these hierarchical relationships arise from semantic ambiguities. EmBolic aims to infer the curvature on the continuous space of emotions, rather than treating them as a categorical set without any metric structure. In the heart of our architecture is the attention mechanism in the hyperbolic disc. The model is trained to generate queries (points in the hyperbolic disc) from textual messages, while keys (points at the boundary) emerge automatically from the generated queries. Predictions are based on the Busemann energy between queries and keys, evaluating how well a certain textual message aligns with the class directions representing emotions. Our experiments demonstrate strong generalization properties and reasonably good prediction accuracy even for small dimensions of the representation space. Overall, this study supports our claim that affective computing is one of the application domains where hyperbolic representations are particularly advantageous.

AI.tldr: EmBolic：一种基于双曲几何的深度学习架构，用于文本消息的细粒度情感分析，利用双曲空间有效捕捉词与情感间的层次关系。
AI.motivation: 传统情感分析将情感视为无度量结构的分类集合，忽略了语义模糊性产生的层次关系。双曲几何能高效捕捉词与情感间的层次结构，为细粒度情感分析提供更合适的表示空间。
AI.method: 提出全双曲深度学习架构EmBolic，核心是双曲圆盘中的注意力机制。模型从文本消息生成查询（双曲圆盘中的点），而键（边界点）从生成的查询自动产生。预测基于查询与键之间的Busemann能量，评估文本消息与代表情感类别的方向对齐程度。
AI.result: 实验表明模型具有良好的泛化性能，即使在表示空间维度较小时也能获得合理的预测准确率。研究支持双曲表示在情感计算领域具有特别优势的论点。
AI.conclusion: 双曲几何为细粒度情感分析提供了有效的表示框架，能捕捉语义层次关系。情感计算是双曲表示特别有利的应用领域之一。

title: Physical Adversarial Attacks on AI Surveillance Systems:Detection, Tracking, and Visible--Infrared Evasion
summary: Physical adversarial attacks are increasingly studied in settings that resemble deployed surveillance systems rather than isolated image benchmarks. In these settings, person detection, multi-object tracking, visible--infrared sensing, and the practical form of the attack carrier all matter at once. This changes how the literature should be read. A perturbation that suppresses a detector in one frame may have limited practical effect if identity is recovered over time; an RGB-only result may say little about night-time systems that rely on visible and thermal inputs together; and a conspicuous patch can imply a different threat model from a wearable or selectively activated carrier. This paper reviews physical attacks from that surveillance-oriented viewpoint. Rather than attempting a complete catalogue of all physical attacks in computer vision, we focus on the technical questions that become central in surveillance: temporal persistence, sensing modality, carrier realism, and system-level objective. We organize prior work through a four-part taxonomy and discuss how recent results on multi-object tracking, dual-modal visible--infrared evasion, and controllable clothing reflect a broader change in the field. We also summarize evaluation practices and unresolved gaps, including distance robustness, camera-pipeline variation, identity-level metrics, and activation-aware testing. The resulting picture is that surveillance robustness cannot be judged reliably from isolated per-frame benchmarks alone; it has to be examined as a system problem unfolding over time, across sensors, and under realistic physical deployment constraints.

AI.tldr: 论文从监控系统视角综述物理对抗攻击，强调时间持续性、多模态感知、载体现实性和系统级目标等关键问题，指出传统单帧基准不足以评估监控鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有物理对抗攻击研究多关注孤立图像基准，而实际监控系统涉及人员检测、多目标跟踪、可见光-红外感知等多种因素，需要从系统层面重新审视攻击的有效性和评估方法。
AI.method: 采用四部分分类法组织现有工作：时间持续性、感知模态、载体现实性和系统级目标；重点分析多目标跟踪、双模态可见光-红外规避和可控服装等最新进展。
AI.result: 提出监控系统鲁棒性评估需要综合考虑距离鲁棒性、相机流水线变化、身份级指标和激活感知测试等未解决问题，强调系统级评估的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 监控鲁棒性不能仅依赖孤立单帧基准评估，必须作为随时间展开、跨传感器、在现实物理部署约束下的系统问题进行考察。

title: Concentrated siting of AI data centers drives regional power-system stress under rising global compute demand
summary: The rapid rise of generative artificial intelligence (AI) is driving unprecedented growth in global computational demand, placing increasing pressure on electricity systems. This study introduces an AI-energy coupling framework that combines large language models (LLMs)-based analysis of corporate, policy, and media data with quantitative energy-system modeling to forecast the electricity footprint of AI-driven data centers from 2025 to 2030. Results show that the new AI infrastructure is highly concentrated in North America, Western Europe, and the Asia-Pacific, which together account for more than 90% of projected compute capacity. Aggregate electricity consumption by the six leading firms is projected to increase from roughly 118 TWh in 2024 to between 239 TWh and 295 TWh by 2030, equivalent to about 1% of global power demand. Regions such as Oregon, Virginia, and Ireland may experience high Power Stress Index (PSI) values exceeding 0.25, indicating local grid vulnerability, whereas diversified systems such as those in Texas and Japan can absorb new loads more effectively. These findings demonstrate that AI infrastructure is evolving from a marginal digital service into a structural component of power-system dynamics, underscoring the need for anticipatory planning that aligns computational growth with renewable expansion and grid resilience.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出AI-能源耦合框架，结合LLM分析和能源系统建模，预测2025-2030年AI数据中心电力足迹，发现AI基础设施正成为电力系统结构性因素
AI.motivation: 生成式AI快速发展导致全球计算需求激增，给电力系统带来巨大压力，需要预测AI基础设施的电力消耗及其对电网的影响
AI.method: 结合LLM分析企业、政策和媒体数据，与定量能源系统建模相结合，预测AI驱动数据中心的电力足迹
AI.result: AI基础设施高度集中在北美、西欧和亚太地区；六大领先企业电力消耗将从2024年118TWh增至2030年239-295TWh，占全球电力需求约1%；部分地区电网脆弱性较高
AI.conclusion: AI基础设施正从边缘数字服务演变为电力系统动态的结构性组成部分，需要前瞻性规划将计算增长与可再生能源扩展和电网韧性对齐

title: ChemVLR: Prioritizing Reasoning in Perception for Chemical Vision-Language Understanding
comment: Accepted by ACL 2026 Findings, Preprint Version
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in chemical visual understanding, current models are predominantly optimized for direct visual question-answering tasks. This paradigm often results in "black-box" systems that fail to utilize the inherent capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to infer underlying reaction mechanisms. In this work, we introduce ChemVLR, a chemical VLM designed to prioritize reasoning within the perception process. Unlike conventional chemical VLMs, ChemVLR analyzes visual inputs in a fine-grained manner by explicitly identifying granular chemical descriptors, such as functional groups, prior to generating answers. This approach ensures the production of explicit and interpretable reasoning paths for complex visual chemical problems. To facilitate this methodology, we implement a cross-modality reverse-engineering strategy, combined with a rigorous filtering pipeline, to curate a large-scale reasoning-and-captioning dataset comprising 760k high-quality samples across molecular and reaction tasks. Furthermore, we adopt a three-stage training framework that systemically builds model perception and reasoning capacity. Experiments demonstrate that ChemVLR achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, surpassing both leading proprietary models and domain-specific open-source baselines. We also provide comprehensive ablation studies to validate our training strategy and data generation designs. Code and model weights will be available at https://github.com/xxlllz/ChemVLR.

AI.tldr: ChemVLR是一个化学视觉语言模型，通过细粒度化学描述符识别（如官能团）来优先考虑感知过程中的推理，为复杂视觉化学问题提供可解释的推理路径。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型主要针对直接视觉问答任务进行优化，导致"黑盒"系统无法利用大语言模型的推理能力来推断底层反应机制。需要一种能够优先考虑推理过程的化学VLM。
AI.method: 1) 采用跨模态逆向工程策略和严格过滤流程，构建包含76万高质量样本的大规模推理和标注数据集；2) 设计三阶段训练框架系统构建模型感知和推理能力；3) 通过细粒度化学描述符识别（如官能团）实现显式推理路径。
AI.result: ChemVLR在分子和反应任务上实现了最先进的性能，超越了领先的专有模型和特定领域的开源基线模型。全面的消融研究验证了训练策略和数据生成设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ChemVLR通过优先考虑感知过程中的推理，为化学视觉理解提供了可解释的解决方案，展示了在复杂视觉化学问题中实现显式推理路径的有效性。

title: The Rhetoric of Machine Learning
comment: 25 pages. Text of a talk given at AlphaPersuade 2.0, 26 March 2026
summary: I examine the technology of machine learning from the perspective of rhetoric, which is simply the art of persuasion. Rather than being a neutral and "objective" way to build "world models" from data, machine learning is (I argue) inherently rhetorical. I explore some of its rhetorical features, and examine one pervasive business model where machine learning is widely used, "manipulation as a service."

AI.tldr: 论文从修辞学角度分析机器学习技术，认为机器学习本质上是说服的艺术而非客观的"世界模型"构建，并探讨了"操纵即服务"这一普遍商业模式。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机是挑战机器学习作为"客观"、"中立"技术的主流观点，从修辞学角度揭示机器学习本质上是一种说服和操纵的工具，特别是在商业应用中。
AI.method: 采用修辞学理论框架分析机器学习技术，探讨其作为说服艺术的特性，并具体分析"操纵即服务"这一商业模式中机器学习的应用方式。
AI.result: 论证了机器学习具有固有的修辞特性，不是中性的技术工具，而是被设计用于影响和说服用户，特别是在商业环境中作为操纵工具使用。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习应被理解为一种修辞实践而非客观科学，其设计和应用反映了特定的说服目的，需要从伦理和社会影响角度重新审视。

title: RefineAnything: Multimodal Region-Specific Refinement for Perfect Local Details
summary: We introduce region-specific image refinement as a dedicated problem setting: given an input image and a user-specified region (e.g., a scribble mask or a bounding box), the goal is to restore fine-grained details while keeping all non-edited pixels strictly unchanged. Despite rapid progress in image generation, modern models still frequently suffer from local detail collapse (e.g., distorted text, logos, and thin structures). Existing instruction-driven editing models emphasize coarse-grained semantic edits and often either overlook subtle local defects or inadvertently change the background, especially when the region of interest occupies only a small portion of a fixed-resolution input. We present RefineAnything, a multimodal diffusion-based refinement model that supports both reference-based and reference-free refinement. Building on a counter-intuitive observation that crop-and-resize can substantially improve local reconstruction under a fixed VAE input resolution, we propose Focus-and-Refine, a region-focused refinement-and-paste-back strategy that improves refinement effectiveness and efficiency by reallocating the resolution budget to the target region, while a blended-mask paste-back guarantees strict background preservation. We further introduce a boundary-aware Boundary Consistency Loss to reduce seam artifacts and improve paste-back naturalness. To support this new setting, we construct Refine-30K (20K reference-based and 10K reference-free samples) and introduce RefineEval, a benchmark that evaluates both edited-region fidelity and background consistency. On RefineEval, RefineAnything achieves strong improvements over competitive baselines and near-perfect background preservation, establishing a practical solution for high-precision local refinement. Project Page: https://limuloo.github.io/RefineAnything/.

AI.tldr: RefineAnything是一个多模态扩散模型，专门解决区域特定图像细化问题，支持基于参考和无参考的细化，通过Focus-and-Refine策略和边界一致性损失实现高精度局部细节恢复，同时严格保持背景不变。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成模型在处理局部细节（如扭曲的文字、徽标和细结构）时经常失败，而指令驱动的编辑模型要么忽略细微局部缺陷，要么无意中改变背景，特别是当感兴趣区域只占固定分辨率输入的一小部分时。需要专门解决区域特定图像细化问题。
AI.method: 提出RefineAnything多模态扩散细化模型，支持基于参考和无参考细化。核心是Focus-and-Refine策略：通过裁剪和调整大小将分辨率预算重新分配给目标区域，然后使用混合掩码粘贴回原始图像。还引入边界感知的边界一致性损失来减少接缝伪影。
AI.result: 在RefineEval基准测试中，RefineAnything相比竞争基线取得显著改进，实现近乎完美的背景保持。构建了Refine-30K数据集（20K参考样本和10K无参考样本）用于训练和评估。
AI.conclusion: RefineAnything为高精度局部细化提供了实用解决方案，通过区域聚焦的细化策略和边界一致性损失，在保持背景严格不变的同时有效恢复局部细节。

title: Thinking in Graphs with CoMAP: A Shared Visual Workspace for Designing Project-Based Learning
summary: Designing project-based learning (PBL) demands managing highly interdependent components, a task that both traditional linear tools and purely conversational AI struggle with. Traditional tools fail to capture the non-linear nature of creative design, while conversational systems lack the persistent, shared context necessary for reflective collaboration. Grounded in theories of distributed cognition, we introduce CoMAP, a system that embodies a graph-based collaboration paradigm. By providing a shared visual workspace with dual-modality AI support, CoMAP transforms the human-AI relationship from a prompt-and-response loop into a transparent and equitable partnership. Our study with 30 educators shows CoMAP significantly improves teachers' design expression, divergent thinking, and iterative practice compared to a dialogue-only baseline. These findings demonstrate how a nonlinear, artifact-centric approach can foster trust, reduce cognitive load, and \textcolor{fix}{support} educators to take control of their creative process. Our contributions are available at: https://comap2025.github.io/.

AI.tldr: CoMAP是一个基于图结构的协作系统，通过共享视觉工作空间和双模态AI支持，将人机关系从提示-响应循环转变为透明平等的伙伴关系，显著提升教师的设计表达、发散思维和迭代实践能力。
AI.motivation: 传统线性工具无法捕捉创造性设计的非线性特性，而纯对话式AI系统缺乏反思协作所需的持久共享上下文。基于分布式认知理论，需要一种新的协作范式来支持项目式学习的设计。
AI.method: 引入CoMAP系统，采用基于图的协作范式，提供共享视觉工作空间和双模态AI支持，将人机交互从提示-响应循环转变为透明平等的伙伴关系。
AI.result: 对30名教育工作者的研究表明，与纯对话基线相比，CoMAP显著提高了教师的设计表达、发散思维和迭代实践能力，展示了非线性、以工件为中心的方法如何培养信任、减少认知负荷。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的协作范式能够有效支持创造性设计过程，通过共享视觉工作空间和双模态AI支持，实现更透明、平等的人机伙伴关系，为项目式学习设计提供新工具。

title: Adaptive Prompt Structure Factorization: A Framework for Self-Discovering and Optimizing Compositional Prompt Programs
summary: Automated prompt optimization is crucial for eliciting reliable reasoning from large language models (LLMs), yet most API-only prompt optimizers iteratively edit monolithic prompts, coupling components and obscuring credit assignment, limiting controllability, and wasting tokens. We propose Adaptive Prompt Structure Factorization (aPSF), an API-only framework (prompt-in/text-out; no access to model internals) that uses an Architect model to discover task-specific prompt structures as semantic factors. aPSF then performs interventional, single-factor updates: interventional factor-level scoring estimates each factor's marginal contribution via validation-performance changes, and error-guided factor selection routes updates to the current dominant failure source for more sample-efficient optimization. Across multiple advanced reasoning benchmarks, aPSF outperforms strong baselines including principle-aware optimizers, improving accuracy by up to +2.16 percentage points on average, and reduces optimization cost by 45--87% tokens on MultiArith while reaching peak validation in 1 step.

AI.tldr: aPSF框架通过将提示分解为语义因子，进行干预性单因子更新，实现更高效、可控的API-only提示优化
AI.motivation: 现有API-only提示优化器通常迭代编辑整体提示，导致组件耦合、信用分配不明确、可控性差和token浪费，需要更高效的优化方法
AI.method: 提出自适应提示结构分解(aPSF)框架：1) 使用Architect模型发现任务特定的提示结构作为语义因子；2) 进行干预性单因子更新，通过因子级评分估计每个因子的边际贡献；3) 错误引导的因子选择将更新路由到当前主要失败源
AI.result: 在多个高级推理基准测试中，aPSF优于包括原则感知优化器在内的强基线，平均准确率提升高达+2.16个百分点，在MultiArith上减少45-87%的token优化成本，仅需1步达到峰值验证
AI.conclusion: aPSF通过因子化提示结构和干预性更新，实现了更高效、可控的API-only提示优化，为LLM提示工程提供了新方法

title: Geometric Properties of the Voronoi Tessellation in Latent Semantic Manifolds of Large Language Models
summary:
Language models operate on discrete tokens but compute in continuous vector spaces, inducing a Voronoi tessellation over the representation manifold. We study this tessellation empirically on Qwen3.5-4B-Base, making two contributions. First, using float32 margin recomputation to resolve bfloat16 quantization artifacts, we validate Mabrok's (2026) linear scaling law of the expressibility gap with $R^2$ = 0.9997 - the strongest confirmation to date - and identify a mid-layer geometric ambiguity regime where margin geometry is anti-correlated with cross-entropy (layers 24-28, $ρ$ = -0.29) before crystallizing into alignment at the final layer ($ρ$ = 0.836).
  Second, we show that the Voronoi tessellation of a converged model is reshapable through margin refinement procedures (MRP): short post-hoc optimization runs that widen token-decision margins without retraining. We compare direct margin maximization against Fisher information distance maximization across a dose-response sweep. Both methods find the same ceiling of ~16,300 correctable positions per 256K evaluated, but differ critically in collateral damage. Margin maximization damage escalates with intervention strength until corrections are overwhelmed. Fisher damage remains constant at ~5,300 positions across the validated range ($λ$ = 0.15-0.6), achieving +28% median margin improvement at $λ$ = 0.6 with invariant downstream benchmarks - a geometric reorganization that compresses the expressibility gap while preserving its scaling law. However, frequency and token-class audits reveal that gains concentrate in high-frequency structural tokens (84% of net corrections at $λ$ = 0.6), with content and entity-like contributions shrinking at higher $λ$. Fisher MRP is therefore a viable geometric polishing tool whose practical ceiling is set not by aggregate damage but by the uniformity of token-level benefit.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究语言模型的Voronoi镶嵌几何结构，通过float32边界重计算验证了表达性间隙的线性缩放定律，并提出边界精炼程序（MRP）来重塑收敛模型的镶嵌结构，其中Fisher信息距离最大化方法能在保持下游性能的同时改善边界几何。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在离散token上操作但在连续向量空间中计算，这会在表示流形上诱导出Voronoi镶嵌。研究者希望实证研究这种镶嵌结构，验证表达性间隙的缩放定律，并探索是否可以通过后处理优化来重塑收敛模型的镶嵌几何。
AI.method: 使用Qwen3.5-4B-Base模型，采用float32边界重计算来消除bfloat16量化伪影。验证Mabrok（2026）的线性缩放定律。提出边界精炼程序（MRP）：短期的后处理优化运行，在不重新训练的情况下扩大token决策边界。比较直接边界最大化与Fisher信息距离最大化方法，进行剂量响应扫描分析。
AI.result: 1）验证了表达性间隙的线性缩放定律（R²=0.9997），发现中间层存在几何模糊区域（层24-28，ρ=-0.29），最终层边界几何与交叉熵对齐（ρ=0.836）。2）两种MRP方法都能纠正约16,300个位置（每256K评估），但Fisher方法在λ=0.15-0.6范围内保持恒定损伤（~5,300位置），实现+28%中值边界改进，同时保持下游基准不变。然而，改进主要集中在高频结构token（84%净纠正），内容和实体类贡献在更高λ时减少。
AI.conclusion: Fisher MRP是一种可行的几何抛光工具，其实用上限不是由总体损伤决定，而是由token级收益的均匀性决定。该方法可以压缩表达性间隙同时保持其缩放定律，但需要解决收益分布不均的问题。

title: SCT-MOT: Enhancing Air-to-Air Multiple UAVs Tracking with Swarm-Coupled Motion and Trajectory Guidance
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures. Under review at IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems (TAES). This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Air-to-air tracking of swarm UAVs presents significant challenges due to the complex nonlinear group motion and weak visual cues for small objects, which often cause detection failures, trajectory fragmentation, and identity switches. Although existing methods have attempted to improve performance by incorporating trajectory prediction, they model each object independently, neglecting the swarm-level motion dependencies. Their limited integration between motion prediction and appearance representation also weakens the spatio-temporal consistency required for tracking in visually ambiguous and cluttered environments, making it difficult to maintain coherent trajectories and reliable associations. To address these challenges, we propose SCT-MOT, a tracking framework that integrates Swarm-Coupled motion modeling and Trajectory-guided feature fusion. First, we develop a Swarm Motion-Aware Trajectory Prediction (SMTP) module jointly models historical trajectories and posture-aware appearance features from a swarm-level perspective, enabling more accurate forecasting of the nonlinear, coupled group trajectories. Second, we design a Trajectory-Guided Spatio-Temporal Feature Fusion (TG-STFF) module aligns predicted positions with historical visual cues and deeply integrates them with current frame features, enhancing temporal consistency and spatial discriminability for weak objects. Extensive experiments on three public air-to-air swarm UAV tracking datasets, including AIRMOT, MOT-FLY, and UAVSwarm, demonstrate that SMTP achieves more accurate trajectory forecasts and yields a 1.21\% IDF1 improvement over the state-of-the-art trajectory prediction module EqMotion when integrated into the same MOT framework. Overall, our SCT-MOT consistently achieves superior accuracy and robustness compared to state-of-the-art trackers across multiple metrics under complex swarm scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出SCT-MOT框架，通过群体耦合运动建模和轨迹引导特征融合，解决空中无人机群跟踪中的检测失败、轨迹碎片化和身份切换问题。
AI.motivation: 空中无人机群跟踪面临复杂非线性群体运动和弱视觉线索的挑战，现有方法独立建模每个对象，忽略了群体级运动依赖关系，预测与外观表示集成有限，导致时空一致性不足。
AI.method: 1. 群体运动感知轨迹预测模块：从群体层面联合建模历史轨迹和姿态感知外观特征；2. 轨迹引导时空特征融合模块：对齐预测位置与历史视觉线索，并与当前帧特征深度集成。
AI.result: 在AIRMOT、MOT-FLY和UAVSwarm三个数据集上验证，SMTP模块比最先进的EqMotion轨迹预测模块提升1.21% IDF1，SCT-MOT在复杂群体场景下多个指标上优于现有跟踪器。
AI.conclusion: SCT-MOT通过群体耦合运动建模和轨迹引导特征融合，显著提升了空中无人机群跟踪的准确性和鲁棒性，解决了复杂非线性群体运动中的跟踪挑战。

title: TEC: A Collection of Human Trial-and-error Trajectories for Problem Solving
summary: Trial-and-error is a fundamental strategy for humans to solve complex problems and a necessary capability for Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems operating in real-world environments. Although several trial-and-error AI techniques have recently been proposed, most of them rely on simple heuristics designed by researchers and achieve limited performance gains. The core issue is the absence of appropriate data: current models cannot learn from detailed records of how humans actually conduct trial-and-error in practice. To address this gap, we introduce a data annotation platform and a corresponding dataset, termed Trial-and-Error Collection (TEC). The platform records users' complete trajectories across multiple trials and collects their reflections after receiving error feedback. Using this platform, we record the problem-solving processes of 46 participants on 58 tasks, resulting in 5,370 trial trajectories along with error reflections across 41,229 webpages. With this dataset, we observe that humans achieve substantially higher accuracy compared to LLMs, which demonstrates that humans are more effective in trial-and-error than LLMs. We believe that the TEC platform and dataset provide a valuable foundation for understanding human trial-and-error behavior and for developing more capable AI systems. Platform and dataset are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Trial-and-Error Collection (TEC)平台和数据集，用于记录人类在解决复杂问题时的试错过程，包含5,370条试错轨迹和41,229个网页数据，旨在帮助AI系统学习人类的试错策略。
AI.motivation: 试错是人类解决复杂问题的基本策略，也是AI系统在现实环境中运行的必要能力。当前AI试错技术大多依赖研究者设计的简单启发式方法，性能提升有限，核心问题在于缺乏合适的数据——现有模型无法从人类实际试错过程的详细记录中学习。
AI.method: 开发了一个数据标注平台和相应的TEC数据集。平台记录用户在多个试错中的完整轨迹，并收集他们在收到错误反馈后的反思。通过该平台记录了46名参与者在58个任务上的问题解决过程。
AI.result: 收集了5,370条试错轨迹和41,229个网页数据，包含错误反思。研究发现人类在试错中的准确率显著高于LLMs，表明人类在试错方面比LLMs更有效。
AI.conclusion: TEC平台和数据集为理解人类试错行为和开发更强大的AI系统提供了宝贵基础。平台和数据集已公开可用。

title: Sparse-Aware Neural Networks for Nonlinear Functionals: Mitigating the Exponential Dependence on Dimension
summary: Deep neural networks have emerged as powerful tools for learning operators defined over infinite-dimensional function spaces. However, existing theories frequently encounter difficulties related to dimensionality and limited interpretability. This work investigates how sparsity can help address these challenges in functional learning, a central ingredient in operator learning. We propose a framework that employs convolutional architectures to extract sparse features from a finite number of samples, together with deep fully connected networks to effectively approximate nonlinear functionals. Using universal discretization methods, we show that sparse approximators enable stable recovery from discrete samples. In addition, both the deterministic and the random sampling schemes are sufficient for our analysis. These findings lead to improved approximation rates and reduced sample sizes in various function spaces, including those with fast frequency decay and mixed smoothness. They also provide new theoretical insights into how sparsity can alleviate the curse of dimensionality in functional learning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用稀疏性解决函数学习中维数灾难问题的框架，通过卷积架构提取稀疏特征，结合深度全连接网络逼近非线性泛函，实现了更优的逼近率和更小的样本需求。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络已成为学习无限维函数空间上算子的强大工具，但现有理论常面临维度灾难和可解释性有限的挑战。本研究旨在探索稀疏性如何帮助解决函数学习（算子学习的核心要素）中的这些难题。
AI.method: 提出一个框架：使用卷积架构从有限样本中提取稀疏特征，结合深度全连接网络有效逼近非线性泛函。采用通用离散化方法，证明稀疏逼近器能够从离散样本中稳定恢复。分析涵盖确定性和随机采样方案。
AI.result: 在多种函数空间（包括快速频率衰减和混合光滑性空间）中实现了改进的逼近率和减少的样本量。稀疏逼近器能够从离散样本中稳定恢复，为缓解函数学习中的维数灾难提供了新的理论见解。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性能够有效缓解函数学习中的维数灾难问题，提出的框架在理论和实践上都取得了显著改进，为算子学习提供了更高效和可解释的方法。

title: Time-driven Survival Analysis from FDG-PET/CT in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
summary:
Purpose: Automated medical image-based prediction of clinical outcomes, such as overall survival (OS), has great potential in improving patient prognostics and personalized treatment planning. We developed a deep regression framework using tissue-wise FDG-PET/CT projections as input, along with a temporal input representing a scalar time horizon (in days) to predict OS in patients with Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC).
  Methods: The proposed framework employed a ResNet-50 backbone to process input images and generate corresponding image embeddings. The embeddings were then combined with temporal data to produce OS probabilities as a function of time, effectively parameterizing the predictions based on time. The overall framework was developed using the U-CAN cohort (n = 556) and evaluated by comparing with a baseline method on the test set (n = 292). The baseline utilized the ResNet-50 architecture, processing only the images as input and providing OS predictions at pre-specified intervals, such as 2- or 5-year.
  Results: The incorporation of temporal data with image embeddings demonstrated an advantage in predicting OS, outperforming the baseline method with an improvement in AUC of 4.3%.
