summary: Current operational Earth Observation (EO) services, including the Copernicus Emergency Management Service (CEMS), the European Forest Fire Information System (EFFIS), and the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS), rely primarily on ground-based processing pipelines. While these systems provide mature large-scale information products, they remain constrained by downlink latency, bandwidth limitations, and limited capability for autonomous observation prioritisation. The International Report for an Innovative Defence of Earth (IRIDE) programme is a national Earth observation initiative led by the Italian government to support public authorities through timely, objective information derived from spaceborne data. Rather than a single constellation, IRIDE is designed as a constellation of constellations, integrating heterogeneous sensing technologies within a unified service-oriented architecture. Within this framework, Hawk for Earth Observation (HEO) enables onboard generation of data products, allowing information extraction earlier in the processing chain. This paper examines the limitations of ground-only architectures and evaluates the added value of onboard processing at the operational service level. The IRIDE burnt-area mapping service is used as a representative case study to demonstrate how onboard intelligence can support higher spatial detail (sub-three-metre ground sampling distance), smaller detectable events (minimum mapping unit of three hectares), and improved system responsiveness. Rather than replacing existing Copernicus services, the IRIDE HEO capability is positioned as a complementary layer providing image-driven pre-classification to support downstream emergency and land-management workflows. This work highlights the operational value of onboard intelligence for emerging low-latency EO service architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了传统地面处理EO系统的局限性，并评估了星上处理在IRIDE星座中的价值，以火灾区域制图为例展示了星上智能如何提高空间分辨率、检测能力和系统响应性。
AI.motivation: 当前地球观测服务（如Copernicus）主要依赖地面处理，受限于下行链路延迟、带宽限制和自主观测优先级能力不足。IRIDE计划旨在通过星上处理能力解决这些限制，提供更及时、客观的空间数据信息。
AI.method: 采用IRIDE星座架构，整合异构传感技术，通过HEO实现星上数据产品生成。以IRIDE火灾区域制图服务为案例研究，对比分析地面处理与星上处理的性能差异。
AI.result: 星上处理能够支持更高的空间细节（亚3米地面采样距离）、更小的可检测事件（最小制图单元3公顷）和改善的系统响应性，作为现有Copernicus服务的补充层。
AI.conclusion: 星上智能为新兴的低延迟EO服务架构提供了操作价值，不是替代现有服务，而是作为支持下游应急和土地管理工作流的图像驱动预分类补充层。

title: SALLIE: Safeguarding Against Latent Language & Image Exploits
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables. Preprint under review
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remain highly vulnerable to textual and visual jailbreaks, as well as prompt injections (arXiv:2307.15043, Greshake et al., 2023, arXiv:2306.13213). Existing defenses often degrade performance through complex input transformations or treat multimodal threats as isolated problems (arXiv:2309.00614, arXiv:2310.03684, Zhang et al., 2025). To address the critical gap for a unified, modal-agnostic defense that mitigates both textual and visual threats simultaneously without degrading performance or requiring architectural modifications, we introduce SALLIE (Safeguarding Against Latent Language & Image Exploits), a lightweight runtime detection framework rooted in mechanistic interpretability (Lindsey et al., 2025, Ameisen et al., 2025). By integrating seamlessly into standard token-level fusion pipelines (arXiv:2306.13549), SALLIE extracts robust signals directly from the model's internal activations. At inference, SALLIE defends via a three-stage architecture: (1) extracting internal residual stream activations, (2) calculating layer-wise maliciousness scores using a K-Nearest Neighbors (k-NN) classifier, and (3) aggregating these predictions via a layer ensemble module. We evaluate SALLIE on compact, open-source architectures - Phi-3.5-vision-instruct (arXiv:2404.14219), SmolVLM2-2.2B-Instruct (arXiv:2504.05299), and gemma-3-4b-it (arXiv:2503.19786) - prioritized for practical inference times and real-world deployment costs. Our comprehensive evaluation pipeline spans over ten datasets and more than five strong baseline methods from the literature, and SALLIE consistently outperforms these baselines across a wide range of experimental settings.

AI.tldr: SALLIE是一个轻量级运行时检测框架，通过提取模型内部激活来统一防御文本和视觉越狱攻击，无需修改架构或降低性能。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法通常通过复杂的输入转换降低性能，或将多模态威胁视为孤立问题。需要一种统一的、模态无关的防御方法，能够同时缓解文本和视觉威胁，且不降低性能或需要架构修改。
AI.method: SALLIE采用三阶段架构：1) 提取内部残差流激活；2) 使用K近邻分类器计算层间恶意分数；3) 通过层集成模块聚合预测。框架基于机制可解释性，无缝集成到标准token级融合管道中。
AI.result: 在紧凑开源架构（Phi-3.5-vision-instruct、SmolVLM2-2.2B-Instruct、gemma-3-4b-it）上评估，涵盖10多个数据集和5个强基线方法，SALLIE在各种实验设置中始终优于基线。
AI.conclusion: SALLIE提供了一个统一、模态无关的防御框架，能够有效检测和缓解多模态越狱攻击，同时保持模型性能，适用于实际部署。

title: iTAG: Inverse Design for Natural Text Generation with Accurate Causal Graph Annotations
summary: A fundamental obstacle to causal discovery from text is the lack of causally annotated text data for use as ground truth, due to high annotation costs. This motivates an important task of generating text with causal graph annotations. Early template-based generation methods sacrifice text naturalness in exchange for high causal graph annotation accuracy. Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-dependent methods directly generate natural text from target graphs through LLMs, but do not guarantee causal graph annotation accuracy. Therefore, we propose iTAG, which performs real-world concept assignment to nodes before converting causal graphs into text in existing LLM-dependent methods. iTAG frames this process as an inverse problem with the causal graph as the target, iteratively examining and refining concept selection through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning so that the induced relations between concepts are as consistent as possible with the target causal relationships described by the causal graph. iTAG demonstrates both extremely high annotation accuracy and naturalness across extensive tests, and the results of testing text-based causal discovery algorithms with the generated data show high statistical correlation with real-world data. This suggests that iTAG-generated data can serve as a practical surrogate for scalable benchmarking of text-based causal discovery algorithms.

AI.tldr: iTAG：通过迭代概念分配和CoT推理，从因果图生成高质量自然文本，用于文本因果发现算法的基准测试
AI.motivation: 文本因果发现面临缺乏因果标注数据的挑战，现有方法要么牺牲文本自然性（模板方法），要么无法保证因果图标注准确性（LLM方法）。需要一种既能生成自然文本又能保证因果图标注准确性的方法。
AI.method: iTAG将因果图转换为文本的过程视为逆问题，在现有LLM依赖方法的基础上，先对节点进行真实世界概念分配，然后通过Chain-of-Thought推理迭代检查和精炼概念选择，确保概念间关系与目标因果图尽可能一致。
AI.result: iTAG在广泛测试中表现出极高的标注准确性和文本自然性。使用生成数据测试文本因果发现算法的结果与现实数据高度相关，表明iTAG生成的数据可作为文本因果发现算法可扩展基准测试的实际替代品。
AI.conclusion: iTAG通过结合概念分配和CoT推理，解决了文本因果发现数据生成中自然性与准确性难以兼得的问题，为文本因果发现算法的基准测试提供了实用解决方案。

title: Lumbermark: Resistant Clustering by Chopping Up Mutual Reachability Minimum Spanning Trees
summary: We introduce Lumbermark, a robust divisive clustering algorithm capable of detecting clusters of varying sizes, densities, and shapes. Lumbermark iteratively chops off large limbs connected by protruding segments of a dataset's mutual reachability minimum spanning tree. The use of mutual reachability distances smoothens the data distribution and decreases the influence of low-density objects, such as noise points between clusters or outliers at their peripheries. The algorithm can be viewed as an alternative to HDBSCAN that produces partitions with user-specified sizes. A fast, easy-to-use implementation of the new method is available in the open-source 'lumbermark' package for Python and R. We show that Lumbermark performs well on benchmark data and hope it will prove useful to data scientists and practitioners across different fields.

AI.tldr: Lumbermark是一种鲁棒的分裂聚类算法，能够检测不同大小、密度和形状的簇。它通过迭代切割数据集互达最小生成树中突出连接的"大枝"来工作，使用互达距离平滑数据分布并减少低密度对象的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类算法在处理不同大小、密度和形状的簇时存在局限性，特别是在噪声和异常值存在的情况下。需要一种鲁棒的聚类方法，能够有效处理复杂的数据分布，同时提供用户可控制的簇大小。
AI.method: 基于互达最小生成树的分裂聚类方法。算法迭代地识别并切割数据集中连接簇的"大枝"，使用互达距离来减少低密度对象（如噪声和异常值）的影响。可以看作是HDBSCAN的替代方案，但能生成用户指定大小的分区。
AI.result: 在基准数据上表现良好，提供了快速易用的Python和R实现（lumbermark包）。算法能够有效检测不同大小、密度和形状的簇，对噪声和异常值具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Lumbermark是一种有效的聚类算法，为数据科学家和从业者提供了处理复杂聚类问题的实用工具，特别是在需要控制簇大小的情况下。

title: Accuracy Improvement of Semi-Supervised Segmentation Using Supervised ClassMix and Sup-Unsup Feature Discriminator
summary: In semantic segmentation, the creation of pixel-level labels for training data incurs significant costs. To address this problem, semi-supervised learning, which utilizes a small number of labeled images alongside unlabeled images to enhance the performance, has gained attention. A conventional semi-supervised learning method, ClassMix, pastes class labels predicted from unlabeled images onto other images. However, since ClassMix performs operations using pseudo-labels obtained from unlabeled images, there is a risk of handling inaccurate labels. Additionally, there is a gap in data quality between labeled and unlabeled images, which can impact the feature maps. This study addresses these two issues. First, we propose a method where class labels from labeled images, along with the corresponding image regions, are pasted onto unlabeled images and their pseudo-labeled images. Second, we introduce a method that trains the model to make predictions on unlabeled images more similar to those on labeled images. Experiments on the Chase and COVID-19 datasets demonstrated an average improvement of 2.07% in mIoU compared to conventional semi-supervised learning methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的半监督语义分割方法，通过将标注图像中的类别标签和对应区域粘贴到未标注图像及其伪标签图像上，并训练模型使未标注图像的预测更接近标注图像，在医学图像分割任务上取得了优于传统方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 语义分割中像素级标注成本高昂，半监督学习利用少量标注图像和大量未标注图像来提升性能。传统方法ClassMix使用未标注图像的伪标签进行混合，存在处理不准确标签的风险，且标注和未标注图像之间存在数据质量差异，影响特征图。
AI.method: 1) 提出将标注图像中的类别标签及对应图像区域粘贴到未标注图像及其伪标签图像上的方法；2) 引入训练策略，使模型对未标注图像的预测更接近对标注图像的预测。
AI.result: 在Chase和COVID-19数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比传统半监督学习方法平均提升了2.07%的mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进数据混合策略和特征对齐方法，有效解决了半监督语义分割中伪标签不准确和数据质量差异的问题，在医学图像分割任务上取得了显著性能提升。

title: Is Biomedical Specialization Still Worth It? Insights from Domain-Adaptive Language Modelling with a New French Health Corpus
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse domains, yet their adaptation to specialized fields remains challenging, particularly for non-English languages. This study investigates domain-adaptive pre-training (DAPT) as a strategy for specializing small to mid-sized LLMs in the French biomedical domain through continued pre-training. We address two key research questions: the viability of specialized continued pre-training for domain adaptation and the relationship between domain-specific performance gains and general capability degradation. Our contributions include the release of a fully open-licensed French biomedical corpus suitable for commercial and open-source applications, the training and release of specialized French biomedical LLMs, and novel insights for DAPT implementation. Our methodology encompasses the collection and refinement of high-quality French biomedical texts, the exploration of causal language modeling approaches using DAPT, and conducting extensive comparative evaluations. Our results cast doubt on the efficacy of DAPT, in contrast to previous works, but we highlight its viability in smaller-scale, resource-constrained scenarios under the right conditions. Findings in this paper further suggest that model merging post-DAPT is essential to mitigate generalization trade-offs, and in some cases even improves performance on specialized tasks at which the DAPT was directed.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了领域自适应预训练（DAPT）在法语生物医学领域专业化小型到中型LLMs中的应用，发现DAPT效果有限，但模型融合后DAPT能缓解泛化权衡问题。
AI.motivation: LLMs在专业领域（特别是非英语语言）的适应仍然具有挑战性。本研究旨在探索DAPT作为法语生物医学领域专业化LLMs的策略，解决两个关键问题：专业化持续预训练的可行性，以及领域特定性能提升与通用能力退化之间的关系。
AI.method: 1) 收集和精炼高质量法语生物医学文本语料库；2) 使用DAPT探索因果语言建模方法；3) 进行广泛的比较评估；4) 研究模型融合在DAPT后的作用。
AI.result: 1) 对DAPT的有效性提出质疑（与先前研究相反）；2) 发现在资源受限的小规模场景下，DAPT在适当条件下仍可行；3) 模型融合后DAPT对于缓解泛化权衡至关重要，有时甚至能提升DAPT针对的专业任务性能。
AI.conclusion: DAPT在法语生物医学领域的专业化效果有限，但通过模型融合可以缓解泛化权衡问题。研究强调了在资源受限场景下DAPT的可行性，并提供了DAPT实施的新见解。

title: Multi-Turn Reasoning LLMs for Task Offloading in Mobile Edge Computing
summary: Emerging computation-intensive applications impose stringent latency requirements on resource-constrained mobile devices. Mobile Edge Computing (MEC) addresses this challenge through task offloading. However, designing effective policies remains difficult due to dynamic task arrivals, time-varying channels, and the spatio-temporal coupling of server queues. Conventional heuristics lack adaptability, while Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) suffers from limited generalization and architectural rigidity, requiring retraining when network topology changes. Although Large Language Models (LLMs) offer semantic reasoning capabilities, standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) yields myopic policies that greedily minimize immediate latency without accounting for long-term system evolution. To address these limitations, we propose COMLLM, a generative framework that enables foresighted decision-making in MEC systems. COMLLM integrates Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a Look-Ahead Collaborative Simulation (LACS) mechanism, which performs multi-step Monte Carlo rollouts while jointly modeling server queue dynamics. By incorporating these rollouts into the reward design, the framework captures the long-term impact of current decisions on future system states. Experimental results demonstrate that COMLLM achieves near-optimal latency and improved load-balancing fairness. Notably, it exhibits zero-shot topological scalability, allowing a model trained on small-scale networks to generalize to larger, unseen topologies without retraining, outperforming SFT, DRL, and heuristic baselines.

AI.tldr: COMLLM：一种用于移动边缘计算任务卸载的生成式框架，结合GRPO和前瞻协作模拟机制，实现长期优化的决策制定和零样本拓扑可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 移动边缘计算中的任务卸载面临动态任务到达、时变信道和服务器队列时空耦合等挑战。传统启发式方法缺乏适应性，深度强化学习泛化能力有限且架构僵化，而标准监督微调产生短视策略。需要一种能够进行前瞻性决策并适应网络拓扑变化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出COMLLM框架，集成组相对策略优化（GRPO）和前瞻协作模拟（LACS）机制。LACS执行多步蒙特卡洛推演，联合建模服务器队列动态，将这些推演纳入奖励设计以捕捉当前决策对未来系统状态的长期影响。
AI.result: COMLLM实现了接近最优的延迟和改善的负载均衡公平性。特别值得注意的是，它展现出零样本拓扑可扩展性，在小型网络上训练的模型能够无需重新训练就泛化到更大、未见过的拓扑结构，超越了SFT、DRL和启发式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: COMLLM成功解决了MEC任务卸载中的长期优化和拓扑泛化问题，将LLM的语义推理能力与前瞻性决策机制相结合，为动态网络环境下的资源管理提供了有效的解决方案。

title: A Utility-preserving De-identification Pipeline for Cross-hospital Radiology Data Sharing
summary: Large-scale radiology data are critical for developing robust medical AI systems. However, sharing such data across hospitals remains heavily constrained by privacy concerns. Existing de-identification research in radiology mainly focus on removing identifiable information to enable compliant data release. Yet whether de-identified radiology data can still preserve sufficient utility for large-scale vision-language model training and cross-hospital transfer remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce a utility-preserving de-identification pipeline (UPDP) for cross-hospital radiology data sharing. Specifically, we compile a blacklist of privacy-sensitive terms and a whitelist of pathology-related terms. For radiology images, we use a generative filtering mechanism that synthesis a privacy-filtered and pathology-reserved counterparts of the original images. These synthetic image counterparts, together with ID-filtered reports, can then be securely shared across hospitals for downstream model development and evaluation. Experiments on public chest X-ray benchmarks demonstrate that our method effectively removes privacy-sensitive information while preserving diagnostically relevant pathology cues. Models trained on the de-identified data maintain competitive diagnostic accuracy compared with those trained on the original data, while exhibiting a marked decline in identity-related accuracy, confirming effective privacy protection. In the cross-hospital setting, we further show that de-identified data can be combined with local data to yield better performance.

AI.tldr: 提出UPDP方法，通过生成式过滤机制合成隐私过滤但保留病理信息的放射影像，结合ID过滤报告，实现跨医院数据共享，在保护隐私的同时保持诊断效用。
AI.motivation: 大规模放射学数据对医疗AI系统至关重要，但医院间数据共享受隐私限制。现有研究主要关注去除可识别信息，但去标识化数据是否仍能保持大规模视觉语言模型训练和跨医院迁移的效用尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出效用保护的去标识化管道(UPDP)：1) 编译隐私敏感术语黑名单和病理相关术语白名单；2) 使用生成式过滤机制合成隐私过滤但保留病理信息的影像副本；3) 结合ID过滤报告，实现安全数据共享。
AI.result: 在公共胸部X光基准测试中，该方法有效移除隐私敏感信息同时保留诊断相关病理线索。在去标识化数据上训练的模型保持与原始数据相当的诊断准确率，而身份相关准确率显著下降，证实有效隐私保护。跨医院设置中，去标识化数据与本地数据结合可获得更好性能。
AI.conclusion: UPDP方法在保护隐私的同时保持放射学数据的诊断效用，支持跨医院数据共享和大规模视觉语言模型训练，为医疗AI发展提供隐私合规的数据解决方案。

title: The AI Skills Shift: Mapping Skill Obsolescence, Emergence, and Transition Pathways in the LLM Era
comment: 11 pages, 12 figures, 2 tables, 17 references. Code and data available at
summary: As Large Language Models reshape the global labor market, policymakers and workers need empirical data on which occupational skills may be most susceptible to automation. We present the Skill Automation Feasibility Index (SAFI), benchmarking four frontier LLMs -- LLaMA 3.3 70B, Mistral Large, Qwen 2.5 72B, and Gemini 2.5 Flash -- across 263 text-based tasks spanning all 35 skills in the U.S. Department of Labor's O*NET taxonomy (1,052 total model calls, 0% failure rate). Cross-referencing with real-world AI adoption data from the Anthropic Economic Index (756 occupations, 17,998 tasks), we propose an AI Impact Matrix -- an interpretive framework that positions skills along four quadrants: High Displacement Risk, Upskilling Required, AI-Augmented, and Lower Displacement Risk. Key findings: (1) Mathematics (SAFI: 73.2) and Programming (71.8) receive the highest automation feasibility scores; Active Listening (42.2) and Reading Comprehension (45.5) receive the lowest; (2) a "capability-demand inversion" where skills most demanded in AI-exposed jobs are those LLMs perform least well at in our benchmark; (3) 78.7% of observed AI interactions are augmentation, not automation; (4) all four models converge to similar skill profiles (3.6-point spread), suggesting that text-based automation feasibility may be more skill-dependent than model-dependent. SAFI measures LLM performance on text-based representations of skills, not full occupational execution. All data, code, and model responses are open-sourced.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了技能自动化可行性指数(SAFI)，评估了4个前沿LLM在263个文本任务上的表现，发现数学和编程技能自动化可行性最高，而积极倾听和阅读理解最低。研究还提出了AI影响矩阵，显示78.7%的AI交互是增强而非自动化。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型重塑全球劳动力市场，政策制定者和工作者需要关于哪些职业技能最易受自动化影响的实证数据。研究旨在提供基于实证的技能自动化可行性评估，帮助理解AI对劳动力市场的影响。
AI.method: 提出了技能自动化可行性指数(SAFI)，对4个前沿LLM（LLaMA 3.3 70B、Mistral Large、Qwen 2.5 72B、Gemini 2.5 Flash）在263个文本任务上进行基准测试，涵盖美国劳工部O*NET分类中的35项技能。共进行1,052次模型调用，失败率为0%。结合Anthropic经济指数的真实世界AI采用数据（756个职业，17,998个任务），提出了AI影响矩阵框架。
AI.result: 1) 数学(SAFI: 73.2)和编程(71.8)自动化可行性最高；积极倾听(42.2)和阅读理解(45.5)最低。2) 发现"能力-需求倒置"现象：AI暴露工作中最需要的技能正是LLM在基准测试中表现最差的。3) 78.7%的AI交互是增强而非自动化。4) 所有4个模型在技能评估上表现相似（3.6分差距），表明文本自动化可行性更多取决于技能本身而非模型。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了基于实证的技能自动化可行性评估框架，揭示了AI对劳动力市场的复杂影响模式。大多数AI交互是增强而非替代人类工作，且技能本身的特性比具体模型选择对自动化可行性影响更大。所有数据、代码和模型响应均已开源。

title: SBBTS: A Unified Schrödinger-Bass Framework for Synthetic Financial Time Series
summary: We study the problem of generating synthetic time series that reproduce both marginal distributions and temporal dynamics, a central challenge in financial machine learning. Existing approaches typically fail to jointly model drift and stochastic volatility, as diffusion-based methods fix the volatility while martingale transport models ignore drift. We introduce the Schrödinger-Bass Bridge for Time Series (SBBTS), a unified framework that extends the Schrödinger-Bass formulation to multi-step time series. The method constructs a diffusion process that jointly calibrates drift and volatility and admits a tractable decomposition into conditional transport problems, enabling efficient learning. Numerical experiments on the Heston model demonstrate that SBBTS accurately recovers stochastic volatility and correlation parameters that prior SchrödingerBridge methods fail to capture. Applied to S&P 500 data, SBBTS-generated synthetic time series consistently improve downstream forecasting performance when used for data augmentation, yielding higher classification accuracy and Sharpe ratio compared to real-data-only training. These results show that SBBTS provides a practical and effective framework for realistic time series generation and data augmentation in financial applications.

AI.tldr: 提出SBBTS框架，统一建模时间序列的漂移和随机波动率，通过扩散过程联合校准两者，在金融时间序列生成和数据增强中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法同时建模时间序列的漂移和随机波动率：基于扩散的方法固定波动率，而鞅传输模型忽略漂移。金融机器学习需要能同时复现边际分布和时间动态的合成时间序列生成方法。
AI.method: 引入Schrödinger-Bass Bridge for Time Series (SBBTS)框架，将Schrödinger-Bass公式扩展到多步时间序列。该方法构建联合校准漂移和波动率的扩散过程，并可分解为条件传输问题，实现高效学习。
AI.result: 在Heston模型实验中，SBBTS能准确恢复随机波动率和相关参数，而先前的SchrödingerBridge方法无法捕捉这些。应用于S&P 500数据时，SBBTS生成的合成时间序列用于数据增强能持续提升下游预测性能，相比仅使用真实数据训练，获得更高的分类准确率和夏普比率。
AI.conclusion: SBBTS为金融应用中的现实时间序列生成和数据增强提供了实用有效的框架，能同时建模漂移和随机波动率，解决了现有方法的局限性。

title: CSA-Graphs: A Privacy-Preserving Structural Dataset for Child Sexual Abuse Research
comment: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2026), in the Workshop on Computer Vision for Children (CV4CHL)
summary: Child Sexual Abuse Imagery (CSAI) classification is an important yet challenging problem for computer vision research due to the strict legal and ethical restrictions that prevent the public sharing of CSAI datasets. This limitation hinders reproducibility and slows progress in developing automated methods. In this work, we introduce CSA-Graphs, a privacy-preserving structural dataset. Instead of releasing the original images, we provide structural representations that remove explicit visual content while preserving contextual information. CSA-Graphs includes two complementary graph-based modalities: scene graphs describing object relationships and skeleton graphs encoding human pose. Experiments show that both representations retain useful information for classifying CSAI, and that combining them further improves performance. This dataset enables broader research on computer vision methods for child safety while respecting legal and ethical constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出了CSA-Graphs数据集，通过场景图和骨架图的结构化表示来保护隐私，用于儿童性虐待图像分类研究，避免了原始图像共享的法律伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 儿童性虐待图像分类研究面临重大挑战：由于严格的法律和伦理限制，无法公开共享CSAI数据集，这阻碍了研究的可重复性和自动化方法的发展。
AI.method: 创建隐私保护的结构化数据集CSA-Graphs，提供两种互补的图表示：1) 场景图描述物体关系，2) 骨架图编码人体姿态，移除了显式视觉内容但保留了上下文信息。
AI.result: 实验表明两种表示都保留了有用的CSAI分类信息，结合使用能进一步提升性能，为儿童安全计算机视觉研究提供了合法合规的数据资源。
AI.conclusion: CSA-Graphs数据集在尊重法律伦理约束的同时，促进了儿童安全计算机视觉方法的更广泛研究，解决了数据共享的核心瓶颈问题。

title: SE-Enhanced ViT and BiLSTM-Based Intrusion Detection for Secure IIoT and IoMT Environments
summary: With the rapid growth of interconnected devices in Industrial and Medical Internet of Things (IIoT and MIoT) ecosystems, ensuring timely and accurate detection of cyber threats has become a critical challenge. This study presents an advanced intrusion detection framework based on a hybrid Squeeze-and-Excitation Attention Vision Transformer-Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (SE ViT-BiLSTM) architecture. In this design, the traditional multi-head attention mechanism of the Vision Transformer is replaced with Squeeze-and-Excitation attention, and integrated with BiLSTM layers to enhance detection accuracy and computational efficiency. The proposed model was trained and evaluated on two real-world benchmark datasets; EdgeIIoT and CICIoMT2024; both before and after data balancing using the Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique (SMOTE) and RandomOverSampler. Experimental results demonstrate that the SE ViT-BiLSTM model outperforms existing approaches across multiple metrics. Before balancing, the model achieved accuracies of 99.11% (FPR: 0.0013%, latency: 0.00032 sec/inst) on EdgeIIoT and 96.10% (FPR: 0.0036%, latency: 0.00053 sec/inst) on CICIoMT2024. After balancing, performance further improved, reaching 99.33% accuracy with 0.00035 sec/inst latency on EdgeIIoT and 98.16% accuracy with 0.00014 sec/inst latency on CICIoMT2024.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于SE ViT-BiLSTM混合架构的入侵检测框架，用于工业物联网和医疗物联网的网络安全威胁检测，在EdgeIIoT和CICIoMT2024数据集上取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 随着工业物联网和医疗物联网设备的快速增长，及时准确地检测网络威胁成为关键挑战。现有方法在检测精度和计算效率方面存在不足，需要更先进的入侵检测框架。
AI.method: 提出混合SE ViT-BiLSTM架构：将Vision Transformer的传统多头注意力机制替换为Squeeze-and-Excitation注意力，并与BiLSTM层集成。使用SMOTE和RandomOverSampler进行数据平衡处理，在两个真实世界数据集(EdgeIIoT和CICIoMT2024)上进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 在数据平衡前：EdgeIIoT上准确率99.11%(FPR:0.0013%，延迟0.00032秒/实例)，CICIoMT2024上准确率96.10%(FPR:0.0036%，延迟0.00053秒/实例)。数据平衡后性能进一步提升：EdgeIIoT准确率99.33%(延迟0.00035秒/实例)，CICIoMT2024准确率98.16%(延迟0.00014秒/实例)，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SE ViT-BiLSTM混合架构在物联网入侵检测中表现出色，结合了注意力机制和时序建模的优势，为工业物联网和医疗物联网网络安全提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Self-Preference Bias in Rubric-Based Evaluation of Large Language Models
summary: LLM-as-a-judge has become the de facto approach for evaluating LLM outputs. However, judges are known to exhibit self-preference bias (SPB): they tend to favor outputs produced by themselves or by models from their own family. This skews evaluations and, thus, hinders model development, especially in settings of recursive self-improvement. We present the first study of SPB in rubric-based evaluation, an increasingly popular benchmarking paradigm where judges issue binary verdicts on individual evaluation criteria, instead of assigning holistic scores or rankings. Using IFEval, a benchmark with programmatically verifiable rubrics, we show that SPB persists even when evaluation criteria are entirely objective: among rubrics where generators fail, judges can be up to 50\% more likely to incorrectly mark them as satisfied when the output is their own. We also find that, similarly to other evaluation paradigms, ensembling multiple judges helps mitigate SPB, but without fully eliminating it. On HealthBench, a medical chat benchmark with subjective rubrics, we observe that SPB skews model scores by up to 10 points, a potentially decisive margin when ranking frontier models. We analyze the factors that drive SPB in this setting, finding that negative rubrics, extreme rubric lengths, and subjective topics like emergency referrals are particularly susceptible.

AI.tldr: LLM-as-a-judge评估中存在自我偏好偏差，即使在客观标准下也会影响评估结果，通过多评委集成可缓解但无法完全消除
AI.motivation: LLM-as-a-judge已成为评估LLM输出的主流方法，但评委存在自我偏好偏差，倾向于给自身或同系列模型输出更高评分，这会扭曲评估结果并阻碍模型开发，特别是在递归自我改进场景中
AI.method: 研究基于标准评估中的自我偏好偏差，使用IFEval（可编程验证标准）和HealthBench（医疗聊天基准）进行实验分析。通过对比不同模型作为评委时的评估结果，量化自我偏好偏差程度，并分析影响因素如负面标准、极端标准长度、主观话题等
AI.result:
1. 在客观标准下仍存在自我偏好偏差：当生成器失败时，评委对自己输出的标准错误标记为满足的概率最高可达50%
2. 多评委集成有助于缓解但无法完全消除偏差
3. 在HealthBench医疗基准中，自我偏好偏差可使模型得分偏差达10分，对前沿模型排名产生决定性影响
4. 负面标准、极端标准长度和主观话题（如紧急转诊）更容易受自我偏好偏差影响
AI.conclusion: LLM-as-a-judge评估中的自我偏好偏差是一个普遍且严重的问题，即使在客观标准下也存在。多评委集成是有效的缓解策略，但需要进一步研究更可靠的评估方法以确保公平的模型比较和开发

title: Smart Commander: A Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning Framework for Fleet-Level PHM Decision Optimization
summary: Decision-making in military aviation Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) faces significant challenges due to the "curse of dimensionality" in large-scale fleet operations, combined with sparse feedback and stochastic mission profiles. To address these issues, this paper proposes Smart Commander, a novel Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL) framework designed to optimize sequential maintenance and logistics decisions. The framework decomposes the complex control problem into a two-tier hierarchy: a strategic General Commander manages fleet-level availability and cost objectives, while tactical Operation Commanders execute specific actions for sortie generation, maintenance scheduling, and resource allocation. The proposed approach is validated within a custom-built, high-fidelity discrete-event simulation environment that captures the dynamics of aircraft configuration and support logistics.By integrating layered reward shaping with planning-enhanced neural networks, the method effectively addresses the difficulty of sparse and delayed rewards. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that Smart Commander significantly outperforms conventional monolithic Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and rule-based baselines. Notably, it achieves a substantial reduction in training time while demonstrating superior scalability and robustness in failure-prone environments. These results highlight the potential of HRL as a reliable paradigm for next-generation intelligent fleet management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Smart Commander分层强化学习框架，解决军事航空PHM中高维、稀疏反馈和随机任务剖面的决策优化问题，显著优于传统DRL和基于规则的方法。
AI.motivation: 军事航空PHM决策面临"维度灾难"、稀疏反馈和随机任务剖面的挑战，传统方法难以有效处理大规模机队运营的复杂决策问题。
AI.method: 提出分层强化学习框架，将复杂控制问题分解为两层：战略层General Commander管理机队可用性和成本目标，战术层Operation Commanders执行具体行动。结合分层奖励塑造和规划增强神经网络。
AI.result: Smart Commander显著优于传统单体深度强化学习和基于规则的基线方法，大幅减少训练时间，在故障易发环境中表现出更好的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 分层强化学习可作为下一代智能机队管理的可靠范式，有效解决军事航空PHM中的复杂决策优化问题。

title: USCNet: Transformer-Based Multimodal Fusion with Segmentation Guidance for Urolithiasis Classification
comment: Accepted by IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics. Early Access
summary: Kidney stone disease ranks among the most prevalent conditions in urology, and understanding the composition of these stones is essential for creating personalized treatment plans and preventing recurrence. Current methods for analyzing kidney stones depend on postoperative specimens, which prevents rapid classification before surgery. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a new approach called the Urinary Stone Segmentation and Classification Network (USCNet). This innovative method allows for precise preoperative classification of kidney stones by integrating Computed Tomography (CT) images with clinical data from Electronic Health Records (EHR). USCNet employs a Transformer-based multimodal fusion framework with CT-EHR attention and segmentation-guided attention modules for accurate classification. Moreover, a dynamic loss function is introduced to effectively balance the dual objectives of segmentation and classification. Experiments on an in-house kidney stone dataset show that USCNet demonstrates outstanding performance across all evaluation metrics, with its classification efficacy significantly surpassing existing mainstream methods. This study presents a promising solution for the precise preoperative classification of kidney stones, offering substantial clinical benefits. The source code has been made publicly available: https://github.com/ZhangSongqi0506/KidneyStone.

AI.tldr: USCNet是一个基于Transformer的多模态融合网络，结合CT图像和电子健康记录，用于肾结石的术前精确分类和分割，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 肾结石疾病在泌尿科非常普遍，了解结石成分对于制定个性化治疗方案和预防复发至关重要。目前的分析方法依赖术后标本，无法在术前进行快速分类，因此需要开发术前分类方法。
AI.method: 提出USCNet（尿路结石分割和分类网络），采用基于Transformer的多模态融合框架，结合CT图像和电子健康记录（EHR）数据。包含CT-EHR注意力模块和分割引导注意力模块，并引入动态损失函数来平衡分割和分类的双重目标。
AI.result: 在内部肾结石数据集上的实验表明，USCNet在所有评估指标上都表现出色，其分类效果显著优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为肾结石的精确术前分类提供了一个有前景的解决方案，具有重要的临床价值。源代码已公开。

title: Learning the Stellar Structure Equations via Self-supervised Physics-Informed Neural Networks
summary: Stellar astrophysics relies critically on accurate descriptions of the physical conditions inside stars. Traditional solvers such as \texttt{MESA} (Modules for Experiments in Stellar Astrophysics), which employ adaptive finite-difference methods, can become computationally expensive and challenging to scale for large stellar population synthesis ($>10^9$ stars). In this work, we present an self-supervised physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework that provides a mesh-free and fully differentiable approach to solving the stellar structure equations under hydrostatic and thermal equilibrium. The model takes as input the stellar boundary conditions (at the center and surface) together with the chemical composition, and learns continuous radial profiles for mass $M_r(r)$, pressure $P(r)$, density $ρ(r)$, temperature $T(r)$, and luminosity $L_r(r)$ by enforcing the governing structure equations through physics-based loss terms. To incorporate realistic microphysics, we introduce auxiliary neural networks that approximate the equation of state and opacity tables as smooth, differentiable functions of the local thermodynamic state. These surrogates replace traditional tabulated inputs and enable end-to-end training. Once trained for a given star, the model produces continuous solutions across the entire radial domain without requiring discretization or interpolation. Validation against benchmark \texttt{MESA} models across a range of stellar masses yields a Mean Relative Absolute Error of $3.06\%$ and an average $R^2$ score of $99.98\%$. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration that the stellar structure equations can be solved in a fully self-supervised and data-free fashion employing PINNs. This work establishes a foundation for scalable, physics-informed emulation of stellar interiors and opens the door to future extensions toward time-dependent stellar evolution.

AI.tldr: 使用物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架求解恒星结构方程，提供无网格、完全可微分的恒星内部物理条件描述方法，替代传统有限差分求解器。
AI.motivation: 传统恒星结构求解器（如MESA）使用自适应有限差分方法，计算成本高且难以扩展到大规模恒星群体合成（>10^9颗恒星）。需要更高效、可扩展的求解方法。
AI.method: 提出自监督物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架：1）输入恒星边界条件和化学组成；2）学习质量、压力、密度、温度、光度的连续径向分布；3）通过物理损失项强制满足控制方程；4）引入辅助神经网络近似状态方程和不透明度表作为可微函数。
AI.result: 验证显示：与MESA基准模型相比，平均相对绝对误差为3.06%，平均R²得分为99.98%。这是首次证明恒星结构方程可以通过完全自监督、无数据的方式使用PINN求解。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为可扩展的、物理信息驱动的恒星内部模拟奠定了基础，并为未来扩展到时间依赖的恒星演化打开了大门。

title: ChunQiuTR: Time-Keyed Temporal Retrieval in Classical Chinese Annals
comment: 24 pages, 11 figures. To appear in Findings of ACL 2026
summary: Retrieval shapes how language models access and ground knowledge in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). In historical research, the target is often not an arbitrary relevant passage, but the exact record for a specific regnal month, where temporal consistency matters as much as topical relevance. This is especially challenging for Classical Chinese annals, where time is expressed through terse, implicit, non-Gregorian reign phrases that must be interpreted from surrounding context, so semantically plausible evidence can still be temporally invalid. We introduce \textbf{ChunQiuTR}, a time-keyed retrieval benchmark built from the \textit{Spring and Autumn Annals} and its exegetical tradition. ChunQiuTR organizes records by month-level reign keys and includes chrono-near confounders that mirror realistic retrieval failures. We further propose \textbf{CTD} (Calendrical Temporal Dual-encoder), a time-aware dual-encoder that combines Fourier-based absolute calendrical context with relative offset biasing. Experiments show consistent gains over strong semantic dual-encoder baselines under time-keyed evaluation, supporting retrieval-time temporal consistency as a key prerequisite for faithful downstream historical RAG. Our code and datasets are available at \href{https://github.com/xbdxwyh/ChunQiuTR}{\texttt{github.com/xbdxwyh/ChunQiuTR}}.

AI.tldr: 提出了ChunQiuTR时间键控检索基准和CTD时间感知双编码器，用于解决历史研究中检索增强生成的时间一致性问题，特别针对古典中国编年史的非公历时间表达。
AI.motivation: 在历史研究中，检索的目标往往不是任意相关段落，而是特定统治月份的确切记录，时间一致性至关重要。古典中国编年史使用简洁、隐式、非公历的统治短语表达时间，必须从上下文解释，导致语义合理的证据可能在时间上无效。
AI.method: 1. 构建ChunQiuTR时间键控检索基准，基于《春秋》及其注释传统，按月份级统治键组织记录，包含时间相近的混淆项以模拟真实检索失败。2. 提出CTD（历法时间双编码器），结合基于傅里叶的绝对历法上下文和相对偏移偏置的时间感知双编码器。
AI.result: 实验显示，在时间键控评估下，CTD相比强大的语义双编码器基线获得了一致的性能提升，支持检索时的时间一致性作为忠实下游历史RAG的关键前提。
AI.conclusion: 检索塑造了语言模型在检索增强生成中访问和基于知识的方式。对于历史研究，时间一致性至关重要，特别是在处理古典中国编年史等非标准时间表达时。提出的ChunQiuTR基准和CTD方法为解决这一问题提供了有效工具。

title: Improving Semantic Uncertainty Quantification in Language Model Question-Answering via Token-Level Temperature Scaling
summary: Calibration is central to reliable semantic uncertainty quantification, yet prior work has largely focused on discrimination, neglecting calibration. As calibration and discrimination capture distinct aspects of uncertainty, focusing on discrimination alone yields an incomplete picture. We address this gap by systematically evaluating both aspects across a broad set of confidence measures. We show that current approaches, particularly fixed-temperature heuristics, produce systematically miscalibrated and poorly discriminative semantic confidence distributions. We demonstrate that optimising a single scalar temperature, which, we argue, provides a suitable inductive bias, is a surprisingly simple yet effective solution. Our exhaustive evaluation confirms that temperature scaling consistently improves semantic calibration, discrimination, and downstream entropy, outperforming both heuristic baselines and more expressive token-level recalibration methods on question-answering tasks.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了语义不确定性量化的校准问题，指出现有方法主要关注区分度而忽视校准，提出通过优化单一温度参数来改善语义置信度的校准和区分度。
AI.motivation: 校准对于可靠的语义不确定性量化至关重要，但先前工作主要关注区分度而忽视了校准。由于校准和区分度捕捉了不确定性的不同方面，仅关注区分度会导致不完整的评估。现有方法（特别是固定温度启发式方法）会产生系统性校准错误和区分度差的语义置信分布。
AI.method: 提出优化单一标量温度参数的方法，认为这提供了合适的归纳偏置。该方法简单而有效，通过温度缩放来改善语义校准、区分度和下游熵。在问答任务上进行了广泛评估，比较了启发式基线和更复杂的token级重新校准方法。
AI.result: 温度缩放一致地改善了语义校准、区分度和下游熵，在问答任务上优于启发式基线和更复杂的token级重新校准方法。单一温度优化被证明是简单而有效的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 校准和区分度都是语义不确定性量化的重要方面，不应只关注区分度。优化单一温度参数提供了合适的归纳偏置，是改善语义置信度校准和区分度的有效方法，优于更复杂的替代方案。

title: Learning to Search: A Decision-Based Agent for Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering
summary: Knowledge-based visual question answering (KB-VQA) requires vision-language models to understand images and use external knowledge, especially for rare entities and long-tail facts. Most existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) methods adopt a fixed pipeline that sequentially retrieves information, filters it, and then produces an answer. Such a design makes it difficult to adapt to diverse question types. Moreover, it separates retrieval from reasoning, making it hard for the model to decide when to search, how to refine queries, or when to stop. As a result, the retrieved evidence is often poorly aligned with the question. To address these limitations, we reformulate KB-VQA as a search-agent problem and model the solving process as a multi-step decision-making procedure. At each step, the agent selects one of four actions-Answer, Image Retrieval, Text Retrieval, and Caption-based on its current information state. We further design an automated pipeline to collect multi-step trajectories that record the agent's reasoning process, tool usage, and intermediate decisions. These trajectories are then used as supervision for fine-tuning. Experiments on InfoSeek and E-VQA demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, consistently outperforming prior baselines and confirming the effectiveness of our framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文将知识库视觉问答重新定义为搜索代理问题，通过多步决策过程让代理自主选择检索、回答等动作，使用自动化收集的轨迹数据进行微调，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强生成方法采用固定流水线设计，难以适应多样化问题类型，且检索与推理分离导致检索证据与问题对齐不佳。需要更灵活、集成的方法来改善知识库视觉问答性能。
AI.method: 将KB-VQA重新定义为搜索代理问题，建模为多步决策过程。代理在每一步选择四种动作之一（回答、图像检索、文本检索、图像描述），设计自动化流程收集包含推理过程、工具使用和中间决策的多步轨迹，并用这些轨迹进行监督微调。
AI.result: 在InfoSeek和E-VQA数据集上的实验表明，该方法实现了最先进的性能，持续优于先前基线，证实了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将KB-VQA重新定义为搜索代理问题并通过多步决策过程建模是有效的，能够改善检索与推理的集成，提高对多样化问题类型的适应性。

title: Continuous Interpretive Steering for Scalar Diversity
summary: Pragmatic inference is inherently graded. Different lexical items give rise to pragmatic enrichment to different degrees. Scalar implicature exemplifies this property through scalar diversity, where implicature strength varies across scalar items. However, evaluations of pragmatic inference in large language models (LLMs) often rely on prompt-based manipulations. Beyond prompt-level effects, this study introduces Continuous Interpretive Steering (CIS), a method that probes graded pragmatic interpretation by treating activation-level steering strength as a continuous experimental variable. To support this analysis, this study introduces a new dataset, GraSD, which encodes graded scalar diversity. Experiments on four LLMs show that uniform activation steering increases pragmatic interpretations globally but collapses item-level variation, whereas graded activation steering yields differentiated interpretive shifts aligned with scalar diversity grades. It indicates that graded sensitivity is encoded in the representation space and can be systematically recovered through controlled intervention. Together, CIS and GraSD provide a principled framework for evaluating graded pragmatic sensitivity in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出连续解释性引导（CIS）方法和GraSD数据集，用于评估大语言模型中分级语用推理能力，发现激活引导可以系统恢复语用敏感性的分级编码。
AI.motivation: 语用推理本质上是分级的，不同词汇项产生不同程度的语用丰富化。标量含义通过标量多样性体现了这一特性，其中含义强度因标量项而异。然而，当前对大语言模型语用推理的评估通常依赖于基于提示的操作，缺乏对激活层面分级敏感性的系统分析。
AI.method: 提出连续解释性引导（CIS）方法，将激活层面的引导强度作为连续实验变量来探测分级语用解释。同时引入新的数据集GraSD，编码分级标量多样性。在四个大语言模型上进行实验，比较均匀激活引导和分级激活引导的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，均匀激活引导会全局增加语用解释但消除项级变异，而分级激活引导则产生与标量多样性等级一致的分化解释偏移。这表明分级敏感性在表示空间中被编码，并可通过受控干预系统恢复。
AI.conclusion: CIS和GraSD为评估大语言模型中的分级语用敏感性提供了原则性框架，揭示了语用推理的分级特性在模型表示中的编码方式。

title: Mixture Proportion Estimation and Weakly-supervised Kernel Test for Conditional Independence
summary: Mixture proportion estimation (MPE) aims to estimate class priors from unlabeled data. This task is a critical component in weakly supervised learning, such as PU learning, learning with label noise, and domain adaptation. Existing MPE methods rely on the \textit{irreducibility} assumption or its variant for identifiability. In this paper, we propose novel assumptions based on conditional independence (CI) given the class label, which ensure identifiability even when irreducibility does not hold. We develop method of moments estimators under these assumptions and analyze their asymptotic properties. Furthermore, we present weakly-supervised kernel tests to validate the CI assumptions, which are of independent interest in applications such as causal discovery and fairness evaluation. Empirically, we demonstrate the improved performance of our estimators compared with existing methods and that our tests successfully control both type I and type II errors.\label{key}

AI.tldr: 提出基于条件独立性的混合比例估计新方法，在不可约性假设不成立时仍能识别类别先验，并开发矩估计器和核检验方法。
AI.motivation: 混合比例估计（MPE）是弱监督学习中的关键任务，但现有方法依赖不可约性假设，限制了其应用范围。本文旨在提出更通用的识别条件，使MPE在不可约性假设不成立时仍能工作。
AI.method: 1）提出基于类别标签的条件独立性（CI）假设作为新的识别条件；2）开发矩估计方法；3）设计弱监督核检验来验证CI假设。
AI.result: 实验表明，新估计器相比现有方法性能提升，核检验能有效控制I型和II型错误，在因果发现和公平性评估等应用中具有独立价值。
AI.conclusion: 条件独立性假设为混合比例估计提供了更通用的识别框架，扩展了MPE的应用范围，相关检验方法具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Bridging MRI and PET physiology: Untangling complementarity through orthogonal representations
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/SonjaA14/inrmri2pet
summary: Multimodal imaging analysis often relies on joint latent representations, yet these approaches rarely define what information is shared versus modality-specific. Clarifying this distinction is clinically relevant, as it delineates the irreducible contribution of each modality and informs rational acquisition strategies. We propose a subspace decomposition framework that reframes multimodal fusion as a problem of orthogonal subspace separation rather than translation. We decompose Prostate-Specific Membrane Antigen (PSMA) PET uptake into an MRI-explainable physiological envelope and an orthogonal residual reflecting signal components not expressible within the MRI feature manifold. Using multiparametric MRI, we train an intensity-based, non-spatial implicit neural representation (INR) to map MRI feature vectors to PET uptake. We introduce a projection-based regularization using singular value decomposition to penalize residual components lying within the span of the MRI feature manifold. This enforces mathematical orthogonality between tissue-level physiological properties (structure, diffusion, perfusion) and intracellular PSMA expression. Tested on 13 prostate cancer patients, the model demonstrates that residual components spanned by MRI features are absorbed into the learned envelope, while the orthogonal residual is largest in tumour regions. This indicates that PSMA PET contains signal components not recoverable from MRI-derived physiological descriptors. The resulting decomposition provides a structured characterization of modality complementarity grounded in representation geometry rather than image translation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种子空间分解框架，将多模态融合重新定义为正交子空间分离问题，而非图像翻译。将PSMA PET摄取分解为MRI可解释的生理包络和正交残差，揭示模态互补性。
AI.motivation: 多模态成像分析通常依赖联合潜在表示，但很少明确定义哪些信息是共享的、哪些是模态特定的。澄清这种区分具有临床意义，因为它界定了每个模态的不可约贡献，并为合理的采集策略提供信息。
AI.method: 使用多参数MRI训练基于强度的非空间隐式神经表示(INR)，将MRI特征向量映射到PET摄取。引入基于奇异值分解的投影正则化，惩罚位于MRI特征流形张成空间内的残差分量，强制组织水平生理特性与细胞内PSMA表达之间的数学正交性。
AI.result: 在13名前列腺癌患者上测试，模型显示由MRI特征张成的残差分量被吸收到学习到的包络中，而正交残差在肿瘤区域最大。这表明PSMA PET包含无法从MRI衍生的生理描述符中恢复的信号分量。
AI.conclusion: 该分解提供了一种基于表示几何而非图像翻译的结构化模态互补性表征，为理解多模态成像中共享与特定信息提供了新框架。

title: DTCRS: Dynamic Tree Construction for Recursive Summarization
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates the hallucination problem of Large Language Models (LLMs) by incorporating external knowledge. Recursive summarization constructs a hierarchical summary tree by clustering text chunks, integrating information from multiple parts of a document to provide evidence for abstractive questions involving multi-step reasoning. However, summary trees often contain a large number of redundant summary nodes, which not only increase construction time but may also negatively impact question answering. Moreover, recursive summarization is not suitable for all types of questions. We introduce DTCRS, a method that dynamically generates summary trees based on document structure and query semantics. DTCRS determines whether a summary tree is necessary by analyzing the question type. It then decomposes the question and uses the embeddings of sub-questions as initial cluster centers, reducing redundant summaries while improving the relevance between summaries and the question. Our approach significantly reduces summary tree construction time and achieves substantial improvements across three QA tasks. Additionally, we investigate the applicability of recursive summarization to different question types, providing valuable insights for future research.

AI.tldr: DTCRS是一种动态生成摘要树的方法，通过分析问题类型决定是否需要摘要树，使用子问题嵌入作为初始聚类中心，减少冗余摘要并提高摘要与问题的相关性。
AI.motivation: RAG通过外部知识缓解LLM幻觉问题，递归摘要通过构建分层摘要树整合文档多部分信息，但现有方法存在冗余摘要节点多、构建时间长、不适合所有问题类型等问题。
AI.method: DTCRS动态生成摘要树：1) 分析问题类型决定是否需要摘要树；2) 分解问题并使用子问题嵌入作为初始聚类中心；3) 基于文档结构和查询语义构建摘要树，减少冗余。
AI.result: 方法显著减少摘要树构建时间，在三个QA任务上取得实质性改进，并研究了递归摘要对不同问题类型的适用性。
AI.conclusion: DTCRS通过动态生成摘要树有效解决传统递归摘要的冗余问题，提高RAG系统的效率和准确性，为未来研究提供有价值见解。

title: Beyond the Mean: Modelling Annotation Distributions in Continuous Affect Prediction
comment: This paper has been accepted at the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW)
summary: Emotion annotation is inherently subjective and cognitively demanding, producing signals that reflect diverse perceptions across annotators rather than a single ground truth. In continuous affect prediction, this variability is typically collapsed into point estimates such as the mean or median, discarding valuable information about annotator disagreement and uncertainty. In this work, we propose a distribution-aware framework that models annotation consensus using the Beta distribution. Instead of predicting a single affect value, models estimate the mean and standard deviation of the annotation distribution, which are transformed into valid Beta parameters through moment matching. This formulation enables the recovery of higher-order distributional descriptors, including skewness, kurtosis, and quantiles, in closed form. As a result, the model captures not only the central tendency of emotional perception but also variability, asymmetry, and uncertainty in annotator responses. We evaluate the proposed approach on the SEWA and RECOLA datasets using multimodal features. Experimental results show that Beta-based modelling produces predictive distributions that closely match the empirical annotator distributions while achieving competitive performance with conventional regression approaches. These findings highlight the importance of modelling annotation uncertainty in affective computing and demonstrate the potential of distribution-aware learning for subjective signal analysis.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于Beta分布的框架，用于建模情感标注中的共识，预测标注分布而非单一值，能捕捉标注者间的差异性和不确定性。
AI.motivation: 情感标注本质上是主观且认知要求高的任务，会产生反映不同标注者感知差异的信号。传统方法通常将这种变异性压缩为均值或中位数等点估计，丢弃了标注者分歧和不确定性的有价值信息。
AI.method: 提出了一个分布感知框架，使用Beta分布建模标注共识。模型预测标注分布的均值和标准差，通过矩匹配转换为有效的Beta参数。这种表述能够以闭式形式恢复高阶分布描述符，包括偏度、峰度和分位数。
AI.result: 在SEWA和RECOLA数据集上使用多模态特征进行评估。实验结果表明，基于Beta的建模产生的预测分布与经验标注分布高度匹配，同时与传统回归方法相比具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在情感计算中建模标注不确定性的重要性，并展示了分布感知学习在主观信号分析中的潜力。

title: DINO-QPM: Adapting Visual Foundation Models for Globally Interpretable Image Classification
comment: Accepted to the 5th Explainable AI for Computer Vision (XAI4CV) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Although visual foundation models like DINOv2 provide state-of-the-art performance as feature extractors, their complex, high-dimensional representations create substantial hurdles for interpretability. This work proposes DINO-QPM, which converts these powerful but entangled features into contrastive, class-independent representations that are interpretable by humans. DINO-QPM is a lightweight interpretability adapter that pursues globally interpretable image classification, adapting the Quadratic Programming Enhanced Model (QPM) to operate on strictly frozen DINO backbones. While classification with visual foundation models typically relies on the \texttt{CLS} token, we deliberately diverge from this standard. By leveraging average-pooling, we directly connect the patch embeddings to the model's features and therefore enable spatial localisation of DINO-QPM's globally interpretable features within the input space. Furthermore, we apply a sparsity loss to minimise spatial scatter and background noise, ensuring that explanations are grounded in relevant object parts. With DINO-QPM we make the level of interpretability of QPM available as an adapter while exceeding the accuracy of DINOv2 linear probe. Evaluated through an introduced Plausibility metric and other interpretability metrics, extensive experiments demonstrate that DINO-QPM is superior to other applicable methods for frozen visual foundation models in both classification accuracy and explanation quality.

AI.tldr: DINO-QPM是一个轻量级可解释性适配器，将DINOv2等视觉基础模型的复杂特征转换为可对比、类别无关的人类可解释表示，同时保持高分类精度。
AI.motivation: 视觉基础模型（如DINOv2）作为特征提取器性能优异，但其复杂高维表示给可解释性带来重大障碍。需要将这些强大但纠缠的特征转换为人类可解释的表示。
AI.method: 提出DINO-QPM轻量级可解释性适配器，将QPM（Quadratic Programming Enhanced Model）适配到严格冻结的DINO骨干上。不同于标准CLS token方法，使用平均池化直接连接patch嵌入到模型特征，实现全局可解释特征的空间定位。应用稀疏损失最小化空间散射和背景噪声。
AI.result: DINO-QPM在保持DINOv2线性探测精度的同时提供可解释性，在分类准确率和解释质量上均优于其他适用于冻结视觉基础模型的方法。通过新提出的Plausibility指标和其他可解释性指标验证。
AI.conclusion: DINO-QPM成功将QPM的可解释性水平作为适配器提供，同时超越DINOv2线性探测的准确性，为视觉基础模型提供了有效的可解释性解决方案。

title: From Exposure to Internalization: Dual-Stream Calibration for In-context Clinical Reasoning
summary: Contextual clinical reasoning demands robust inference grounded in complex, heterogeneous clinical records. While state-of-the-art fine-tuning, in-context learning (ICL), and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enable knowledge exposure, they often fall short of genuine contextual internalization: dynamically adjusting a model's internal representations to the subtle nuances of individual cases at inference time. To address this, we propose Dual-Stream Calibration (DSC), a test-time training framework that transcends superficial knowledge exposure to achieve deep internalization during inference. DSC facilitates input internalization by synergistically aligning two calibration streams. Unlike passive context exposure, the Semantic Calibration Stream enforces a deliberative reflection on core evidence, internalizing semantic anchors by minimizing entropy to stabilize generative trajectories. Simultaneously, the Structural Calibration Stream assimilates latent inferential dependencies through an iterative meta-learning objective. By training on specialized support sets at test-time, this stream enables the model to bridge the gap between external evidence and internal logic, synthesizing fragmented data into a coherent response. Our approach shifts the reasoning paradigm from passive attention-based matching to an active refinement of the latent inferential space. Validated against thirteen clinical datasets, DSC demonstrates superiority across three distinct task paradigms, consistently outstripping state-of-the-art baselines ranging from training-dependent models to test-time learning frameworks.

AI.tldr: 提出Dual-Stream Calibration (DSC)测试时训练框架，通过语义校准流和结构校准流实现临床推理中的深度上下文内化，超越传统微调、ICL和RAG方法。
AI.motivation: 当前临床推理方法（微调、ICL、RAG）主要停留在知识暴露层面，缺乏对个体病例细微差异的动态内部表示调整能力，无法实现真正的上下文内化。
AI.method: DSC框架包含两个协同校准流：1) 语义校准流通过最小化熵来内化语义锚点，稳定生成轨迹；2) 结构校准流通过迭代元学习目标吸收潜在推理依赖关系，在测试时使用专门支持集训练。
AI.result: 在13个临床数据集上验证，DSC在三种不同任务范式上均表现出优越性，超越了从训练依赖模型到测试时学习框架的各种最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DSC将推理范式从被动的基于注意力的匹配转变为对潜在推理空间的主动精炼，实现了临床推理中的深度上下文内化。

title: Corpora deduplication or duplication in Natural Language Processing of few resourced languages ? A case of study: The Mexico's Nahuatl
summary: In this article, we seek to answer the following question: could data duplication be useful in Natural Language Processing (NLP) for languages with limited computational resources? In this type of languages (or $π$-languages), corpora available for training Large Language Models are virtually non-existent. In particular, we will study the impact of corpora expansion in Nawatl, an agglutinative and polysynthetic $π$-language spoken by over 2 million people, with a large number of dialectal varieties. The aim is to expand the new $π$-yalli corpus, which contains a limited number of Nawatl texts, by duplicating it in a controlled way. In our experiments, we will use the incremental duplication technique. The aim is to learn embeddings that are well-suited to NLP tasks. Thus, static embeddings were trained and evaluated in a sentence-level semantic similarity task. Our results show a moderate improvement in performance when using incremental duplication compared to the results obtained using only the corpus without expansion. Furthermore, to our knowledge, this technique has not yet been used in the literature.

AI.tldr: 研究数据复制对资源有限语言（π-语言）NLP任务的影响，通过增量复制扩展Nawatl语料库，在语义相似度任务中观察到中等性能提升
AI.motivation: 针对计算资源有限的语言（π-语言），这些语言的语料库几乎不存在，无法有效训练大语言模型。研究探索数据复制是否能在Nawatl这种拥有200多万使用者、具有大量方言变体的粘着语和多式综合语中提升NLP任务性能
AI.method: 使用增量复制技术扩展π-yalli语料库，通过受控方式复制有限的Nawatl文本。训练静态词嵌入，并在句子级语义相似度任务中进行评估
AI.result: 与未扩展的语料库相比，使用增量复制技术带来了中等程度的性能提升。据作者所知，这是首次在文献中使用这种技术
AI.conclusion: 数据复制对于资源有限语言的NLP任务可能是有用的策略，特别是在语料库稀缺的情况下。增量复制技术为这类语言的大语言模型训练提供了新的可能性

title: Diffusion Processes on Implicit Manifolds
summary: High-dimensional data are often modeled as lying near a low-dimensional manifold. We study how to construct diffusion processes on this data manifold in the implicit setting. That is, using only point cloud samples and without access to charts, projections, or other geometric primitives. Our main contribution is a data-driven SDE that captures intrinsic diffusion on the underlying manifold while being defined in ambient space. The construction relies on estimating the diffusion's infinitesimal generator and its carré-du-champ (CDC) from a proximity graph built from the data. The generator and CDC together encode the local stochastic and geometric structure of the intended diffusion. We show that, as the number of samples grows, the induced process converges in law on the space of probability paths to its smooth manifold counterpart. We call this construction Implicit Manifold-valued Diffusions (IMDs), and furthermore present a numerical simulation procedure using Euler-Maruyama integration. This gives a rigorous basis for practical implementations of diffusion dynamics on data manifolds, and opens new directions for manifold-aware sampling, exploration, and generative modeling.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了IMDs方法，通过点云数据构建数据流形上的扩散过程，无需显式几何结构，实现了流形感知的采样和生成建模。
AI.motivation: 高维数据通常位于低维流形附近，但现有方法需要显式的几何结构（如坐标图、投影）。本文旨在仅使用点云样本，无需几何原语，构建数据流形上的扩散过程。
AI.method: 基于邻近图估计扩散过程的无穷小生成元及其carré-du-champ（CDC），构建数据驱动的SDE。使用欧拉-丸山积分进行数值模拟，实现隐式流形值扩散（IMDs）。
AI.result: 证明了随着样本数量增加，诱导过程在概率路径空间上收敛到其光滑流形对应物。为数据流形上的扩散动力学提供了严格的实践基础。
AI.conclusion: IMDs方法为流形感知的采样、探索和生成建模开辟了新方向，提供了在隐式设置下构建数据流形扩散过程的严格框架。

title: Multiple Domain Generalization Using Category Information Independent of Domain Differences
summary: Domain generalization is a technique aimed at enabling models to maintain high accuracy when applied to new environments or datasets (unseen domains) that differ from the datasets used in training. Generally, the accuracy of models trained on a specific dataset (source domain) often decreases significantly when evaluated on different datasets (target domain). This issue arises due to differences in domains caused by varying environmental conditions such as imaging equipment and staining methods. Therefore, we undertook two initiatives to perform segmentation that does not depend on domain differences. We propose a method that separates category information independent of domain differences from the information specific to the source domain. By using information independent of domain differences, our method enables learning the segmentation targets (e.g., blood vessels and cell nuclei). Although we extract independent information of domain differences, this cannot completely bridge the domain gap between training and test data. Therefore, we absorb the domain gap using the quantum vectors in Stochastically Quantized Variational AutoEncoder (SQ-VAE). In experiments, we evaluated our method on datasets for vascular segmentation and cell nucleus segmentation. Our methods improved the accuracy compared to conventional methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种域泛化分割方法，通过分离与域差异无关的类别信息和源域特定信息，并利用SQ-VAE的量子向量吸收域间差异，在血管和细胞核分割任务上取得优于传统方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 解决医学图像分割中的域泛化问题：模型在特定数据集（源域）上训练后，在不同环境或设备采集的数据（目标域）上性能显著下降，这源于成像设备、染色方法等造成的域差异。
AI.method: 1) 分离与域差异无关的类别信息和源域特定信息；2) 利用随机量化变分自编码器(SQ-VAE)的量子向量吸收训练与测试数据之间的域差异；3) 在血管分割和细胞核分割数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在血管分割和细胞核分割任务上，该方法相比传统方法提高了分割精度，证明了其在跨域分割任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的域泛化分割方法通过分离域无关信息和利用SQ-VAE吸收域差异，能够有效处理医学图像分割中的域偏移问题，在未见域上保持较好的分割性能。

title: Incentive-Aware Multi-Fidelity Optimization for Generative Advertising in Large Language Models
summary: Generative advertising in large language model (LLM) responses requires optimizing sponsorship configurations under two strict constraints: the strategic behavior of advertisers and the high cost of stochastic generations. To address this, we propose the Incentive-Aware Multi-Fidelity Mechanism (IAMFM), a unified framework coupling Vickrey-Clarke-Groves (VCG) incentives with Multi-Fidelity Optimization to maximize expected social welfare. We compare two algorithmic instantiations (elimination-based and model-based), revealing their budget-dependent performance trade-offs. Crucially, to make VCG computationally feasible, we introduce Active Counterfactual Optimization, a "warm-start" approach that reuses optimization data for efficient payment calculation. We provide formal guarantees for approximate strategy-proofness and individual rationality, establishing a general approach for incentive-aligned, budget-constrained generative processes. Experiments demonstrate that IAMFM outperforms single-fidelity baselines across diverse budgets.

AI.tldr: 提出IAMFM框架，结合VCG激励机制与多保真度优化，解决LLM生成式广告中的赞助配置问题，在广告商策略行为和高随机生成成本约束下最大化社会福祉。
AI.motivation: LLM生成式广告面临两个严格约束：广告商的策略行为和随机生成的高成本。需要设计既能激励广告商真实报价，又能高效优化赞助配置的机制。
AI.method: 提出IAMFM统一框架，将VCG激励机制与多保真度优化耦合。引入两种算法实例（基于淘汰和基于模型），并提出Active Counterfactual Optimization作为"热启动"方法，重用优化数据高效计算支付。
AI.result: 实验表明IAMFM在不同预算下优于单保真度基线。提供了近似策略证明性和个体理性的形式化保证。
AI.conclusion: IAMFM为激励对齐、预算约束的生成过程建立了通用方法，解决了LLM生成式广告中的关键挑战。

title: MARS: Enabling Autoregressive Models Multi-Token Generation
summary: Autoregressive (AR) language models generate text one token at a time, even when consecutive tokens are highly predictable given earlier context. We introduce MARS (Mask AutoRegreSsion), a lightweight fine-tuning method that teaches an instruction-tuned AR model to predict multiple tokens per forward pass. MARS adds no architectural modifications, no extra parameters, and produces a single model that can still be called exactly like the original AR model with no performance degradation. Unlike speculative decoding, which maintains a separate draft model alongside the target, or multi-head approaches such as Medusa, which attach additional prediction heads, MARS requires only continued training on existing instruction data. When generating one token per forward pass, MARS matches or exceeds the AR baseline on six standard benchmarks. When allowed to accept multiple tokens per step, it maintains baseline-level accuracy while achieving 1.5-1.7x throughput. We further develop a block-level KV caching strategy for batch inference, achieving up to 1.71x wall-clock speedup over AR with KV cache on Qwen2.5-7B. Finally, MARS supports real-time speed adjustment via confidence thresholding: under high request load, the serving system can increase throughput on the fly without swapping models or restarting, providing a practical latency-quality knob for deployment.

AI.tldr: MARS是一种轻量级微调方法，教指令调优的自回归模型每次前向传播预测多个token，无需架构修改或额外参数，在保持准确性的同时实现1.5-1.7倍吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: 自回归语言模型每次只生成一个token，即使连续token在给定上下文的情况下高度可预测。现有方法如推测解码需要额外模型，多头方法需要额外预测头，都增加了复杂性。需要一种轻量级方法在不改变架构的情况下提升生成效率。
AI.method: MARS通过继续在现有指令数据上训练，教模型预测多个token。使用掩码自回归训练，模型学习同时预测多个未来token。支持实时速度调整的置信度阈值机制，并开发了批量推理的块级KV缓存策略。
AI.result: 在六个标准基准测试中，每次生成一个token时，MARS匹配或超过自回归基线。当允许每步接受多个token时，保持基线级准确性同时实现1.5-1.7倍吞吐量提升。在Qwen2.5-7B上，使用KV缓存实现高达1.71倍的实际速度提升。
AI.conclusion: MARS提供了一种实用的延迟-质量权衡机制，支持实时速度调整，无需交换模型或重启，为部署提供了实用的效率提升方案。

title: How Does Machine Learning Manage Complexity?
summary:
We provide a computational complexity lens to understand the power of machine learning models, particularly their ability to model complex systems.
  Machine learning models are often trained on data drawn from sampleable or more complex distributions, a far wider range of distributions than just computable ones. By focusing on computable distributions, machine learning models can better manage complexity via probability. We abstract away from specific learning mechanisms, modeling machine learning as producing P/poly-computable distributions with polynomially-bounded max-entropy.
  We illustrate how learning computable distributions models complexity by showing that if a machine learning model produces a distribution $μ$ that minimizes error against the distribution generated by a cryptographic pseudorandom generator, then $μ$ must be close to uniform.

AI.tldr: 论文从计算复杂性角度分析机器学习模型的能力，特别是建模复杂系统的能力。通过关注可计算分布而非更广泛的样本分布，机器学习模型能更好地通过概率管理复杂性。研究表明，如果模型产生的分布最小化与密码学伪随机生成器分布的误差，则该分布必须接近均匀分布。
AI.motivation: 论文的动机是从计算复杂性理论的角度理解机器学习模型的能力边界。机器学习模型通常训练于可采样或更复杂的分布，这比可计算分布的范围更广。通过关注可计算分布，机器学习模型能更好地通过概率管理复杂性，这为理解模型如何建模复杂系统提供了理论框架。
AI.method: 论文采用计算复杂性理论的方法，将机器学习抽象为产生P/poly可计算分布的过程，这些分布具有多项式有界的最大熵。通过这种抽象，研究机器学习模型在可计算分布上的能力，特别分析了当模型产生的分布最小化与密码学伪随机生成器分布的误差时的情况。
AI.result: 主要结果是：如果机器学习模型产生的分布μ最小化与密码学伪随机生成器生成的分布之间的误差，那么μ必须接近均匀分布。这表明在密码学伪随机生成器的背景下，机器学习模型无法有效区分伪随机分布与均匀分布。
AI.conclusion: 结论是计算复杂性理论为理解机器学习模型的能力提供了重要视角。通过关注可计算分布，机器学习能更好地管理复杂性。在密码学伪随机生成器的设置下，模型产生的分布必须接近均匀分布，这揭示了机器学习模型在特定复杂性类中的局限性。

title: Energy-based Tissue Manifolds for Longitudinal Multiparametric MRI Analysis
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/tkartikay/EnFold-MRI
summary: We propose a geometric framework for longitudinal multi-parametric MRI analysis based on patient-specific energy modelling in sequence space. Rather than operating on images with spatial networks, each voxel is represented by its multi-sequence intensity vector ($T1$, $T1c$, $T2$, FLAIR, ADC), and a compact implicit neural representation is trained via denoising score matching to learn an energy function $E_θ(\mathbf{u})$ over $\mathbb{R}^d$ from a single baseline scan. The learned energy landscape provides a differential-geometric description of tissue regimes without segmentation labels. Local minima define tissue basins, gradient magnitude reflects proximity to regime boundaries, and Laplacian curvature characterises local constraint structure. Importantly, this baseline energy manifold is treated as a fixed geometric reference: it encodes the set of contrast combinations observed at diagnosis and is not retrained at follow-up. Longitudinal assessment is therefore formulated as evaluation of subsequent scans relative to this baseline geometry. Rather than comparing anatomical segmentations, we analyse how the distribution of MRI sequence vectors evolves under the baseline energy function. In a paediatric case with later recurrence, follow-up scans show progressive deviation in energy and directional displacement in sequence space toward the baseline tumour-associated regime before clear radiological reappearance. In a case with stable disease, voxel distributions remain confined to established low-energy basins without systematic drift. The presented cases serve as proof-of-concept that patient-specific energy manifolds can function as geometric reference systems for longitudinal mpMRI analysis without explicit segmentation or supervised classification, providing a foundation for further investigation of manifold-based tissue-at-risk tracking in neuro-oncology.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于患者特异性能量建模的纵向多参数MRI几何分析框架，通过去噪分数匹配学习能量函数，将组织状态表示为能量流形，用于追踪疾病进展而不依赖分割标签。
AI.motivation: 传统纵向MRI分析通常依赖解剖分割和空间网络，需要标注数据且难以捕捉组织状态的连续变化。本文旨在开发一种无需分割标签的几何框架，通过能量流形表征组织状态，为神经肿瘤学提供更灵活的纵向评估方法。
AI.method: 将每个体素表示为多序列强度向量(T1, T1c, T2, FLAIR, ADC)，通过去噪分数匹配训练紧凑的隐式神经表示学习能量函数E_θ(u)。能量流形作为固定几何参考，局部极小值定义组织盆地，梯度幅度反映边界接近度，拉普拉斯曲率表征局部约束结构。纵向评估通过分析MRI序列向量分布在基线能量函数下的演化来实现。
AI.result: 在儿科复发案例中，随访扫描显示能量逐渐偏离，序列空间中的方向位移指向基线肿瘤相关状态，早于明确的放射学复发。在稳定疾病案例中，体素分布保持在已建立的低声能盆地内，无系统性漂移。证明患者特异性能量流形可作为纵向分析的有效几何参考系统。
AI.conclusion: 患者特异性能量流形提供了一种无需显式分割或监督分类的纵向mpMRI分析几何框架，为神经肿瘤学中基于流形的组织风险追踪奠定了基础，展示了在疾病复发前检测组织状态变化的潜力。

title: ToxReason: A Benchmark for Mechanistic Chemical Toxicity Reasoning via Adverse Outcome Pathway
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled molecular reasoning for property prediction. However, toxicity arises from complex biological mechanisms beyond chemical structure, necessitating mechanistic reasoning for reliable prediction. Despite its importance, current benchmarks fail to systematically evaluate this capability. LLMs can generate fluent but biologically unfaithful explanations, making it difficult to assess whether predicted toxicities are grounded invalid mechanisms. To bridge this gap, we introduce ToxReason, a benchmark grounded in the Adverse Outcome Pathway (AOP) that evaluates organ-level toxicity reasoning across multiple organs. ToxReason integrates experimental drug-target interaction evidence with toxicity labels, requiring models to infer both toxic outcomes and their underlying mechanisms from Molecular Initiating Event (MIE) to Adverse Outcome (AO). Using ToxReason, we evaluate toxicity prediction performance and reasoning quality across diverse LLMs. We find that strong predictive performance does not necessarily imply reliable reasoning. Furthermore, we show that reasoning-aware training improves mechanistic reasoning and, consequently, toxicity prediction performance. Together, these results underscore the necessity of integrating reasoning into both evaluation and training for trustworthy toxicity modeling.

AI.tldr: ToxReason是一个基于不良结局通路(AOP)的基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在器官水平毒性推理方面的能力，要求模型从分子起始事件到不良结局推断毒性结果及其潜在机制。
AI.motivation: 毒性预测需要超越化学结构的复杂生物机制推理，但现有基准无法系统评估这种能力。LLMs可能生成流畅但生物学上不可靠的解释，难以判断毒性预测是否基于有效机制。
AI.method: 提出ToxReason基准，整合实验药物-靶点相互作用证据和毒性标签，要求模型从分子起始事件到不良结局推断毒性结果和机制。使用该基准评估多种LLMs的毒性预测性能和推理质量。
AI.result: 研究发现：1) 强大的预测性能不一定意味着可靠的推理；2) 推理感知训练可以改善机制推理，从而提高毒性预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 为了可信的毒性建模，必须在评估和训练中整合推理能力。推理感知训练是提高LLMs毒性预测可靠性的有效途径。

title: Gemma 4, Phi-4, and Qwen3: Accuracy-Efficiency Tradeoffs in Dense and MoE Reasoning Language Models
summary: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) language models are often expected to offer better quality-efficiency tradeoffs than dense models because only a subset of parameters is activated per token, but the practical value of that advantage depends on end-to-end behavior under realistic inference constraints. We present a controlled empirical benchmark of seven recent reasoning-oriented instruction-tuned models spanning dense and MoE designs, namely Gemma-4-E2B, Gemma-4-E4B, Gemma-4-26B-A4B, Phi-4-mini-reasoning, Phi-4-reasoning, Qwen3-8B, and Qwen3-30B-A3B, evaluated on four benchmarks -- ARC-Challenge, GSM8K, Math Level 1-3, and TruthfulQA MC1 -- under three prompting strategies: zero-shot, chain-of-thought, and few-shot chain-of-thought. The study covers 8,400 total model-dataset-prompt evaluations and records accuracy, latency, peak GPU memory usage (VRAM), and an approximate floating-point operations (FLOPs)-per-token proxy. Across the weighted multi-task summary, Gemma-4-E4B with few-shot chain-of-thought achieved the best overall result, reaching weighted accuracy 0.675 with mean VRAM 14.9 GB, while Gemma-4-26B-A4B was close in accuracy at 0.663 but substantially more memory intensive at 48.1 GB. At the task level, Gemma models dominated ARC and Math, Phi models were strongest on TruthfulQA, and GSM8K showed the largest prompt sensitivity, including a sharp drop for Phi-4-reasoning from 0.67 under chain-of-thought to 0.11 under few-shot chain-of-thought. These results show that sparse activation alone does not guarantee the best practical operating point: observed accuracy-efficiency tradeoffs depend jointly on architecture, prompting protocol, and task composition. We release a reproducible benchmark pipeline, aggregated results, and paired statistical analyses to support deployment-oriented evaluation of reasoning LLMs under real resource constraints.

AI.tldr: 该研究对7个推理导向的指令微调模型（包括密集和MoE架构）在4个推理基准上进行了端到端评估，比较了准确性、延迟、显存使用和FLOPs等指标，发现Gemma-4-E4B在few-shot chain-of-thought下表现最佳，稀疏激活并不总是保证最佳实用效率。
AI.motivation: 混合专家（MoE）语言模型理论上应提供更好的质量-效率权衡，因为每个token只激活部分参数，但这种优势的实际价值需要在真实推理约束下的端到端行为中验证。研究旨在通过系统基准测试，比较密集和MoE模型在推理任务中的实际表现。
AI.method: 研究评估了7个推理导向的指令微调模型（Gemma-4-E2B、Gemma-4-E4B、Gemma-4-26B-A4B、Phi-4-mini-reasoning、Phi-4-reasoning、Qwen3-8B、Qwen3-30B-A3B），在4个基准（ARC-Challenge、GSM8K、Math Level 1-3、TruthfulQA MC1）上使用3种提示策略（zero-shot、chain-of-thought、few-shot chain-of-thought）。记录了准确性、延迟、峰值GPU显存使用和FLOPs-per-token代理指标，共进行了8,400次模型-数据集-提示评估。
AI.result: 在加权多任务汇总中，Gemma-4-E4B在few-shot chain-of-thought下达到最佳整体结果（加权准确性0.675，平均显存14.9 GB）。Gemma-4-26B-A4B准确性接近（0.663）但显存使用显著更高（48.1 GB）。任务层面：Gemma模型在ARC和Math上表现最佳，Phi模型在TruthfulQA上最强，GSM8K显示最大的提示敏感性（Phi-4-reasoning从chain-of-thought的0.67降至few-shot chain-of-thought的0.11）。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏激活本身并不能保证最佳实用操作点：观察到的准确性-效率权衡共同依赖于架构、提示协议和任务组成。研究提供了可复现的基准测试流程、聚合结果和配对统计分析，支持在真实资源约束下对推理LLM进行部署导向的评估。

title: On the Price of Privacy for Language Identification and Generation
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly trained on sensitive user data, understanding the fundamental cost of privacy in language learning becomes essential. We initiate the study of differentially private (DP) language identification and generation in the agnostic statistical setting, establishing algorithms and matching lower bounds that precisely quantify the cost of privacy. For both tasks, approximate $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP with constant $\varepsilon > 0$ recovers the non-private error rates: $\exp(-r(n))$ for identification (for any $r(n) = o(n)$) and $\exp(-Ω(n))$ for generation. Under pure $\varepsilon$-DP, the exponents degrade by a multiplicative factor of $\min\{1, \varepsilon\}$, which we show is tight up to constants. Notably, for generation under pure DP with mild assumptions, the upper bound $\exp(-\min\{1,\varepsilon\} \cdot Ω(n))$ matches the lower bound up to some constants, establishing an optimal rate. Our results show that the cost of privacy in language learning is surprisingly mild: absent entirely under approximate DP, and exactly a $\min\{1,\varepsilon\}$ factor in the exponent under pure DP.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了语言模型在差分隐私下的学习成本，发现近似差分隐私下隐私成本为零，纯差分隐私下隐私成本仅为指数项的min{1,ε}倍，表明隐私保护的语言学习成本出人意料地温和。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型越来越多地在敏感用户数据上训练，理解语言学习中隐私的基本成本变得至关重要。论文旨在量化差分隐私在语言识别和生成任务中的成本。
AI.method: 在不可知统计设置下研究差分隐私语言识别和生成，建立算法和匹配的下界来精确量化隐私成本。分析近似(ε,δ)-DP和纯ε-DP两种设置下的性能。
AI.result: 近似DP下可恢复非隐私错误率：识别为exp(-r(n))，生成为exp(-Ω(n))。纯DP下指数项退化min{1,ε}倍，且该下界是紧的。对于生成任务，在温和假设下，上界exp(-min{1,ε}·Ω(n))与下界匹配，建立了最优速率。
AI.conclusion: 语言学习中的隐私成本出人意料地温和：近似DP下完全不存在，纯DP下仅为指数项的min{1,ε}倍。这表明在保护隐私的同时仍能获得良好的语言学习性能。

title: TeaLeafVision: An Explainable and Robust Deep Learning Framework for Tea Leaf Disease Classification
summary: As the worlds second most consumed beverage after water, tea is not just a cultural staple but a global economic force of profound scale and influence. More than a mere drink, it represents a quiet negotiation between nature, culture, and the human desire for a moment of reflection. So, the precise identification and detection of tea leaf disease is crucial. With this goal, we have evaluated several Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models, among them three shows noticeable performance including DenseNet201, MobileNetV2, InceptionV3 on the teaLeafBD dataset. teaLeafBD dataset contains seven classes, six disease classes and one healthy class, collected under various field conditions reflecting real world challenges. Among the CNN models, DenseNet201 has achieved the highest test accuracy of 99%. In order to enhance the model reliability and interpretability, we have implemented Gradient weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad CAM), occlusion sensitivity analysis and adversarial training techniques to increase the noise resistance of the model. Finally, we have developed a prototype in order to leverage the models capabilities on real life agriculture. This paper illustrates the deep learning models capabilities to classify the disease in real life tea leaf disease detection and management.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了多种CNN模型在茶叶病害检测上的性能，其中DenseNet201在teaLeafBD数据集上达到99%的测试准确率，并采用Grad-CAM、遮挡敏感度分析和对抗训练等技术增强模型可靠性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 茶叶作为全球第二大消费饮料，其病害检测对农业经济至关重要。论文旨在利用深度学习技术实现茶叶病害的精确识别，解决实际农业中的病害管理问题。
AI.method: 1. 在teaLeafBD数据集（包含7个类别：6种病害+1种健康）上评估多种CNN模型；2. 比较DenseNet201、MobileNetV2、InceptionV3等模型的性能；3. 采用Grad-CAM进行可视化解释；4. 使用遮挡敏感度分析；5. 实施对抗训练增强模型抗噪能力；6. 开发实际应用原型。
AI.result: DenseNet201在测试集上达到99%的最高准确率，优于其他CNN模型。通过Grad-CAM和遮挡分析增强了模型可解释性，对抗训练提高了模型对噪声的鲁棒性，并开发了可用于实际农业的原型系统。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型在茶叶病害检测中表现出色，DenseNet201是最佳选择。结合可解释性技术和对抗训练可增强模型在实际应用中的可靠性和实用性，为农业病害管理提供了有效的技术方案。

title: Attribution-Driven Explainable Intrusion Detection with Encoder-Based Large Language Models
summary: Software-Defined Networking (SDN) improves network flexibility but also increases the need for reliable and interpretable intrusion detection. Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been explored for cybersecurity tasks due to their strong representation learning capabilities; however, their lack of transparency limits their practical adoption in security-critical environments. Understanding how LLMs make decisions is therefore essential. This paper presents an attribution-driven analysis of encoder-based LLMs for network intrusion detection using flow-level traffic features. Attribution analysis demonstrates that model decisions are driven by meaningful traffic behavior patterns, improving transparency and trust in transformer-based SDN intrusion detection. These patterns align with established intrusion detection principles, indicating that LLMs learn attack behavior from traffic dynamics. This work demonstrates the value of attribution methods for validating and trusting LLM-based security analysis.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于归因分析的方法来增强基于LLM的SDN入侵检测系统的可解释性和可信度，通过分析模型决策与流量行为模式的关系来验证LLM学习到的攻击行为。
AI.motivation: SDN提高了网络灵活性，但也增加了对可靠且可解释的入侵检测的需求。LLM在网络安全任务中表现出强大的表示学习能力，但其缺乏透明度限制了在安全关键环境中的实际应用。理解LLM如何做出决策对于实际部署至关重要。
AI.method: 采用基于编码器的LLM进行网络入侵检测，使用流级流量特征。通过归因分析（attribution analysis）方法来解释模型决策，分析模型决策与流量行为模式之间的关系。
AI.result: 归因分析表明，模型决策是由有意义的流量行为模式驱动的，这提高了基于Transformer的SDN入侵检测的透明度和可信度。这些模式与既定的入侵检测原则一致，表明LLM从流量动态中学习到了攻击行为。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作证明了归因方法在验证和信任基于LLM的安全分析方面的价值，为LLM在网络安全领域的可信应用提供了方法论支持。

title: ReDAct: Uncertainty-Aware Deferral for LLM Agents
summary: Recently, LLM-based agents have become increasingly popular across many applications, including complex sequential decision-making problems. However, they inherit the tendency of LLMs to hallucinate, leading to incorrect decisions. In sequential settings, even a single mistake can irreversibly degrade the trajectory, making hallucinations an even bigger problem. Although larger LLMs hallucinate less, they incur a significantly higher per-token cost. In this paper, we address this tradeoff by proposing ReDAct (Reason-Defer-Act). In ReDAct, an agent is equipped with two LLMs: a small, cheap model used by default, and a large, more reliable but expensive model. When the predictive uncertainty of the small model exceeds a calibrated threshold, the decision is deferred to the large model. We evaluate our approach in text-based embodied environments such as ALFWorld and MiniGrid and show that deferring only about 15% of decisions to the large model can match the quality of using it exclusively, while significantly reducing inference costs.

AI.tldr: 提出ReDAct方法，使用大小两个LLM协同工作：小模型默认决策，当不确定性超过阈值时，将决策推迟给大模型，在保持性能的同时显著降低推理成本。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在顺序决策任务中面临幻觉问题，单个错误可能导致轨迹不可逆恶化。大模型幻觉较少但推理成本高，小模型成本低但可靠性差，需要平衡性能与成本。
AI.method: ReDAct方法配备两个LLM：小型廉价模型（默认使用）和大型可靠但昂贵模型。通过校准阈值检测小模型预测不确定性，当不确定性超过阈值时，将决策推迟给大模型。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和MiniGrid等文本化具身环境中评估，仅将约15%的决策推迟给大模型，就能达到完全使用大模型的性能水平，同时显著降低推理成本。
AI.conclusion: ReDAct方法有效解决了LLM代理在顺序决策中的幻觉与成本权衡问题，通过智能推迟机制实现了成本效益的决策系统。

title: Weaves, Wires, and Morphisms: Formalizing and Implementing the Algebra of Deep Learning
summary: Despite deep learning models running well-defined mathematical functions, we lack a formal mathematical framework for describing model architectures. Ad-hoc notation, diagrams, and pseudocode poorly handle nonlinear broadcasting and the relationship between individual components and composed models. This paper introduces a categorical framework for deep learning models that formalizes broadcasting through the novel axis-stride and array-broadcasted categories. This allows the mathematical function underlying architectures to be precisely expressed and manipulated in a compositional manner. These mathematical definitions are translated into human manageable diagrams and machine manageable data structures. We provide a mirrored implementation in Python (pyncd) and TypeScript (tsncd) to show the universal aspect of our framework, along with features including algebraic construction, graph conversion, PyTorch compilation and diagram rendering. This lays the foundation for a systematic, formal approach to deep learning model design and analysis.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个用于深度学习模型的范畴论框架，通过轴步幅和数组广播范畴来形式化广播操作，使得架构的数学函数能够以组合方式精确表达和操作。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习模型运行明确定义的数学函数，但缺乏描述模型架构的正式数学框架。现有的临时符号、图表和伪代码难以处理非线性广播以及组件与组合模型之间的关系。
AI.method: 引入基于范畴论的深度学习模型框架，通过新颖的轴步幅和数组广播范畴来形式化广播操作。将数学定义转化为人类可管理的图表和机器可管理的数据结构，并在Python(pyncd)和TypeScript(tsncd)中实现。
AI.result: 开发了包含代数构造、图转换、PyTorch编译和图表渲染等功能的实现，展示了框架的通用性，为深度学习模型设计和分析提供了系统化的形式化方法基础。
AI.conclusion: 该范畴论框架为深度学习模型设计提供了正式的数学基础，能够精确表达和操作架构的数学函数，支持组合性建模，为系统化的模型设计和分析奠定了基础。

title: INSPATIO-WORLD: A Real-Time 4D World Simulator via Spatiotemporal Autoregressive Modeling
summary: Building world models with spatial consistency and real-time interactivity remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Current video generation paradigms often struggle with a lack of spatial persistence and insufficient visual realism, making it difficult to support seamless navigation in complex environments. To address these challenges, we propose INSPATIO-WORLD, a novel real-time framework capable of recovering and generating high-fidelity, dynamic interactive scenes from a single reference video.
