At the core of our approach is a Spatiotemporal Autoregressive (STAR) architecture, which enables consistent and controllable scene evolution through two tightly coupled components: Implicit Spatiotemporal Cache aggregates reference and historical observations into a latent world representation, ensuring global consistency during long-horizon navigation; Explicit Spatial Constraint Module enforces geometric structure and translates user interactions into precise and physically plausible camera trajectories. Furthermore, we introduce Joint Distribution Matching Distillation (JDMD). By using real-world data distributions as a regularizing guide, JDMD effectively overcomes the fidelity degradation typically caused by over-reliance on synthetic data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INSPATIO-WORLD significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) models in spatial consistency and interaction precision, ranking first among real-time interactive methods on the WorldScore-Dynamic benchmark, and establishing a practical pipeline for navigating 4D environments reconstructed from monocular videos.

AI.tldr: INSPATIO-WORLD：一个实时框架，能从单参考视频恢复和生成高保真动态交互场景，通过时空自回归架构和联合分布匹配蒸馏解决空间一致性和视觉真实性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成范式在空间持久性和视觉真实性方面存在不足，难以支持复杂环境中的无缝导航。需要构建具有空间一致性和实时交互性的世界模型。
AI.method: 提出时空自回归（STAR）架构，包含隐式时空缓存（聚合参考和历史观测到潜在世界表示）和显式空间约束模块（强制几何结构并转换用户交互为精确相机轨迹）。引入联合分布匹配蒸馏（JDMD），利用真实世界数据分布作为正则化指导。
AI.result: 在空间一致性和交互精度方面显著优于现有SOTA模型，在WorldScore-Dynamic基准测试中实时交互方法排名第一，建立了从单目视频重建4D环境的实用流程。
AI.conclusion: INSPATIO-WORLD为从单参考视频恢复和生成高保真动态交互场景提供了有效解决方案，在空间一致性和交互精度方面达到SOTA水平，推动了4D环境导航的实际应用。

title: Sell More, Play Less: Benchmarking LLM Realistic Selling Skill
summary: Sales dialogues require multi-turn, goal-directed persuasion under asymmetric incentives, which makes them a challenging setting for large language models (LLMs). Yet existing dialogue benchmarks rarely measure deal progression and outcomes. We introduce SalesLLM, a bilingual (ZH/EN) benchmark derived from realistic applications covering Financial Services and Consumer Goods, built from 30,074 scripted configurations and 1,805 curated multi-turn scenarios with controllable difficulty and personas. We propose a fully automatic evaluation pipeline that combines (i) an LLM-based rater for sales-process progress, and (ii) fine-tuned BERT classifiers for end-of-dialogue buying intent. To improve simulation fidelity, we train a user model, CustomerLM, with SFT and DPO on 8,000 crowdworker-involved sales conversations, reducing role inversion from 17.44% (GPT-4o) to 8.8%. SalesLLM scores correlate strongly with expert human ratings (Pearson r=0.98). Experiments across 15 mainstream LLMs reveal substantial variability: top-performance LLMs are competitive with human-level performance while the less capable ones are worse than human. SalesLLM serves as a scalable benchmark for developing and evaluating outcome-oriented sales agents.

AI.tldr: SalesLLM是一个双语销售对话基准，用于评估LLM在不对称激励下的多轮目标导向说服能力，包含自动评估流程和用户模拟模型。
AI.motivation: 现有对话基准很少衡量交易进展和结果，而销售对话具有多轮、目标导向、不对称激励的特点，对LLM构成挑战，需要专门的评估框架。
AI.method: 构建双语销售对话基准（金融服务和消费品领域），包含30,074个脚本配置和1,805个多轮场景；提出自动评估流程：LLM评分器评估销售过程进展，BERT分类器评估购买意图；训练用户模型CustomerLM（SFT+DPO）提高模拟保真度。
AI.result: SalesLLM评分与专家人工评分高度相关（Pearson r=0.98）；CustomerLM将角色反转从GPT-4o的17.44%降低到8.8%；15个主流LLM表现差异显著，顶尖LLM达到人类水平，较差LLM不如人类。
AI.conclusion: SalesLLM作为可扩展的基准，可用于开发和评估面向结果的销售代理，填补了现有对话基准在衡量交易进展和结果方面的空白。

title: A comparative analysis of machine learning models in SHAP analysis
summary: In this growing age of data and technology, large black-box models are becoming the norm due to their ability to handle vast amounts of data and learn incredibly complex data patterns. The deficiency of these methods, however, is their inability to explain the prediction process, making them untrustworthy and their use precarious in high-stakes situations. SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) analysis is an explainable AI method growing in popularity for its ability to explain model predictions in terms of the original features. For each sample and feature in the data set, an associated SHAP value quantifies the contribution of that feature to the prediction of that sample. Analysis of these SHAP values provides valuable insight into the model's decision-making process, which can be leveraged to create data-driven solutions. The interpretation of these SHAP values, however, is model-dependent, so there does not exist a universal analysis procedure. To aid in these efforts, we present a detailed investigation of SHAP analysis across various machine learning models and data sets. In uncovering the details and nuance behind SHAP analysis, we hope to empower analysts in this less-explored territory. We also present a novel generalization of the waterfall plot to the multi-classification problem.

AI.tldr: 本文详细研究了SHAP（SHapley Additive exPlanations）分析方法在不同机器学习模型和数据集上的应用，揭示了SHAP分析的细节和细微差别，并提出了多分类问题中瀑布图的新泛化方法。
AI.motivation: 随着大数据和黑盒模型的普及，这些模型虽然能处理海量数据并学习复杂模式，但缺乏可解释性，使其在高风险场景中不可信。SHAP作为一种可解释AI方法越来越受欢迎，但其解释依赖于具体模型，缺乏通用的分析流程。
AI.method: 1. 对多种机器学习模型和数据集进行详细的SHAP分析研究；2. 提出多分类问题中瀑布图的新泛化方法；3. 探索SHAP值在不同模型和数据集中的解释差异。
AI.result: 揭示了SHAP分析在不同模型和数据集中的细节和细微差别，为分析师提供了在这一较少探索领域的实用指导，并扩展了瀑布图在多分类问题中的应用。
AI.conclusion: SHAP分析是理解黑盒模型决策过程的有力工具，但其解释具有模型依赖性。通过系统研究不同场景下的SHAP分析，可以为分析师提供更好的指导，增强模型的可解释性和可信度。

title: VersaVogue: Visual Expert Orchestration and Preference Alignment for Unified Fashion Synthesis
summary: Diffusion models have driven remarkable advancements in fashion image generation, yet prior works usually treat garment generation and virtual dressing as separate problems, limiting their flexibility in real-world fashion workflows. Moreover, fashion image synthesis under multi-source heterogeneous conditions remains challenging, as existing methods typically rely on simple feature concatenation or static layer-wise injection, which often causes attribute entanglement and semantic interference. To address these issues, we propose VersaVogue, a unified framework for multi-condition controllable fashion synthesis that jointly supports garment generation and virtual dressing, corresponding to the design and showcase stages of the fashion lifecycle. Specifically, we introduce a trait-routing attention (TA) module that leverages a mixture-of-experts mechanism to dynamically route condition features to the most compatible experts and generative layers, enabling disentangled injection of visual attributes such as texture, shape, and color. To further improve realism and controllability, we develop an automated multi-perspective preference optimization (MPO) pipeline that constructs preference data without human annotation or task-specific reward models. By combining evaluators of content fidelity, textual alignment, and perceptual quality, MPO identifies reliable preference pairs, which are then used to optimize the model via direct preference optimization (DPO). Extensive experiments on both garment generation and virtual dressing benchmarks demonstrate that VersaVogue consistently outperforms existing methods in visual fidelity, semantic consistency, and fine-grained controllability.

AI.tldr: VersaVogue是一个统一的多条件可控时尚合成框架，支持服装生成和虚拟试穿，通过特质路由注意力模块和自动化多视角偏好优化提升生成质量和可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型通常将服装生成和虚拟试穿视为独立问题，限制了实际时尚工作流程的灵活性。同时，多源异构条件下的时尚图像合成面临挑战，现有方法通过简单特征拼接或静态层注入容易导致属性纠缠和语义干扰。
AI.method: 1. 提出特质路由注意力模块，利用专家混合机制动态路由条件特征到最兼容的专家和生成层，实现纹理、形状、颜色等视觉属性的解耦注入。2. 开发自动化多视角偏好优化流程，无需人工标注或任务特定奖励模型，通过内容保真度、文本对齐和感知质量评估器构建偏好数据，使用直接偏好优化优化模型。
AI.result: 在服装生成和虚拟试穿基准测试上的广泛实验表明，VersaVogue在视觉保真度、语义一致性和细粒度可控性方面持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VersaVogue提供了一个统一的时尚合成框架，通过创新的条件注入机制和自动化偏好优化，显著提升了多条件可控时尚图像生成的质量和灵活性。

title: MAT-Cell: A Multi-Agent Tree-Structured Reasoning Framework for Batch-Level Single-Cell Annotation
summary: Automated cellular reasoning faces a core dichotomy: supervised methods fall into the Reference Trap and fail to generalize to out-of-distribution cell states, while large language models (LLMs), without grounded biological priors, suffer from a Signal-to-Noise Paradox that produces spurious associations. We propose MAT-Cell, a neuro-symbolic reasoning framework that reframes single-cell analysis from black-box classification into constructive, verifiable proof generation. MAT-Cell injects symbolic constraints through adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to ground neural reasoning in biological axioms and reduce transcriptomic noise. It further employs a dialectic verification process with homogeneous rebuttal agents to audit and prune reasoning paths, forming syllogistic derivation trees that enforce logical consistency.Across large-scale and cross-species benchmarks, MAT-Cell significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) models and maintains robust per-formance in challenging scenarios where baselinemethods severely degrade. Code is available at https://gith ub.com/jiangliu91/MAT-Cell-A-Mul ti-Agent-Tree-Structured-Reasoni ng-Framework-for-Batch-Level-Sin gle-Cell-Annotation.

AI.tldr: MAT-Cell是一个神经符号推理框架，将单细胞分析从黑盒分类重构为可验证的证明生成，通过自适应RAG注入符号约束，并使用辩证验证过程确保逻辑一致性。
AI.motivation: 解决细胞自动推理的核心困境：监督方法陷入"参考陷阱"无法泛化到分布外细胞状态，而大语言模型缺乏生物学先验知识，存在"信噪比悖论"产生虚假关联。
AI.method: 1) 通过自适应检索增强生成(RAG)注入符号约束，将神经推理基于生物学公理并减少转录组噪声；2) 使用同质反驳代理的辩证验证过程，审计和修剪推理路径，形成强制逻辑一致性的三段论推导树。
AI.result: 在大规模和跨物种基准测试中，MAT-Cell显著优于最先进模型，并在基线方法严重退化的挑战性场景中保持稳健性能。
AI.conclusion: MAT-Cell通过神经符号推理框架成功解决了细胞分析中的泛化问题和信噪比悖论，为单细胞注释提供了可验证的推理方法。

title: IndoBERT-Sentiment: Context-Conditioned Sentiment Classification for Indonesian Text
summary: Existing Indonesian sentiment analysis models classify text in isolation, ignoring the topical context that often determines whether a statement is positive, negative, or neutral. We introduce IndoBERT-Sentiment, a context-conditioned sentiment classifier that takes both a topical context and a text as input, producing sentiment predictions grounded in the topic being discussed. Built on IndoBERT Large (335M parameters) and trained on 31,360 context-text pairs labeled across 188 topics, the model achieves an F1 macro of 0.856 and accuracy of 88.1%. In a head-to-head evaluation against three widely used general-purpose Indonesian sentiment models on the same test set, IndoBERT-Sentiment outperforms the best baseline by 35.6 F1 points. We show that context-conditioning, previously demonstrated for relevancy classification, transfers effectively to sentiment analysis and enables the model to correctly classify texts that are systematically misclassified by context-free approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了IndoBERT-Sentiment，这是一个基于印尼语BERT的上下文条件情感分类器，通过结合主题上下文和文本输入，显著提升了印尼语情感分析的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有印尼语情感分析模型孤立地分类文本，忽略了决定情感极性的主题上下文。许多陈述的情感取决于讨论的主题，因此需要上下文条件的情感分类方法。
AI.method: 基于IndoBERT Large（3.35亿参数）构建，采用上下文条件架构，同时接受主题上下文和文本作为输入。在188个主题的31,360个上下文-文本对上训练，实现基于主题的情感预测。
AI.result: 模型达到F1宏平均0.856和准确率88.1%。在与三个广泛使用的印尼语情感模型的对比评估中，比最佳基线高出35.6个F1点。能够正确分类上下文无关方法系统误判的文本。
AI.conclusion: 上下文条件方法（先前用于相关性分类）可有效迁移到情感分析，显著提升印尼语情感分类性能，解决了上下文无关方法的系统性错误。

title: Tracking Adaptation Time: Metrics for Temporal Distribution Shift
comment: Accepted at CEUR-WS Vol. 4183 (Streaming Continual Learning Bridge at AAAI 2026)
summary: Evaluating robustness under temporal distribution shift remains an open challenge. Existing metrics quantify the average decline in performance, but fail to capture how models adapt to evolving data. As a result, temporal degradation is often misinterpreted: when accuracy declines, it is unclear whether the model is failing to adapt or whether the data itself has become inherently more challenging to learn. In this work, we propose three complementary metrics to distinguish adaptation from intrinsic difficulty in the data. Together, these metrics provide a dynamic and interpretable view of model behavior under temporal distribution shift. Results show that our metrics uncover adaptation patterns hidden by existing analysis, offering a richer understanding of temporal robustness in evolving environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了三种互补的指标来区分模型适应能力与数据内在难度，以更准确地评估时间分布偏移下的模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标只能量化性能的平均下降，但无法捕捉模型如何适应演化数据。当准确率下降时，难以判断是模型未能适应还是数据本身变得更难学习，导致对时间退化的误解。
AI.method: 提出了三种互补的指标：1) 区分模型适应能力与数据内在难度的指标；2) 提供动态和可解释的模型行为视图；3) 共同揭示现有分析隐藏的适应模式。
AI.result: 新指标能够揭示现有分析隐藏的适应模式，提供对演化环境中时间鲁棒性更丰富的理解，比传统平均性能下降指标更有洞察力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的指标框架能够更准确地评估时间分布偏移下的模型鲁棒性，区分模型适应失败与数据难度增加，为动态环境中的模型评估提供了更精细的分析工具。

title: PhyEdit: Towards Real-World Object Manipulation via Physically-Grounded Image Editing
summary: Achieving physically accurate object manipulation in image editing is essential for its potential applications in interactive world models. However, existing visual generative models often fail at precise spatial manipulation, resulting in incorrect scaling and positioning of objects. This limitation primarily stems from the lack of explicit mechanisms to incorporate 3D geometry and perspective projection. To achieve accurate manipulation, we develop PhyEdit, an image editing framework that leverages explicit geometric simulation as contextual 3D-aware visual guidance. By combining this plug-and-play 3D prior with joint 2D--3D supervision, our method effectively improves physical accuracy and manipulation consistency. To support this method and evaluate performance, we present a real-world dataset, RealManip-10K, for 3D-aware object manipulation featuring paired images and depth annotations. We also propose ManipEval, a benchmark with multi-dimensional metrics to evaluate 3D spatial control and geometric consistency. Extensive experiments show that our approach outperforms existing methods, including strong closed-source models, in both 3D geometric accuracy and manipulation consistency.

AI.tldr: PhyEdit：通过显式几何模拟实现物理精确图像编辑的框架，结合3D先验和2D-3D联合监督，提升物体操纵的物理准确性和一致性
AI.motivation: 现有视觉生成模型在精确空间操纵方面存在不足，无法正确缩放和定位物体，主要原因是缺乏显式机制来融入3D几何和透视投影
AI.method: 开发PhyEdit框架，利用显式几何模拟作为上下文3D感知视觉指导，结合可插拔3D先验和2D-3D联合监督；构建RealManip-10K真实世界数据集和ManipEval评估基准
AI.result: 方法在3D几何准确性和操纵一致性方面优于现有方法，包括强大的闭源模型
AI.conclusion: 通过显式几何模拟和3D感知指导，能够显著提升图像编辑的物理准确性，为交互式世界模型应用奠定基础

title: Towards the Development of an LLM-Based Methodology for Automated Security Profiling in Compliance with Ukrainian Cybersecurity Regulations
summary: In recent years, the pace of development of information technology in various areas has increased drastically, forcing cybersecurity specialists to constantly review existing processes in order to prevent unauthorized access to confidential information. Using Ukraine as a primary case study, this paper explores the integration of international best practices, specifically ISO/IEC 27001 and the NIST Cybersecurity Framework, into national regulatory systems. A focus is placed on the transition from traditional compliance models to risk-based approaches, exemplified by the recent adoption of the Ukrainian normative documents. Furthermore, we propose a methodology for automating the development of target security profiles using Large Language Models (LLMs) enhanced by RetrievalAugmented Generation (RAG). By integrating a vector database of national regulations and organizational policies, the proposed RAG-based advisor reduces manual complexity, minimizes human error, and ensures alignment between technical controls and legal requirements. This study contributes to the field by providing a structured workflow for AI-assisted cybersecurity management in environments characterized by high-intensity hybrid threats.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于RAG增强LLM的方法，用于自动化开发网络安全目标安全配置文件，特别针对乌克兰的网络安全监管环境，整合ISO/IEC 27001和NIST框架。
AI.motivation: 网络安全威胁日益复杂，传统合规模型难以应对高强度混合威胁。乌克兰等国家需要将国际最佳实践（ISO/IEC 27001、NIST框架）整合到国家监管体系中，但手动开发安全配置文件存在复杂性高、易出错的问题。
AI.method: 提出基于检索增强生成（RAG）的LLM方法，集成国家法规和组织政策的向量数据库，自动化开发目标安全配置文件。通过RAG技术减少手动复杂性，最小化人为错误，确保技术控制与法律要求的一致性。
AI.result: 开发了一个RAG-based advisor系统，能够结构化处理网络安全管理工作流程，在混合威胁环境中提供AI辅助的网络安全管理解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为AI辅助网络安全管理提供了结构化工作流程，特别适用于高强度混合威胁环境，有助于实现从传统合规模型向基于风险方法的转变。

title: SemEval-2026 Task 3: Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (DimABSA)
summary: We present the SemEval-2026 shared task on Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (DimABSA), which improves traditional ABSA by modeling sentiment along valence-arousal (VA) dimensions rather than using categorical polarity labels. To extend ABSA beyond consumer reviews to public-issue discourse (e.g., political, energy, and climate issues), we introduce an additional task, Dimensional Stance Analysis (DimStance), which treats stance targets as aspects and reformulates stance detection as regression in the VA space. The task consists of two tracks: Track A (DimABSA) and Track B (DimStance). Track A includes three subtasks: (1) dimensional aspect sentiment regression, (2) dimensional aspect sentiment triplet extraction, and (3) dimensional aspect sentiment quadruplet extraction, while Track B includes only the regression subtask for stance targets. We also introduce a continuous F1 (cF1) metric to jointly evaluate structured extraction and VA regression. The task attracted more than 400 participants, resulting in 112 final submissions and 42 system description papers. We report baseline results, discuss top-performing systems, and analyze key design choices to provide insights into dimensional sentiment analysis at the aspect and stance-target levels. All resources are available on our GitHub repository.

AI.tldr: SemEval-2026共享任务提出维度方面情感分析(DimABSA)，将传统ABSA从分类极性标签扩展到价-唤醒(VA)维度建模，并引入维度立场分析(DimStance)用于公共议题话语分析。
AI.motivation: 传统方面情感分析(ABSA)使用分类极性标签(正面/负面/中性)，无法捕捉情感的细微差别。该任务旨在将ABSA扩展到价-唤醒(VA)维度空间，以更细致地建模情感，并将分析范围从消费者评论扩展到公共议题话语(政治、能源、气候等)。
AI.method: 提出两个任务轨道：Track A (DimABSA)包括三个子任务：(1)维度方面情感回归，(2)维度方面情感三元组提取，(3)维度方面情感四元组提取；Track B (DimStance)仅包括立场目标的回归子任务。引入连续F1(cF1)指标联合评估结构化提取和VA回归。
AI.result: 任务吸引了400多名参与者，收到112份最终提交和42篇系统描述论文。报告了基线结果，分析了表现最佳的系统，并讨论了维度情感分析在方面和立场目标层面的关键设计选择。
AI.conclusion: 该共享任务成功推动了维度情感分析的发展，提供了从分类极性到连续VA空间建模的框架，为情感分析的细粒度建模和公共议题分析提供了新方向。

title: Android Coach: Improve Online Agentic Training Efficiency with Single State Multiple Actions
summary: Online reinforcement learning (RL) serves as an effective method for enhancing the capabilities of Android agents. However, guiding agents to learn through online interaction is prohibitively expensive due to the high latency of emulators and the sample inefficiency of existing RL algorithms. We identify a fundamental limitation in current approaches: the Single State Single Action paradigm, which updates the policy with one-to-one state-action pairs from online one-way rollouts without fully exploring each costly emulator state. In this paper, we propose Android Coach, a novel framework that shifts the training paradigm to Single State Multiple Actions, allowing the agent to sample and utilize multiple actions for a single online state. We enable this without additional emulator overhead by learning a critic that estimates action values. To ensure the critic serves as a reliable coach, we integrate a process reward model and introduce a group-wise advantage estimator based on the averaged critic outputs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of Android Coach: it achieves 7.5% and 8.3% success rate improvements on AndroidLab and AndroidWorld over UI-TARS-1.5-7B, and attains 1.4x higher training efficiency than Single State Single Action methods PPO and GRPO at matched success rates.

AI.tldr: Android Coach：一种新的在线强化学习框架，通过单状态多动作范式提升Android智能体训练效率，利用评论家网络估计动作价值，无需额外模拟器开销即可实现高效学习。
AI.motivation: 当前Android智能体在线强化学习存在成本过高的问题，主要原因是模拟器延迟高和现有RL算法样本效率低。核心限制在于"单状态单动作"范式，每个昂贵的模拟器状态只探索一个动作，无法充分利用状态信息。
AI.method: 提出Android Coach框架，将训练范式从"单状态单动作"转变为"单状态多动作"。通过学习评论家网络估计动作价值，无需额外模拟器开销即可为单个在线状态采样多个动作。集成过程奖励模型，并引入基于平均评论家输出的分组优势估计器。
AI.result: 在AndroidLab和AndroidWorld上分别比UI-TARS-1.5-7B提升7.5%和8.3%的成功率。在相同成功率下，比PPO和GRPO等单状态单动作方法获得1.4倍的训练效率提升。
AI.conclusion: Android Coach通过单状态多动作范式有效解决了Android智能体在线强化学习的高成本问题，显著提升了训练效率和性能，为移动设备智能体训练提供了新思路。

title: Geo-EVS: Geometry-Conditioned Extrapolative View Synthesis for Autonomous Driving
summary: Extrapolative novel view synthesis can reduce camera-rig dependency in autonomous driving by generating standardized virtual views from heterogeneous sensors. Existing methods degrade outside recorded trajectories because extrapolated poses provide weak geometric support and no dense target-view supervision. The key is to explicitly expose the model to out-of-trajectory condition defects during training. We propose Geo-EVS, a geometry-conditioned framework under sparse supervision. Geo-EVS has two components. Geometry-Aware Reprojection (GAR) uses fine-tuned VGGT to reconstruct colored point clouds and reproject them to observed and virtual target poses, producing geometric condition maps. This design unifies the reprojection path between training and inference. Artifact-Guided Latent Diffusion (AGLD) injects reprojection-derived artifact masks during training so the model learns to recover structure under missing support. For evaluation, we use a LiDAR-Projected Sparse-Reference (LPSR) protocol when dense extrapolated-view ground truth is unavailable. On Waymo, Geo-EVS improves sparse-view synthesis quality and geometric accuracy, especially in high-angle and low-coverage settings. It also improves downstream 3D detection.

AI.tldr: Geo-EVS：一种几何条件化的稀疏监督框架，用于自动驾驶中的外推新视角合成，通过几何感知重投影和伪影引导的潜在扩散来改善轨迹外合成质量
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中异构传感器需要标准化虚拟视图，现有方法在记录轨迹外性能下降，因为外推姿态提供弱几何支持且无密集目标视图监督
AI.method: 提出Geo-EVS框架：1) 几何感知重投影(GAR)使用微调VGGT重建彩色点云并重投影到观测和虚拟目标姿态；2) 伪影引导潜在扩散(AGLD)注入重投影衍生的伪影掩码，让模型学习在缺失支持下的结构恢复
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上，Geo-EVS提高了稀疏视图合成质量和几何精度，特别是在高角度和低覆盖设置中，并改善了下游3D检测性能
AI.conclusion: 通过显式暴露模型于轨迹外条件缺陷的训练方法，Geo-EVS能够有效处理外推新视角合成问题，减少自动驾驶对相机阵列的依赖

title: Plasma GraphRAG: Physics-Grounded Parameter Selection for Gyrokinetic Simulations
summary: Accurate parameter selection is fundamental to gyrokinetic plasma simulations, yet current practices rely heavily on manual literature reviews, leading to inefficiencies and inconsistencies. We introduce Plasma GraphRAG, a novel framework that integrates Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) with large language models (LLMs) for automated, physics-grounded parameter range identification. By constructing a domain-specific knowledge graph from curated plasma literature and enabling structured retrieval over graph-anchored entities and relations, Plasma GraphRAG enables LLMs to generate accurate, context-aware recommendations. Extensive evaluations across five metrics, comprehensiveness, diversity, grounding, hallucination, and empowerment, demonstrate that Plasma GraphRAG outperforms vanilla RAG by over $10\%$ in overall quality and reduces hallucination rates by up to $25\%$. {Beyond enhancing simulation reliability, Plasma GraphRAG offers a methodology for accelerating scientific discovery across complex, data-rich domains.

AI.tldr: Plasma GraphRAG：结合图检索增强生成与LLMs的框架，用于等离子体模拟中的自动化参数范围识别，相比传统RAG提升10%整体质量并减少25%幻觉率
AI.motivation: 当前等离子体模拟中的参数选择严重依赖人工文献调研，导致效率低下和结果不一致。需要一种自动化、基于物理知识的参数范围识别方法。
AI.method: 提出Plasma GraphRAG框架：1）从精选的等离子体文献构建领域特定知识图谱；2）在图锚定实体和关系上进行结构化检索；3）结合LLMs生成准确、上下文感知的参数推荐。
AI.result: 在五个评估指标（全面性、多样性、基础性、幻觉率、赋能性）上，Plasma GraphRAG相比传统RAG整体质量提升超过10%，幻觉率降低达25%。
AI.conclusion: Plasma GraphRAG不仅提高了模拟可靠性，还为复杂、数据丰富的科学领域提供了一种加速科学发现的方法论。

title: Is Cross-Lingual Transfer in Bilingual Models Human-Like? A Study with Overlapping Word Forms in Dutch and English
summary: Bilingual speakers show cross-lingual activation during reading, especially for words with shared surface form. Cognates (friends) typically lead to facilitation, whereas interlingual homographs (false friends) cause interference or no effect. We examine whether cross-lingual activation in bilingual language models mirrors these patterns. We train Dutch-English causal Transformers under four vocabulary-sharing conditions that manipulate whether (false) friends receive shared or language-specific embeddings. Using psycholinguistic stimuli from bilingual reading studies, we evaluate the models through surprisal and embedding similarity analyses. The models largely maintain language separation, and cross-lingual effects arise primarily when embeddings are shared. In these cases, both friends and false friends show facilitation relative to controls. Regression analyses reveal that these effects are mainly driven by frequency rather than consistency in form-meaning mapping. Only when just friends share embeddings are the qualitative patterns of bilinguals reproduced. Overall, bilingual language models capture some cross-linguistic activation effects. However, their alignment with human processing seems to critically depend on how lexical overlap is encoded, possibly limiting their explanatory adequacy as models of bilingual reading.

AI.tldr: 双语语言模型在词汇共享条件下能捕捉跨语言激活效应，但与人类处理模式的匹配程度取决于词汇重叠的编码方式
AI.motivation: 研究双语者在阅读时存在跨语言激活现象（同源词促进，同形异义词干扰），探索双语语言模型是否能够复现这些人类处理模式
AI.method: 训练荷兰语-英语因果Transformer模型，设置四种词汇共享条件（控制同源词和同形异义词是否共享嵌入），使用心理语言学刺激材料，通过惊奇度和嵌入相似性分析评估模型
AI.result: 模型主要保持语言分离，跨语言效应仅在嵌入共享时出现；此时同源词和同形异义词都显示促进效应；回归分析显示效应主要由频率驱动而非形式-意义映射一致性；仅当只有同源词共享嵌入时，模型能复现双语者的定性模式
AI.conclusion: 双语语言模型能捕捉部分跨语言激活效应，但与人类处理的对齐程度高度依赖于词汇重叠的编码方式，这可能限制其作为双语阅读解释模型的充分性

title: Graph Neural ODE Digital Twins for Control-Oriented Reactor Thermal-Hydraulic Forecasting Under Partial Observability
summary: Real-time supervisory control of advanced reactors requires accurate forecasting of plant-wide thermal-hydraulic states, including locations where physical sensors are unavailable. Meeting this need calls for surrogate models that combine predictive fidelity, millisecond-scale inference, and robustness to partial observability. In this work, we present a physics-informed message-passing Graph Neural Network coupled with a Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (GNN-ODE) to addresses all three requirements simultaneously. We represent the whole system as a directed sensor graph whose edges encode hydraulic connectivity through flow/heat transfer-aware message passing, and we advance the latent dynamics in continuous time via a controlled Neural ODE. A topology-guided missing-node initializer reconstructs uninstrumented states at rollout start; prediction then proceeds fully autoregressively. The GNN-ODE surrogate achieves satisfactory results for the system dynamics prediction. On held-out simulation transients, the surrogate achieves an average MAE of 0.91 K at 60 s and 2.18 K at 300 s for uninstrumented nodes, with $R^2$ up to 0.995 for missing-node state reconstruction. Inference runs at approximately 105 times faster than simulated time on a single GPU, enabling 64-member ensemble rollouts for uncertainty quantification. To assess sim-to-real transfer, we adapt the pretrained surrogate to experimental facility data using layerwise discriminative fine-tuning with only 30 training sequences. The learned flow-dependent heat-transfer scaling recovers a Reynolds-number exponent consistent with established correlations, indicating constitutive learning beyond trajectory fitting. The model tracks a steep power change transient and produces accurate trajectories at uninstrumented locations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于物理信息图神经网络与神经常微分方程（GNN-ODE）的核反应堆热工水力状态预测模型，用于实时监控和预测未安装传感器的位置状态。
AI.motivation: 先进核反应堆的实时监控需要准确预测全厂热工水力状态，包括物理传感器不可达的位置。现有方法需要同时满足预测精度、毫秒级推理速度和对部分可观测性的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用物理信息消息传递图神经网络与神经常微分方程结合（GNN-ODE）。将系统表示为有向传感器图，边通过流动/传热感知的消息传递编码水力连接性，通过受控神经ODE在连续时间中推进潜在动力学。使用拓扑引导的缺失节点初始化器在开始时重建未检测状态，然后完全自回归地进行预测。
AI.result: 在保留的模拟瞬态测试中，对未检测节点在60秒时平均MAE为0.91K，300秒时为2.18K，缺失节点状态重建R²高达0.995。推理速度比模拟时间快约105倍，支持64成员集成滚动进行不确定性量化。通过仅30个训练序列的层间判别微调，成功迁移到实验设施数据。
AI.conclusion: GNN-ODE模型成功解决了核反应堆热工水力状态预测的三个关键需求：预测保真度、毫秒级推理和对部分可观测性的鲁棒性。模型能够学习流动依赖的传热缩放关系，显示出超越轨迹拟合的构成性学习能力。

title: Non-identifiability of Explanations from Model Behavior in Deep Networks of Image Authenticity Judgments
summary: Deep neural networks can predict human judgments, but this does not imply that they rely on human-like information or reveal the cues underlying those judgments. Prior work has addressed this issue using attribution heatmaps, but their explanatory value in itself depends on robustness. Here we tested the robustness of such explanations by evaluating whether models that predict human authenticity ratings also produce consistent explanations within and across architectures. We fit lightweight regression heads to multiple frozen pretrained vision models and generated attribution maps using Grad-CAM, LIME, and multiscale pixel masking. Several architectures predicted ratings well, reaching about 80% of the noise ceiling. VGG models achieved this by tracking image quality rather than authenticity-specific variance, limiting the relevance of their attributions. Among the remaining models, attribution maps were generally stable across random seeds within an architecture, especially for EfficientNetB3 and Barlow Twins, and consistency was higher for images judged as more authentic. Crucially, agreement in attribution across architectures was weak even when predictive performance was similar. To address this, we combined models in ensembles, which improved prediction of human authenticity judgments and enabled image-level attribution via pixel masking. We conclude that while deep networks can predict human authenticity judgments well, they do not produce identifiable explanations for those judgments. More broadly, our findings suggest that post hoc explanations from successful models of behavior should be treated as weak evidence for cognitive mechanism.

AI.tldr: 该研究测试了预测人类真实性评分的深度学习模型的解释鲁棒性，发现尽管多个架构能较好预测评分，但不同架构间的归因图一致性很弱，表明成功的行为模型的事后解释不能作为认知机制的有力证据。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型能够预测人类判断，但这并不意味着它们依赖人类类似的信息或揭示了判断背后的线索。先前研究使用归因热图解决这个问题，但其解释价值本身取决于鲁棒性。本研究旨在测试这种解释的鲁棒性，评估预测人类真实性评分的模型是否能在架构内部和跨架构产生一致的解释。
AI.method: 在多个冻结的预训练视觉模型上拟合轻量级回归头，使用Grad-CAM、LIME和多尺度像素掩码生成归因图。比较了不同架构（包括VGG、EfficientNetB3、Barlow Twins等）在预测人类真实性评分时的表现和归因一致性。最后通过模型集成来改进预测并实现图像级归因。
AI.result: 多个架构能较好预测人类真实性评分，达到噪声上限的约80%。VGG模型通过追踪图像质量而非真实性特定方差实现这一性能，限制了其归因的相关性。在剩余模型中，归因图在架构内部相对稳定，特别是EfficientNetB3和Barlow Twins。然而，即使预测性能相似，跨架构的归因一致性也很弱。模型集成改进了人类真实性判断的预测，并实现了像素掩码的图像级归因。
AI.conclusion: 虽然深度网络能较好地预测人类真实性判断，但它们不能为这些判断产生可识别的解释。更广泛地说，成功行为模型的事后解释应被视为认知机制的弱证据。

title: DosimeTron: Automating Personalized Monte Carlo Radiation Dosimetry in PET/CT with Agentic AI
summary:
Purpose: To develop and evaluate DosimeTron, an agentic AI system for automated patient-specific MC internal radiation dosimetry in PET/CT examinations.
  Materials and Methods: In this retrospective study, DosimeTron was evaluated on a publicly available PSMA-PET/CT dataset comprising 597 studies from 378 male patients acquired on three scanner models (18-F, n = 369; 68-Ga, n = 228). The system uses GPT-5.2 as its reasoning engine and 23 tools exposed via four Model Context Protocol servers, automating DICOM metadata extraction, image preprocessing, MC simulation, organ segmentation, and dosimetric reporting through natural-language interaction. Agentic performance was assessed using diverse prompt templates spanning single-turn instructions of varying specificity and multi-turn conversational exchanges, monitored via OpenTelemetry traces. Dosimetric accuracy was validated against OpenDose3D across 114 cases and 22 organs using Pearson's r, Lin's concordance correlation coefficient (CCC), and Bland-Altman analysis.
  Results: Across all prompt templates and all runs, no execution failures, pipeline errors, or hallucinated outputs were observed. Pearson's r ranged from 0.965 to 1.000 (median 0.997; all p < 0.001) and CCC from 0.963 to 1.000 (median 0.996). Mean absolute percentage difference was below 5% for 19 of 22 organs (median 2.5%). Total per-study processing time (SD) was 32.3 (6.0) minutes.
  Conclusion: DosimeTron autonomously executed complex dosimetry pipelines across diverse prompt configurations and achieved high dosimetric agreement with OpenDose3D at clinically acceptable processing times, demonstrating the feasibility of agentic AI for patient-specific Monte Carlo dosimetry in PET/CT.

AI.tldr: DosimeTron是一个基于GPT-5.2的智能代理系统，用于PET/CT检查中患者特异性蒙特卡洛内部辐射剂量学的自动化计算，在597个研究中实现了高精度（中位相关系数0.997）和临床可接受的处理时间（32.3分钟）。
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够自动化执行复杂医学剂量学流程的智能代理系统，解决传统方法中需要大量人工干预和专业知识的瓶颈问题，提高患者特异性辐射剂量计算的效率和准确性。
AI.method: 使用GPT-5.2作为推理引擎，通过四个Model Context Protocol服务器暴露23个工具，实现DICOM元数据提取、图像预处理、蒙特卡洛模拟、器官分割和剂量学报告的自然语言交互自动化。评估采用多样化提示模板和OpenTelemetry追踪。
AI.result: 在所有597个研究中无执行失败或幻觉输出，Pearson相关系数0.965-1.000（中位0.997），Lin一致性相关系数0.963-1.000（中位0.996），22个器官中19个的平均绝对百分比差异低于5%（中位2.5%），单研究处理时间32.3±6.0分钟。
AI.conclusion: DosimeTron能够在多样化提示配置下自主执行复杂剂量学流程，与OpenDose3D达到高剂量学一致性，处理时间临床可接受，证明了智能代理AI在PET/CT患者特异性蒙特卡洛剂量学中的可行性。

title: Multilingual Embedding Probes Fail to Generalize Across Learner Corpora
summary: Do multilingual embedding models encode a language-general representation of proficiency? We investigate this by training linear and non-linear probes on hidden-state activations from Qwen3-Embedding (0.6B, 4B, 8B) to predict CEFR proficiency levels from learner texts across nine corpora and seven languages. We compare five probing architectures against a baseline trained on surface-level text features. Under in-distribution evaluation, probes achieve strong performance ($QWK\approx0.7$), substantially outperforming the surface baseline, with middle layers consistently yielding the best predictions. However, in cross-corpus evaluation performance collapses across all probe types and model sizes. Residual analysis reveals that out-of-distribution probes converge towards predicting uniformly distributed labels, indicating that the learned mappings capture corpus-specific distributional properties (topic, language, task type, rating methodology) rather than an abstract, transferable proficiency dimension. These results suggest that current multilingual embeddings do not straightforwardly encode language-general proficiency, with implications for representation-based approaches to proficiency-adaptive language technology.

AI.tldr: 多语言嵌入模型（如Qwen3-Embedding）的隐藏状态激活无法编码跨语料库通用的语言能力表示，探针学习到的主要是语料库特定的分布特性而非抽象的可迁移能力维度。
AI.motivation: 研究多语言嵌入模型是否编码了语言能力的通用表示，这对于基于表示的语言能力自适应技术具有重要意义。当前需要验证这些模型是否真正捕获了跨语言、跨语料库的抽象能力维度。
AI.method: 在Qwen3-Embedding（0.6B、4B、8B）的隐藏状态激活上训练线性和非线性探针，预测九个语料库、七种语言的学习者文本的CEFR能力等级。比较五种探针架构与基于表层文本特征的基线模型。
AI.result: 在分布内评估中，探针表现良好（QWK≈0.7），显著优于基线，中间层预测效果最佳。但在跨语料库评估中，所有探针类型和模型大小的性能都崩溃。残差分析显示，分布外探针趋向于预测均匀分布的标签，表明学习到的映射捕获的是语料库特定的分布特性（主题、语言、任务类型、评分方法），而非抽象的可迁移能力维度。
AI.conclusion: 当前的多语言嵌入模型并未直接编码语言通用的能力表示，这对基于表示的能力自适应语言技术具有重要启示。模型学习到的主要是语料库特定的伪相关特征，而非真正的语言能力抽象表示。

title: SL-FAC: A Communication-Efficient Split Learning Framework with Frequency-Aware Compression
summary: The growing complexity of neural networks hinders the deployment of distributed machine learning on resource-constrained devices. Split learning (SL) offers a promising solution by partitioning the large model and offloading the primary training workload from edge devices to an edge server. However, the increasing number of participating devices and model complexity leads to significant communication overhead from the transmission of smashed data (e.g., activations and gradients), which constitutes a critical bottleneck for SL. To tackle this challenge, we propose SL-FAC, a communication-efficient SL framework comprising two key components: adaptive frequency decomposition (AFD) and frequency-based quantization compression (FQC). AFD first transforms the smashed data into the frequency domain and decomposes it into spectral components with distinct information. FQC then applies customized quantization bit widths to each component based on its spectral energy distribution. This collaborative approach enables SL-FAC to achieve significant communication reduction while strategically preserving the information most crucial for model convergence. Extensive experiments confirm the superior performance of SL-FAC for improving the training efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出SL-FAC框架，通过频域分解和量化压缩减少分割学习中的通信开销
AI.motivation: 神经网络复杂度增加阻碍了分布式机器学习在资源受限设备上的部署，分割学习虽然能解决这个问题，但参与设备增多和模型复杂度提升导致激活值和梯度传输的通信开销成为关键瓶颈
AI.method: 提出SL-FAC框架，包含两个关键组件：自适应频率分解（AFD）将数据转换到频域并分解为不同信息的光谱分量；基于频率的量化压缩（FQC）根据每个分量的光谱能量分布应用定制化的量化位宽
AI.result: 广泛的实验证实SL-FAC在提高训练效率方面具有优越性能，能够显著减少通信开销
AI.conclusion: SL-FAC通过频域分解和自适应量化压缩的协同方法，在保持模型收敛所需关键信息的同时，实现了显著的通信减少

title: GenLCA: 3D Diffusion for Full-Body Avatars from In-the-Wild Videos
summary: We present GenLCA, a diffusion-based generative model for generating and editing photorealistic full-body avatars from text and image inputs. The generated avatars are faithful to the inputs, while supporting high-fidelity facial and full-body animations. The core idea is a novel paradigm that enables training a full-body 3D diffusion model from partially observable 2D data, allowing the training dataset to scale to millions of real-world videos. This scalability contributes to the superior photorealism and generalizability of GenLCA. Specifically, we scale up the dataset by repurposing a pretrained feed-forward avatar reconstruction model as an animatable 3D tokenizer, which encodes unstructured video frames into structured 3D tokens. However, most real-world videos only provide partial observations of body parts, resulting in excessive blurring or transparency artifacts in the 3D tokens. To address this, we propose a novel visibility-aware diffusion training strategy that replaces invalid regions with learnable tokens and computes losses only over valid regions. We then train a flow-based diffusion model on the token dataset, inherently maintaining the photorealism and animatability provided by the pretrained avatar reconstruction model. Our approach effectively enables the use of large-scale real-world video data to train a diffusion model natively in 3D. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method through diverse and high-fidelity generation and editing results, outperforming existing solutions by a large margin. The project page is available at https://onethousandwu.com/GenLCA-Page.

AI.tldr: GenLCA是一个基于扩散模型的生成模型，用于从文本和图像输入生成和编辑逼真的全身虚拟形象，支持高保真面部和全身动画，通过创新的训练范式利用大规模真实世界视频数据进行3D扩散模型训练。
AI.motivation: 当前生成逼真全身虚拟形象的方法面临数据稀缺和训练困难的问题。大多数方法依赖于有限的3D数据或合成数据，难以实现高真实感和泛化能力。本文旨在利用大规模真实世界视频数据来训练3D扩散模型，解决数据可扩展性问题。
AI.method: 1) 使用预训练的前馈虚拟形象重建模型作为可动画的3D标记器，将非结构化视频帧编码为结构化3D标记；2) 提出可见性感知扩散训练策略，用可学习标记替换无效区域，仅在有效区域计算损失；3) 在标记数据集上训练基于流的扩散模型，保持预训练模型的真实感和动画能力。
AI.result: GenLCA能够生成多样化和高保真的虚拟形象，支持文本和图像驱动的生成与编辑，在真实感和动画质量上大幅超越现有解决方案。模型展示了优秀的泛化能力和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: GenLCA通过创新的训练范式成功解决了利用大规模真实世界视频数据训练3D扩散模型的技术挑战，实现了逼真全身虚拟形象的生成和编辑，为3D内容创作提供了新的可能性。

title: ClawLess: A Security Model of AI Agents
summary: Autonomous AI agents powered by Large Language Models can reason, plan, and execute complex tasks, but their ability to autonomously retrieve information and run code introduces significant security risks. Existing approaches attempt to regulate agent behavior through training or prompting, which does not offer fundamental security guarantees. We present ClawLess, a security framework that enforces formally verified policies on AI agents under a worst-case threat model where the agent itself may be adversarial. ClawLess formalizes a fine-grained security model over system entities, trust scopes, and permissions to express dynamic policies that adapt to agents' runtime behavior. These policies are translated into concrete security rules and enforced through a user-space kernel augmented with BPF-based syscall interception. This approach bridges the formal security model with practical enforcement, ensuring security regardless of the agent's internal design.

AI.tldr: ClawLess是一个为AI代理设计的安全框架，通过形式化验证的策略和用户空间内核增强来强制执行安全策略，即使在代理本身可能是对抗性的最坏情况下也能保证安全。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的自主AI代理能够推理、规划和执行复杂任务，但其自主检索信息和运行代码的能力引入了重大安全风险。现有方法通过训练或提示来规范代理行为，无法提供根本性的安全保障。
AI.method: ClawLess形式化了一个细粒度的安全模型，涵盖系统实体、信任范围和权限，以表达适应代理运行时行为的动态策略。这些策略被转化为具体的安全规则，并通过增强BPF系统调用拦截的用户空间内核来强制执行。
AI.result: 该方法将形式化安全模型与实际执行相结合，确保无论代理内部设计如何都能保证安全性，在最坏威胁模型下提供形式化验证的安全保证。
AI.conclusion: ClawLess为AI代理提供了一个实用的安全框架，能够强制执行形式化验证的策略，解决了现有方法无法提供根本性安全保障的问题，为可信AI系统提供了重要基础。

title: STRIDE-ED: A Strategy-Grounded Stepwise Reasoning Framework for Empathetic Dialogue Systems
summary: Empathetic dialogue requires not only recognizing a user's emotional state but also making strategy-aware, context-sensitive decisions throughout response generation. However, the lack of a comprehensive empathy strategy framework, explicit task-aligned multi-stage reasoning, and high-quality strategy-aware data fundamentally limits existing approaches, preventing them from effectively modeling empathetic dialogue as a complex, multi-stage cognitive and decision-making process. To address these challenges, we propose STRIDE-ED, a STRategy-grounded, Interpretable, and DEep reasoning framework that models Empathetic Dialogue through structured, strategy-conditioned reasoning. To support effective learning, we develop a strategy-aware data refinement pipeline integrating LLM-based annotation, multi-model consistency-weighted evaluation, and dynamic sampling to construct high-quality training data aligned with empathetic strategies. Furthermore, we adopt a two-stage training paradigm that combines supervised fine-tuning with multi-objective reinforcement learning to better align model behaviors with target emotions, empathetic strategies, and response formats. Extensive experiments demonstrate that STRIDE-ED generalizes across diverse open-source LLMs and consistently outperforms existing methods on both automatic metrics and human evaluations.

AI.tldr: STRIDE-ED：基于策略的共情对话框架，通过结构化策略条件推理和多阶段训练，提升共情对话质量
AI.motivation: 现有共情对话方法缺乏全面的策略框架、明确的任务对齐多阶段推理和高质量的策略感知数据，无法有效建模共情对话作为复杂的多阶段认知和决策过程
AI.method: 提出STRIDE-ED框架，包含：1) 策略感知数据精炼流水线（LLM标注、多模型一致性加权评估、动态采样）；2) 两阶段训练范式（监督微调+多目标强化学习）
AI.result: STRIDE-ED在不同开源LLM上均表现出良好的泛化能力，在自动指标和人工评估中均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 结构化策略条件推理框架能有效提升共情对话质量，策略感知数据构建和多阶段训练是关键成功因素

title: How to sketch a learning algorithm
summary:
How does the choice of training data influence an AI model? This question is of central importance to interpretability, privacy, and basic science. At its core is the data deletion problem: after a reasonable amount of precomputation, quickly predict how the model would behave in a given situation if a given subset of training data had been excluded from the learning algorithm.
  We present a data deletion scheme capable of predicting model outputs with vanishing error $\varepsilon$ in the deep learning setting. Our precomputation and prediction algorithms are only $\mathrm{poly}(1/\varepsilon)$ factors slower than regular training and inference, respectively. The storage requirements are those of $\mathrm{poly}(1/\varepsilon)$ models.
  Our proof is based on an assumption that we call "stability." In contrast to the assumptions made by prior work, stability appears to be fully compatible with learning powerful AI models. In support of this, we show that stability is satisfied in a minimal set of experiments with microgpt. Our code is available at https://github.com/SamSpo1/microgpt-sketch.
  At a technical level, our work is based on a new method for locally sketching an arithmetic circuit by computing higher-order derivatives in random complex directions. Forward-mode automatic differentiation allows cheap computation of these derivatives.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种数据删除方案，能够预测在删除特定训练数据子集后模型的输出，计算复杂度仅为poly(1/ε)，基于"稳定性"假设
AI.motivation: 研究训练数据选择如何影响AI模型，这对可解释性、隐私和基础科学至关重要。核心是数据删除问题：在预计算后快速预测如果某些训练数据被排除，模型在特定情况下的行为
AI.method: 基于"稳定性"假设的数据删除方案，使用新的局部草图技术：通过在随机复数方向上计算高阶导数来草图化算术电路，利用前向模式自动微分高效计算这些导数
AI.result: 提出的方案能够以消失误差ε预测模型输出，预计算和预测算法仅比常规训练和推理慢poly(1/ε)倍，存储需求为poly(1/ε)个模型
AI.conclusion: 稳定性假设与学习强大AI模型完全兼容，在microgpt实验中验证了该假设，为数据删除问题提供了高效解决方案

title: Mem3R: Streaming 3D Reconstruction with Hybrid Memory via Test-Time Training
summary: Streaming 3D perception is well suited to robotics and augmented reality, where long visual streams must be processed efficiently and consistently. Recent recurrent models offer a promising solution by maintaining fixed-size states and enabling linear-time inference, but they often suffer from drift accumulation and temporal forgetting over long sequences due to the limited capacity of compressed latent memories. We propose Mem3R, a streaming 3D reconstruction model with a hybrid memory design that decouples camera tracking from geometric mapping to improve temporal consistency over long sequences. For camera tracking, Mem3R employs an implicit fast-weight memory implemented as a lightweight Multi-Layer Perceptron updated via Test-Time Training. For geometric mapping, Mem3R maintains an explicit token-based fixed-size state. Compared with CUT3R, this design not only significantly improves long-sequence performance but also reduces the model size from 793M to 644M parameters. Mem3R supports existing improved plug-and-play state update strategies developed for CUT3R. Specifically, integrating it with TTT3R decreases Absolute Trajectory Error by up to 39% over the base implementation on 500 to 1000 frame sequences. The resulting improvements also extend to other downstream tasks, including video depth estimation and 3D reconstruction, while preserving constant GPU memory usage and comparable inference throughput. Project page: https://lck666666.github.io/Mem3R/

AI.tldr: Mem3R是一个流式3D感知模型，采用混合记忆设计，将相机跟踪与几何映射解耦，通过隐式快速权重记忆和显式令牌状态提升长序列处理的时序一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有循环模型在长序列处理中存在漂移积累和时间遗忘问题，压缩潜在记忆容量有限，需要改进流式3D感知的时序一致性。
AI.method: 1) 相机跟踪使用基于轻量级MLP的隐式快速权重记忆，通过测试时训练更新；2) 几何映射使用显式令牌固定大小状态；3) 支持CUT3R的即插即用状态更新策略。
AI.result: 相比CUT3R，模型参数量从793M减少到644M，绝对轨迹误差降低达39%（500-1000帧序列），同时保持恒定GPU内存使用和可比推理吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: Mem3R的混合记忆设计有效解决了长序列处理中的漂移和遗忘问题，提升了流式3D感知的时序一致性，可扩展到深度估计和3D重建等下游任务。

title: Harnessing Hyperbolic Geometry for Harmful Prompt Detection and Sanitization
comment: Paper accepted at ICLR 2026. Webpage available at: https://hype-vlm.github.io
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have become essential for tasks such as image synthesis, captioning, and retrieval by aligning textual and visual information in a shared embedding space. Yet, this flexibility also makes them vulnerable to malicious prompts designed to produce unsafe content, raising critical safety concerns. Existing defenses either rely on blacklist filters, which are easily circumvented, or on heavy classifier-based systems, both of which are costly and fragile under embedding-level attacks. We address these challenges with two complementary components: Hyperbolic Prompt Espial (HyPE) and Hyperbolic Prompt Sanitization (HyPS). HyPE is a lightweight anomaly detector that leverages the structured geometry of hyperbolic space to model benign prompts and detect harmful ones as outliers. HyPS builds on this detection by applying explainable attribution methods to identify and selectively modify harmful words, neutralizing unsafe intent while preserving the original semantics of user prompts. Through extensive experiments across multiple datasets and adversarial scenarios, we prove that our framework consistently outperforms prior defenses in both detection accuracy and robustness. Together, HyPE and HyPS offer an efficient, interpretable, and resilient approach to safeguarding VLMs against malicious prompt misuse.

AI.tldr: 提出HyPE和HyPS框架，利用双曲空间几何检测和净化恶意提示，保护视觉语言模型安全
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型(VLMs)虽然功能强大，但容易受到恶意提示攻击生成不安全内容。现有防御方法要么依赖黑名单过滤器（易被绕过），要么使用重型分类器系统（成本高且脆弱），无法有效应对嵌入级攻击。
AI.method: 提出两个互补组件：1) HyPE：轻量级异常检测器，利用双曲空间的结构化几何建模良性提示，将有害提示检测为异常值；2) HyPS：基于检测结果，应用可解释归因方法识别并选择性修改有害词语，在保持用户提示原始语义的同时消除不安全意图。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和对抗场景下的广泛实验表明，该框架在检测准确性和鲁棒性方面持续优于现有防御方法。
AI.conclusion: HyPE和HyPS为保护VLMs免受恶意提示滥用提供了一种高效、可解释且具有弹性的方法。

title: The Impact of Steering Large Language Models with Persona Vectors in Educational Applications
summary: Activation-based steering can personalize large language models at inference time, but its effects in educational settings remain unclear. We study persona vectors for seven character traits in short-answer generation and automated scoring on the ASAP-SAS benchmark across three models spanning two architectures. Persona steering lowers answer quality overall, with much larger effects on open-ended English Language Arts (ELA) prompts than on factual science prompts; interpretive and argumentative tasks are up to 11x more sensitive. On the scoring side, we observe predictable valence-aligned calibration shifts: evil and impolite scorers grade more harshly, while good and optimistic scorers grade more leniently. ELA tasks are 2.5-3x more susceptible to scorer personalization than science tasks, and the Mixture-of-Experts model shows roughly 6x larger calibration shifts than the dense models. To our knowledge, this is the first study to systematically examine the effects of activation-steered persona traits in educational generation and scoring, and the results highlight the need for task-aware and architecture-aware calibration when deploying steered models in educational settings.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次系统分析了激活导向的人格特质在教育场景中的影响，发现人格导向会降低答案质量，且对开放式英语语言艺术任务的影响远大于事实性科学任务；在评分方面，人格导向会导致可预测的校准偏移。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于激活的导向可以在推理时个性化大型语言模型，但其在教育场景中的效果尚不清楚。研究旨在探索人格导向在短答案生成和自动评分中的影响，特别是在不同任务类型和模型架构下的差异。
AI.method: 使用ASAP-SAS基准测试，研究了七种人格特质向量在三个模型（涵盖两种架构）上的表现。分析了人格导向对短答案生成质量和自动评分校准的影响，比较了开放式英语语言艺术任务与事实性科学任务的敏感性差异。
AI.result: 人格导向总体上降低了答案质量，对开放式英语语言艺术任务的影响是事实性科学任务的11倍。在评分方面，观察到可预测的校准偏移：邪恶和不礼貌的评分者更严厉，而善良和乐观的评分者更宽容。英语语言艺术任务对评分者个性化的敏感性是科学任务的2.5-3倍，混合专家模型的校准偏移比密集模型大约6倍。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次系统研究激活导向人格特质在教育生成和评分中的影响。结果表明，在教育场景中部署导向模型时，需要考虑任务感知和架构感知的校准，因为不同任务类型和模型架构对人格导向的敏感性存在显著差异。

title: MedRoute: RL-Based Dynamic Specialist Routing in Multi-Agent Medical Diagnosis
summary: Medical diagnosis using Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) has gained increasing attention due to capability of these models in providing precise diagnoses. These models generally combine medical questions with visual inputs to generate diagnoses or treatments. However, they are often overly general and unsuitable under the wide range of medical conditions in real-world healthcare. In clinical practice, diagnosis is performed by multiple specialists, each contributing domain-specific expertise. To emulate this process, a potential solution is to deploy a dynamic multi-agent LMM framework, where each agent functions as a medical specialist. Current approaches in this emerging area, typically relying on static or predefined selection of various specialists, cannot be adapted to the changing practical scenario. In this paper, we propose MedRoute, a flexible and dynamic multi-agent framework that comprises of a collaborative system of specialist LMM agents. Furthermore, we add a General Practitioner with an RL-trained router for dynamic specialist selection, and a Moderator that produces the final decision. In this way, our framework closely mirrors real clinical workflows. Extensive evaluations on text and image-based medical datasets demonstrate improved diagnostic accuracy, outperforming the state-of-the-art baselines. Our work lays a strong foundation for future research. Code and models are available at https://github.com/UCF-CRCV/MedRoute/.

AI.tldr: 提出了MedRoute，一个动态多智能体LMM框架，模拟真实临床工作流程，通过RL训练的路由器动态选择专科医生，提高医疗诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗诊断LMM模型过于通用，无法适应真实医疗场景的多样化条件。实际临床诊断需要多专科医生协作，而现有方法采用静态或预定义的专科选择，无法适应动态变化的实际场景。
AI.method: 提出MedRoute框架：1）专科LMM智能体协作系统；2）全科医生配备RL训练的路由器进行动态专科选择；3）协调员生成最终决策。框架模拟真实临床工作流程。
AI.result: 在文本和图像医疗数据集上的广泛评估显示，诊断准确性显著提升，优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MedRoute为未来研究奠定了坚实基础，代码和模型已开源。该框架通过模拟真实临床协作流程，解决了当前LMM医疗诊断模型的通用性问题。

title: Are Face Embeddings Compatible Across Deep Neural Network Models?
summary: Automated face recognition has made rapid strides over the past decade due to the unprecedented rise of deep neural network (DNN) models that can be trained for domain-specific tasks. At the same time, foundation models that are pretrained on broad vision or vision-language tasks have shown impressive generalization across diverse domains, including biometrics. This raises an important question: Do different DNN models--both domain-specific and foundation models--encode facial identity in similar ways, despite being trained on different datasets, loss functions, and architectures? In this regard, we directly analyze the geometric structure of embedding spaces imputed by different DNN models. Treating embeddings of face images as point clouds, we study whether simple affine transformations can align face representations of one model with another. Our findings reveal surprising cross-model compatibility: low-capacity linear mappings substantially improve cross-model face recognition over unaligned baselines for both face identification and verification tasks. Alignment patterns generalize across datasets and vary systematically across model families, indicating representational convergence in facial identity encoding. These findings have implications for model interoperability, ensemble design, and biometric template security.

AI.tldr: 研究发现不同DNN模型（包括领域特定模型和基础模型）的面部身份编码具有惊人的跨模型兼容性，简单的仿射变换就能显著改善跨模型人脸识别性能。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究不同DNN模型（基于不同数据集、损失函数和架构训练）是否以相似的方式编码面部身份特征，特别是比较领域特定模型和基础模型在面部识别中的表示一致性。
AI.method: 将不同DNN模型生成的面部图像嵌入视为点云，研究简单的仿射变换是否能够对齐不同模型的面部表示。通过低容量线性映射来评估跨模型面部识别的兼容性。
AI.result: 研究发现低容量线性映射显著改善了跨模型面部识别性能（包括身份识别和验证任务），对齐模式在不同数据集间具有泛化性，且在不同模型家族间呈现系统性变化，表明面部身份编码存在表示收敛。
AI.conclusion: 不同DNN模型在面部身份编码上表现出惊人的兼容性，简单的线性变换就能对齐它们的表示空间。这一发现对模型互操作性、集成设计和生物特征模板安全具有重要意义。

title: Yale-DM-Lab at ArchEHR-QA 2026: Deterministic Grounding and Multi-Pass Evidence Alignment for EHR Question Answering
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. System description for ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task
summary: We describe the Yale-DM-Lab system for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task. The task studies patient-authored questions about hospitalization records and contains four subtasks (ST): clinician-interpreted question reformulation, evidence sentence identification, answer generation, and evidence-answer alignment. ST1 uses a dual-model pipeline with Claude Sonnet 4 and GPT-4o to reformulate patient questions into clinician-interpreted questions. ST2-ST4 rely on Azure-hosted model ensembles (o3, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.1, and DeepSeek-R1) combined with few-shot prompting and voting strategies. Our experiments show three main findings. First, model diversity and ensemble voting consistently improve performance compared to single-model baselines. Second, the full clinician answer paragraph is provided as additional prompt context for evidence alignment. Third, results on the development set show that alignment accuracy is mainly limited by reasoning. The best scores on the development set reach 88.81 micro F1 on ST4, 65.72 macro F1 on ST2, 34.01 on ST3, and 33.05 on ST1.

AI.tldr: Yale-DM-Lab系统在ArchEHR-QA 2026医疗问答任务中，使用多模型集成和投票策略处理患者病历问题，包含四个子任务：问题重述、证据识别、答案生成和证据对齐。
AI.motivation: 解决患者对住院记录提出的问题，需要将患者问题转化为临床医生可解释的形式，并从医疗记录中提取准确证据和答案，这对医疗AI系统具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用多模型集成方法：ST1使用Claude Sonnet 4和GPT-4o双模型管道进行问题重述；ST2-ST4使用Azure托管的模型集成（o3、GPT-5.2、GPT-5.1、DeepSeek-R1），结合few-shot提示和投票策略。
AI.result: 在开发集上取得最佳分数：ST4达到88.81微F1，ST2达到65.72宏F1，ST3为34.01，ST1为33.05。模型多样性和集成投票相比单模型基线有持续改进。
AI.conclusion: 多模型集成和投票策略能有效提升医疗问答任务性能，证据对齐的准确性主要受推理能力限制，临床医生答案段落作为额外上下文有助于证据对齐。

title: Region-Graph Optimal Transport Routing for Mixture-of-Experts Whole-Slide Image Classification
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is the dominant framework for gigapixel whole-slide image (WSI) classification in computational pathology. However, current MIL aggregators route all instances through a shared pathway, constraining their capacity to specialise across the pathological heterogeneity inherent in each slide. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) methods offer a natural remedy by partitioning instances across specialised expert subnetworks; yet unconstrained softmax routing may yield highly imbalanced utilisation, where one or a few experts absorb most routing mass, collapsing the mixture back to a near-single-pathway solution. To address these limitations, we propose ROAM (Region-graph OptimAl-transport Mixture-of-experts), a spatially aware MoE-MIL aggregator that routes region tokens to expert poolers via capacity-constrained entropic optimal transport, promoting balanced expert utilisation by construction. ROAM operates on spatial region tokens, obtained by compressing dense patch bags into spatially binned units that align routing with local tissue neighbourhoods and introduces two key mechanisms: (i) region-to-expert assignment formulated as entropic optimal transport (Sinkhorn) with explicit per slide capacity marginals, enforcing balanced expert utilisation without auxiliary load-balancing losses; and (ii) graph-regularised Sinkhorn iterations that diffuse routing assignments over the spatial region graph, encouraging neighbouring regions to coherently route to the same experts. Evaluated on four WSI benchmarks with frozen foundation-model patch embeddings, ROAM achieves performance competitive against strong MIL and MoE baselines, and on NSCLC generalisation (TCGA-CPTAC) reaches external AUC 0.845 +- 0.019.

AI.tldr: ROAM是一种用于计算病理学中全切片图像分类的混合专家MIL聚合器，通过熵最优传输实现空间感知的区域到专家路由，强制平衡专家利用率，无需额外的负载均衡损失。
AI.motivation: 当前MIL聚合器将所有实例通过共享路径路由，限制了在病理异质性中专业化的能力。混合专家方法虽然提供解决方案，但无约束的softmax路由可能导致专家利用率高度不平衡，使混合退化为近单路径解决方案。
AI.method: ROAM将密集补丁包压缩为空间分箱的区域标记，通过容量约束的熵最优传输（Sinkhorn）将区域路由到专家池化器，并引入图正则化Sinkhorn迭代在空间区域图上扩散路由分配，鼓励相邻区域一致路由到相同专家。
AI.result: 在四个WSI基准测试中，使用冻结的基础模型补丁嵌入，ROAM性能与强MIL和MoE基线相当，在NSCLC泛化（TCGA-CPTAC）上达到外部AUC 0.845 ± 0.019。
AI.conclusion: ROAM通过空间感知的MoE-MIL聚合器解决了病理异质性问题，通过最优传输强制平衡专家利用率，在计算病理学中实现了有效的区域到专家路由。

title: Are Non-English Papers Reviewed Fairly? Language-of-Study Bias in NLP Peer Reviews
summary: Peer review plays a central role in the NLP publication process, but is susceptible to various biases. Here, we study language-of-study (LoS) bias: the tendency for reviewers to evaluate a paper differently based on the language(s) it studies, rather than its scientific merit. Despite being explicitly flagged in reviewing guidelines, such biases are poorly understood. Prior work treats such comments as part of broader categories of weak or unconstructive reviews without defining them as a distinct form of bias. We present the first systematic characterization of LoS bias, distinguishing negative and positive forms, and introduce the human-annotated dataset LOBSTER (Language-Of-study Bias in ScienTific pEer Review) and a method achieving 87.37 macro F1 for detection. We analyze 15,645 reviews to estimate how negative and positive biases differ with respect to the LoS, and find that non-English papers face substantially higher bias rates than English-only ones, with negative bias consistently outweighing positive bias. Finally, we identify four subcategories of negative bias, and find that demanding unjustified cross-lingual generalization is the most dominant form. We publicly release all resources to support work on fairer reviewing practices in NLP and beyond.

AI.tldr: 首次系统性地研究了NLP同行评审中的语言研究偏见（LoS bias），区分了正面和负面偏见，创建了标注数据集LOBSTER，开发了检测方法（87.37 macro F1），分析了15,645条评审，发现非英语论文面临更高的偏见率，并识别了四种负面偏见子类别。
AI.motivation: 同行评审在NLP发表过程中至关重要，但存在各种偏见。语言研究偏见（LoS bias）指评审者基于论文研究的语言而非科学价值进行不同评价的倾向。尽管评审指南明确提及此类偏见，但对其理解仍很有限。先前研究将其归为宽泛的弱评审或无建设性评审类别，未将其定义为独特的偏见形式。
AI.method: 1. 首次系统性地表征LoS偏见，区分正面和负面形式；2. 创建人工标注数据集LOBSTER（Language-Of-study Bias in ScienTific pEer Review）；3. 开发检测方法，达到87.37 macro F1分数；4. 分析15,645条评审数据，估计不同语言研究的偏见差异；5. 识别四种负面偏见子类别。
AI.result: 1. 非英语论文面临的偏见率显著高于仅研究英语的论文；2. 负面偏见始终超过正面偏见；3. 识别出四种负面偏见子类别，其中要求不合理跨语言泛化是最主要形式；4. 检测方法在LOBSTER数据集上达到87.37 macro F1。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次系统性地揭示了NLP同行评审中的语言研究偏见问题，提供了数据集、检测方法和实证分析，支持在NLP及其他领域建立更公平的评审实践。所有资源已公开释放。

title: Beyond Loss Values: Robust Dynamic Pruning via Loss Trajectory Alignment
summary: Existing dynamic data pruning methods often fail under noisy-label settings, as they typically rely on per-sample loss as the ranking criterion. This could mistakenly lead to preserving noisy samples due to their high loss values, resulting in significant performance drop. To address this, we propose AlignPrune, a noise-robust module designed to enhance the reliability of dynamic pruning under label noise. Specifically, AlignPrune introduces the Dynamic Alignment Score (DAS), which is a loss-trajectory-based criterion that enables more accurate identification of noisy samples, thereby improving pruning effectiveness. As a simple yet effective plug-and-play module, AlignPrune can be seamlessly integrated into state-of-the-art dynamic pruning frameworks, consistently outperforming them without modifying either the model architecture or the training pipeline. Extensive experiments on five widely-used benchmarks across various noise types and pruning ratios demonstrate the effectiveness of AlignPrune, boosting accuracy by up to 6.3\% over state-of-the-art baselines. Our results offer a generalizable solution for pruning under noisy data, encouraging further exploration of learning in real-world scenarios. Code is available at: https://github.com/leonqin430/AlignPrune.

AI.tldr: 提出AlignPrune模块，通过动态对齐分数改进动态数据剪枝在噪声标签下的效果，提升模型精度达6.3%
AI.motivation: 现有动态数据剪枝方法在噪声标签设置下表现不佳，因为它们通常依赖单样本损失作为排序标准。这可能导致错误地保留噪声样本（因其高损失值），造成显著性能下降。
AI.method: 提出AlignPrune噪声鲁棒模块，引入基于损失轨迹的动态对齐分数(DAS)，能更准确识别噪声样本。作为即插即用模块，可无缝集成到现有动态剪枝框架中，无需修改模型架构或训练流程。
AI.result: 在五种广泛使用的基准测试上，针对不同噪声类型和剪枝比例进行实验，AlignPrune比最先进基线方法提升精度达6.3%，表现出色。
AI.conclusion: AlignPrune为噪声数据下的剪枝提供了通用解决方案，鼓励在真实场景中进一步探索学习。

title: Blockchain and AI: Securing Intelligent Networks for the Future
summary: The rapid evolution of intelligent networks under the Internet of Everything (IoE) paradigm is transforming connectivity by integrating people, processes, data, and things. This ecosystem includes domains such as the Internet of Things (IoT), Internet of Healthcare (IoH), Internet of Vehicles (IoV), and cyber-physical and human-machine systems. While enabling efficiency and automation, this interconnectivity also exposes critical infrastructures to increasingly sophisticated cyber threats, creating an urgent need for advanced security solutions. This chapter examines the integration of Blockchain and Artificial Intelligence (AI) as complementary approaches for securing intelligent networks. Blockchain provides decentralized, immutable, and transparent mechanisms that strengthen data integrity, trust, and accountability. In parallel, AI offers predictive analytics, anomaly detection, and adaptive defense capabilities to enable proactive threat identification and mitigation. The chapter discusses how Blockchain supports security in cyber-physical systems, how AI enables proactive security operations, and how their combination creates robust, adaptive, and trustworthy security frameworks. The chapter also explores the emerging role of large language models in threat intelligence and analyzes how controlled agentic AI can support bounded security workflows such as alert triage, evidence collection, and policy-aware response planning. Representative case studies illustrate the potential of these technologies to enhance cyber resilience. Finally, challenges related to scalability, energy efficiency, and ethical considerations are addressed, along with reported mitigation strategies and future research directions. Overall, this chapter provides researchers, practitioners, and policymakers with insights to design secure, resilient, and adaptable intelligent networks.

AI.tldr: 本章探讨区块链与人工智能在智能网络安全中的协同应用，分析两者如何互补增强数据完整性、威胁检测和自适应防御能力，并讨论大语言模型在威胁情报和可控AI在安全流程中的作用。
AI.motivation: 万物互联(IoE)范式下的智能网络快速发展，将物联网、医疗物联网、车联网等系统连接起来，在提升效率的同时也面临日益复杂的网络威胁，迫切需要先进的安全解决方案来保护关键基础设施。
AI.method: 采用综合分析框架，探讨区块链与AI的互补集成：区块链提供去中心化、不可篡改和透明的数据完整性保障；AI提供预测分析、异常检测和自适应防御能力。同时分析大语言模型在威胁情报中的作用，以及可控AI在安全流程中的应用。
AI.result: 区块链与AI的集成能够创建强大、自适应且可信的安全框架，通过代表性案例研究展示了这些技术提升网络韧性的潜力。同时识别了可扩展性、能源效率和伦理挑战，并提出了缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: 区块链与AI的协同为智能网络安全提供了创新解决方案，大语言模型和可控AI进一步增强了威胁情报和安全流程自动化能力。未来研究需要解决可扩展性、能效和伦理问题，以实现安全、韧性和适应性强的智能网络。

title: Language Bias under Conflicting Information in Multilingual LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been shown to contain biases in the process of integrating conflicting information when answering questions. Here we ask whether such biases also exist with respect to which language is used for each conflicting piece of information. To answer this question, we extend the conflicting needles in a haystack paradigm to a multilingual setting and perform a comprehensive set of evaluations with naturalistic news domain data in five different languages, for a range of multilingual LLMs of different sizes. We find that all LLMs tested, including GPT-5.2, ignore the conflict and confidently assert only one of the possible answers in the large majority of cases. Furthermore, there is a consistent bias across models in which languages are preferred, with a general bias against Russian and, for the longest context lengths, in favor of Chinese. Both of these patterns are consistent between models trained inside and outside of mainland China, though somewhat stronger in the former category.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现多语言大语言模型在处理多语言冲突信息时存在系统性偏见，模型倾向于忽略信息冲突并自信地选择特定语言的答案，尤其对俄语存在偏见，在长上下文场景下则偏向中文。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索LLMs在整合多语言冲突信息时是否存在语言偏见。已有研究表明LLMs在处理冲突信息时存在偏见，但尚未研究这种偏见是否与语言选择相关。研究旨在将"大海捞针"范式扩展到多语言环境，评估不同规模的多语言LLMs在五种语言中的表现。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）将冲突信息检测范式扩展到多语言设置；2）使用五种不同语言的新闻领域自然数据进行全面评估；3）测试不同规模的多语言LLMs；4）分析模型在冲突信息整合中的语言偏好模式。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）所有测试的LLMs（包括GPT-5.2）在大多数情况下忽略信息冲突，自信地只选择其中一个可能答案；2）模型存在一致的语言偏好偏见，普遍对俄语存在偏见；3）在最长上下文长度下，模型偏向中文；4）这些模式在中国境内和境外训练的模型中均存在，但在前者中更为明显。
AI.conclusion: 结论是多语言LLMs在处理多语言冲突信息时存在系统性语言偏见，模型倾向于忽略信息冲突并表现出特定的语言偏好。这一发现对LLMs的可信AI（特别是公平性和安全性）以及多语言评估具有重要意义。

title: Distilling Photon-Counting CT into Routine Chest CT through Clinically Validated Degradation Modeling
summary: Photon-counting CT (PCCT) provides superior image quality with higher spatial resolution and lower noise compared to conventional energy-integrating CT (EICT), but its limited clinical availability restricts large-scale research and clinical deployment. To bridge this gap, we propose SUMI, a simulated degradation-to-enhancement method that learns to reverse realistic acquisition artifacts in low-quality EICT by leveraging high-quality PCCT as reference. Our central insight is to explicitly model realistic acquisition degradations, transforming PCCT into clinically plausible lower-quality counterparts and learning to invert this process. The simulated degradations were validated for clinical realism by board-certified radiologists, enabling faithful supervision without requiring paired acquisitions at scale. As outcomes of this technical contribution, we: (1) train a latent diffusion model on 1,046 PCCTs, using an autoencoder first pre-trained on both these PCCTs and 405,379 EICTs from 145 hospitals to extract general CT latent features that we release for reuse in other generative medical imaging tasks; (2) construct a large-scale dataset of over 17,316 publicly available EICTs enhanced to PCCT-like quality, with radiologist-validated voxel-wise annotations of airway trees, arteries, veins, lungs, and lobes; and (3) demonstrate substantial improvements: across external data, SUMI outperforms state-of-the-art image translation methods by 15% in SSIM and 20% in PSNR, improves radiologist-rated clinical utility in reader studies, and enhances downstream top-ranking lesion detection performance, increasing sensitivity by up to 15% and F1 score by up to 10%. Our results suggest that emerging imaging advances can be systematically distilled into routine EICT using limited high-quality scans as reference.

AI.tldr: SUMI方法通过模拟退化-增强学习，将低质量能量积分CT转换为光子计数CT质量，利用有限的高质量PCCT作为参考，提升常规CT图像质量。
AI.motivation: 光子计数CT（PCCT）相比传统能量积分CT（EICT）具有更优的图像质量，但临床可用性有限。研究旨在通过有限的高质量PCCT参考，将常规EICT提升到PCCT质量水平。
AI.method: 提出SUMI方法：1）显式建模真实采集退化过程，将PCCT转换为临床合理的低质量对应物；2）学习反转该退化过程；3）使用潜在扩散模型，在自编码器预训练提取通用CT潜在特征基础上进行训练。
AI.result: 1）在外部数据上，SUMI在SSIM和PSNR上分别优于现有图像转换方法15%和20%；2）提升放射科医生评定的临床效用；3）增强下游病变检测性能，灵敏度提升达15%，F1分数提升达10%。
AI.conclusion: 新兴成像技术可以通过有限的高质量扫描作为参考，系统性地蒸馏到常规EICT中，实现图像质量的显著提升。

title: A Novel Automatic Framework for Speaker Drift Detection in Synthesized Speech
comment: The paper has been accepted by the IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2026
summary: Recent diffusion-based text-to-speech (TTS) models achieve high naturalness and expressiveness, yet often suffer from speaker drift, a subtle, gradual shift in perceived speaker identity within a single utterance. This underexplored phenomenon undermines the coherence of synthetic speech, especially in long-form or interactive settings. We introduce the first automatic framework for detecting speaker drift by formulating it as a binary classification task over utterance-level speaker consistency. Our method computes cosine similarity across overlapping segments of synthesized speech and prompts large language models (LLMs) with structured representations to assess drift. We provide theoretical guarantees for cosine-based drift detection and demonstrate that speaker embeddings exhibit meaningful geometric clustering on the unit sphere. To support evaluation, we construct a high-quality synthetic benchmark with human-validated speaker drift annotations. Experiments with multiple state-of-the-art LLMs confirm the viability of this embedding-to-reasoning pipeline. Our work establishes speaker drift as a standalone research problem and bridges geometric signal analysis with LLM-based perceptual reasoning in modern TTS.

AI.tldr: 提出首个自动检测语音合成中说话人漂移的框架，将说话人一致性建模为二分类任务，结合余弦相似度分析和LLM推理，并构建了带人工标注的基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前基于扩散的文本转语音模型虽然自然度和表现力高，但存在说话人漂移问题——在单个话语中说话人身份逐渐偏移，这影响了合成语音的连贯性，尤其是在长文本或交互场景中。该现象尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 1) 将说话人漂移检测建模为话语级说话人一致性的二分类任务；2) 计算合成语音重叠片段的余弦相似度；3) 使用结构化表征提示LLM评估漂移；4) 提供余弦相似度检测的理论保证；5) 构建高质量合成基准数据集并人工验证标注。
AI.result: 1) 证明说话人嵌入在单位球面上具有有意义的几何聚类；2) 多个SOTA LLM实验验证了嵌入到推理流程的可行性；3) 建立了首个自动检测说话人漂移的框架。
AI.conclusion: 将说话人漂移确立为独立研究问题，在现代TTS中桥接了几何信号分析和基于LLM的感知推理，为语音合成连贯性评估提供了新方法。

title: Dynamic Context Evolution for Scalable Synthetic Data Generation
summary: Large language models produce repetitive output when prompted independently across many batches, a phenomenon we term cross-batch mode collapse: the progressive loss of output diversity when a language model is prompted repeatedly without access to its prior generations. Practitioners have long mitigated this with ad hoc deduplication and seed rotation, but no principled framework exists. We introduce Dynamic Context Evolution (DCE), comprising three mechanisms: (1) verbalized tail sampling (the model labels each idea with a guess about how obvious it is, and obvious ideas are discarded), which filters high-probability candidates via model self-assessment; (2) semantic memory, which maintains a persistent embedding index to reject near-duplicates across batches; and (3) adaptive prompt evolution, which reconstructs the generation prompt each batch using memory state and rotating diversity strategies. In experiments across three domains (sustainable packaging concepts, educational exam questions, and creative writing prompts) and two model families (gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku-4-5), a component ablation across 2-3 random seeds per method shows that DCE achieves 0.0 +/- 0.0% collapse versus 5.6 +/- 2.0% for naive prompting, while producing 17-18 HDBSCAN clusters per seed versus naive's volatile 2-17, indicating reliably richer conceptual structure. These results are validated with an independent embedding model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and hold across sensitivity sweeps of the VTS threshold tau and dedup threshold delta. Deduplication and prompt evolution are individually insufficient but jointly effective, at approximately $0.50 per 1,000 candidates using only standard API calls, with no fine-tuning or custom architectures required.

AI.tldr: 提出Dynamic Context Evolution (DCE)框架，通过三种机制解决LLM跨批次模式崩溃问题：verbalized tail sampling、semantic memory和adaptive prompt evolution，有效提升输出多样性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在独立多次提示时会产生重复输出（跨批次模式崩溃），现有方法依赖临时去重和种子轮换，缺乏系统化解决方案。
AI.method: DCE包含三个机制：1) verbalized tail sampling：模型自我评估并过滤明显想法；2) semantic memory：持久嵌入索引拒绝跨批次近重复；3) adaptive prompt evolution：基于记忆状态和多样性策略重构提示。
AI.result: 在三个领域（可持续包装概念、教育考试题、创意写作提示）和两个模型族（gpt-5-mini和claude-haiku-4-5）的实验中，DCE实现0.0%崩溃率（vs naive 5.6%），生成17-18个聚类（vs naive 2-17个），概念结构更丰富。
AI.conclusion: DCE有效解决跨批次模式崩溃问题，无需微调或定制架构，仅需标准API调用，成本约$0.50/1000候选，去重和提示演化需联合使用才有效。

title: From Blobs to Spokes: High-Fidelity Surface Reconstruction via Oriented Gaussians
comment: Our project page is available in http://diego1401.github.io/BlobsToSpokesWebsite/index.html
summary:
3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized fast novel view synthesis, yet its opacity-based formulation makes surface extraction fundamentally difficult. Unlike implicit methods built on Signed Distance Fields or occupancy, 3DGS lacks a global geometric field, forcing existing approaches to resort to heuristics such as TSDF fusion of blended depth maps.
  Inspired by the Objects as Volumes framework, we derive a principled occupancy field for Gaussian Splatting and show how it can be used to extract highly accurate watertight meshes of complex scenes. Our key contribution is to introduce a learnable oriented normal at each Gaussian element and to define an adapted attenuation formulation, which leads to closed-form expressions for both the normal and occupancy fields at arbitrary locations in space. We further introduce a novel consistency loss and a dedicated densification strategy to enforce Gaussians to wrap the entire surface by closing geometric holes, ensuring a complete shell of oriented primitives. We modify the differentiable rasterizer to output depth as an isosurface of our continuous model, and introduce Primal Adaptive Meshing for Region-of-Interest meshing at arbitrary resolution.
  We additionally expose fundamental biases in standard surface evaluation protocols and propose two more rigorous alternatives. Overall, our method Gaussian Wrapping sets a new state-of-the-art on DTU and Tanks and Temples, producing complete, watertight meshes at a fraction of the size of concurrent work-recovering thin structures such as the notoriously elusive bicycle spokes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Gaussian Wrapping方法，为3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）引入可学习的法向量和衰减公式，推导出封闭形式的法向量场和占据场，从而从3DGS中提取高质量的水密网格。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在快速新视角合成方面表现出色，但其基于不透明度的表示使得表面提取变得困难。与基于符号距离场或占据场的隐式方法不同，3DGS缺乏全局几何场，现有方法只能依赖启发式方法如TSDF融合深度图。
AI.method: 1) 为每个高斯元素引入可学习的定向法向量；2) 定义适应的衰减公式，推导出空间任意位置的法向量场和占据场的封闭形式表达式；3) 引入一致性损失和专门的致密化策略，确保高斯元素包裹整个表面；4) 修改可微分光栅化器以输出连续模型的等值面深度；5) 提出Primal Adaptive Meshing进行感兴趣区域网格化。
AI.result: 在DTU和Tanks and Temples数据集上达到新的SOTA，能够生成完整的水密网格，网格尺寸远小于同期工作，能够恢复薄结构如自行车辐条等困难几何。
AI.conclusion: Gaussian Wrapping为3DGS提供了原则性的几何表示，解决了表面提取的根本难题，同时揭示了标准表面评估协议中的偏差，提出了更严格的替代方案。

title: Agent-Driven Corpus Linguistics: A Framework for Autonomous Linguistic Discovery
summary: Corpus linguistics has traditionally relied on human researchers to formulate hypotheses, construct queries, and interpret results - a process demanding specialized technical skills and considerable time. We propose Agent-Driven Corpus Linguistics, an approach in which a large language model (LLM), connected to a corpus query engine via a structured tool-use interface, takes over the investigative cycle: generating hypotheses, querying the corpus, interpreting results, and refining analysis across multiple rounds. The human researcher sets direction and evaluates final output. Unlike unconstrained LLM generation, every finding is anchored in verifiable corpus evidence. We treat this not as a replacement for the corpus-based/corpus-driven distinction but as a complementary dimension: it concerns who conducts the inquiry, not the epistemological relationship between theory and data. We demonstrate the framework by linking an LLM agent to a CQP-indexed Gutenberg corpus (5 million tokens) via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Given only "investigate English intensifiers," the agent identified a diachronic relay chain (so+ADJ > very > really), three pathways of semantic change (delexicalization, polarity fixation, metaphorical constraint), and register-sensitive distributions. A controlled baseline experiment shows that corpus grounding contributes quantification and falsifiability that the model cannot produce from training data alone. To test external validity, the agent replicated two published studies on the CLMET corpus (40 million tokens) - Claridge (2025) and De Smet (2013) - with close quantitative agreement. Agent-driven corpus research can thus produce empirically grounded findings at machine speed, lowering the technical barrier for a broader range of researchers.

AI.tldr: 提出Agent-Driven Corpus Linguistics框架，让LLM通过结构化工具接口连接语料库查询引擎，自动完成假设生成、查询、结果解释和分析优化的完整研究循环，人类研究者仅需设定方向和评估最终输出。
AI.motivation: 传统语料库语言学依赖人类研究者进行假设制定、查询构建和结果解释，需要专业技能且耗时。本文旨在降低语料库研究的技术门槛，让更广泛的研究者能够进行实证研究。
AI.method: 通过Model Context Protocol (MCP)将LLM代理连接到CQP索引的Gutenberg语料库（500万词），构建结构化工具使用接口。LLM代理执行完整研究循环：生成假设、查询语料库、解释结果、多轮优化分析。
AI.result: 1）在"调查英语强化词"任务中，代理识别出历时接力链（so+ADJ > very > really）、三种语义变化路径（去词汇化、极性固定、隐喻约束）和语域敏感分布；2）控制实验显示语料库基础提供了模型无法从训练数据中产生的量化和可证伪性；3）在CLMET语料库（4000万词）上成功复现了两项已发表研究，定量结果高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 代理驱动的语料库研究能够在机器速度下产生实证基础的研究发现，显著降低技术门槛，使更广泛的研究者能够进行语料库研究，同时保持结果的可验证性。

title: Appear2Meaning: A Cross-Cultural Benchmark for Structured Cultural Metadata Inference from Images
summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have improved image captioning for cultural heritage. However, inferring structured cultural metadata (e.g., creator, origin, period) from visual input remains underexplored. We introduce a multi-category, cross-cultural benchmark for this task and evaluate VLMs using an LLM-as-Judge framework that measures semantic alignment with reference annotations. To assess cultural reasoning, we report exact-match, partial-match, and attribute-level accuracy across cultural regions. Results show that models capture fragmented signals and exhibit substantial performance variation across cultures and metadata types, leading to inconsistent and weakly grounded predictions. These findings highlight the limitations of current VLMs in structured cultural metadata inference beyond visual perception.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个多类别、跨文化的文化遗产元数据推理基准，使用LLM-as-Judge框架评估视觉语言模型在结构化文化元数据推断上的表现，发现现有模型在不同文化和元数据类型上表现不一致且缺乏充分依据。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在文化遗产图像描述方面有所进步，但从视觉输入推断结构化文化元数据（如创作者、起源、时期）的研究仍然不足。现有模型在这方面的能力尚未得到充分评估。
AI.method: 1) 引入多类别、跨文化的文化遗产元数据推理基准；2) 使用LLM-as-Judge框架评估视觉语言模型，通过语义对齐度衡量模型输出与参考标注的一致性；3) 评估文化推理能力，报告精确匹配、部分匹配和属性级准确率，并跨文化区域进行分析。
AI.result: 模型只能捕捉碎片化信号，在不同文化和元数据类型上表现出显著的性能差异，导致预测结果不一致且缺乏充分依据。这表明当前视觉语言模型在结构化文化元数据推理方面存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型在超越视觉感知的结构化文化元数据推断方面存在明显不足，需要更专门的方法来处理文化推理任务。

title: "Don't Be Afraid, Just Learn": Insights from Industry Practitioners to Prepare Software Engineers in the Age of Generative AI
summary: Although tension between university curricula and industry expectations has existed in some form for decades, the rapid integration of generative AI (GenAI) tools into software development has recently widened the gap between the two domains. To better understand this disconnect, we surveyed 51 industry practitioners (software developers, technical leads, upper management, \etc) and conducted 11 follow-up interviews focused on hiring practices, required job skills, perceived shortcomings in university curricula, and views on how university learning outcomes can be improved. Our results suggest that GenAI creates demand for new skills (\eg prompting and output evaluation), while strengthening the importance of soft-skills (\eg problem solving and critical thinking) and traditional competencies (\eg architecture design and debugging). We synthesize these findings into actionable recommendations for academia (\eg how to incorporate GenAI into curricula and evaluation redesign). Our work offers empirical guidance to help educators prepare students for modern software engineering environments.

AI.tldr: 研究调查了生成式AI工具如何扩大大学课程与软件行业期望之间的差距，通过调查51名行业从业者和11次访谈，发现GenAI创造了新技能需求（如提示工程），同时强化了软技能和传统能力的重要性，为学术界提供了课程改进建议。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI工具在软件开发中的快速集成扩大了大学课程与行业期望之间的差距，这种长期存在的紧张关系需要实证研究来理解，以便更好地为现代软件工程环境培养学生。
AI.method: 采用混合方法研究：1) 对51名行业从业者（软件开发者、技术主管、高层管理人员等）进行问卷调查；2) 进行11次后续深度访谈，重点关注招聘实践、所需工作技能、大学课程的不足以及改进建议。
