AI.result: 研究发现：1) GenAI创造了新的技能需求，如提示工程和输出评估；2) 强化了软技能的重要性，如问题解决和批判性思维；3) 传统能力（如架构设计和调试）仍然重要；4) 为学术界提供了具体的课程改进建议。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI正在重塑软件工程技能需求，大学课程需要相应调整，既要纳入新的GenAI技能，又要强化软技能和传统能力，以更好地为学生准备现代软件工程职业。

title: LaScA: Language-Conditioned Scalable Modelling of Affective Dynamics
comment: This paper has been accepted at the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW)
summary: Predicting affect in unconstrained environments remains a fundamental challenge in human-centered AI. While deep neural embeddings dominate contemporary approaches, they often lack interpretability and limit expert-driven refinement. We propose a novel framework that uses Language Models (LMs) as semantic context conditioners over handcrafted affect descriptors to model changes in Valence and Arousal. Our approach begins with interpretable facial geometry and acoustic features derived from structured domain knowledge. These features are transformed into symbolic natural-language descriptions encoding their affective implications. A pretrained LM processes these descriptions to generate semantic context embeddings that act as high-level priors over affective dynamics. Unlike end-to-end black-box pipelines, our framework preserves feature transparency while leveraging the contextual abstraction capabilities of LMs. We evaluate the proposed method on the Aff-Wild2 and SEWA datasets for affect change prediction. Experimental results show consistent improvements in accuracy for both Valence and Arousal compared to handcrafted-only and deep-embedding baselines. Our findings demonstrate that semantic conditioning enables interpretable affect modelling without sacrificing predictive performance, offering a transparent and computationally efficient alternative to fully end-to-end architectures

AI.tldr: 提出一种使用语言模型作为语义上下文调节器的新框架，通过手工特征的自然语言描述来建模情感变化，在保持可解释性的同时提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度神经网络嵌入的情感预测方法缺乏可解释性，限制了专家驱动的优化。需要一种既能保持特征透明度又能利用语言模型上下文抽象能力的方法。
AI.method: 1) 从结构化领域知识中提取可解释的面部几何和声学特征；2) 将这些特征转换为编码情感含义的符号化自然语言描述；3) 使用预训练语言模型处理这些描述，生成作为情感动态高级先验的语义上下文嵌入。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2和SEWA数据集上的实验表明，该方法在效价和唤醒度的预测准确率上均优于纯手工特征和深度嵌入基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义调节能够在保持预测性能的同时实现可解释的情感建模，为完全端到端架构提供了透明且计算高效的替代方案。

title: Tight Convergence Rates for Online Distributed Linear Estimation with Adversarial Measurements
summary: We study mean estimation of a random vector $X$ in a distributed parameter-server-worker setup. Worker $i$ observes samples of $a_i^\top X$, where $a_i^\top$ is the $i$th row of a known sensing matrix $A$. The key challenges are adversarial measurements and asynchrony: a fixed subset of workers may transmit corrupted measurements, and workers are activated asynchronously--only one is active at any time. In our previous work, we proposed a two-timescale $\ell_1$-minimization algorithm and established asymptotic recovery under a null-space-property-like condition on $A$. In this work, we establish tight non-asymptotic convergence rates under the same null-space-property-like condition. We also identify relaxed conditions on $A$ under which exact recovery may fail but recovery of a projected component of $\mathbb{E}[X]$ remains possible. Overall, our results provide a unified finite-time characterization of robustness, identifiability, and statistical efficiency in distributed linear estimation with adversarial workers, with implications for network tomography and related distributed sensing problems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究分布式参数服务器-工作者设置中的随机向量均值估计问题，针对对抗性测量和异步激活的挑战，建立了紧致的非渐近收敛速率，并识别了放宽条件下部分恢复的可能性。
AI.motivation: 研究分布式线性估计中的鲁棒性、可识别性和统计效率问题，特别是在存在对抗性工作者和异步激活的实际场景下，这对网络层析成像等分布式感知应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用两时间尺度的ℓ₁最小化算法，在已知传感矩阵A的条件下，基于零空间性质类条件进行分析，研究对抗性测量和异步激活下的分布式参数估计。
AI.result: 在相同零空间性质类条件下建立了紧致的非渐近收敛速率，识别了放宽条件下精确恢复可能失败但部分投影分量仍可恢复的条件，提供了鲁棒性、可识别性和统计效率的统一有限时间表征。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为分布式线性估计提供了完整的理论框架，特别适用于存在对抗性工作者和异步激活的实际应用场景，对网络层析成像等分布式感知问题具有重要启示。

title: TC-AE: Unlocking Token Capacity for Deep Compression Autoencoders
summary: We propose TC-AE, a ViT-based architecture for deep compression autoencoders. Existing methods commonly increase the channel number of latent representations to maintain reconstruction quality under high compression ratios. However, this strategy often leads to latent representation collapse, which degrades generative performance. Instead of relying on increasingly complex architectures or multi-stage training schemes, TC-AE addresses this challenge from the perspective of the token space, the key bridge between pixels and image latents, through two complementary innovations: Firstly, we study token number scaling by adjusting the patch size in ViT under a fixed latent budget, and identify aggressive token-to-latent compression as the key factor that limits effective scaling. To address this issue, we decompose token-to-latent compression into two stages, reducing structural information loss and enabling effective token number scaling for generation. Secondly, to further mitigate latent representation collapse, we enhance the semantic structure of image tokens via joint self-supervised training, leading to more generative-friendly latents. With these designs, TC-AE achieves substantially improved reconstruction and generative performance under deep compression. We hope our research will advance ViT-based tokenizer for visual generation.

AI.tldr: TC-AE是一种基于ViT的深度压缩自编码器架构，通过令牌空间优化解决高压缩比下的潜在表示崩溃问题，提升重建和生成性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常通过增加潜在表示的通道数来维持高压缩比下的重建质量，但这往往导致潜在表示崩溃，从而降低生成性能。TC-AE旨在从令牌空间角度解决这一问题，避免依赖复杂架构或多阶段训练方案。
AI.method: 1) 研究令牌数量缩放：在固定潜在预算下调整ViT的patch大小，识别出激进的令牌到潜在压缩是限制有效缩放的关键因素。通过将令牌到潜在压缩分解为两个阶段来减少结构信息损失。2) 增强语义结构：通过联合自监督训练增强图像令牌的语义结构，获得更利于生成的潜在表示。
AI.result: TC-AE在深度压缩下实现了显著改进的重建和生成性能，为基于ViT的视觉生成分词器提供了新思路。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过令牌空间视角解决了深度压缩自编码器的潜在表示崩溃问题，为ViT-based视觉生成分词器的发展提供了重要进展。

title: Efficient Learned Data Compression via Dual-Stream Feature Decoupling
summary: While Learned Data Compression (LDC) has achieved superior compression ratios, balancing precise probability modeling with system efficiency remains challenging. Crucially, uniform single-stream architectures struggle to simultaneously capture micro-syntactic and macro-semantic features, necessitating deep serial stacking that exacerbates latency. Compounding this, heterogeneous systems are constrained by device speed mismatches, where throughput is capped by Amdahl's Law due to serial processing. To this end, we propose a Dual-Stream Multi-Scale Decoupler that disentangles local and global contexts to replace deep serial processing with shallow parallel streams, and incorporate a Hierarchical Gated Refiner for adaptive feature refinement and precise probability modeling. Furthermore, we design a Concurrent Stream-Parallel Pipeline, which overcomes systemic bottlenecks to achieve full-pipeline parallelism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both compression ratio and throughput, while maintaining the lowest latency and memory usage. The code is available at https://github.com/huidong-ma/FADE.

AI.tldr: 提出FADE：一种双流多尺度解耦器，通过并行处理局部和全局上下文来改进学习型数据压缩，在保持高压缩比的同时显著降低延迟和内存使用
AI.motivation: 学习型数据压缩(LDC)在平衡精确概率建模与系统效率方面存在挑战。传统单流架构难以同时捕获微观句法和宏观语义特征，需要深度串行堆叠导致高延迟。此外，异构系统受限于设备速度不匹配，串行处理导致吞吐量受Amdahl定律限制。
AI.method: 1) 双流多尺度解耦器：将局部和全局上下文解耦，用浅层并行流替代深度串行处理；2) 分层门控细化器：用于自适应特征细化和精确概率建模；3) 并发流并行流水线：克服系统瓶颈，实现全流水线并行。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在压缩比和吞吐量方面达到最先进性能，同时保持最低延迟和内存使用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的FADE框架通过并行化架构设计，有效解决了学习型数据压缩中效率与精度平衡的难题，为高效数据压缩系统提供了新思路。

title: Adversarial Robustness of Time-Series Classification for Crystal Collimator Alignment
summary: In this paper, we analyze and improve the adversarial robustness of a convolutional neural network (CNN) that assists crystal-collimator alignment at CERN's Large Hadron Collider (LHC) by classifying a beam-loss monitor (BLM) time series during crystal rotation. We formalize a local robustness property for this classifier under an adversarial threat model based on real-world plausibility. Building on established parameterized input-transformation patterns used for transformation- and semantic-perturbation robustness, we instantiate a preprocessing-aware wrapper for our deployed time-series pipeline: we encode time-series normalization, padding constraints, and structured perturbations as a lightweight differentiable wrapper in front of the CNN, so that existing gradient-based robustness frameworks can operate on the deployed pipeline. For formal verification, data-dependent preprocessing such as per-window z-normalization introduces nonlinear operators that require verifier-specific abstractions. We therefore focus on attack-based robustness estimates and pipeline-checked validity by benchmarking robustness with the frameworks Foolbox and ART. Adversarial fine-tuning of the resulting CNN improves robust accuracy by up to 18.6 % without degrading clean accuracy. Finally, we extend robustness on time-series data beyond single windows to sequence-level robustness for sliding-window classification, introduce adversarial sequences as counterexamples to a temporal robustness requirement over full scans, and observe attack-induced misclassifications that persist across adjacent windows.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究用于CERN大型强子对撞机晶体准直器对准的CNN时间序列分类器的对抗鲁棒性，提出预处理感知包装器方法，通过对抗微调将鲁棒准确率提升18.6%，并扩展到时序序列级鲁棒性分析。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是提高CERN大型强子对撞机中用于晶体准直器对准的CNN时间序列分类器的对抗鲁棒性。由于该分类器在实际物理实验中用于关键的对准任务，需要确保其在对抗攻击下的可靠性，特别是在真实世界可信的威胁模型下。
AI.method: 方法包括：1) 基于参数化输入变换模式构建预处理感知包装器，将时间序列归一化、填充约束和结构化扰动编码为轻量级可微分包装器；2) 使用Foolbox和ART框架进行攻击基准测试；3) 对CNN进行对抗微调；4) 将鲁棒性分析从单窗口扩展到滑动窗口分类的序列级鲁棒性。
AI.result: 通过对抗微调，CNN的鲁棒准确率提升了18.6%，且不降低干净准确率。研究还发现了攻击引起的误分类在相邻窗口间持续存在的现象，并提出了对抗序列作为完整扫描时序鲁棒性要求的反例。
AI.conclusion: 论文成功提高了CERN LHC晶体准直器对准CNN分类器的对抗鲁棒性，提出的预处理感知包装器方法有效，对抗微调显著提升鲁棒性。研究还扩展了时间序列数据的鲁棒性分析范围，为时序分类系统的安全评估提供了新视角。

title: MoRight: Motion Control Done Right
summary: Generating motion-controlled videos--where user-specified actions drive physically plausible scene dynamics under freely chosen viewpoints--demands two capabilities: (1) disentangled motion control, allowing users to separately control the object motion and adjust camera viewpoint; and (2) motion causality, ensuring that user-driven actions trigger coherent reactions from other objects rather than merely displacing pixels. Existing methods fall short on both fronts: they entangle camera and object motion into a single tracking signal and treat motion as kinematic displacement without modeling causal relationships between object motion. We introduce MoRight, a unified framework that addresses both limitations through disentangled motion modeling. Object motion is specified in a canonical static-view and transferred to an arbitrary target camera viewpoint via temporal cross-view attention, enabling disentangled camera and object control. We further decompose motion into active (user-driven) and passive (consequence) components, training the model to learn motion causality from data. At inference, users can either supply active motion and MoRight predicts consequences (forward reasoning), or specify desired passive outcomes and MoRight recovers plausible driving actions (inverse reasoning), all while freely adjusting the camera viewpoint. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in generation quality, motion controllability, and interaction awareness.

AI.tldr: MoRight是一个生成运动控制视频的统一框架，通过解耦运动建模实现分离的相机和物体控制，并学习运动因果关系，支持正向和逆向推理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要问题：1）将相机和物体运动纠缠在单一跟踪信号中；2）将运动视为运动学位移而不建模物体间的因果关系。这限制了用户对运动控制的灵活性和视频生成的物理合理性。
AI.method: 提出解耦运动建模框架：1）在静态视角规范中指定物体运动，通过时间跨视角注意力转移到任意目标相机视角；2）将运动分解为主动（用户驱动）和被动（后果）组件，从数据中学习运动因果关系。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中展示了最先进的生成质量、运动可控性和交互感知能力，支持正向推理（给定主动运动预测后果）和逆向推理（指定被动结果恢复驱动动作）。
AI.conclusion: MoRight通过解耦运动建模解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了分离的相机和物体控制，并学习了运动因果关系，为运动控制视频生成提供了更灵活和物理合理的方法。

title: Joint Optimization of Reasoning and Dual-Memory for Self-Learning Diagnostic Agent
summary: Clinical expertise improves not only by acquiring medical knowledge, but by accumulating experience that yields reusable diagnostic patterns. Recent LLMs-based diagnostic agents have shown promising progress in clinical reasoning for decision support. However, most approaches treat cases independently, limiting experience reuse and continual adaptation. We propose SEA, a self-learning diagnostic agent with cognitively inspired dual-memory module. We design a reinforcement training framework tailored to our designed agent for joint optimization of reasoning and memory management. We evaluate SEA in two complementary settings. On standard evaluation with MedCaseReasoning dataset, SEA achieves 92.46% accuracy, outperforming the strongest baseline by +19.6%, demonstrating the benefit of jointly optimizing reasoning and memory. On the long-horizon with ER-Reason dataset, SEA attains the best final accuracy (0.7214) and the largest improvement (+0.35 Acc@100), while baseline methods show limited or unstable gains. Expert evaluation further indicates that rules consolidated from SEA show strong clinical correctness, usefulness and trust, suggesting that the induced rules in dual-memory module are reliable and practically meaningful. Overall, SEA improves both diagnostic reasoning ability and continual learning by effectively transforming experience into reusable knowledge.

AI.tldr: SEA是一个具有认知启发的双记忆模块的自学习诊断代理，通过强化学习联合优化推理和记忆管理，在临床诊断任务中显著优于现有方法，并能将经验转化为可重用知识。
AI.motivation: 临床专业知识不仅通过获取医学知识，还通过积累产生可重用诊断模式的经验来提升。现有基于LLM的诊断代理大多独立处理病例，限制了经验重用和持续适应。需要开发能够积累和重用临床经验的智能诊断系统。
AI.method: 提出SEA自学习诊断代理，采用认知启发的双记忆模块设计。开发了专门针对该代理的强化训练框架，用于联合优化推理和记忆管理。在MedCaseReasoning和ER-Reason两个数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 在MedCaseReasoning数据集上达到92.46%准确率，比最强基线提升19.6%。在ER-Reason长时程任务中获得最佳最终准确率(0.7214)和最大改进(+0.35 Acc@100)。专家评估表明SEA整合的规则具有临床正确性、实用性和可信度。
AI.conclusion: SEA通过有效将经验转化为可重用知识，显著提升了诊断推理能力和持续学习性能。双记忆模块中归纳的规则可靠且具有实际意义，为临床决策支持系统提供了新思路。

title: FedSpy-LLM: Towards Scalable and Generalizable Data Reconstruction Attacks from Gradients on LLMs
summary: Given the growing reliance on private data in training Large Language Models (LLMs), Federated Learning (FL) combined with Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has garnered significant attention for enhancing privacy and efficiency. Despite FL's privacy benefits, prior studies have shown that private data can still be extracted from shared gradients. However, these studies, mainly on full-parameter model training, are limited to reconstructing small batches, short input sequences, and specific model architectures, such as encoder-based or decoder-based models. The reconstruction quality becomes even worse when dealing with gradients from PEFT methods. To fully understand the practical attack surface of federated LLMs, this paper proposes FedSpy-LLM, a scalable and generalizable data reconstruction attack designed to reconstruct training data with larger batch sizes and longer sequences while generalizing across diverse model architectures, even when PEFT methods are deployed for training. At the core of FedSpy-LLM is a novel gradient decomposition strategy that exploits the rank deficiency and subspace structure of gradients, enabling efficient token extraction while preserving key signal components at scale. This approach further mitigates the reconstruction challenges introduced by PEFT's substantial null space, ensuring robustness across encoder-based, decoder-based, and encoder-decoder model architectures. Additionally, by iteratively aligning each token's partial-sequence gradient with the full-sequence gradient, FedSpy-LLM ensures accurate token ordering in reconstructed sequences.

AI.tldr: FedSpy-LLM：一种可扩展的通用数据重建攻击方法，针对联邦学习中的大语言模型，能够处理更大批次和更长序列，适用于多种模型架构和参数高效微调方法
AI.motivation: 尽管联邦学习（FL）结合参数高效微调（PEFT）在保护隐私方面有优势，但现有研究表明私有数据仍可从共享梯度中提取。然而，这些研究主要针对全参数模型训练，只能重建小批次、短输入序列和特定模型架构。当处理PEFT方法的梯度时，重建质量更差。本文旨在全面理解联邦LLMs的实际攻击面。
AI.method: 提出FedSpy-LLM攻击方法，核心是新颖的梯度分解策略，利用梯度的秩不足和子空间结构，实现高效的token提取，同时保持关键信号成分。该方法通过迭代对齐每个token的部分序列梯度与全序列梯度，确保重建序列中token顺序的准确性。
AI.result: FedSpy-LLM能够重建更大批次和更长序列的训练数据，并泛化到多种模型架构（编码器、解码器、编码器-解码器），即使在部署PEFT方法进行训练时也能保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习中的LLMs存在实际的数据泄露风险，即使使用PEFT方法。FedSpy-LLM展示了针对联邦LLMs的可扩展和通用数据重建攻击的可行性，强调了需要更强的隐私保护机制。

title: Fast Spatial Memory with Elastic Test-Time Training
summary: Large Chunk Test-Time Training (LaCT) has shown strong performance on long-context 3D reconstruction, but its fully plastic inference-time updates remain vulnerable to catastrophic forgetting and overfitting. As a result, LaCT is typically instantiated with a single large chunk spanning the full input sequence, falling short of the broader goal of handling arbitrarily long sequences in a single pass. We propose Elastic Test-Time Training inspired by elastic weight consolidation, that stabilizes LaCT fast-weight updates with a Fisher-weighted elastic prior around a maintained anchor state. The anchor evolves as an exponential moving average of past fast weights to balance stability and plasticity. Based on this updated architecture, we introduce Fast Spatial Memory (FSM), an efficient and scalable model for 4D reconstruction that learns spatiotemporal representations from long observation sequences and renders novel view-time combinations. We pre-trained FSM on large-scale curated 3D/4D data to capture the dynamics and semantics of complex spatial environments. Extensive experiments show that FSM supports fast adaptation over long sequences and delivers high-quality 3D/4D reconstruction with smaller chunks and mitigating the camera-interpolation shortcut. Overall, we hope to advance LaCT beyond the bounded single-chunk setting toward robust multi-chunk adaptation, a necessary step for generalization to genuinely longer sequences, while substantially alleviating the activation-memory bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 提出Elastic Test-Time Training方法，结合弹性权重整合来稳定LaCT的快速权重更新，并引入Fast Spatial Memory模型用于4D重建，支持长序列适应和小块处理。
AI.motivation: LaCT在长上下文3D重建中表现良好，但其完全可塑的推理时更新容易遭受灾难性遗忘和过拟合，通常只能使用单个大块处理完整输入序列，无法真正处理任意长序列。
AI.method: 提出弹性测试时训练，使用Fisher加权的弹性先验来稳定LaCT的快速权重更新，锚点状态通过过去快速权重的指数移动平均演化。基于此架构引入Fast Spatial Memory模型，从长观测序列学习时空表示并渲染新视角-时间组合。
AI.result: FSM支持长序列的快速适应，提供高质量的3D/4D重建，使用更小的块并缓解相机插值捷径问题。实验表明该方法能超越有界单块设置，实现鲁棒的多块适应。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将LaCT扩展到鲁棒的多块适应，是泛化到真正长序列的必要步骤，同时显著缓解了激活内存瓶颈。

title: ClickGuard: A Trustworthy Adaptive Fusion Framework for Clickbait Detection
summary: The widespread use of clickbait headlines, crafted to mislead and maximize engagement, poses a significant challenge to online credibility. These headlines employ sensationalism, misleading claims, and vague language, underscoring the need for effective detection to ensure trustworthy digital content. The paper introduces, ClickGuard: a trustworthy adaptive fusion framework for clickbait detection. It combines BERT embeddings and structural features using a Syntactic-Semantic Adaptive Fusion Block (SSAFB) for dynamic integration. The framework incorporates a hybrid CNN-BiLSTM to capture patterns and dependencies. The model achieved 96.93% testing accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches. The model's trustworthiness is evaluated using LIME and Permutation Feature Importance (PFI) for interpretability and perturbation analysis. These methods assess the model's robustness and sensitivity to feature changes by measuring the average prediction variation. Ablation studies validated the SSAFB's effectiveness in optimizing feature fusion. The model demonstrated robust performance across diverse datasets, providing a scalable, reliable solution for enhancing online content credibility by addressing syntactic-semantic modelling challenges. Code of the work is available at: https://github.com/palindromeRice/ClickBait_Detection_Architecture

AI.tldr: ClickGuard：一个可信的自适应融合框架，用于点击诱饵检测，结合BERT嵌入和结构特征，在测试中达到96.93%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 点击诱饵标题的广泛使用误导用户并损害在线可信度，需要有效的检测方法来确保数字内容的可信性。
AI.method: 提出ClickGuard框架，使用句法-语义自适应融合块（SSAFB）动态整合BERT嵌入和结构特征，结合混合CNN-BiLSTM捕获模式和依赖关系。
AI.result: 模型达到96.93%的测试准确率，优于现有方法；通过LIME和PFI评估可信度，消融研究验证了SSAFB的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为增强在线内容可信度提供了可扩展、可靠的解决方案，解决了句法-语义建模的挑战。

title: MAE-SAM2: Mask Autoencoder-Enhanced SAM2 for Clinical Retinal Vascular Leakage Segmentation
summary: We propose MAE-SAM2, a novel foundation model for retinal vascular leakage segmentation on fluorescein angiography images. Due to the small size and dense distribution of the leakage areas, along with the limited availability of labeled clinical data, this presents a significant challenge for segmentation tasks. Our approach integrates a Self-Supervised learning (SSL) strategy, Masked Autoencoder (MAE), with SAM2. In our implementation, we explore different loss functions and conclude a task-specific combined loss. Extensive experiments and ablation studies demonstrate that MAE-SAM2 outperforms several state-of-the-art models, achieving the highest Dice score and Intersection-over-Union (IoU). Compared to the original SAM2, our model achieves a $5\%$ performance improvement, highlighting the promise of foundation models with self-supervised pretraining in clinical imaging tasks.

AI.tldr: MAE-SAM2：一种用于荧光素血管造影图像中视网膜血管渗漏分割的新型基础模型，结合自监督学习（MAE）与SAM2，在有限标注数据下实现5%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 视网膜血管渗漏分割面临两大挑战：1）渗漏区域小且分布密集；2）标注临床数据有限。传统方法难以处理这些困难，需要开发能够利用有限标注数据的高效分割模型。
AI.method: 将自监督学习策略（Masked Autoencoder, MAE）与SAM2模型集成，探索不同损失函数并最终确定任务特定的组合损失函数。
AI.result: MAE-SAM2在多个实验中优于现有最先进模型，获得最高的Dice分数和IoU。相比原始SAM2，性能提升5%，证明了自监督预训练基础模型在临床影像任务中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练与基础模型的结合在医学影像分割任务中具有显著优势，特别是在标注数据有限的情况下，能够有效提升模型性能。

title: A Systematic Study of Retrieval Pipeline Design for Retrieval-Augmented Medical Question Answering
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in medical question answering; however, purely parametric models often suffer from knowledge gaps and limited factual grounding. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) addresses this limitation by integrating external knowledge retrieval into the reasoning process. Despite increasing interest in RAG-based medical systems, the impact of individual retrieval components on performance remains insufficiently understood. This study presents a systematic evaluation of retrieval-augmented medical question answering using the MedQA USMLE benchmark and a structured textbook-based knowledge corpus. We analyze the interaction between language models, embedding models, retrieval strategies, query reformulation, and cross-encoder reranking within a unified experimental framework comprising forty configurations. Results show that retrieval augmentation significantly improves zero-shot medical question answering performance. The best-performing configuration was dense retrieval with query reformulation and reranking achieved 60.49% accuracy. Domain-specialized language models were also found to better utilize retrieved medical evidence than general-purpose models. The analysis further reveals a clear tradeoff between retrieval effectiveness and computational cost, with simpler dense retrieval configurations providing strong performance while maintaining higher throughput. All experiments were conducted on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating that systematic evaluation of retrieval-augmented medical QA systems can be performed under modest computational resources.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了检索增强生成（RAG）在医学问答中的表现，分析了语言模型、嵌入模型、检索策略等组件的影响，发现RAG显著提升零样本医学问答性能，最佳配置达到60.49%准确率，且可在消费级GPU上完成评估。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在医学问答中表现出色，但纯参数化模型存在知识空白和事实基础有限的问题。检索增强生成通过整合外部知识检索来解决这一限制，然而RAG系统中各个检索组件对性能的影响尚未得到充分理解。
AI.method: 使用MedQA USMLE基准和结构化教科书知识库，在统一实验框架下分析语言模型、嵌入模型、检索策略、查询重构和交叉编码器重排序等40种配置的交互作用。
AI.result: 检索增强显著提升零样本医学问答性能，最佳配置（密集检索+查询重构+重排序）达到60.49%准确率。领域专用语言模型比通用模型能更好地利用检索到的医学证据。研究发现检索效果与计算成本之间存在明显权衡。
AI.conclusion: 系统评估表明RAG能有效提升医学问答性能，简单的密集检索配置在保持高吞吐量的同时提供强大性能。所有实验在单消费级GPU上完成，证明可在有限计算资源下进行系统评估。

title: WebSP-Eval: Evaluating Web Agents on Website Security and Privacy Tasks
summary: Web agents automate browser tasks, ranging from simple form completion to complex workflows like ordering groceries. While current benchmarks evaluate general-purpose performance~(e.g., WebArena) or safety against malicious actions~(e.g., SafeArena), no existing framework assesses an agent's ability to successfully execute user-facing website security and privacy tasks, such as managing cookie preferences, configuring privacy-sensitive account settings, or revoking inactive sessions. To address this gap, we introduce WebSP-Eval, an evaluation framework for measuring web agent performance on website security and privacy tasks. WebSP-Eval comprises 1) a manually crafted task dataset of 200 task instances across 28 websites; 2) a robust agentic system supporting account and initial state management across runs using a custom Google Chrome extension; and 3) an automated evaluator. We evaluate a total of 8 web agent instantiations using state-of-the-art multimodal large language models, conducting a fine-grained analysis across websites, task categories, and UI elements. Our evaluation reveals that current models suffer from limited autonomous exploration capabilities to reliably solve website security and privacy tasks, and struggle with specific task categories and websites. Crucially, we identify stateful UI elements such as toggles and checkboxes are a primary reason for agent failure, failing at a rate of more than 45\% in tasks containing these elements across many models.

AI.tldr: WebSP-Eval：首个评估Web智能体在网站安全与隐私任务（如cookie管理、隐私设置）性能的框架，包含200个任务实例、支持状态管理的代理系统和自动评估器。评估发现当前智能体在自主探索能力和状态UI元素（如开关、复选框）处理上存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有Web智能体基准主要关注通用性能（如WebArena）或对抗恶意行为的安全性（如SafeArena），但缺乏评估智能体执行用户端网站安全与隐私任务（如cookie偏好管理、隐私敏感设置配置、撤销非活跃会话）能力的框架。为填补这一空白，作者提出了WebSP-Eval。
AI.method: 1) 手工构建包含200个任务实例的数据集，覆盖28个网站；2) 开发支持账户和初始状态管理的鲁棒代理系统，使用自定义Chrome扩展；3) 设计自动化评估器。使用8个基于最先进多模态大语言模型的Web智能体实例进行细粒度评估，分析网站、任务类别和UI元素层面的表现。
AI.result: 评估显示：1) 当前模型在自主探索能力上有限，难以可靠解决网站安全与隐私任务；2) 在特定任务类别和网站上表现不佳；3) 最关键的是，状态UI元素（如开关、复选框）是智能体失败的主要原因，包含这些元素的任务中失败率超过45%。
AI.conclusion: WebSP-Eval填补了Web智能体在安全与隐私任务评估方面的空白，揭示了当前智能体在处理状态UI元素和自主探索方面的显著缺陷，为未来Web智能体在安全隐私领域的改进提供了重要基准和方向。

title: GS-Surrogate: Deformable Gaussian Splatting for Parameter Space Exploration of Ensemble Simulations
summary: Exploring ensemble simulations is increasingly important across many scientific domains. However, supporting flexible post-hoc exploration remains challenging due to the trade-off between storing the expensive raw data and flexibly adjusting visualization settings. Existing visualization surrogate models have improved this workflow, but they either operate in image space without an explicit 3D representation or rely on neural radiance fields that are computationally expensive for interactive exploration and encode all parameter-driven variations within a single implicit field. In this work, we introduce GS-Surrogate, a deformable Gaussian Splatting-based visualization surrogate for parameter-space exploration. Our method first constructs a canonical Gaussian field as a base 3D representation and adapts it through sequential parameter-conditioned deformations. By separating simulation-related variations from visualization-specific changes, this explicit formulation enables efficient and controllable adaptation to different visualization tasks, such as isosurface extraction and transfer function editing. We evaluate our framework on a range of simulation datasets, demonstrating that GS-Surrogate enables real-time and flexible exploration across both simulation and visualization parameter spaces.

AI.tldr: GS-Surrogate：基于可变形高斯泼溅的可视化代理模型，用于参数空间探索，将模拟相关变化与可视化特定变化分离，实现实时灵活的探索
AI.motivation: 解决科学计算中集合模拟探索的挑战：现有方法要么在图像空间操作缺乏3D表示，要么依赖计算昂贵的神经辐射场，且将所有参数变化编码在单个隐式场中
AI.method: 构建规范高斯场作为基础3D表示，通过顺序参数条件变形进行适应，分离模拟相关变化与可视化特定变化，支持等值面提取和传递函数编辑等任务
AI.result: 在多个模拟数据集上评估，GS-Surrogate能够在模拟和可视化参数空间实现实时灵活的探索
AI.conclusion: 提出的可变形高斯泼溅方法为参数空间探索提供了高效可控的可视化代理，优于现有方法

title: Why teaching resists automation in an AI-inundated era: Human judgment, non-modular work, and the limits of delegation
summary: Debates about artificial intelligence (AI) in education often portray teaching as a modular and procedural job that can increasingly be automated or delegated to technology. This brief communication paper argues that such claims depend on treating teaching as more separable than it is in practice. Drawing on recent literature and empirical studies of large language models and retrieval-augmented generation systems, I argue that although AI can support some bounded functions, instructional work remains difficult to automate in meaningful ways because it is inherently interpretive, relational, and grounded in professional judgment. More fundamentally, teaching and learning are shaped by human cognition, behavior, motivation, and social interaction in ways that cannot be fully specified, predicted, or exhaustively modeled. Tasks that may appear separable in principle derive their instructional value in practice from ongoing contextual interpretation across learners, situations, and relationships. As long as educational practice relies on emergent understanding of human cognition and learning, teaching remains a form of professional work that resists automation. AI may improve access to information and support selected instructional activities, but it does not remove the need for human judgment and relational accountability that effective teaching requires.

AI.tldr: 本文认为教学难以自动化，因为教学本质上是解释性、关系性和基于专业判断的工作，AI只能支持有限功能，无法替代人类教师的专业判断和关系责任。
AI.motivation: 针对当前关于AI在教育中应用的讨论，特别是认为教学可以模块化和程序化从而被自动化或委托给技术的观点，本文提出反驳，强调教学工作的不可分割性和复杂性。
AI.method: 基于近期文献和大型语言模型与检索增强生成系统的实证研究，通过理论分析和论证，探讨教学工作的本质特征及其与AI自动化的关系。
AI.result: 论证表明教学是解释性、关系性和基于专业判断的工作，受人类认知、行为、动机和社会互动的影响，这些因素无法完全指定、预测或详尽建模。AI只能支持有限功能，无法替代人类教师的专业判断。
AI.conclusion: 教学作为一种专业工作抵制自动化，AI可以提高信息获取和支持特定教学活动，但不能消除有效教学所需的人类判断和关系责任。

title: ForkKV: Scaling Multi-LoRA Agent Serving via Copy-on-Write Disaggregated KV Cache
summary:
The serving paradigm of large language models (LLMs) is rapidly shifting towards complex multi-agent workflows where specialized agents collaborate over massive shared contexts. While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables the efficient co-hosting of these specialized agents on a single base model, it introduces a critical memory footprint bottleneck during serving. Specifically, unique LoRA activations cause Key-Value (KV) cache divergence across agents, rendering traditional prefix caching ineffective for shared contexts. This forces redundant KV cache maintenance, rapidly saturating GPU capacity and degrading throughput.
  To address this challenge, we introduce ForkKV, a serving system for multi-LoRA agent workflows centered around a novel memory management paradigm in OS: fork with copy-on-write (CoW). By exploiting the structural properties of LoRA, ForkKV physically decouples the KV cache into a massive shared component (analogous to the parent process's memory pages) and lightweight agent-specific components (the child process's pages). To support this mechanism, we propose a DualRadixTree architecture that allows newly forked agents to inherit the massive shared cache and apply CoW semantics for their lightweight unique cache. Furthermore, to guarantee efficient execution, we design ResidualAttention, a specialized kernel that reconstructs the disaggregated KV cache directly within on-chip SRAM. Comprehensive evaluations across diverse language models and practical datasets of different tasks demonstrate that ForkKV achieves up to 3.0x the throughput of state-of-the-art multi-LoRA serving systems with a negligible impact on generation quality.

AI.tldr: ForkKV：针对多LoRA智能体工作流的KV缓存内存管理系统，通过类似操作系统fork+CoW的机制，将KV缓存解耦为共享组件和智能体特定组件，显著提升吞吐量
AI.motivation: 随着LLM服务范式向多智能体工作流演进，LoRA使得多个专用智能体可以在单个基础模型上协同托管，但带来了关键的内存瓶颈。独特的LoRA激活导致KV缓存在不同智能体间产生分歧，使得传统的prefix缓存失效，需要冗余的KV缓存维护，从而快速饱和GPU容量并降低吞吐量。
AI.method:
1. 引入类似操作系统的fork with copy-on-write内存管理范式，将KV缓存物理解耦为大规模共享组件（类似父进程内存页）和轻量级智能体特定组件（子进程页）
2. 提出DualRadixTree架构，使新fork的智能体能够继承大规模共享缓存，并对其轻量级独特缓存应用CoW语义
3. 设计ResidualAttention专用内核，在片上SRAM内直接重构解耦的KV缓存以保证高效执行
AI.result: 在不同语言模型和实际任务数据集上的综合评估表明，ForkKV相比最先进的多LoRA服务系统实现了高达3.0倍的吞吐量提升，且对生成质量影响可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: ForkKV通过创新的内存管理范式有效解决了多LoRA智能体工作流中的KV缓存内存瓶颈问题，显著提升了服务效率，为复杂多智能体LLM服务提供了实用的系统解决方案。

title: OpenSpatial: A Principled Data Engine for Empowering Spatial Intelligence
summary: Spatial understanding is a fundamental cornerstone of human-level intelligence. Nonetheless, current research predominantly focuses on domain-specific data production, leaving a critical void: the absence of a principled, open-source engine capable of fully unleashing the potential of high-quality spatial data. To bridge this gap, we elucidate the design principles of a robust data generation system and introduce OpenSpatial -- an open-source data engine engineered for high quality, extensive scalability, broad task diversity, and optimized efficiency. OpenSpatial adopts 3D bounding boxes as the fundamental primitive to construct a comprehensive data hierarchy across five foundational tasks: Spatial Measurement (SM), Spatial Relationship (SR), Camera Perception (CP), Multi-view Consistency (MC), and Scene-Aware Reasoning (SAR). Leveraging this scalable infrastructure, we curate OpenSpatial-3M, a large-scale dataset comprising 3 million high-fidelity samples. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that versatile models trained on our dataset achieve state-of-the-art performance across a wide spectrum of spatial reasoning benchmarks. Notably, the best-performing model exhibits a substantial average improvement of 19 percent, relatively. Furthermore, we provide a systematic analysis of how data attributes influence spatial perception. By open-sourcing both the engine and the 3M-scale dataset, we provide a robust foundation to accelerate future research in spatial intelligence.

AI.tldr: OpenSpatial是一个开源空间数据引擎，采用3D边界框作为基本原语，构建了包含5个基础任务的数据层次结构，并生成了包含300万高质量样本的OpenSpatial-3M数据集，显著提升了空间推理模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前空间理解研究主要集中在特定领域的数据生产，缺乏一个能够充分发挥高质量空间数据潜力的原则性开源引擎。为了填补这一空白，需要建立一个能够支持高质量、可扩展、任务多样且高效的空间数据生成系统。
AI.method: 提出OpenSpatial开源数据引擎，采用3D边界框作为基本原语，构建包含五个基础任务的数据层次结构：空间测量、空间关系、相机感知、多视图一致性和场景感知推理。基于这一可扩展基础设施，创建了包含300万高质量样本的OpenSpatial-3M数据集。
AI.result: 使用该数据集训练的通用模型在广泛的空间推理基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。表现最佳的模型相对平均提升了19%。此外，还系统分析了数据属性如何影响空间感知能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过开源引擎和300万规模的数据集，为加速未来空间智能研究提供了坚实基础。这项工作填补了高质量空间数据生成系统的空白，显著提升了空间推理模型的性能。

title: Structural Regularities of Cinema SDR-to-HDR Mapping in a Controlled Mastering Workflow: A Pixel-wise Case Study on ASC StEM2
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures. Empirical case study on cinema SDR-to-HDR mapping using ASC StEM2
summary: We present an empirical case study of cinema SDR-to-HDR mapping using ASC StEM2, a rare common-source dataset containing EXR scene-referred images and matched SDR/HDR cinema release masters from the same ACES-based mastering workflow. Based on pixel-wise statistics over all 18,580 frames of the test film, we construct a three-domain comparison involving EXR source data, SDR release masters, and HDR release masters to characterize their luminance and color structural relationships within this controlled workflow. In the luminance dimension, SDR and HDR masters exhibit a highly stable global monotonic correspondence, with geometric structure remaining largely consistent overall; sparse and structured deviations appear in self-luminous highlights and specific material regions. In the color dimension, the two masters remain largely consistent in hue, with saturation exhibiting a redistribution pattern of shadow suppression, midtone expansion, and highlight convergence. Using EXR as a scene-referred anchor, we further define a pixel-level decision map that operationally separates EXR-closer recovery regions from content-adaptive adjustment regions. Under this operational definition, 82.4% of sampled image regions are classified as EXR-closer recovery, while the remainder require localized adaptive adjustment. Rather than claiming a universal law for all cinema mastering pipelines, the study provides an interpretable quantitative baseline for structure-aware SDR-to-HDR analysis and for designing learning-based models under shared-source mastering conditions.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用ASC StEM2数据集对电影SDR到HDR映射进行实证分析，通过三域比较（EXR源数据、SDR母版、HDR母版）揭示了亮度与色彩的结构关系，并提出了像素级决策图来区分恢复区域与自适应调整区域。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是理解在受控的电影制作流程中，SDR和HDR母版之间的结构关系，为基于学习的SDR-to-HDR转换模型提供可解释的定量基准，而不是声称适用于所有电影制作流程的通用规律。
AI.method: 使用ASC StEM2数据集（包含EXR场景参考图像和匹配的SDR/HDR电影母版），对18,580帧进行像素级统计分析。构建三域比较框架（EXR源数据、SDR母版、HDR母版），分析亮度和色彩的结构关系，并定义像素级决策图来操作性地分离EXR更接近的恢复区域和内容自适应调整区域。
AI.result: 亮度维度：SDR和HDR母版表现出高度稳定的全局单调对应关系，几何结构整体一致；在自发光高光和特定材质区域出现稀疏结构化偏差。色彩维度：两母版色调基本一致，饱和度呈现阴影抑制、中间调扩展、高光收敛的重新分布模式。82.4%的图像区域被分类为EXR更接近的恢复区域，其余需要局部自适应调整。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为结构感知的SDR-to-HDR分析和在共享源制作条件下设计基于学习的模型提供了可解释的定量基准，强调了在受控工作流程中理解SDR-HDR关系的重要性。

title: Evaluating In-Context Translation with Synchronous Context-Free Grammar Transduction
summary: Low-resource languages pose a challenge for machine translation with large language models (LLMs), which require large amounts of training data. One potential way to circumvent this data dependence is to rely on LLMs' ability to use in-context descriptions of languages, like textbooks and dictionaries. To do so, LLMs must be able to infer the link between the languages' grammatical descriptions and the sentences in question. Here we isolate this skill using a formal analogue of the task: string transduction based on a formal grammar provided in-context. We construct synchronous context-free grammars which define pairs of formal languages designed to model particular aspects of natural language grammar, morphology, and written representation. Using these grammars, we measure how well LLMs can translate sentences from one formal language into another when given both the grammar and the source-language sentence. We vary the size of the grammar, the lengths of the sentences, the syntactic and morphological properties of the languages, and their written script. We note three key findings. First, LLMs' translation accuracy decreases markedly as a function of grammar size and sentence length. Second, differences in morphology and written representation between the source and target languages can strongly diminish model performance. Third, we examine the types of errors committed by models and find they are most prone to recall the wrong words from the target language vocabulary, hallucinate new words, or leave source-language words untranslated.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过形式语法任务评估LLMs在低资源语言翻译中的能力，发现模型性能随语法规模和句子长度显著下降，形态和书写差异会严重影响翻译准确性，主要错误类型包括词汇选择错误、幻觉和未翻译源语言词汇。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言翻译面临训练数据不足的挑战，研究者希望探索LLMs能否通过上下文中的语言描述（如教科书、词典）来理解语言结构并进行翻译，而不依赖大量训练数据。
AI.method: 构建同步上下文无关文法来定义形式语言对，模拟自然语言的语法、形态和书写特征。在给定文法和源语言句子的情况下，测量LLMs将句子从一个形式语言翻译到另一个的能力，并系统变化文法规模、句子长度、语言特性和书写系统。
AI.result: 1) LLMs翻译准确率随文法规模和句子长度显著下降；2) 源语言和目标语言在形态和书写表示上的差异会严重降低模型性能；3) 主要错误类型包括：选择错误的目标语言词汇、幻觉新词汇、未翻译源语言词汇。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在基于形式文法描述的翻译任务中表现有限，特别是在处理复杂语法结构、长句和语言差异时。这表明仅靠上下文语言描述可能不足以解决低资源语言翻译问题，需要更有效的机制来理解语言结构。

title: Revisiting Fairness Impossibility with Endogenous Behavior
summary:
In many real-world settings, institutions can and do adjust the consequences attached to algorithmic classification decisions, such as the size of fines, sentence lengths, or benefit levels. We refer to these consequences as the stakes associated with classification. These stakes can give rise to behavioral responses to classification, as people adjust their actions in anticipation of how they will be classified. Much of the algorithmic fairness literature evaluates classification outcomes while holding behavior fixed, treating behavioral differences across groups as exogenous features of the environment. Under this assumption, the stakes of classification play no role in shaping outcomes.
  We revisit classic impossibility results in algorithmic fairness in a setting where people respond strategically to classification. We show that, in this environment, the well-known incompatibility between error-rate balance and predictive parity disappears, but only by potentially introducing a qualitatively different form of unequal treatment. Concretely, we construct a two-stage design in which a classifier first standardizes its statistical performance across groups, and then adjusts stakes so as to induce comparable patterns of behavior. This requires treating groups differently in the consequences attached to identical classification decisions. Our results demonstrate that fairness in strategic settings cannot be assessed solely by how algorithms map data into decisions. Rather, our analysis treats the human consequences of classification as primary design variables, introduces normative criteria governing their use, and shows that their interaction with statistical fairness criteria generates qualitatively new tradeoffs. Our aim is to make these tradeoffs precise and explicit.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究算法公平性在战略环境中的新视角，探讨当人们根据分类结果调整行为时，公平性标准的兼容性问题，提出两阶段设计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统算法公平性文献通常假设行为是固定的，忽略了分类结果带来的后果（如罚款、刑期等）会引发人们的战略行为调整。现实中，人们会根据分类结果调整自己的行为，这影响了公平性评估的有效性。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段设计框架：1）分类器首先标准化跨群体的统计性能；2）调整分类结果的后果（stakes），以诱导可比较的行为模式。这种方法需要针对不同群体对相同的分类决策施加不同的后果。
AI.result: 在战略响应环境中，经典的公平性不可能定理（错误率平衡与预测公平性的不兼容性）消失，但代价是引入了不同形式的差异化处理。通过调整分类结果的后果，可以在战略环境中实现统计公平性。
AI.conclusion: 战略环境中的公平性不能仅通过算法如何将数据映射到决策来评估。需要将分类结果的人类后果作为主要设计变量，并考虑其与统计公平性标准的交互作用，这产生了新的权衡关系。

title: Beyond Functional Correctness: Design Issues in AI IDE-Generated Large-Scale Projects
comment: 40 pages, 19 images, 5 tables, Manuscript submitted to a Journal (2026)
summary: New generation of AI coding tools, including AI-powered IDEs equipped with agentic capabilities, can generate code within the context of the project. These AI IDEs are increasingly perceived as capable of producing project-level code at scale. However, there is limited empirical evidence on the extent to which they can generate large-scale software systems and what design issues such systems may exhibit. To address this gap, we conducted a study to explore the capability of Cursor in generating large-scale projects and to evaluate the design quality of projects generated by Cursor. First, we propose a Feature-Driven Human-In-The-Loop (FD-HITL) framework that systematically guides project generation from curated project descriptions. We generated 10 projects using Cursor with the FD-HITL framework across three application domains and multiple technologies. We assessed the functional correctness of these projects through manual evaluation, obtaining an average functional correctness score of 91%. Next, we analyzed the generated projects using two static analysis tools, CodeScene and SonarQube, to detect design issues. We identified 1,305 design issues categorized into 9 categories by CodeScene and 3,193 issues in 11 categories by SonarQube. Our findings show that (1) when used with the FD-HITL framework, Cursor can generate functional large-scale projects averaging 16,965 LoC and 114 files; (2) the generated projects nevertheless contain design issues that may pose long-term maintainability and evolvability risks, requiring careful review by experienced developers; (3) the most prevalent issues include Code Duplication, high Code Complexity, Large Methods, Framework Best-Practice Violations, Exception-Handling Issues and Accessibility Issues; (4) these design issues violate design principles such as SRP, SoC, and DRY. The replication package is at https://github.com/Kashifraz/DIinAGP

AI.tldr: 研究评估AI代码工具Cursor生成大规模项目的能力及设计质量问题，发现虽然能生成功能正确的项目（平均91%正确率），但存在大量设计问题可能影响长期维护性
AI.motivation: 尽管AI代码工具（如AI驱动的IDE）被认为能够生成项目级代码，但缺乏关于其生成大规模软件系统能力及设计问题的实证证据。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索Cursor生成大规模项目的能力并评估其设计质量。
AI.method: 提出特征驱动的人机协同（FD-HITL）框架，系统地从策划的项目描述中指导项目生成。使用Cursor和FD-HITL框架生成了10个项目，涵盖3个应用领域和多种技术。通过人工评估功能正确性，并使用CodeScene和SonarQube进行静态分析检测设计问题。
AI.result: 1. 使用FD-HITL框架时，Cursor能生成平均16,965行代码、114个文件的功能性大规模项目，平均功能正确性得分91%。2. 但生成的项目包含大量设计问题：CodeScene检测到1,305个问题（9类），SonarQube检测到3,193个问题（11类）。3. 最普遍的问题包括代码重复、高复杂度、大型方法、框架最佳实践违反、异常处理问题和可访问性问题。4. 这些问题违反了SRP、SoC、DRY等设计原则。
AI.conclusion: AI代码工具如Cursor在适当框架下能生成功能性大规模项目，但生成代码存在严重设计质量问题，可能对长期维护性和可演化性构成风险，需要经验丰富的开发者仔细审查。

title: Personalized RewardBench: Evaluating Reward Models with Human Aligned Personalization
summary: Pluralistic alignment has emerged as a critical frontier in the development of Large Language Models (LLMs), with reward models (RMs) serving as a central mechanism for capturing diverse human values. While benchmarks for general response quality are prevalent, evaluating how well reward models account for individual user preferences remains an open challenge. To bridge this gap, we introduce Personalized RewardBench, a novel benchmark designed to rigorously assess reward models' capacity to model personalized preferences. We construct chosen and rejected response pairs based on strict adherence to (or violation of) user-specific rubrics, ensuring that preference distinctions are uniquely tailored to the individual. In particular, human evaluations confirm that the primary discriminative factor between pairs is strictly personal preference, with both responses maintaining high general quality (e.g., correctness, relevance and helpfulness). Extensive testing reveals that existing state-of-the-art reward models struggle significantly with personalization, peaking at an accuracy of just 75.94%. Crucially, because an effective reward model benchmark should predict a reward model's performance on downstream tasks, we conduct experiments demonstrating that our benchmark exhibits a significantly higher correlation with downstream performance in both Best-of-N (BoN) sampling and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) compared to existing baselines. These findings establish Personalized RewardBench as a robust and accurate proxy for evaluating reward models' performance in downstream applications.

AI.tldr: 提出Personalized RewardBench基准，用于评估奖励模型对个性化偏好的建模能力，发现现有SOTA奖励模型在个性化任务上表现不佳（最高仅75.94%准确率），且该基准与下游任务性能相关性更高。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM发展中的多元化对齐成为关键前沿，奖励模型作为捕捉多样化人类价值观的核心机制。虽然通用响应质量基准很普遍，但评估奖励模型如何考虑个体用户偏好仍是一个开放挑战。需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建Personalized RewardBench基准，基于严格遵循（或违反）用户特定规则构建选择和拒绝响应对，确保偏好区分完全针对个体定制。通过人工评估确认主要区分因素是严格的个人偏好，同时保持响应的高通用质量。
AI.result: 现有最先进的奖励模型在个性化方面表现显著不足，最高准确率仅为75.94%。更重要的是，该基准与下游任务性能（Best-of-N采样和PPO）的相关性显著高于现有基线，能更准确地预测奖励模型在下游应用中的表现。
AI.conclusion: Personalized RewardBench是一个稳健且准确的代理基准，用于评估奖励模型在下游应用中的性能，为奖励模型的个性化能力评估提供了重要工具。

title: Calibration of a neural network ocean closure for improved mean state and variability
summary: Global ocean models exhibit biases in the mean state and variability, particularly at coarse resolution, where mesoscale eddies are unresolved. To address these biases, parameterization coefficients are typically tuned ad hoc. Here, we formulate parameter tuning as a calibration problem using Ensemble Kalman Inversion (EKI). We optimize parameters of a neural network parameterization of mesoscale eddies in two idealized ocean models at coarse resolution. The calibrated parameterization reduces errors in the time-averaged fluid interfaces and their variability by approximately a factor of two compared to the unparameterized model or the offline-trained parameterization. The EKI method is robust to noise in time-averaged statistics arising from chaotic ocean dynamics. Furthermore, we propose an efficient calibration protocol that bypasses integration to statistical equilibrium by carefully choosing an initial condition. These results demonstrate that systematic calibration can substantially improve coarse-resolution ocean simulations and provide a practical pathway for reducing biases in global ocean models.

AI.tldr: 使用集成卡尔曼反演(EKI)方法校准海洋模型中未解析的中尺度涡旋神经网络参数化，显著减少了粗分辨率海洋模拟的偏差
AI.motivation: 全球海洋模型在粗分辨率下存在平均状态和变率的偏差，特别是未解析的中尺度涡旋问题。传统参数化系数调整通常是临时性的，需要系统化的校准方法来解决这些偏差。
AI.method: 将参数调整表述为校准问题，使用集成卡尔曼反演(EKI)方法优化两个理想化海洋模型中中尺度涡旋神经网络参数化的参数。提出了一种高效的校准协议，通过精心选择初始条件来绕过统计平衡积分。
AI.result: 校准后的参数化将时间平均流体界面及其变率的误差减少了约一半，相比未参数化模型或离线训练的参数化有显著改进。EKI方法对混沌海洋动力学产生的时间平均统计噪声具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 系统化校准可以显著改善粗分辨率海洋模拟，为减少全球海洋模型偏差提供了实用途径。该方法展示了参数化校准在提高海洋模型精度方面的有效性。

title: Uncertainty Estimation for Deep Reconstruction in Actuatic Disaster Scenarios with Autonomous Vehicles
summary: Accurate reconstruction of environmental scalar fields from sparse onboard observations is essential for autonomous vehicles engaged in aquatic monitoring. Beyond point estimates, principled uncertainty quantification is critical for active sensing strategies such as Informative Path Planning, where epistemic uncertainty drives data collection decisions. This paper compares Gaussian Processes, Monte Carlo Dropout, Deep Ensembles, and Evidential Deep Learning for simultaneous scalar field reconstruction and uncertainty decomposition under three perceptual models representative of real sensor modalities. Results show that Evidential Deep Learning achieves the best reconstruction accuracy and uncertainty calibration across all sensor configurations at the lowest inference cost, while Gaussian Processes are fundamentally limited by their stationary kernel assumption and become intractable as observation density grows. These findings support Evidential Deep Learning as the preferred method for uncertainty-aware field reconstruction in real-time autonomous vehicle deployments.

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了四种不确定性量化方法（高斯过程、蒙特卡洛dropout、深度集成、证据深度学习）用于自主水下车辆的环境标量场重建，发现证据深度学习在重建精度、不确定性校准和推理成本方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 自主水下车辆进行环境监测时，需要从稀疏观测中准确重建标量场（如温度、盐度等）。除了点估计外，原则性的不确定性量化对于主动感知策略（如信息路径规划）至关重要，其中认知不确定性驱动数据收集决策。
AI.method: 比较了四种不确定性量化方法：1）高斯过程（GP），2）蒙特卡洛dropout（MC Dropout），3）深度集成（Deep Ensembles），4）证据深度学习（Evidential Deep Learning）。在三种代表真实传感器模态的感知模型下评估这些方法，同时进行标量场重建和不确定性分解。
AI.result: 证据深度学习在所有传感器配置下实现了最佳的重建精度和不确定性校准，且推理成本最低。高斯过程受限于其平稳核假设，随着观测密度增加变得难以处理。证据深度学习在实时自主车辆部署中表现出优越性。
AI.conclusion: 证据深度学习是实时自主车辆部署中不确定性感知场重建的首选方法，在准确性、校准性和计算效率方面均优于其他方法。

title: Towards Resilient Intrusion Detection in CubeSats: Challenges, TinyML Solutions, and Future Directions
comment: Published in IEEE Aerospace and Electronic Systems Magazine
summary: CubeSats have revolutionized access to space by providing affordable and accessible platforms for research and education. However, their reliance on Commercial Off-The-Shelf (COTS) components and open-source software has introduced significant cybersecurity vulnerabilities. Ensuring the cybersecurity of CubeSats is vital as they play increasingly important roles in space missions. Traditional security measures, such as intrusion detection systems (IDS), are impractical for CubeSats due to resource constraints and unique operational environments. This paper provides an in-depth review of current cybersecurity practices for CubeSats, highlighting limitations and identifying gaps in existing methods. Additionally, it explores non-cyber anomaly detection techniques that offer insights into adaptable algorithms and deployment strategies suitable for CubeSat constraints. Open research problems are identified, including the need for resource-efficient intrusion detection mechanisms, evaluation of IDS solutions under realistic mission scenarios, development of autonomous response systems, and creation of cybersecurity frameworks. The addition of TinyML into CubeSat systems is explored as a promising solution to address these challenges, offering resource-efficient, real-time intrusion detection capabilities. Future research directions are proposed, such as integrating cybersecurity with health monitoring systems, and fostering collaboration between cybersecurity researchers and space domain experts.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了CubeSat（立方体卫星）的网络安全挑战，分析了现有安全措施的局限性，并探讨了TinyML作为资源高效入侵检测的解决方案。
AI.motivation: CubeSat因其使用商用现成组件和开源软件而存在严重网络安全漏洞，但传统安全措施（如入侵检测系统）由于资源限制和特殊操作环境而不适用，需要探索适合CubeSat约束的网络安全解决方案。
AI.method: 论文采用文献综述方法，深入分析当前CubeSat网络安全实践，识别现有方法的局限性，并探索非网络异常检测技术，特别关注TinyML在CubeSat系统中的集成应用。
AI.result: 识别了CubeSat网络安全的关键研究问题：需要资源高效的入侵检测机制、在真实任务场景下评估IDS解决方案、开发自主响应系统、建立网络安全框架。TinyML被证明是解决这些挑战的有前景方案。
AI.conclusion: CubeSat网络安全需要专门针对其资源约束和环境特点的解决方案，TinyML集成、网络安全与健康监测系统结合、网络安全研究人员与空间领域专家协作是未来重要研究方向。

title: ARIA: Adaptive Retrieval Intelligence Assistant -- A Multimodal RAG Framework for Domain-Specific Engineering Education
summary: Developing effective, domain-specific educational support systems is central to advancing AI in education. Although large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities, they face significant limitations in specialized educational applications, including hallucinations, limited knowledge updates, and lack of domain expertise. Fine-tuning requires complete model retraining, creating substantial computational overhead, while general-purpose LLMs often provide inaccurate responses in specialized contexts due to reliance on generalized training data. To address this, we propose ARIA (Adaptive Retrieval Intelligence Assistant), a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework for creating intelligent teaching assistants across university-level courses. ARIA leverages a multimodal content extraction pipeline combining Docling for structured document analysis, Nougat for mathematical formula recognition, and GPT-4 Vision API for diagram interpretation, with the e5-large-v2 embedding model for high semantic performance and low latency. This enables accurate processing of complex educational materials while maintaining pedagogical consistency through engineered prompts and response controls. We evaluate ARIA using lecture material from Statics and Mechanics of Materials, a sophomore-level civil engineering course at Johns Hopkins University, benchmarking against ChatGPT-5. Results demonstrate 97.5% accuracy in domain-specific question filtering and superior pedagogical performance. ARIA correctly answered all 20 relevant course questions while rejecting 58 of 60 non-relevant queries, achieving 90.9% precision, 100% recall, and 4.89/5.0 average response quality. These findings demonstrate that ARIA's course-agnostic architecture represents a scalable framework for domain-specific educational AI deployment.

AI.tldr: ARIA是一个基于检索增强生成(RAG)的智能教学助手框架，专门针对大学课程设计，通过多模态内容提取和语义检索解决LLM在专业教育领域的幻觉、知识更新和领域专业知识不足问题。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型在专业教育应用中存在幻觉、知识更新有限和缺乏领域专业知识等问题，微调需要完整模型重训练计算成本高，而通用LLM在专业上下文中常提供不准确回答。
AI.method: 提出ARIA框架，采用多模态内容提取管道（Docling结构化文档分析、Nougat数学公式识别、GPT-4 Vision API图表解释），结合e5-large-v2嵌入模型进行高效语义检索，通过工程化提示和响应控制保持教学一致性。
AI.result: 在约翰霍普金斯大学土木工程静力学与材料力学课程材料上评估，ARIA在领域特定问题过滤中达到97.5%准确率，正确回答了所有20个相关课程问题，拒绝了60个非相关查询中的58个，实现90.9%精确率、100%召回率和4.89/5.0平均响应质量。
AI.conclusion: ARIA的课程无关架构代表了领域特定教育AI部署的可扩展框架，展示了RAG方法在专业教育应用中的有效性。

title: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Data for Recommender Systems
summary: In recommender systems, collecting, storing, and processing large-scale interaction data is increasingly costly in terms of time, energy, and computation, yet it remains unclear when additional data stops providing meaningful gains. This paper investigates how offline recommendation performance evolves as the size of the training dataset increases and whether a saturation point can be observed. We implemented a reproducible Python evaluation workflow with two established toolkits, LensKit and RecBole, included 11 large public datasets with at least 7 million interactions, and evaluated 10 tool-algorithm combinations. Using absolute stratified user sampling, we trained models on nine sample sizes from 100,000 to 100,000,000 interactions and measured NDCG@10. Overall, raw NDCG usually increased with sample size, with no observable saturation point. To make result groups comparable, we applied min-max normalization within each group, revealing a clear positive trend in which around 75% of the points at the largest completed sample size also achieved the group's best observed performance. A late-stage slope analysis over the final 10-30% of each group further supported this upward trend: the interquartile range remained entirely non-negative with a median near 1.0. In summary, for traditional recommender systems on typical user-item interaction data, incorporating more training data remains primarily beneficial, while weaker scaling behavior is concentrated in atypical dataset cases and in the algorithmic outlier RecBole BPR under our setup.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨推荐系统中训练数据规模对性能的影响，发现即使数据量达到1亿次交互，传统推荐系统性能仍持续提升，未观察到明显的饱和点。
AI.motivation: 随着推荐系统中收集、存储和处理大规模交互数据的成本不断增加，需要明确何时额外数据不再带来显著性能提升，以优化资源使用效率。
AI.method: 使用可复现的Python评估流程，结合LensKit和RecBole两个工具包，在11个大型公共数据集（至少700万次交互）上评估10种工具-算法组合。采用绝对分层用户采样，在9个样本规模（10万到1亿次交互）上训练模型，测量NDCG@10指标。
AI.result: 原始NDCG通常随样本规模增加而提升，未观察到饱和点。通过组内最小-最大归一化后，约75%的最大样本规模点达到了组内最佳性能。后期斜率分析显示，最后10-30%数据的中位斜率接近1.0，表明性能持续增长。
AI.conclusion: 对于基于典型用户-物品交互数据的传统推荐系统，增加训练数据仍然主要是有益的，较弱的扩展行为仅出现在非典型数据集和特定算法（RecBole BPR）中。

title: Adaptive Differential Privacy for Federated Medical Image Segmentation Across Diverse Modalities
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures. Accepted in SPIE Medical Imaging 2026. Recipient of CAD Best Paper Award: 1st Place, and Robert F. Wagner All-Conference Best Paper Award: Finalist
summary: Large volumes of medical data remain underutilized because centralizing distributed data is often infeasible due to strict privacy regulations and institutional constraints. In addition, models trained in centralized settings frequently fail to generalize across clinical sites because of heterogeneity in imaging protocols and continuously evolving data distributions arising from differences in scanners, acquisition parameters, and patient populations. Federated learning offers a promising solution by enabling collaborative model training without sharing raw data. However, incorporating differential privacy into federated learning, while essential for privacy guarantees, often leads to degraded accuracy, unstable convergence, and reduced generalization. In this work, we propose an adaptive differentially private federated learning (ADP-FL) framework for medical image segmentation that dynamically adjusts privacy mechanisms to better balance the privacy-utility trade-off. The proposed approach stabilizes training, significantly improves Dice scores and segmentation boundary quality, and maintains rigorous privacy guarantees. We evaluated ADP-FL across diverse imaging modalities and segmentation tasks, including skin lesion segmentation in dermoscopic images, kidney tumor segmentation in 3D CT scans, and brain tumor segmentation in multi-parametric MRI. Compared with conventional federated learning and standard differentially private federated learning, ADP-FL consistently achieves higher accuracy, improved boundary delineation, faster convergence, and greater training stability, with performance approaching that of non-private federated learning under the same privacy budgets. These results demonstrate the practical viability of ADP-FL for high-performance, privacy-preserving medical image segmentation in real-world federated settings.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，用于医学图像分割，动态调整隐私机制以平衡隐私-效用权衡，在保持严格隐私保证的同时显著提升分割精度和训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据因隐私法规和机构限制难以集中化利用，且集中训练模型难以泛化到不同临床站点。联邦学习虽能协作训练但不共享原始数据，但加入差分隐私会导致精度下降、收敛不稳定和泛化能力降低。
AI.method: 提出自适应差分隐私联邦学习框架ADP-FL，动态调整隐私机制以优化隐私-效用权衡。该方法稳定训练过程，提升Dice分数和分割边界质量，同时保持严格的隐私保证。
AI.result: 在多种成像模态和分割任务上评估ADP-FL，包括皮肤病变分割、肾脏肿瘤分割和脑肿瘤分割。相比传统联邦学习和标准差分隐私联邦学习，ADP-FL在相同隐私预算下达到更高精度、更好边界描绘、更快收敛和更强训练稳定性，性能接近非隐私联邦学习。
AI.conclusion: ADP-FL证明了在实际联邦设置中实现高性能、隐私保护的医学图像分割的可行性，为医疗AI应用提供了实用的隐私保护解决方案。

title: Operator Learning for Surrogate Modeling of Wave-Induced Forces from Sea Surface Waves
summary: Wave setup plays a significant role in transferring wave-induced energy to currents and causing an increase in water elevation. This excess momentum flux, known as radiation stress, motivates the coupling of circulation models with wave models to improve the accuracy of storm surge prediction, however, traditional numerical wave models are complex and computationally expensive. As a result, in practical coupled simulations, wave models are often executed at much coarser temporal resolution than circulation models. In this work, we explore the use of Deep Operator Networks (DeepONets) as a surrogate for the Simulating WAves Nearshore (SWAN) numerical wave model. The proposed surrogate model was tested on three distinct 1-D and 2-D steady-state numerical examples with variable boundary wave conditions and wind fields. When applied to a realistic numerical example of steady state wave simulation in Duck, NC, the model achieved consistently high accuracy in predicting the components of the radiation stress gradient and the significant wave height across representative scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该论文探索使用深度算子网络（DeepONets）作为SWAN数值波浪模型的替代模型，以提高耦合模拟中波浪建模的计算效率，特别是在风暴潮预测中。
AI.motivation: 传统数值波浪模型（如SWAN）复杂且计算成本高，导致在实际耦合模拟中波浪模型通常以比环流模型粗得多的时间分辨率运行。这限制了风暴潮预测的准确性，因为波浪设置（wave setup）在将波浪诱导能量传递给海流和引起水位上升方面起着重要作用。
AI.method: 使用深度算子网络（DeepONets）作为Simulating WAves Nearshore（SWAN）数值波浪模型的替代模型。该方法在具有可变边界波浪条件和风场的三个不同的1-D和2-D稳态数值示例上进行了测试。
AI.result: 在北卡罗来纳州Duck的稳态波浪模拟现实数值示例中，该模型在预测辐射应力梯度分量和有效波高方面实现了持续的高精度，适用于代表性场景。
AI.conclusion: 深度算子网络可以作为传统数值波浪模型的有效替代方案，显著提高计算效率，同时保持高精度，这对于改进风暴潮预测中的耦合模拟具有重要意义。

title: CWRNN-INVR: A Coupled WarpRNN based Implicit Neural Video Representation
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
summary: Implicit Neural Video Representation (INVR) has emerged as a novel approach for video representation and compression, using learnable grids and neural networks. Existing methods focus on developing new grid structures efficient for latent representation and neural network architectures with large representation capability, lacking the study on their roles in video representation. In this paper, the difference between INVR based on neural network and INVR based on grid is first investigated from the perspective of video information composition to specify their own advantages, i.e., neural network for general structure while grid for specific detail. Accordingly, an INVR based on mixed neural network and residual grid framework is proposed, where the neural network is used to represent the regular and structured information and the residual grid is used to represent the remaining irregular information in a video. A Coupled WarpRNN-based multi-scale motion representation and compensation module is specifically designed to explicitly represent the regular and structured information, thus terming our method as CWRNN-INVR. For the irregular information, a mixed residual grid is learned where the irregular appearance and motion information are represented together. The mixed residual grid can be combined with the coupled WarpRNN in a way that allows for network reuse. Experiments show that our method achieves the best reconstruction results compared with the existing methods, with an average PSNR of 33.73 dB on the UVG dataset under the 3M model and outperforms existing INVR methods in other downstream tasks. The code can be found at https://github.com/yiyang-sdu/CWRNN-INVR.git}{https://github.com/yiyang-sdu/CWRNN-INVR.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CWRNN-INVR方法，结合神经网络和残差网格进行隐式神经视频表示，神经网络处理规则结构信息，残差网格处理不规则细节，在UVG数据集上达到33.73dB PSNR最佳重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式神经视频表示方法主要关注网格结构效率和神经网络表示能力，但缺乏对它们在视频表示中各自角色的研究。本文旨在明确神经网络和网格在视频信息组成中的不同优势。
AI.method: 提出基于混合神经网络和残差网格的框架：1）使用耦合WarpRNN多尺度运动表示和补偿模块处理规则结构信息；2）学习混合残差网格共同表示不规则外观和运动信息；3）允许网络重用。
AI.result: 在UVG数据集上，3M模型下平均PSNR达到33.73dB，优于现有方法，在其他下游任务中也表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过明确区分神经网络和网格在视频表示中的角色，提出的CWRNN-INVR方法在视频重建质量上达到最佳效果，验证了混合框架的有效性。

title: Say Something Else: Rethinking Contextual Privacy as Information Sufficiency
summary: LLM agents increasingly draft messages on behalf of users, yet users routinely overshare sensitive information and disagree on what counts as private. Existing systems support only suppression (omitting sensitive information) and generalization (replacing information with an abstraction), and are typically evaluated on single isolated messages, leaving both the strategy space and evaluation setting incomplete. We formalize privacy-preserving LLM communication as an \textbf{Information Sufficiency (IS)} task, introduce \textbf{free-text pseudonymization} as a third strategy that replaces sensitive attributes with functionally equivalent alternatives, and propose a \textbf{conversational evaluation protocol} that assesses strategies under realistic multi-turn follow-up pressure. Across 792 scenarios spanning three power-relation types (institutional, peer, intimate) and three sensitivity categories (discrimination risk, social cost, boundary), we evaluate seven frontier LLMs on privacy at two granularities, covertness, and utility. Pseudonymization yields the strongest privacy\textendash utility tradeoff overall, and single-message evaluation systematically underestimates leakage, with generalization losing up to 16.3 percentage points of privacy under follow-up.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将隐私保护的LLM通信形式化为信息充分性任务，引入自由文本假名化作为第三种隐私策略，并设计对话式评估协议来评估多轮对话下的隐私保护效果。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理在代表用户起草消息时存在隐私保护不足的问题。现有系统仅支持抑制（省略敏感信息）和泛化（用抽象替换信息）两种策略，且通常在单条孤立消息上进行评估，这既限制了策略空间也简化了评估场景。
AI.method: 1. 将隐私保护的LLM通信形式化为信息充分性任务；2. 引入自由文本假名化作为第三种隐私策略（用功能等效的替代品替换敏感属性）；3. 提出对话式评估协议，在现实的多轮后续压力下评估策略；4. 在792个场景中评估7个前沿LLM，涵盖三种权力关系类型和三种敏感类别。
AI.result: 假名化在隐私-效用权衡方面表现最佳。单消息评估系统性低估了信息泄露，泛化策略在后续对话中隐私保护效果下降高达16.3个百分点。研究还发现不同权力关系和敏感类别下的隐私保护效果差异。
AI.conclusion: 自由文本假名化是有效的隐私保护策略，对话式评估协议能更准确地反映现实场景中的隐私风险。现有单消息评估方法存在局限性，需要更全面的评估框架来评估LLM通信中的隐私保护。

title: Learning Debt and Cost-Sensitive Bayesian Retraining: A Forecasting Operations Framework
summary: Forecasters often choose retraining schedules by convention rather than by an explicit decision rule. This paper gives that decision a posterior-space language. We define learning debt as the divergence between the deployed and continuously updated posteriors, define actionable staleness as the policy-relevant latent state, and derive a one-step Bayes retraining rule under an excess-loss formulation. In an online conjugate simulation using the exact Kullback-Leibler divergence between deployed and shadow normal-inverse-gamma posteriors, a debt-filter beats a default 10-period calendar baseline in 15 of 24 abrupt-shift cells, all 24 gradual-drift cells, and 17 of 24 variance-shift cells, and remains below the best fixed cadence in a grid of cadences (5, 10, 20, and 40 periods) in 10, 24, and 17 cells, respectively. Fixed-threshold CUSUM remains a strong benchmark, while a proxy filter built from indirect diagnostics performs poorly. A retrospective Airbnb production backtest shows how the same decision logic behaves around a known payment-policy shock.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个贝叶斯重训练决策框架，通过定义"学习债务"和"可操作陈旧性"来优化预测模型的重训练调度，而不是依赖传统的时间间隔规则。
AI.motivation: 预测者通常基于惯例而非明确的决策规则来选择重训练计划。本文旨在为这一决策提供一个后验空间的语言框架，使重训练决策更加系统和理论化。
AI.method: 定义学习债务为部署后验与连续更新后验之间的散度，定义可操作陈旧性为策略相关的潜在状态，并在超额损失公式下推导出一步贝叶斯重训练规则。使用精确的Kullback-Leibler散度在在线共轭模拟中评估性能。
AI.result: 在模拟实验中，债务过滤器在24个突变单元中的15个、24个渐变漂移单元的全部、24个方差变化单元中的17个中优于默认的10周期基准。在回顾性Airbnb生产回测中，该方法在已知支付政策冲击周围表现出良好的决策逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 该论文提出的贝叶斯重训练框架为预测模型的重训练调度提供了理论依据，在多种变化场景下优于传统固定间隔方法，为实际应用中的模型维护提供了更智能的决策支持。

title: A Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) Framework for High Fidelity Image Compression
comment: Accepted by IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON CIRCUITS AND SYSTEMS FOR VIDEO TECHNOLOGY
summary: With the great success of diffusion models in image generation, diffusion-based image compression is attracting increasing interests. However, due to the random noise introduced in the diffusion learning, they usually produce reconstructions with deviation from the original images, leading to suboptimal compression results. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a Noise Constrained Diffusion (NC-Diffusion) framework for high fidelity image compression. Unlike existing diffusion-based compression methods that add random Gaussian noise and direct the noise into the image space, the proposed NC-Diffusion formulates the quantization noise originally added in the learned image compression as the noise in the forward process of diffusion. Then a noise constrained diffusion process is constructed from the ground-truth image to the initial compression result generated with quantization noise. The NC-Diffusion overcomes the problem of noise mismatch between compression and diffusion, significantly improving the inference efficiency. In addition, an adaptive frequency-domain filtering module is developed to enhance the skip connections in the U-Net based diffusion architecture, in order to enhance high-frequency details. Moreover, a zero-shot sample-guided enhancement method is designed to further improve the fidelity of the image. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method can achieve the best performance compared with existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出NC-Diffusion框架用于高保真图像压缩，通过将量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声，解决传统扩散压缩中的噪声不匹配问题，显著提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成方面取得巨大成功，但基于扩散的图像压缩方法由于引入随机噪声，通常会产生与原始图像有偏差的重建结果，导致压缩效果不佳。需要解决噪声不匹配问题以提高压缩保真度。
AI.method: 1. 提出噪声约束扩散(NC-Diffusion)框架，将学习图像压缩中添加的量化噪声作为扩散前向过程的噪声；2. 构建从真实图像到带量化噪声的初始压缩结果的噪声约束扩散过程；3. 开发自适应频域滤波模块增强U-Net架构中的跳跃连接以提升高频细节；4. 设计零样本样本引导增强方法进一步提高图像保真度。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法能够获得最佳性能，显著提高了压缩效率和重建质量。
AI.conclusion: NC-Diffusion框架有效解决了扩散压缩中的噪声不匹配问题，通过量化噪声约束、频域滤波增强和零样本引导等方法，实现了高保真图像压缩，在推理效率和重建质量方面均表现出色。

title: Anticipating tipping in spatiotemporal systems with machine learning
summary: In nonlinear dynamical systems, tipping refers to a critical transition from one steady state to another, typically catastrophic, steady state, often resulting from a saddle-node bifurcation. Recently, the machine-learning framework of parameter-adaptable reservoir computing has been applied to predict tipping in systems described by low-dimensional stochastic differential equations. However, anticipating tipping in complex spatiotemporal dynamical systems remains a significant open problem. The ability to forecast not only the occurrence but also the precise timing of such tipping events is crucial for providing the actionable lead time necessary for timely mitigation. By utilizing the mathematical approach of non-negative matrix factorization to generate dimensionally reduced spatiotemporal data as input, we exploit parameter-adaptable reservoir computing to accurately anticipate tipping. We demonstrate that the tipping time can be identified within a narrow prediction window across a variety of spatiotemporal dynamical systems, as well as in CMIP5 (Coupled Model Intercomparison Project 5) climate projections. Furthermore, we show that this reservoir-computing framework, utilizing reduced input data, is robust against common forecasting challenges and significantly alleviates the computational overhead associated with processing full spatiotemporal data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合非负矩阵分解降维和参数自适应储备池计算的方法，用于预测复杂时空动力系统中的临界转变（tipping）及其精确时间
AI.motivation: 非线性动力系统中的临界转变（从一种稳态到另一种通常灾难性的稳态）预测是重要问题。现有方法主要针对低维随机微分方程，但复杂时空动力系统中的临界转变预测仍是一个重大开放问题。准确预测转变发生及其精确时间对于提供足够的预警时间至关重要。
AI.method: 1. 使用非负矩阵分解（NMF）对时空数据进行降维处理；2. 将降维后的数据作为输入，采用参数自适应储备池计算（parameter-adaptable reservoir computing）框架；3. 该框架能够处理降维输入数据，减轻计算负担。
AI.result: 1. 能够在多种时空动力系统中准确识别临界转变时间，预测窗口狭窄；2. 在CMIP5气候预测模型中验证了方法的有效性；3. 该方法对常见预测挑战具有鲁棒性；4. 使用降维输入数据显著减轻了处理完整时空数据的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 提出的结合非负矩阵分解和参数自适应储备池计算的框架能够有效预测复杂时空动力系统中的临界转变及其精确时间，具有计算效率和鲁棒性优势，在气候预测等实际应用中具有价值。

title: Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1). AgileLens: A scalable CNN-based pipeline for strong gravitational lens identification
summary: We present an end-to-end, iterative pipeline for efficient identification of strong galaxy--galaxy lensing systems, applied to the Euclid Q1 imaging data. Starting from VIS catalogues, we reject point sources, apply a magnitude cut (I$_E$ $\leq$ 24) on deflectors, and run a pixel-level artefact/noise filter to build 96 $\times$ 96 pix cutouts; VIS+NISP colour composites are constructed with a VIS-anchored luminance scheme that preserves VIS morphology and NISP colour contrast. A VIS-only seed classifier supplies clear positives and typical impostors, from which we curate a morphology-balanced negative set and augment scarce positives. Among the six CNNs studied initially, a modified VGG16 (GlobalAveragePooling + 256/128 dense layers with the last nine layers trainable) performs best; the training set grows from 27 seed lenses (augmented to 1809) plus 2000 negatives to a colour dataset of 30,686 images. After three rounds of iterative fine-tuning, human grading of the top 4000 candidates ranked by the final model yields 441 Grade A/B candidate lensing systems, including 311 overlapping with the existing Q1 strong-lens catalogue, and 130 additional A/B candidates (9 As and 121 Bs) not previously reported. Independently, the model recovers 740 out of 905 (81.8%) candidate Q1 lenses within its top 20,000 predictions, considering off-centred samples. Candidates span I$_E$ $\simeq$ 17--24 AB mag (median 21.3 AB mag) and are redder in Y$_E$--H$_E$ than the parent population, consistent with massive early-type deflectors. Each training iteration required a week for a small team, and the approach easily scales to future Euclid releases; future work will calibrate the selection function via lens injection, extend recall through uncertainty-aware active learning, explore multi-scale or attention-based neural networks with fast post-hoc vetters that incorporate lens models into the classification.

AI.tldr: 提出一个端到端的迭代流程，用于高效识别强引力透镜系统，应用于欧几里得Q1成像数据，通过迭代微调CNN模型，从30,686张图像中识别出441个A/B级候选透镜系统。
AI.motivation: 欧几里得任务产生了大量天文数据，需要高效自动化的方法来识别强引力透镜系统。传统方法效率低下，需要开发基于深度学习的自动化流程来加速发现过程。
AI.method: 1) 从VIS星表开始，剔除点源，对偏折体应用星等截断(I_E ≤ 24)，运行像素级伪影/噪声滤波器构建96×96像素切图；2) 使用VIS锚定的亮度方案构建VIS+NISP彩色合成图像；3) 使用VIS-only种子分类器提供清晰正样本和典型假样本；4) 从六个CNN中选出改进的VGG16架构；5) 进行三轮迭代微调，训练集从27个种子透镜扩展到30,686张图像。
AI.result: 最终模型从排名前4000的候选者中识别出441个A/B级候选透镜系统，包括311个与现有Q1强透镜星表重叠的候选者，以及130个新发现的候选者(9个A级和121个B级)。模型在其前20,000个预测中恢复了905个候选Q1透镜中的740个(81.8%)。
AI.conclusion: 该迭代流程成功应用于欧几里得Q1数据，能够高效识别强引力透镜系统。方法可扩展到未来欧几里得数据发布，未来工作将通过透镜注入校准选择函数，通过不确定性感知的主动学习扩展召回率，探索多尺度或基于注意力的神经网络。

title: Spatiotemporal Gaussian representation-based dynamic reconstruction and motion estimation framework for time-resolved volumetric MR imaging (DREME-GSMR)
summary: Time-resolved volumetric MR imaging that reconstructs a 3D MRI within sub-seconds to resolve deformable motion is essential for motion-adaptive radiotherapy. Representing patient anatomy and associated motion fields as 3D Gaussians, we developed a spatiotemporal Gaussian representation-based framework (DREME-GSMR), which enables time-resolved dynamic MRI reconstruction from a pre-treatment 3D MR scan without any prior anatomical/motion model. DREME-GSMR represents a reference MRI volume and a corresponding low-rank motion model (as motion-basis components) using 3D Gaussians, and incorporates a dual-path MLP/CNN motion encoder to estimate temporal motion coefficients of the motion model from raw k-space-derived signals. Furthermore, using the solved motion model, DREME-GSMR can infer motion coefficients directly from new online k-space data, allowing subsequent intra-treatment volumetric MR imaging and motion tracking (real-time imaging). A motion-augmentation strategy is further introduced to improve robustness to unseen motion patterns during real-time imaging. DREME-GSMR was evaluated on the XCAT digital phantom, a physical motion phantom, and MR-LINAC datasets acquired from 6 healthy volunteers and 20 patients (with independent sequential scans for cross-evaluation). DREME-GSMR reconstructs MRIs of a ~400ms temporal resolution, with an inference time of ~10ms/volume. In XCAT experiments, DREME-GSMR achieved mean(s.d.) SSIM, tumor center-of-mass-error(COME), and DSC of 0.92(0.01)/0.91(0.02), 0.50(0.15)/0.65(0.19) mm, and 0.92(0.02)/0.92(0.03) for dynamic reconstruction/real-time imaging. For the physical phantom, the mean target COME was 1.19(0.94)/1.40(1.15) mm for dynamic/real-time imaging, while for volunteers and patients, the mean liver COME for real-time imaging was 1.31(0.82) and 0.96(0.64) mm, respectively.

AI.tldr: DREME-GSMR：一种基于时空高斯表示的动态MRI重建框架，用于放疗中的实时运动跟踪，无需先验解剖/运动模型，实现约400ms时间分辨率和10ms/体积的推理时间。
AI.motivation: 放疗需要时间分辨的3D MRI来解析可变形运动，以实现运动自适应放疗。现有方法通常需要先验解剖或运动模型，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 使用3D高斯表示参考MRI体积和低秩运动模型，结合双路径MLP/CNN运动编码器从k空间信号估计时间运动系数，并引入运动增强策略提高对未见运动模式的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在XCAT数字体模、物理运动体模和MR-LINAC数据集上评估，实现约400ms时间分辨率，推理时间约10ms/体积。XCAT实验中SSIM达0.92/0.91，肿瘤中心质量误差0.50/0.65mm；物理体模目标误差1.19/1.40mm；志愿者和患者肝脏误差分别为1.31mm和0.96mm。
AI.conclusion: DREME-GSMR能够从治疗前3D MR扫描重建时间分辨动态MRI，无需先验模型，支持实时成像和运动跟踪，为运动自适应放疗提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: 4D Vessel Reconstruction for Benchtop Thrombectomy Analysis
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures, 1 table, supplementary material (3 tables, 3 figures, and 11 videos). Project page: https://ethanuser.github.io/vessel4D/
summary:
Introduction: Mechanical thrombectomy can cause vessel deformation and procedure-related injury. Benchtop models are widely used for device testing, but time-resolved, full-field 3D vessel-motion measurements remain limited.
  Methods: We developed a nine-camera, low-cost multi-view workflow for benchtop thrombectomy in silicone middle cerebral artery phantoms (2160p, 20 fps). Multi-view videos were calibrated, segmented, and reconstructed with 4D Gaussian Splatting. Reconstructed point clouds were converted to fixed-connectivity edge graphs for region-of-interest (ROI) displacement tracking and a relative surface-based stress proxy. Stress-proxy values were derived from edge stretch using a Neo-Hookean mapping and reported as comparative surface metrics. A synthetic Blender pipeline with known deformation provided geometric and temporal validation.
  Results: In synthetic bulk translation, the stress proxy remained near zero for most edges (median $\approx$ 0 MPa; 90th percentile 0.028 MPa), with sparse outliers. In synthetic pulling (1-5 mm), reconstruction showed close geometric and temporal agreement with ground truth, with symmetric Chamfer distance of 1.714-1.815 mm and precision of 0.964-0.972 at $τ= 1$ mm. In preliminary benchtop comparative trials (one trial per condition), cervical aspiration catheter placement showed higher max-median ROI displacement and stress-proxy values than internal carotid artery terminus placement.
  Conclusion: The proposed protocol provides standardized, time-resolved surface kinematics and comparative relative displacement and stress proxy measurements for thrombectomy benchtop studies. The framework supports condition-to-condition comparisons and methods validation, while remaining distinct from absolute wall-stress estimation. Implementation code and example data are available at https://ethanuser.github.io/vessel4D

AI.tldr: 开发了一个低成本多视角工作流，用于血栓切除术硅胶模型中的血管运动测量，通过4D高斯溅射重建和表面应力代理分析，支持标准化比较和验证。
AI.motivation: 机械血栓切除术可能导致血管变形和手术相关损伤。虽然台式模型广泛用于设备测试，但时间分辨的全场3D血管运动测量仍然有限，需要开发标准化的测量方法。
AI.method: 开发了九相机低成本多视角工作流，用于硅胶大脑中动脉模型的血栓切除术测试。使用4D高斯溅射进行多视角视频校准、分割和重建，将重建点云转换为固定连接边图，用于感兴趣区域位移跟踪和相对表面应力代理分析。通过Blender合成管道进行几何和时间验证。
AI.result: 在合成批量平移中，应力代理值接近零；在合成拉伸中，重建与地面真实值在几何和时间上高度一致。初步台式比较试验显示，颈动脉抽吸导管放置比颈内动脉末端放置产生更高的最大中位ROI位移和应力代理值。
AI.conclusion: 该协议为血栓切除术台式研究提供了标准化、时间分辨的表面运动学和相对位移/应力代理测量，支持条件间比较和方法验证，但不同于绝对壁应力估计。

title: Soft-Quantum Algorithms
summary: Quantum operations on pure states can be fully represented by unitary matrices. Variational quantum circuits, also known as quantum neural networks, embed data and trainable parameters into gate-based operations and optimize the parameters via gradient descent. The high cost of training and low fidelity of current quantum devices, however, restricts much of quantum machine learning to classical simulation. For few-qubit problems with large datasets, training the matrix elements directly, as is done with weight matrices in classical neural networks, can be faster than decomposing data and parameters into gates. We propose a method that trains matrices directly while maintaining unitarity through a single regularization term added to the loss function. A second training step, circuit alignment, then recovers a gate-based architecture from the resulting soft-unitary. On a five-qubit supervised classification task with 1000 datapoints, this two-step process produces a trained variational circuit in under four minutes, compared to over two hours for direct circuit training, while achieving lower binary cross-entropy loss.
